#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <vector>\n#include <unordered_map>\n#include <algorithm>\nusing namespace std;\n\nvector<vector<string>> groupAnagrams(const vector<string>& strs) {\n    unordered_map<string, vector<string>> groups;\n    \n    for(const string& str : strs) {\n        string sorted = str;\n        sort(sorted.begin(), sorted.end());\n        groups[sorted].push_back(str);\n    }\n    \n    vector<vector<string>> result;\n    for(const auto& pair : groups) {\n        result.push_back(pair.second);\n    }\n    \n    return result;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    vector<string> strs = {\"eat\", \"tea\", \"tan\", \"ate\", \"nat\", \"bat\"};\n    vector<vector<string>> groups = groupAnagrams(strs);\n    \n    cout << \"Группы анаграмм:\" << endl;\n    for(const auto& group : groups) {\n        for(const string& word : group) {\n            cout << word << \" \";\n        }\n        cout << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <functional>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Button {\n    vector<function<void()>> observers;\npublic:\n    void addObserver(function<void()> obs) {\n        observers.push_back(obs);\n    }\n    void click() {\n        for (auto& obs : observers) {\n            obs();\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Button btn;\n    btn.addObserver([]{ cout << \"Observer 1: Button clicked!\" << endl; });\n    btn.addObserver([]{ cout << \"Observer 2: Action performed.\" << endl; });\n    btn.click();\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <memory>\n#include <vector>\n#include <algorithm>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Resource {\n    int id;\n    bool inUse;\npublic:\n    Resource(int i) : id(i), inUse(false) {}\n    void acquire() {\n        inUse = true;\n        cout << \"Resource \" << id << \" acquired\" << endl;\n    }\n    void release() {\n        inUse = false;\n        cout << \"Resource \" << id << \" released\" << endl;\n    }\n    bool isInUse() const { return inUse; }\n    int getId() const { return id; }\n};\n\nclass ResourcePool {\n    vector<unique_ptr<Resource>> pool;\npublic:\n    ResourcePool(int size) {\n        for (int i = 0; i < size; ++i) {\n            pool.push_back(make_unique<Resource>(i));\n        }\n    }\n    Resource* acquireResource() {\n        auto it = find_if(pool.begin(), pool.end(),\n                          [](const unique_ptr<Resource>& r) { return !r->isInUse(); });\n        if (it != pool.end()) {\n            (*it)->acquire();\n            return it->get();\n        }\n        return nullptr;\n    }\n    void releaseResource(int id) {\n        auto it = find_if(pool.begin(), pool.end(),\n                          [id](const unique_ptr<Resource>& r) { return r->getId() == id; });\n        if (it != pool.end()) {\n            (*it)->release();\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    ResourcePool pool(3);\n    auto* res1 = pool.acquireResource();\n    auto* res2 = pool.acquireResource();\n    if (res2) pool.releaseResource(res2->getId());\n    auto* res3 = pool.acquireResource();\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <tuple>\n#include <string>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    const tuple<int, string, double> const_tup(42, \"answer\", 3.14);\n    \n    cout << \"const tuple: \" << get<0>(const_tup) << \", \" \n         << get<1>(const_tup) << \", \" << get<2>(const_tup) << endl;\n    \n    tuple<int, string, double> mutable_tup(1, \"test\", 2.71);\n    get<0>(mutable_tup) = 100;\n    \n    const auto& const_ref = mutable_tup;\n    cout << \"via const ref: \" << get<0>(const_ref) << endl;\n    \n    const auto& [c_int, c_str, c_dbl] = const_tup;\n    cout << \"structured binding: \" << c_int << \", \" << c_str << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <algorithm>\nusing namespace std;\n\n// Перечисление с пропущенными значениями\nenum ErrorCode {\n SUCCESS = 0,\n FILE_NOT_FOUND = 10,\n PERMISSION_DENIED = 20,\n INVALID_DATA = 30,\n TIMEOUT = 40,\n UNKNOWN_ERROR = 99\n};\n\n// Функция для получения строкового представления кода ошибки\nstring errorCodeToString(ErrorCode code) {\n switch(code) {\n case SUCCESS: return \"SUCCESS\";\n case FILE_NOT_FOUND: return \"FILE_NOT_FOUND\";\n case PERMISSION_DENIED: return \"PERMISSION_DENIED\";\n case INVALID_DATA: return \"INVALID_DATA\";\n case TIMEOUT: return \"TIMEOUT\";\n case UNKNOWN_ERROR: return \"UNKNOWN_ERROR\";\n default: return \"INVALID_CODE\";\n }\n}\n\n// Функция для проверки, находится ли код в диапазоне известных ошибок\nbool isInErrorRange(int code) {\n return (code >= FILE_NOT_FOUND && code <= TIMEOUT);\n}\n\nint main() {\n // 1. Демонстрация перечисления\n cout << \"=== Демонстрация перечисления с пропущенными значениями ===\" << endl;\n \n vector<ErrorCode> allCodes = {SUCCESS, FILE_NOT_FOUND, PERMISSION_DENIED, \n INVALID_DATA, TIMEOUT, UNKNOWN_ERROR};\n \n for (ErrorCode code : allCodes) {\n cout << \"Код: \" << static_cast<int>(code) \n << \", Имя: \" << errorCodeToString(code) << endl;\n }\n \n // 2. Итерация по диапазону числовых значений\n cout << \"\\n=== Итерация по диапазону от \" << FILE_NOT_FOUND \n << \" до \" << TIMEOUT << \" ===\" << endl;\n \n for (int i = FILE_NOT_FOUND; i <= TIMEOUT; i++) {\n cout << \"Значение \" << i << \": \";\n if (isInErrorRange(i)) {\n // Пытаемся найти соответствующий enum\n bool found = false;\n for (ErrorCode code : allCodes) {\n if (static_cast<int>(code) == i) {\n cout << \"соответствует \" << errorCodeToString(code);\n found = true;\n break;\n }\n }\n if (!found) {\n cout << \"нет соответствующего enum (пропущенное значение)\";\n }\n } else {\n cout << \"вне диапазона известных ошибок\";\n }\n cout << endl;\n }\n \n // 3. Демонстрация пропущенных значений\n cout << \"\\n=== Проверка пропущенных значений ===\" << endl;\n vector<int> testValues = {0, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, 35, 40, 99, 100};\n \n for (int val : testValues) {\n cout << \"Значение \" << val << \": \";\n if (isInErrorRange(val)) {\n cout << \"в диапазоне ошибок\";\n } else {\n cout << \"вне диапазона ошибок\";\n }\n cout << endl;\n }\n \n // 4. Использование enum в условиях\n cout << \"\\n=== Использование enum в условиях ===\" << endl;\n ErrorCode currentError = PERMISSION_DENIED;\n \n switch(currentError) {\n case SUCCESS:\n cout << \"Операция успешно завершена\" << endl;\n break;\n case FILE_NOT_FOUND:\n case PERMISSION_DENIED:\n case INVALID_DATA:\n case TIMEOUT:\n cout << \"Произошла ошибка: \" << errorCodeToString(currentError) << endl;\n break;\n case UNKNOWN_ERROR:\n cout << \"Неизвестная ошибка\" << endl;\n break;\n }\n \n return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\nusing namespace std;\n\nstruct BankAccount {\n    string accountNumber;\n    double balance;\n};\n\nvoid deposit(BankAccount& account, double amount) {\n    account.balance += amount;\n}\n\nbool withdraw(BankAccount& account, double amount) {\n    if (amount <= account.balance) {\n        account.balance -= amount;\n        return true;\n    }\n    return false;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    BankAccount account = {\"123456789\", 1000.0};\n    \n    deposit(account, 500.0);\n    cout << \"Баланс после внесения: \" << account.balance << endl;\n    \n    if (withdraw(account, 200.0)) {\n        cout << \"Снятие успешно. Новый баланс: \" << account.balance << endl;\n    } else {\n        cout << \"Недостаточно средств.\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <unordered_set>\n#include <memory>\n#include <algorithm>\nusing namespace std;\n\ntemplate<typename T>\nclass CyclicGC {\n    struct Edge;\n    \n    struct Node {\n        T* object;\n        int refCount;\n        bool marked;\n        vector<Edge*> incoming;\n        vector<Edge*> outgoing;\n        \n        Node(T* obj) : object(obj), refCount(0), marked(false) {}\n        \n        ~Node() {\n            delete object;\n        }\n    };\n    \n    struct Edge {\n        Node* from;\n        Node* to;\n        \n        Edge(Node* f, Node* t) : from(f), to(t) {}\n    };\n    \n    static unordered_set<Node*> nodes;\n    static unordered_set<Edge*> edges;\n    \n    Node* node;\n    \n    static void addEdge(Node* from, Node* to) {\n        Edge* edge = new Edge(from, to);\n        from->outgoing.push_back(edge);\n        to->incoming.push_back(edge);\n        edges.insert(edge);\n    }\n    \n    static void removeEdge(Edge* edge) {\n        auto& fromOut = edge->from->outgoing;\n        fromOut.erase(remove(fromOut.begin(), fromOut.end(), edge), fromOut.end());\n        \n        auto& toIn = edge->to->incoming;\n        toIn.erase(remove(toIn.begin(), toIn.end(), edge), toIn.end());\n        \n        edges.erase(edge);\n        delete edge;\n    }\n    \n    static void mark(Node* node) {\n        if(node->marked) return;\n        \n        node->marked = true;\n        for(Edge* edge : node->outgoing) {\n            mark(edge->to);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    static void sweep() {\n        vector<Node*> toDelete;\n        \n        for(Node* node : nodes) {\n            if(!node->marked && node->refCount == 0) {\n                toDelete.push_back(node);\n            }\n            node->marked = false;\n        }\n        \n        for(Node* node : toDelete) {\n            vector<Edge*> edgesToRemove = node->incoming;\n            edgesToRemove.insert(edgesToRemove.end(), node->outgoing.begin(), node->outgoing.end());\n            \n            for(Edge* edge : edgesToRemove) {\n                removeEdge(edge);\n            }\n            \n            nodes.erase(node);\n            delete node;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    static void collect() {\n        for(Node* node : nodes) {\n            if(node->refCount > 0) {\n                mark(node);\n            }\n        }\n        \n        sweep();\n    }\n    \npublic:\n    CyclicGC(T* ptr = nullptr) {\n        if(ptr) {\n            node = new Node(ptr);\n            nodes.insert(node);\n            node->refCount = 1;\n        } else {\n            node = nullptr;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    CyclicGC(const CyclicGC& other) : node(other.node) {\n        if(node) node->refCount++;\n    }\n    \n    CyclicGC& operator=(const CyclicGC& other) {\n        if(this != &other) {\n            if(node && --node->refCount == 0) {\n                collect();\n            }\n            node = other.node;\n            if(node) node->refCount++;\n        }\n        return *this;\n    }\n    \n    void linkTo(CyclicGC& other) {\n        if(node && other.node) {\n            addEdge(node, other.node);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    T& operator*() const { return *node->object; }\n    T* operator->() const { return node->object; }\n    \n    explicit operator bool() const { return node != nullptr; }\n    \n    ~CyclicGC() {\n        if(node && --node->refCount == 0) {\n            collect();\n        }\n    }\n    \n    static void printStats() {\n        cout << \"Nodes: \" << nodes.size() << \", Edges: \" << edges.size() << endl;\n    }\n};\n\ntemplate<typename T>\nunordered_set<typename CyclicGC<T>::Node*> CyclicGC<T>::nodes;\n\ntemplate<typename T>\nunordered_set<typename CyclicGC<T>::Edge*> CyclicGC<T>::edges;\n\nint main() {\n    struct TestObject {\n        int id;\n        TestObject(int i) : id(i) {}\n    };\n    \n    CyclicGC<TestObject> a(new TestObject(1));\n    CyclicGC<TestObject> b(new TestObject(2));\n    \n    a.linkTo(b);\n    b.linkTo(a);\n    \n    CyclicGC<TestObject>::printStats();\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <stdexcept>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass BorrowableResource {\n    int* data;\n    bool borrowed;\npublic:\n    BorrowableResource() : data(new int(0)), borrowed(false) {\n        cout << \"Resource created\" << endl;\n    }\n    ~BorrowableResource() {\n        delete data;\n        cout << \"Resource destroyed\" << endl;\n    }\n    class Borrower {\n        BorrowableResource& owner;\n        int*& ptr;\n    public:\n        explicit Borrower(BorrowableResource& res) : owner(res), ptr(res.data) {\n            if (owner.borrowed) throw runtime_error(\"Resource already borrowed\");\n            owner.borrowed = true;\n            cout << \"Resource borrowed\" << endl;\n        }\n        ~Borrower() {\n            owner.borrowed = false;\n            cout << \"Resource returned\" << endl;\n        }\n        int* get() const { return ptr; }\n        Borrower(const Borrower&) = delete;\n        Borrower& operator=(const Borrower&) = delete;\n    };\n    Borrower borrow() {\n        return Borrower(*this);\n    }\n    void set(int value) {\n        if (borrowed) throw runtime_error(\"Cannot modify while borrowed\");\n        *data = value;\n    }\n    int get() const { return *data; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    BorrowableResource res;\n    res.set(42);\n    cout << \"Value: \" << res.get() << endl;\n    {\n        auto borrower = res.borrow();\n        int* ptr = borrower.get();\n        cout << \"Borrowed pointer: \" << *ptr << endl;\n    }\n    res.set(100);\n    cout << \"New value: \" << res.get() << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    int arr[] = {1, 1, 2, 2, 3, 4, 4, 5, 5};\n    int size = sizeof(arr) / sizeof(arr[0]);\n    \n    if (size == 0) {\n        cout << \"Массив пуст\" << endl;\n        return 0;\n    }\n    \n    int uniqueIndex = 0;\n    for (int i = 1; i < size; i++) {\n        if (arr[i] != arr[uniqueIndex]) {\n            uniqueIndex++;\n            arr[uniqueIndex] = arr[i];\n        }\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"Массив без дубликатов (первые \" << uniqueIndex + 1 << \" элементов): \";\n    for (int i = 0; i <= uniqueIndex; i++) {\n        cout << arr[i] << \" \";\n    }\n    cout << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <string>\n#include <vector>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    vector<string> files = {\"data1.csv\", \"data2.csv\"};\n    ofstream merged(\"merged.csv\");\n    bool firstFile = true;\n    for (const string& fname : files) {\n        ifstream file(fname);\n        string line;\n        bool firstLine = true;\n        while (getline(file, line)) {\n            if (firstFile && firstLine) {\n                merged << line << endl; // Пишем заголовок только из первого файла\n            } else if (!firstLine) {\n                merged << line << endl; // Пропускаем заголовки в последующих файлах\n            }\n            firstLine = false;\n        }\n        file.close();\n        firstFile = false;\n    }\n    merged.close();\n    cout << \"CSV files merged.\\n\";\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n double side;\n cout << \"Введите длину ребра правильного тетраэдра:\";\n cin >> side;\n \n if (side <= 0) {\n cout << \"Ошибка: длина ребра должна быть положительной!\" << endl;\n return 1;\n }\n \n double volume = (side * side * side) / (6.0 * sqrt(2.0));\n cout << \"Объем правильного тетраэдра: \" << volume << endl;\n return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nint main() {\n    int arr[5] = {1, 2, 3, 4, 5};\n    \n    std::cout << \"Элементы массива:\" << std::endl;\n    for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {\n        std::cout << \"arr[\" << i << \"] = \" << arr[i] << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <algorithm>\n#include <iterator>\nusing namespace std;\n\ntemplate<typename Iterator>\nvoid quick_sort(Iterator first, Iterator last) {\n    if (distance(first, last) <= 1) return;\n    auto pivot = *next(first, distance(first, last) / 2);\n    Iterator middle1 = partition(first, last, [pivot](const auto& em) { return em < pivot; });\n    Iterator middle2 = partition(middle1, last, [pivot](const auto& em) { return !(pivot < em); });\n    quick_sort(first, middle1);\n    quick_sort(middle2, last);\n}\n\nint main() {\n    vector<int> vec = {9, 3, 7, 1, 5, 8, 2, 6, 4};\n    quick_sort(vec.begin(), vec.end());\n    cout << \"После быстрой сортировки: \";\n    for (int x : vec) cout << x << \" \";\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <cmath>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    double total;\n    int loyaltyYears;\n    string promoCode;\n    char seasonPeak;\n    \n    cout << \"Введите сумму покупки: \";\n    cin >> total;\n    cout << \"Введите стаж в годах по карте лояльности: \";\n    cin >> loyaltyYears;\n    cout << \"Введите промокод (или 'нет'): \";\n    cin >> promoCode;\n    cout << \"Высокий сезон? (y/n): \";\n    cin >> seasonPeak;\n    \n    double discount = 0.0;\n    \n    // Базовая скидка от суммы\n    if (total > 10000) {\n        discount = 15.0;\n    } else if (total > 5000) {\n        discount = 10.0;\n    } else if (total > 1000) {\n        discount = 5.0;\n    } else {\n        discount = 0.0;\n    }\n    \n    // Доп. скидка за стаж\n    switch (loyaltyYears) {\n        case 0: break;\n        case 1: case 2: discount += 2.0; break;\n        case 3: case 4: case 5: discount += 5.0; break;\n        default: discount += 7.0; break;\n    }\n    \n    // Промокод\n    if (promoCode == \"SUMMER25\") {\n        discount += 2.5;\n    } else if (promoCode == \"WINTER50\") {\n        discount += 5.0;\n    } else if (promoCode == \"MEGA10\") {\n        discount *= 1.1; // +10% к существующей скидке\n    }\n    \n    // Сезонный коэффициент (уменьшение скидки в высокий сезон)\n    if (seasonPeak == 'y' || seasonPeak == 'Y') {\n        discount = discount > 10.0 ? discount - 5.0 : discount / 2.0;\n    }\n    \n    // Ограничение максимальной скидки\n    discount = discount > 30.0 ? 30.0 : discount;\n    discount = discount < 0.0 ? 0.0 : discount;\n    \n    double finalTotal = total * (100.0 - discount) / 100.0;\n    \n    cout << \"\\nИтоговая скидка: \" << discount << \"%\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Сумма к оплате: \" << finalTotal << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass LazySegmentTree {\n    vector<int> tree, lazy;\n    int n;\n    void build(const vector<int>& arr, int node, int start, int end) {\n        if (start == end) {\n            tree[node] = arr[start];\n        } else {\n            int mid = (start + end) / 2;\n            build(arr, node * 2, start, mid);\n            build(arr, node * 2 + 1, mid + 1, end);\n            tree[node] = tree[node * 2] + tree[node * 2 + 1];\n        }\n    }\n    void updateRange(int node, int start, int end, int l, int r, int val) {\n        if (lazy[node] != 0) {\n            tree[node] += (end - start + 1) * lazy[node];\n            if (start != end) {\n                lazy[node * 2] += lazy[node];\n                lazy[node * 2 + 1] += lazy[node];\n            }\n            lazy[node] = 0;\n        }\n        if (start > r || end < l) return;\n        if (l <= start && end <= r) {\n            tree[node] += (end - start + 1) * val;\n            if (start != end) {\n                lazy[node * 2] += val;\n                lazy[node * 2 + 1] += val;\n            }\n            return;\n        }\n        int mid = (start + end) / 2;\n        updateRange(node * 2, start, mid, l, r, val);\n        updateRange(node * 2 + 1, mid + 1, end, l, r, val);\n        tree[node] = tree[node * 2] + tree[node * 2 + 1];\n    }\n    int queryRange(int node, int start, int end, int l, int r) {\n        if (lazy[node] != 0) {\n            tree[node] += (end - start + 1) * lazy[node];\n            if (start != end) {\n                lazy[node * 2] += lazy[node];\n                lazy[node * 2 + 1] += lazy[node];\n            }\n            lazy[node] = 0;\n        }\n        if (start > r || end < l) return 0;\n        if (l <= start && end <= r) return tree[node];\n        int mid = (start + end) / 2;\n        return queryRange(node * 2, start, mid, l, r) + queryRange(node * 2 + 1, mid + 1, end, l, r);\n    }\npublic:\n    LazySegmentTree(const vector<int>& arr) {\n        n = arr.size();\n        tree.resize(4 * n);\n        lazy.resize(4 * n, 0);\n        build(arr, 1, 0, n - 1);\n    }\n    void updateRange(int l, int r, int val) {\n        updateRange(1, 0, n - 1, l, r, val);\n    }\n    int queryRange(int l, int r) {\n        return queryRange(1, 0, n - 1, l, r);\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    vector<int> arr = {1, 3, 5, 7, 9, 11};\n    LazySegmentTree lst(arr);\n    cout << \"Сумма [1,3]: \" << lst.queryRange(1, 3) << endl;\n    lst.updateRange(1, 3, 2);\n    cout << \"Сумма [1,3] после прибавления 2: \" << lst.queryRange(1, 3) << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\n\nint main() {\n double a, b, c;\n std::cout << \"Введите три положительных числа:\";\n std::cin >> a >> b >> c;\n \n if (a <= 0 || b <= 0 || c <= 0) {\n std::cout << \"Ошибка: числа должны быть положительными!\" << std::endl;\n return 1;\n }\n \n double mean = (a + b + c) / 3.0;\n double variance = (a * a + b * b + c * c) / 3.0 - mean * mean;\n double std_dev = std::sqrt(variance);\n double cv = (std_dev / mean) * 100.0;\n \n std::cout << \"Коэффициент вариации: \" << cv << \"%\" << std::endl;\n return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Rectangle {\npublic:\n    int width, height;\n    Rectangle(int w, int h) : width(w), height(h) {}\n};\n\nclass Servant {\npublic:\n    static void move(Rectangle& rect, int x, int y) {\n        cout << \"Moving rectangle to (\" << x << \",\" << y << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Rectangle rect(10, 20);\n    Servant::move(rect, 5, 5);\n    return 0;\n}
#include <signal.h>\n#include <unistd.h>\n#include <sys/wait.h>\n#include <iostream>\n#include <cstring>\nusing namespace std;\nvoid handler(int sig, siginfo_t* info, void* context) {\n    cout << \"Received signal \" << sig << \" with value: \" << info->si_value.sival_int << endl;\n}\nint main() {\n    struct sigaction sa;\n    sa.sa_sigaction = handler;\n    sa.sa_flags = SA_SIGINFO;\n    sigemptyset(&sa.sa_mask);\n    sigaction(SIGUSR1, &sa, nullptr);\n    pid_t pid = fork();\n    if(pid == 0) {\n        sleep(1);\n        union sigval value;\n        value.sival_int = 42;\n        sigqueue(getppid(), SIGUSR1, value);\n        cout << \"Child sent signal with value 42\" << endl;\n        _exit(0);\n    } else {\n        cout << \"Parent waiting for signal...\" << endl;\n        pause();\n        wait(nullptr);\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <mutex>\n#include <thread>\n\nclass LockGuard {\n    std::mutex& mtx;\npublic:\n    explicit LockGuard(std::mutex& m) : mtx(m) { mtx.lock(); }\n    ~LockGuard() { mtx.unlock(); }\n    LockGuard(const LockGuard&) = delete;\n    LockGuard& operator=(const LockGuard&) = delete;\n};\n\nstd::mutex m;\nvoid print(int id) {\n    LockGuard lock(m);\n    std::cout << \"Thread \" << id << \" is working\" << std::endl;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::thread t1(print, 1);\n    std::thread t2(print, 2);\n    t1.join();\n    t2.join();\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Car {\npublic:\n    string engine;\n    string wheels;\n    void show() const { cout << \"Car with \" << engine << \" engine and \" << wheels << \" wheels\" << endl; }\n};\n\nclass Builder {\npublic:\n    virtual void buildEngine() = 0;\n    virtual void buildWheels() = 0;\n    virtual Car* getResult() = 0;\n};\n\nclass SportsCarBuilder : public Builder {\n    Car* car;\npublic:\n    SportsCarBuilder() { car = new Car(); }\n    void buildEngine() override { car->engine = \"V8 Turbo\"; }\n    void buildWheels() override { car->wheels = \"Sport Rims\"; }\n    Car* getResult() override { return car; }\n};\n\nclass Director {\n    Builder* builder;\npublic:\n    void setBuilder(Builder* b) { builder = b; }\n    Car* construct() {\n        builder->buildEngine();\n        builder->buildWheels();\n        return builder->getResult();\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    SportsCarBuilder builder;\n    Director director;\n    director.setBuilder(&builder);\n    Car* car = director.construct();\n    car->show();\n    delete car;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Base {\npublic:\n    static void* operator new(size_t size) {\n        cout << \"Base custom new, size = \" << size << endl;\n        return ::operator new(size);\n    }\n    static void operator delete(void* ptr) {\n        cout << \"Base custom delete\" << endl;\n        ::operator delete(ptr);\n    }\n};\n\nclass Derived : public Base {\n    int extra[10];\npublic:\n    static void* operator new(size_t size) {\n        cout << \"Derived custom new, size = \" << size << endl;\n        return ::operator new(size);\n    }\n    static void operator delete(void* ptr) {\n        cout << \"Derived custom delete\" << endl;\n        ::operator delete(ptr);\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Base* b = new Base();\n    delete b;\n    Derived* d = new Derived();\n    delete d;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <algorithm>\n\nbool areAnagrams(std::string str1, std::string str2) {\n    str1.erase(std::remove(str1.begin(), str1.end(), ' '), str1.end());\n    str2.erase(std::remove(str2.begin(), str2.end(), ' '), str2.end());\n    \n    if(str1.length() != str2.length()) return false;\n    \n    std::sort(str1.begin(), str1.end());\n    std::sort(str2.begin(), str2.end());\n    \n    return str1 == str2;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::string s1 = \"listen\";\n    std::string s2 = \"silent\";\n    std::string s3 = \"hello\";\n    \n    std::cout << s1 << \" и \" << s2 << (areAnagrams(s1, s2) ? \" - анаграммы\" : \" - не анаграммы\") << std::endl;\n    std::cout << s1 << \" и \" << s3 << (areAnagrams(s1, s3) ? \" - анаграммы\" : \" - не анаграммы\") << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nint main() {\n    int n;\n    \n    std::cout << \"Сколько чисел Фибоначчи вывести? \";\n    std::cin >> n;\n    \n    if (n <= 0) {\n        std::cout << \"Количество должно быть положительным!\" << std::endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    long long a = 0, b = 1;\n    std::cout << \"Числа Фибоначчи: \";\n    \n    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {\n        std::cout << a << \" \";\n        long long next = a + b;\n        a = b;\n        b = next;\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Battery {\nprivate:\n    int charge;\npublic:\n    Battery() : charge(100) {}\n    void discharge(int amount) {\n        charge -= amount;\n        if (charge < 0) charge = 0;\n        cout << \"Заряд: \" << charge << \"%\" << endl;\n    }\n    void recharge(int amount) {\n        charge += amount;\n        if (charge > 100) charge = 100;\n        cout << \"Заряд: \" << charge << \"%\" << endl;\n    }\n    int getCharge() const { return charge; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Battery battery;\n    battery.discharge(30);\n    battery.recharge(20);\n    battery.discharge(100);\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <chrono>\n#include <iomanip>\n#include <sstream>\n#include <filesystem>\nusing namespace std;\nnamespace fs = filesystem;\nclass RotatingLogger {\n    string baseName;\n    size_t maxSize;\n    int maxFiles;\n    ofstream currentFile;\n    size_t currentSize;\n    string getTimestamp() {\n        auto now = chrono::system_clock::now();\n        time_t time = chrono::system_clock::to_time_t(now);\n        stringstream ss;\n        ss << put_time(localtime(&time), \"%Y%m%d_%H%M%S\");\n        return ss.str();\n    }\n    void rotate() {\n        if(currentFile.is_open()) currentFile.close();\n        for(int i = maxFiles-1; i > 0; i--) {\n            string oldName = baseName + \".\" + to_string(i-1) + \".bin\";\n            string newName = baseName + \".\" + to_string(i) + \".bin\";\n            if(fs::exists(oldName)) fs::rename(oldName, newName);\n        }\n        currentFile.open(baseName + \".0.bin\", ios::binary | ios::app);\n        currentSize = 0;\n    }\npublic:\n    RotatingLogger(const string& name, size_t sizeMB, int files) \n        : baseName(name), maxSize(sizeMB * 1024 * 1024), maxFiles(files), currentSize(0) {\n        rotate();\n    }\n    void write(const vector<char>& data) {\n        if(currentSize + data.size() > maxSize) rotate();\n        currentFile.write(data.data(), data.size());\n        currentSize += data.size();\n    }\n    void writeWithTimestamp(const vector<char>& data) {\n        string timestamp = getTimestamp();\n        vector<char> stampedData(timestamp.begin(), timestamp.end());\n        stampedData.push_back('|');\n        stampedData.insert(stampedData.end(), data.begin(), data.end());\n        write(stampedData);\n    }\n};\nint main() {\n    RotatingLogger logger(\"app_log\", 10, 5);\n    logger.writeWithTimestamp({'T', 'e', 's', 't'});\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass GameScore {\n    int score;\npublic:\n    GameScore() : score(0) {}\n    void addPoints(int points) { score += points; }\n    int getScore() const { return score; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    GameScore player;\n    player.addPoints(100);\n    cout << \"Score: \" << player.getScore() << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <chrono>\n#include <thread>\n#include <stdexcept>\n#include <atomic>\n#include <vector>\n#include <string>\n\nclass DistributedLock {\n    std::string resource;\n    std::atomic<bool> locked;\n    std::chrono::steady_clock::time_point lock_time;\npublic:\n    DistributedLock(const std::string& res) : resource(res), locked(false) {}\n    bool try_lock(std::chrono::milliseconds timeout = std::chrono::milliseconds(500)) {\n        auto start = std::chrono::steady_clock::now();\n        while (std::chrono::steady_clock::now() - start < timeout) {\n            bool expected = false;\n            if (locked.compare_exchange_weak(expected, true)) {\n                lock_time = std::chrono::steady_clock::now();\n                std::cout << \"Lock acquired for \" << resource << std::endl;\n                return true;\n            }\n            std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(10));\n        }\n        return false;\n    }\n    void unlock() {\n        if (locked) {\n            locked = false;\n            auto duration = std::chrono::duration_cast<std::chrono::milliseconds>(std::chrono::steady_clock::now() - lock_time);\n            std::cout << \"Lock released for \" << resource << \" after \" << duration.count() << \"ms\" << std::endl;\n        }\n    }\n    ~DistributedLock() {\n        unlock();\n    }\n    class ScopedLock {\n        DistributedLock& lock;\n    public:\n        ScopedLock(DistributedLock& l, std::chrono::milliseconds timeout = std::chrono::milliseconds(500)) : lock(l) {\n            if (!lock.try_lock(timeout)) {\n                throw std::runtime_error(\"Failed to acquire distributed lock within timeout\");\n            }\n        }\n        ~ScopedLock() {\n            lock.unlock();\n        }\n        ScopedLock(const ScopedLock&) = delete;\n        ScopedLock& operator=(const ScopedLock&) = delete;\n    };\n    DistributedLock(const DistributedLock&) = delete;\n    DistributedLock& operator=(const DistributedLock&) = delete;\n};\n\nint main() {\n    DistributedLock lock(\"resource_1\");\n    std::vector<std::thread> threads;\n    for (int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {\n        threads.emplace_back([&lock, i] {\n            try {\n                DistributedLock::ScopedLock sl(lock, std::chrono::milliseconds(200));\n                std::cout << \"Thread \" << i << \" doing work\" << std::endl;\n                std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(100));\n            } catch (const std::exception& e) {\n                std::cout << \"Thread \" << i << \" failed: \" << e.what() << std::endl;\n            }\n        });\n    }\n    for (auto& t : threads) t.join();\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <unordered_map>\n\nint romanToDecimal(std::string roman) {\n    std::unordered_map<char, int> values = {\n        {'I', 1}, {'V', 5}, {'X', 10}, {'L', 50},\n        {'C', 100}, {'D', 500}, {'M', 1000}\n    };\n    \n    int result = 0;\n    \n    for (int i = 0; i < roman.length(); i++) {\n        if (i < roman.length() - 1 && values[roman[i]] < values[roman[i+1]]) {\n            result -= values[roman[i]];\n        } else {\n            result += values[roman[i]];\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return result;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::cout << romanToDecimal(\"MCMXCIV\") << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <algorithm>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass FixedVector {\n    static const int SIZE = 10;\n    int data[SIZE];\n    int count;\npublic:\n    FixedVector() : count(0) {}\n    bool insert(int value) {\n        if(count >= SIZE) return false;\n        data[count++] = value;\n        return true;\n    }\n    void sort() {\n        ::sort(data, data + count);  // Явное указание глобальной функции sort\n    }\n    int binarySearch(int key) const {\n        int left = 0, right = count - 1;\n        while(left <= right) {\n            int mid = left + (right - left) / 2;\n            if(data[mid] == key) return mid;\n            if(data[mid] < key) left = mid + 1;\n            else right = mid - 1;\n        }\n        return -1;\n    }\n    void print() const {\n        for(int i = 0; i < count; i++) cout << data[i] << \" \";\n        cout << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    FixedVector vec;\n    for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) vec.insert(10 - i);\n    cout << \"Original: \"; vec.print();\n    vec.sort();\n    cout << \"Sorted: \"; vec.print();\n    int key = 7;\n    int index = vec.binarySearch(key);\n    cout << \"Index of \" << key << \": \" << index << endl;\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <memory>\n#include <string>\n#include <vector>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass NonCopyableButCloneable {\nprivate:\n    string data;\n    int id;\n    \n    // Закрытый конструктор копирования\n    NonCopyableButCloneable(const NonCopyableButCloneable& other) \n        : data(other.data), id(other.id + 100) {\n        cout << \"Private copy constructor called (id: \" << id << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    // Закрытый оператор присваивания\n    NonCopyableButCloneable& operator=(const NonCopyableButCloneable&) = delete;\n    \n    static int nextId;\n    \npublic:\n    // Публичный конструктор\n    NonCopyableButCloneable(const string& d) : data(d), id(nextId++) {\n        cout << \"Created object #\" << id << \" with data: '\" << data << \"'\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    // Статический метод для создания копии\n    static unique_ptr<NonCopyableButCloneable> createCopy(const NonCopyableButCloneable& original) {\n        // Используем new, так как make_unique может не работать с private конструктором\n        return unique_ptr<NonCopyableButCloneable>(new NonCopyableButCloneable(original));\n    }\n    \n    // Статический метод для клонирования с модификацией\n    static unique_ptr<NonCopyableButCloneable> cloneWithModification(\n        const NonCopyableButCloneable& original, \n        const string& newData) {\n        \n        // Создаем временную копию\n        NonCopyableButCloneable copy(original);\n        copy.data = newData;\n        return unique_ptr<NonCopyableButCloneable>(new NonCopyableButCloneable(copy));\n    }\n    \n    // Статический метод для создания нескольких копий\n    static vector<unique_ptr<NonCopyableButCloneable>> createCopies(\n        const NonCopyableButCloneable& original, \n        int count) {\n        \n        vector<unique_ptr<NonCopyableButCloneable>> copies;\n        copies.reserve(count);\n        for(int i = 0; i < count; ++i) {\n            copies.push_back(createCopy(original));\n        }\n        return copies;\n    }\n    \n    // Метод для отображения данных\n    void display() const {\n        cout << \"Object #\" << id << \" data: '\" << data << \"'\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    // Геттер для ID\n    int getId() const { return id; }\n    \n    // Геттер для данных\n    string getData() const { return data; }\n    \n    // Деструктор\n    ~NonCopyableButCloneable() {\n        cout << \"Destroying object #\" << id << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint NonCopyableButCloneable::nextId = 1;\n\nint main() {\n    cout << \"=== Non-Copyable but Cloneable Class Demo ===\" << endl;\n    \n    // Создаем оригинальный объект\n    NonCopyableButCloneable original(\"Original Data\");\n    \n    // Создаем копию через статический метод\n    auto copy1 = NonCopyableButCloneable::createCopy(original);\n    cout << \"\\nFirst copy:\" << endl;\n    copy1->display();\n    \n    // Создаем модифицированную копию\n    auto modifiedCopy = NonCopyableButCloneable::cloneWithModification(\n        original, \"Modified Data\");\n    cout << \"\\nModified copy:\" << endl;\n    modifiedCopy->display();\n    \n    // Создаем несколько копий\n    cout << \"\\nCreating 3 copies:\" << endl;\n    auto copies = NonCopyableButCloneable::createCopies(original, 3);\n    \n    for(const auto& copy : copies) {\n        copy->display();\n    }\n    \n    // Показываем, что оригинал не изменился\n    cout << \"\\nOriginal (should be unchanged):\" << endl;\n    original.display();\n    \n    // Демонстрация предотвращения копирования\n    cout << \"\\n=== Demonstrating copy prevention ===\" << endl;\n    \n    // Этот код не должен компилироваться:\n    // NonCopyableButCloneable copy2 = original; // Ошибка: конструктор копирования приватный\n    // NonCopyableButCloneable copy3(original); // Ошибка: конструктор копирования приватный\n    \n    // Но этот код работает через статический метод\n    cout << \"\\nCreating copy through static method (works):\" << endl;\n    auto copy4 = NonCopyableButCloneable::createCopy(original);\n    copy4->display();\n    \n    // Демонстрация, что оператор присваивания тоже запрещен\n    cout << \"\\n=== Assignment operator is deleted ===\" << endl;\n    // original = *copy1; // Ошибка: оператор присваивания удален\n    \n    // Пример вложенного класса для демонстрации\n    class TestClass {\n        NonCopyableButCloneable member;\n    public:\n        // Конструктор, который не использует параметр для демонстрации\n        TestClass() : member(\"Test Object\") {}\n        \n        void show() const {\n            cout << \"TestClass contains: \";\n            member.display();\n        }\n    };\n    \n    TestClass test;\n    test.show();\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== End of demo ===\" << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nint main() {\n    int a, b, c, d, e, f;\n    std::cout << \"Введите шесть сторон: \";\n    std::cin >> a >> b >> c >> d >> e >> f;\n    \n    if (a == b && b == c && c == d && d == e && e == f) {\n        std::cout << \"Правильный шестиугольник\";\n    } else if (a == d && b == e && c == f) {\n        std::cout << \"Осесимметричный шестиугольник\";\n    } else {\n        std::cout << \"Неправильный шестиугольник\";\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\nusing namespace std;\n\nstruct Point {\n    double x, y;\n    \n    void rotate(double angleDegrees) {\n        double angleRadians = angleDegrees * M_PI / 180.0;\n        double cosA = cos(angleRadians);\n        double sinA = sin(angleRadians);\n        double newX = x * cosA - y * sinA;\n        double newY = x * sinA + y * cosA;\n        x = newX;\n        y = newY;\n    }\n    \n    void print() const {\n        cout << \"(\" << x << \", \" << y << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Point p = {1, 0};\n    \n    cout << \"Исходная точка: \";\n    p.print();\n    \n    p.rotate(90);\n    cout << \"После поворота на 90 градусов: \";\n    p.print();\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Polynomial {\nprivate:\n    vector<double> coefficients; // коэффициенты от старшей степени к младшей\npublic:\n    Polynomial(const vector<double>& coeffs) : coefficients(coeffs) {}\n    friend double evaluate(const Polynomial& poly, double x);\n};\n\ndouble evaluate(const Polynomial& poly, double x) {\n    double result = 0.0;\n    double power = 1.0;\n    for (int i = poly.coefficients.size() - 1; i >= 0; --i) {\n        result += poly.coefficients[i] * power;\n        power *= x;\n    }\n    return result;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    Polynomial p({2.0, -3.0, 1.0}); // 2x^2 - 3x + 1\n    double x = 2.0;\n    cout << \"Значение полинома в точке \" << x << \" равно \" << evaluate(p, x) << endl;\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n\nint main() {\n    int n;\n    long long factorial = 1;\n    \n    std::cout << \"Введите неотрицательное число (макс. 20): \";\n    std::cin >> n;\n    \n    if (n < 0) {\n        std::cout << \"Факториал отрицательного числа не определен\" << std::endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    if (n > 20) {\n        std::cout << \"Слишком большое число! Результат может выйти за пределы типа.\" << std::endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {\n        factorial *= i;\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << n << \"! = \" << factorial << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n\nint& getLarger(int& a, int& b) {\n    if (a > b) {\n        return a;\n    } else {\n        return b;\n    }\n}\n\nint main() {\n    int x = 5, y = 10;\n    \n    std::cout << \"До изменения: x = \" << x << \", y = \" << y << std::endl;\n    \n    int& larger = getLarger(x, y);\n    larger = 100; // изменяем большее число\n    \n    std::cout << \"После изменения: x = \" << x << \", y = \" << y << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <string>\n#include <ctime>\nusing namespace std;\n\nstring getCurrentTime() {\n    time_t now = time(nullptr);\n    char buffer[80];\n    strftime(buffer, sizeof(buffer), \"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S\", localtime(&now));\n    return string(buffer);\n}\n\nint main() {\n    ofstream file(\"log.txt\", ios::app);\n    \n    if (file.is_open()) {\n        string message;\n        cout << \"Введите сообщение для добавления в лог: \";\n        getline(cin, message);\n        \n        file << \"[\" << getCurrentTime() << \"] \" << message << endl;\n        file.close();\n        \n        cout << \"Сообщение добавлено в log.txt\" << endl;\n    } else {\n        cout << \"Ошибка открытия файла\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <algorithm>\nusing namespace std;\n\nstruct Interval {\n    double start, end;\n    \n    Interval unionWith(const Interval& other) const {\n        Interval result;\n        result.start = min(start, other.start);\n        result.end = max(end, other.end);\n        return result;\n    }\n    \n    void print() const {\n        cout << \"[\" << start << \", \" << end << \"]\" << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Interval i1 = {1, 5};\n    Interval i2 = {3, 8};\n    \n    cout << \"Интервал 1: \";\n    i1.print();\n    cout << \"Интервал 2: \";\n    i2.print();\n    \n    Interval u = i1.unionWith(i2);\n    cout << \"Объединение: \";\n    u.print();\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cstdlib>\n#include <stdexcept>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass AlignedMemory {\n    void* ptr;\n    size_t size;\n    size_t alignment;\npublic:\n    AlignedMemory(size_t sz, size_t align) : size(sz), alignment(align) {\n        if (alignment == 0 || (alignment & (alignment - 1)) != 0)\n            throw invalid_argument(\"Alignment must be power of two\");\n        ptr = aligned_alloc(alignment, size);\n        if (!ptr) throw bad_alloc();\n        cout << \"Allocated \" << size << \" bytes aligned to \" << alignment << \" bytes\" << endl;\n    }\n    ~AlignedMemory() {\n        free(ptr);\n        cout << \"Freed aligned memory\" << endl;\n    }\n    void* get() const { return ptr; }\n    AlignedMemory(const AlignedMemory&) = delete;\n    AlignedMemory& operator=(const AlignedMemory&) = delete;\n    AlignedMemory(AlignedMemory&& other) noexcept : ptr(other.ptr), size(other.size), alignment(other.alignment) {\n        other.ptr = nullptr;\n    }\n    AlignedMemory& operator=(AlignedMemory&& other) noexcept {\n        if (this != &other) {\n            free(ptr);\n            ptr = other.ptr;\n            size = other.size;\n            alignment = other.alignment;\n            other.ptr = nullptr;\n        }\n        return *this;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    try {\n        AlignedMemory mem(1024, 64);\n        int* arr = static_cast<int*>(mem.get());\n        arr[0] = 42;\n        cout << \"First element: \" << arr[0] << endl;\n    } catch (const exception& e) {\n        cout << \"Error: \" << e.what() << endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    int arr[] = {10, 20, 30, 40, 50};\n    int* ptr = arr;\n    \n    cout << \"Доступ к элементам через арифметику указателей:\" << endl;\n    cout << \"*ptr = \" << *ptr << \" (элемент 0)\" << endl;\n    cout << \"*(ptr + 1) = \" << *(ptr + 1) << \" (элемент 1)\" << endl;\n    cout << \"*(ptr + 2) = \" << *(ptr + 2) << \" (элемент 2)\" << endl;\n    cout << \"*(ptr + 3) = \" << *(ptr + 3) << \" (элемент 3)\" << endl;\n    \n    cout << \"\\nАдреса элементов:\" << endl;\n    for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {\n        cout << \"&arr[\" << i << \"] = \" << &arr[i] \n             << \", ptr + \" << i << \" = \" << ptr + i << endl;\n    }\n    \n    // Дополнительные операции с указателями\n    cout << \"\\nДополнительные операции:\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Размер int: \" << sizeof(int) << \" байт\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Разница адресов: &arr[3] - &arr[1] = \" << &arr[3] - &arr[1] << endl;\n    \n    int* ptr2 = arr + 4; // Указатель на последний элемент\n    cout << \"\\nptr (начало) = \" << ptr << endl;\n    cout << \"ptr2 (конец) = \" << ptr2 << endl;\n    cout << \"Количество элементов между ними: \" << ptr2 - ptr << endl;\n    \n    // Итерация через указатели\n    cout << \"\\nИтерация массива через указатели:\" << endl;\n    for (int* p = arr; p != arr + 5; p++) {\n        cout << \" *p = \" << *p << \" at address \" << p << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\nusing namespace std;\n\nstruct Employee {\n    int id;\n    string name;\n    double salary;\n};\n\nvoid raiseSalary(Employee& emp, double percent) {\n    emp.salary += emp.salary * (percent / 100.0);\n}\n\nint main() {\n    Employee emp = {101, \"Алексей\", 50000.0};\n    \n    cout << \"Зарплата до повышения: \" << emp.salary << endl;\n    raiseSalary(emp, 10.0);\n    cout << \"Зарплата после повышения на 10%: \" << emp.salary << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nclass Base {\nprotected:\n    int flags;\npublic:\n    Base(int f = 0) : flags(f) {}\n    virtual Base operator|(const Base& other) const {\n        return Base(flags | other.flags);\n    }\n    virtual Base& operator|=(const Base& other) {\n        flags |= other.flags;\n        return *this;\n    }\n    int getFlags() const { return flags; }\n};\n\nclass ExtendedFlags : public Base {\npublic:\n    ExtendedFlags(int f = 0) : Base(f) {}\n    ExtendedFlags operator|(const ExtendedFlags& other) const {\n        return ExtendedFlags(flags | other.flags | 0x100);\n    }\n    ExtendedFlags& operator|=(const ExtendedFlags& other) {\n        flags |= other.flags | 0x100;\n        return *this;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    ExtendedFlags f1(1);\n    ExtendedFlags f2(2);\n    ExtendedFlags f3 = f1 | f2;\n    std::cout << \"Flags: 0x\" << std::hex << f3.getFlags() << std::endl;\n    f1 |= f2;\n    std::cout << \"Flags after |=: 0x\" << std::hex << f1.getFlags() << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <cmath>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    string plantType;\n    string season;\n    double temperature;\n    double humidity;\n    int daysSinceRain;\n    \n    cout << \"Тип растения (cactus/succulent/vegetable/flower/tree): \";\n    cin >> plantType;\n    cout << \"Сезон (summer/autumn/winter/spring): \";\n    cin >> season;\n    cout << \"Температура (°C): \";\n    cin >> temperature;\n    cout << \"Влажность (%): \";\n    cin >> humidity;\n    cout << \"Дней без дождя: \";\n    cin >> daysSinceRain;\n    \n    double waterAmount = 0.0;\n    int wateringDuration = 0;\n    string wateringTime = \"morning\";\n    bool skipWatering = false;\n    string message = \"\";\n    \n    // Базовое количество воды по типу растения (литры)\n    if (plantType == \"cactus\") {\n        waterAmount = 0.5;\n    } else if (plantType == \"succulent\") {\n        waterAmount = 1.0;\n    } else if (plantType == \"vegetable\") {\n        waterAmount = 2.0;\n    } else if (plantType == \"flower\") {\n        waterAmount = 1.5;\n    } else if (plantType == \"tree\") {\n        waterAmount = 5.0;\n    } else {\n        cout << \"Неизвестный тип растения!\" << endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    // Модификатор по сезону\n    if (season == \"summer\") {\n        waterAmount *= 1.5;\n        wateringTime = \"evening\";\n    } else if (season == \"winter\") {\n        waterAmount *= 0.3;\n        wateringTime = \"noon\";\n    } else if (season == \"spring\") {\n        waterAmount *= 1.2;\n    } else if (season == \"autumn\") {\n        waterAmount *= 0.8;\n    }\n    \n    // Модификатор по температуре\n    if (temperature > 30) {\n        waterAmount *= 1.3;\n    } else if (temperature > 20) {\n        waterAmount *= 1.1;\n    } else if (temperature < 5) {\n        waterAmount *= 0.2;\n        skipWatering = true;\n        message = \"Температура слишком низкая для полива\";\n    }\n    \n    // Модификатор по влажности\n    if (humidity > 80) {\n        waterAmount *= 0.5;\n    } else if (humidity > 60) {\n        waterAmount *= 0.8;\n    }\n    \n    // Модификатор по дням без дождя\n    waterAmount *= (1 + daysSinceRain * 0.1);\n    \n    // Проверка на необходимость полива\n    if (humidity > 90 && daysSinceRain < 2) {\n        skipWatering = true;\n        message = \"Полив не требуется - высокая влажность и недавний дождь\";\n    }\n    \n    // Расчет длительности полива (предполагаем расход 2 л/мин)\n    wateringDuration = ceil(waterAmount / 2.0 * 60); // в секундах\n    \n    // Особые условия для кактусов\n    if (plantType == \"cactus\" && season == \"winter\") {\n        skipWatering = true;\n        message = \"Кактусы в зимний период не поливают\";\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== СИСТЕМА ПОЛИВА ===\" << endl;\n    \n    if (skipWatering) {\n        cout << \"РЕШЕНИЕ: Пропустить полив\" << endl;\n        cout << \"Причина: \" << message << endl;\n    } else {\n        cout << \"РЕШЕНИЕ: Полив необходим\" << endl;\n        cout << \"Количество воды: \" << waterAmount << \" л\" << endl;\n        cout << \"Длительность полива: \" << wateringDuration << \" секунд\" << endl;\n        cout << \"Лучшее время: \" << wateringTime << endl;\n        \n        // Предупреждения\n        if (waterAmount > 10) {\n            cout << \"ВНИМАНИЕ: Большой расход воды! Проверьте систему.\" << endl;\n        }\n        if (temperature > 35 && wateringTime != \"evening\") {\n            cout << \"СОВЕТ: Перенесите полив на вечер при высокой температуре\" << endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    // Рекомендации по уходу\n    cout << \"\\nДОПОЛНИТЕЛЬНО:\" << endl;\n    if (plantType == \"vegetable\" && season == \"summer\") {\n        cout << \"- Овощи летом нуждаются в ежедневном поливе\" << endl;\n    }\n    if (plantType == \"tree\" && daysSinceRain > 7) {\n        cout << \"- Деревья при длительной засухе требуют глубокого полива\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint add(int a, int b) {\n    return a + b;\n}\n\ndouble multiply(double a, double b) {\n    return a * b;\n}\n\nvoid printMessage() {\n    cout << \"Hello from function!\" << endl;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    int (*intFuncPtr)(int, int) = add;\n    \n    double (*doubleFuncPtr)(double, double) = multiply;\n    \n    void (*voidFuncPtr)() = printMessage;\n    \n    cout << \"add(5, 3) через указатель: \" << intFuncPtr(5, 3) << endl;\n    cout << \"multiply(2.5, 4.0) через указатель: \" << doubleFuncPtr(2.5, 4.0) << endl;\n    \n    cout << \"Вызов функции без параметров: \";\n    voidFuncPtr();\n    \n    int (*funcArray[3])(int, int);\n    \n    funcArray[0] = add;\n    funcArray[1] = [](int a, int b) { return a + b + 1; };\n    funcArray[2] = [](int a, int b) { return a + b + 2; };\n    \n    cout << \"\\nМассив функций:\" << endl;\n    for(int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {\n        cout << \"funcArray[\" << i << \"](10, 5) = \" << funcArray[i](10, 5) << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <queue>\n#include <limits>\n#include <algorithm>\nusing namespace std;\n\nconst int INF = numeric_limits<int>::max();\n\nvector<int> dijkstra(const vector<vector<pair<int, int>>>& graph, int start) {\n    int n = graph.size();\n    vector<int> dist(n, INF);\n    dist[start] = 0;\n    \n    priority_queue<pair<int, int>, vector<pair<int, int>>, greater<pair<int, int>>> pq;\n    pq.push({0, start});\n    \n    while (!pq.empty()) {\n        int u = pq.top().second;\n        int d = pq.top().first;\n        pq.pop();\n        \n        if (d > dist[u]) continue;\n        \n        for (const auto& edge : graph[u]) {\n            int v = edge.first;\n            int weight = edge.second;\n            \n            if (dist[u] + weight < dist[v]) {\n                dist[v] = dist[u] + weight;\n                pq.push({dist[v], v});\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return dist;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    int n = 6;\n    vector<vector<pair<int, int>>> graph(n);\n    \n    graph[0].push_back({1, 7});\n    graph[0].push_back({2, 9});\n    graph[0].push_back({5, 14});\n    graph[1].push_back({2, 10});\n    graph[1].push_back({3, 15});\n    graph[2].push_back({3, 11});\n    graph[2].push_back({5, 2});\n    graph[3].push_back({4, 6});\n    graph[4].push_back({5, 9});\n    \n    int start = 0;\n    vector<int> distances = dijkstra(graph, start);\n    \n    cout << \"Кратчайшие расстояния от вершины \" << start << \":\" << endl;\n    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {\n        if (distances[i] == INF) {\n            cout << \"До \" << i << \": недостижима\" << endl;\n        } else {\n            cout << \"До \" << i << \": \" << distances[i] << endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <stack>\n#include <vector>\nusing namespace std;\n\nvoid dfs1(int v, vector<int>* adj, bool* visited, stack<int>& st) {\n    visited[v] = true;\n    for(int u : adj[v]) {\n        if(!visited[u]) dfs1(u, adj, visited, st);\n    }\n    st.push(v);\n}\n\nvoid dfs2(int v, vector<int>* radj, bool* visited, vector<int>& component) {\n    visited[v] = true;\n    component.push_back(v);\n    for(int u : radj[v]) {\n        if(!visited[u]) dfs2(u, radj, visited, component);\n    }\n}\n\nint main() {\n    int V = 8, E = 14;\n    vector<int>* adj = new vector<int>[V];\n    vector<int>* radj = new vector<int>[V];\n    adj[0].push_back(1); radj[1].push_back(0);\n    adj[1].push_back(2); radj[2].push_back(1);\n    adj[2].push_back(0); radj[0].push_back(2);\n    adj[2].push_back(3); radj[3].push_back(2);\n    adj[3].push_back(4); radj[4].push_back(3);\n    adj[4].push_back(5); radj[5].push_back(4);\n    adj[5].push_back(3); radj[3].push_back(5);\n    adj[6].push_back(5); radj[5].push_back(6);\n    adj[6].push_back(7); radj[7].push_back(6);\n    adj[7].push_back(6); radj[6].push_back(7);\n    bool* visited = new bool[V]();\n    stack<int> st;\n    for(int i = 0; i < V; i++) {\n        if(!visited[i]) dfs1(i, adj, visited, st);\n    }\n    for(int i = 0; i < V; i++) visited[i] = false;\n    vector<vector<int>> sccs;\n    while(!st.empty()) {\n        int v = st.top(); st.pop();\n        if(!visited[v]) {\n            vector<int> component;\n            dfs2(v, radj, visited, component);\n            sccs.push_back(component);\n        }\n    }\n    cout << \"Сильно связанные компоненты:\" << endl;\n    for(auto& comp : sccs) {\n        for(int v : comp) cout << v << \" \";\n        cout << endl;\n    }\n    delete[] adj;\n    delete[] radj;\n    delete[] visited;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <random>\n#include <sstream>\n#include <iomanip>\n\nstd::string generateUUID() {\n    std::random_device rd;\n    std::mt19937 gen(rd());\n    std::uniform_int_distribution<int> dis(0, 255);\n    \n    std::stringstream ss;\n    ss << std::hex << std::setfill('0');\n    \n    // Генерируем 16 случайных байт\n    for (int i = 0; i < 16; i++) {\n        int byte = dis(gen);\n        \n        // Версия 4: установка битов\n        if (i == 6) {\n            byte = (byte & 0x0F) | 0x40; // версия 4\n        }\n        // Вариант: установка двух старших битов в 10\n        if (i == 8) {\n            byte = (byte & 0x3F) | 0x80;\n        }\n        \n        ss << std::setw(2) << byte;\n        \n        // Добавляем дефисы в нужных позициях\n        if (i == 3 || i == 5 || i == 7 || i == 9) {\n            ss << \"-\";\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return ss.str();\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::cout << \"UUID v4: \" << generateUUID() << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <variant>\n#include <vector>\n#include <map>\n#include <string>\n#include <memory>\n#include <algorithm>\n#include <type_traits>\nusing namespace std;\n\n// Предварительное объявление\nstruct JsonNode;\n\n// Определение типов JSON с использованием unique_ptr для рекурсивных типов\nusing JsonValue = variant<\n    nullptr_t,\n    bool,\n    int,\n    double,\n    string,\n    unique_ptr<vector<unique_ptr<JsonNode>>>,\n    unique_ptr<map<string, unique_ptr<JsonNode>>>\n>;\n\nstruct JsonNode {\n    JsonValue value;\n    \n    // Конструкторы для разных типов\n    JsonNode(nullptr_t) : value(nullptr) {}\n    JsonNode(bool b) : value(b) {}\n    JsonNode(int i) : value(i) {}\n    JsonNode(double d) : value(d) {}\n    JsonNode(const string& s) : value(s) {}\n    JsonNode(const char* s) : value(string(s)) {}\n    JsonNode(unique_ptr<vector<unique_ptr<JsonNode>>> arr) : value(move(arr)) {}\n    JsonNode(unique_ptr<map<string, unique_ptr<JsonNode>>> obj) : value(move(obj)) {}\n    \n    // Утилитарные статические методы для создания коллекций\n    static unique_ptr<JsonNode> create_array(vector<unique_ptr<JsonNode>> elements) {\n        auto arr = make_unique<vector<unique_ptr<JsonNode>>>(move(elements));\n        return make_unique<JsonNode>(move(arr));\n    }\n    \n    static unique_ptr<JsonNode> create_object(map<string, unique_ptr<JsonNode>> properties) {\n        auto obj = make_unique<map<string, unique_ptr<JsonNode>>>(move(properties));\n        return make_unique<JsonNode>(move(obj));\n    }\n};\n\nclass JsonPrinter {\npublic:\n    string print(const JsonNode& node, int indent = 0) const {\n        return visit([this, indent](const auto& v) -> string {\n            using T = decay_t<decltype(v)>;\n            if constexpr (is_same_v<T, nullptr_t>) {\n                return \"null\";\n            } else if constexpr (is_same_v<T, bool>) {\n                return v ? \"true\" : \"false\";\n            } else if constexpr (is_same_v<T, int> || is_same_v<T, double>) {\n                return to_string(v);\n            } else if constexpr (is_same_v<T, string>) {\n                return \"\\\"\" + v + \"\\\"\";\n            } else if constexpr (is_same_v<T, unique_ptr<vector<unique_ptr<JsonNode>>>>) {\n                return print_array(*v, indent);\n            } else if constexpr (is_same_v<T, unique_ptr<map<string, unique_ptr<JsonNode>>>>) {\n                return print_object(*v, indent);\n            }\n        }, node.value);\n    }\n    \nprivate:\n    string print_array(const vector<unique_ptr<JsonNode>>& arr, int indent) const {\n        if (arr.empty()) return \"[]\";\n        \n        string result = \"[\\n\";\n        string spaces(indent + 2, ' ');\n        \n        for (size_t i = 0; i < arr.size(); ++i) {\n            result += spaces + print(*arr[i], indent + 2);\n            if (i < arr.size() - 1) result += \",\";\n            result += \"\\n\";\n        }\n        \n        result += string(indent, ' ') + \"]\";\n        return result;\n    }\n    \n    string print_object(const map<string, unique_ptr<JsonNode>>& obj, int indent) const {\n        if (obj.empty()) return \"{}\";\n        \n        string result = \"{\\n\";\n        string spaces(indent + 2, ' ');\n        \n        size_t i = 0;\n        for (const auto& [key, value] : obj) {\n            result += spaces + \"\\\"\" + key + \"\\\": \" + print(*value, indent + 2);\n            if (++i < obj.size()) result += \",\";\n            result += \"\\n\";\n        }\n        \n        result += string(indent, ' ') + \"}\";\n        return result;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    // Создаем сложную JSON-структуру с использованием unique_ptr\n    auto tags = make_unique<vector<unique_ptr<JsonNode>>>();\n    tags->push_back(make_unique<JsonNode>(\"developer\"));\n    tags->push_back(make_unique<JsonNode>(\"cpp\"));\n    tags->push_back(make_unique<JsonNode>(\"backend\"));\n    \n    auto coordinates = make_unique<vector<unique_ptr<JsonNode>>>();\n    coordinates->push_back(make_unique<JsonNode>(40.7128));\n    coordinates->push_back(make_unique<JsonNode>(-74.0060));\n    \n    auto address = make_unique<map<string, unique_ptr<JsonNode>>>();\n    address->insert({\"city\", make_unique<JsonNode>(\"New York\")});\n    address->insert({\"zip\", make_unique<JsonNode>(\"10001\")});\n    address->insert({\"coordinates\", make_unique<JsonNode>(move(coordinates))});\n    \n    auto projectA = make_unique<map<string, unique_ptr<JsonNode>>>();\n    projectA->insert({\"name\", make_unique<JsonNode>(\"Project A\")});\n    projectA->insert({\"status\", make_unique<JsonNode>(\"completed\")});\n    \n    auto projectB = make_unique<map<string, unique_ptr<JsonNode>>>();\n    projectB->insert({\"name\", make_unique<JsonNode>(\"Project B\")});\n    projectB->insert({\"status\", make_unique<JsonNode>(\"in_progress\")});\n    \n    auto projects = make_unique<vector<unique_ptr<JsonNode>>>();\n    projects->push_back(make_unique<JsonNode>(move(projectA)));\n    projects->push_back(make_unique<JsonNode>(move(projectB)));\n    \n    auto user = make_unique<map<string, unique_ptr<JsonNode>>>();\n    user->insert({\"name\", make_unique<JsonNode>(\"John Doe\")});\n    user->insert({\"age\", make_unique<JsonNode>(30)});\n    user->insert({\"is_active\", make_unique<JsonNode>(true)});\n    user->insert({\"balance\", make_unique<JsonNode>(1234.56)});\n    user->insert({\"tags\", make_unique<JsonNode>(move(tags))});\n    user->insert({\"address\", make_unique<JsonNode>(move(address))});\n    user->insert({\"projects\", make_unique<JsonNode>(move(projects))});\n    \n    JsonNode json_user(move(user));\n    JsonPrinter printer;\n    \n    cout << \"JSON Structure:\" << endl;\n    cout << printer.print(json_user) << endl;\n    \n    // Обработка JSON\n    auto& obj = get<unique_ptr<map<string, unique_ptr<JsonNode>>>>(json_user.value);\n    cout << \"\\nAccessing values:\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Name: \" << get<string>((*obj)[\"name\"]->value) << endl;\n    cout << \"Age: \" << get<int>((*obj)[\"age\"]->value) << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <sstream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    string text = \"Hello World from C++ Programming\";\n    istringstream iss(text);\n    string word;\n    string lastWord;\n    \n    while(iss >> word) {\n        lastWord = word;\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"Последнее слово: \" << lastWord << \", длина: \" << lastWord.length() << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <cctype>\n\nstd::string rleDecompress(const std::string& compressed) {\n    std::string result;\n    \n    for(size_t i = 0; i < compressed.length(); i++) {\n        char c = compressed[i];\n        if(std::isalpha(c)) {\n            i++;\n            std::string num_str;\n            while(i < compressed.length() && std::isdigit(compressed[i])) {\n                num_str += compressed[i];\n                i++;\n            }\n            i--;\n            int count = std::stoi(num_str);\n            result += std::string(count, c);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return result;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::string compressed = \"A3B3C3D1\";\n    std::string decompressed = rleDecompress(compressed);\n    \n    std::cout << \"Сжатая: \" << compressed << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Восстановленная: \" << decompressed << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <map>\n#include <string>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <ctime>\n#include <iomanip>\n#include <cstring>\n#include <cstdlib>\n#include <algorithm>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass LeakDetector {\n    struct AllocationInfo {\n        size_t size;\n        string file;\n        int line;\n        time_t timestamp;\n        \n        AllocationInfo(size_t sz, const string& f, int l) \n            : size(sz), file(f), line(l) {\n            timestamp = time(nullptr);\n        }\n        \n        string toString() const {\n            char timeStr[100];\n            strftime(timeStr, sizeof(timeStr), \"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S\", localtime(&timestamp));\n            \n            return \"Size: \" + to_string(size) + \n                   \" bytes, File: \" + file + \n                   \":\" + to_string(line) + \n                   \", Time: \" + timeStr;\n        }\n    };\n    \n    static map<void*, AllocationInfo> allocations;\n    static size_t totalAllocated;\n    static size_t peakAllocated;\n    \npublic:\n    static void* trackAllocation(size_t size, const char* file, int line) {\n        void* ptr = malloc(size);\n        if(!ptr) throw bad_alloc();\n        \n        allocations[ptr] = AllocationInfo(size, file, line);\n        totalAllocated += size;\n        peakAllocated = max(peakAllocated, totalAllocated);\n        \n        cout << \"[LEAK DETECT] Allocated \" << size << \" bytes at \" \n             << ptr << \" in \" << file << \":\" << line << endl;\n        \n        return ptr;\n    }\n    \n    static void trackDeallocation(void* ptr, const char* file, int line) {\n        auto it = allocations.find(ptr);\n        if(it != allocations.end()) {\n            totalAllocated -= it->second.size;\n            \n            cout << \"[LEAK DETECT] Freed \" << it->second.size \n                 << \" bytes at \" << ptr << \" in \" << file << \":\" << line << endl;\n            \n            allocations.erase(it);\n            free(ptr);\n        } else {\n            cout << \"[LEAK DETECT] WARNING: Attempt to free untracked pointer \" \n                 << ptr << \" in \" << file << \":\" << line << endl;\n            free(ptr);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    static void generateReport(const string& filename = \"memory_report.txt\") {\n        ofstream report(filename);\n        \n        report << \"=== Memory Leak Detection Report ===\\n\\n\";\n        report << \"Total active allocations: \" << allocations.size() << \"\\n\";\n        report << \"Currently allocated: \" << totalAllocated << \" bytes\\n\";\n        report << \"Peak allocated: \" << peakAllocated << \" bytes\\n\\n\";\n        \n        if(!allocations.empty()) {\n            report << \"=== LEAKS DETECTED ===\\n\\n\";\n            for(const auto& entry : allocations) {\n                report << \"Address: \" << entry.first << \"\\n\";\n                report << \"  \" << entry.second.toString() << \"\\n\\n\";\n            }\n        } else {\n            report << \"No memory leaks detected\\n\";\n        }\n        \n        report.close();\n        cout << \"Report generated: \" << filename << endl;\n    }\n    \n    static void checkAtExit() {\n        generateReport();\n        if(!allocations.empty()) {\n            cout << \"\\nWARNING: Memory leaks detected! Check report file.\\n\";\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nmap<void*, LeakDetector::AllocationInfo> LeakDetector::allocations;\nsize_t LeakDetector::totalAllocated = 0;\nsize_t LeakDetector::peakAllocated = 0;\n\n// Перегрузка operator new с информацией о файле и строке\nvoid* operator new(size_t size, const char* file, int line) {\n    return LeakDetector::trackAllocation(size, file, line);\n}\n\nvoid* operator new[](size_t size, const char* file, int line) {\n    return LeakDetector::trackAllocation(size, file, line);\n}\n\nint main() {\n    atexit(LeakDetector::checkAtExit);\n    \n    cout << \"Memory Leak Detection System\\n\" << endl;\n    \n    // Используем отслеживаемые версии new\n    cout << \"1. Creating tracked allocations...\" << endl;\n    int* p1 = new(__FILE__, __LINE__) int(42);\n    double* p2 = new(__FILE__, __LINE__) double(3.14);\n    char* p3 = new(__FILE__, __LINE__) char[100];\n    \n    cout << \"\\n2. Deleting some allocations...\" << endl;\n    // Явно вызываем стандартные операторы delete\n    ::operator delete(p1);\n    \n    cout << \"\\n3. Some allocations intentionally not freed to show leaks\" << endl;\n    // p2 и p3 не удаляются специально, чтобы показать утечки\n    \n    cout << \"\\n4. Program ending - checkAtExit will generate report\" << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <algorithm>\n#include <cmath>\nclass DeltaCompressor {\n    std::vector<char> previous;\n    static void computeDelta(const std::vector<char>& oldData, const std::vector<char>& newData, std::vector<char>& delta) {\n        delta.clear();\n        size_t minSize = std::min(oldData.size(), newData.size());\n        for(size_t i = 0; i < minSize; i++) {\n            delta.push_back(newData[i] - oldData[i]);\n        }\n        delta.insert(delta.end(), newData.begin() + minSize, newData.end());\n    }\n    static void applyDelta(const std::vector<char>& base, const std::vector<char>& delta, std::vector<char>& result) {\n        result = base;\n        result.resize(std::max(base.size(), delta.size()));\n        for(size_t i = 0; i < delta.size(); i++) {\n            if(i < base.size()) result[i] += delta[i];\n            else result[i] = delta[i];\n        }\n    }\npublic:\n    void createVersion(const std::string& newFile, const std::string& deltaFile) {\n        std::ifstream newStream(newFile, std::ios::binary);\n        std::vector<char> newData(std::istreambuf_iterator<char>(newStream), {});\n        std::vector<char> delta;\n        computeDelta(previous, newData, delta);\n        std::ofstream deltaOut(deltaFile, std::ios::binary);\n        deltaOut.write(delta.data(), delta.size());\n        previous = newData;\n    }\n    void restoreVersion(const std::string& baseFile, const std::string& deltaFile, const std::string& outputFile) {\n        std::ifstream baseStream(baseFile, std::ios::binary);\n        std::vector<char> baseData(std::istreambuf_iterator<char>(baseStream), {});\n        std::ifstream deltaStream(deltaFile, std::ios::binary);\n        std::vector<char> delta(std::istreambuf_iterator<char>(deltaStream), {});\n        std::vector<char> result;\n        applyDelta(baseData, delta, result);\n        std::ofstream out(outputFile, std::ios::binary);\n        out.write(result.data(), result.size());\n    }\n};\nint main() {\n    DeltaCompressor dc;\n    dc.createVersion(\"v2.bin\", \"delta_v2.bin\");\n    dc.restoreVersion(\"v1.bin\", \"delta_v2.bin\", \"restored_v2.bin\");\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Counter {\nprivate:\n    int value;\n\npublic:\n    Counter(int start = 0) : value(start) {}\n    \n    void increment() {\n        value++;\n        cout << \"Увеличено до: \" << value << endl;\n    }\n    \n    void decrement() {\n        value--;\n        cout << \"Уменьшено до: \" << value << endl;\n    }\n    \n    void reset() {\n        value = 0;\n        cout << \"Сброшено в 0\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    void print() const {\n        cout << \"Текущее значение: \" << value << endl;\n    }\n    \n    int getValue() const { return value; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Counter counter(5);\n    counter.print();\n    \n    counter.increment();\n    counter.increment();\n    counter.decrement();\n    \n    counter.reset();\n    counter.print();\n    \n    for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {\n        counter.increment();\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"Итог: \" << counter.getValue() << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <thread>\n#include <mutex>\n#include <shared_mutex>\n#include <condition_variable>\n#include <queue>\n#include <chrono>\n#include <vector>\n#include <functional>\n\ntemplate<typename T>\nclass ThreadSafeQueue {\nprivate:\n mutable std::shared_mutex mtx;\n std::queue<T> data_queue;\n std::condition_variable_any cv;\n \npublic:\n void push(T value) {\n {\n std::unique_lock<std::shared_mutex> lock(mtx);\n data_queue.push(std::move(value));\n std::cout << \"Добавлен элемент: \" << value << std::endl;\n }\n cv.notify_one();\n }\n \n bool try_pop(T& value) {\n std::unique_lock<std::shared_mutex> lock(mtx);\n if (data_queue.empty()) {\n return false;\n }\n value = std::move(data_queue.front());\n data_queue.pop();\n return true;\n }\n \n void wait_and_pop(T& value) {\n std::shared_lock<std::shared_mutex> lock(mtx);\n cv.wait(lock, [this] { \n std::shared_lock<std::shared_mutex> inner_lock(mtx);\n return !data_queue.empty(); \n });\n \n // Переключаемся на exclusive lock для модификации\n lock.unlock();\n std::unique_lock<std::shared_mutex> exclusive_lock(mtx);\n if (!data_queue.empty()) {\n value = std::move(data_queue.front());\n data_queue.pop();\n std::cout << \"Извлечен элемент: \" << value << std::endl;\n }\n }\n \n bool empty() const {\n std::shared_lock<std::shared_mutex> lock(mtx);\n return data_queue.empty();\n }\n \n size_t size() const {\n std::shared_lock<std::shared_mutex> lock(mtx);\n return data_queue.size();\n }\n};\n\nvoid producer(ThreadSafeQueue<int>& queue, int id, int items) {\n for (int i = 0; i < items; i++) {\n int value = id * 100 + i;\n queue.push(value);\n std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(50));\n }\n std::cout << \"Производитель \" << id << \" завершил работу\" << std::endl;\n}\n\nvoid consumer(ThreadSafeQueue<int>& queue, int id) {\n for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {\n int value;\n queue.wait_and_pop(value);\n std::cout << \"Потребитель \" << id << \" обработал: \" << value << std::endl;\n std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(30));\n }\n std::cout << \"Потребитель \" << id << \" завершил работу\" << std::endl;\n}\n\nvoid reader(ThreadSafeQueue<int>& queue, int id) {\n for (int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {\n // Читаем размер без блокировки производителей\n std::cout << \"Читатель \" << id << \" видит размер: \" << queue.size() << std::endl;\n std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(20));\n }\n}\n\nint main() {\n ThreadSafeQueue<int> queue;\n \n std::vector<std::thread> producers;\n std::vector<std::thread> consumers;\n std::vector<std::thread> readers;\n \n // Запускаем производителей\n for (int i = 0; i < 2; i++) {\n producers.emplace_back(producer, std::ref(queue), i + 1, 4);\n }\n \n // Запускаем потребителей\n for (int i = 0; i < 2; i++) {\n consumers.emplace_back(consumer, std::ref(queue), i + 1);\n }\n \n // Запускаем читателей\n for (int i = 0; i < 2; i++) {\n readers.emplace_back(reader, std::ref(queue), i + 1);\n }\n \n for (auto& t : producers) {\n t.join();\n }\n \n for (auto& t : consumers) {\n t.join();\n }\n \n for (auto& t : readers) {\n t.join();\n }\n \n std::cout << \"\\nОставшиеся элементы в очереди: \" << queue.size() << std::endl;\n \n return 0;\n}
