#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Ticket {\n    string ticketNumber;\npublic:\n    Ticket(string num) : ticketNumber(num) {\n        cout << \"Билет #\" << ticketNumber << \" выдан\" << endl;\n    }\n    ~Ticket() {\n        cout << \"Билет #\" << ticketNumber << \" аннулирован\" << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Ticket t(\"TK789012\");\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <sstream>\n#include <string>\n#include <memory>\n#include <vector>\n\nclass Serializable {\nprotected:\n    virtual std::string getClassName() const = 0;\n    virtual int getVersion() const = 0;\n    \npublic:\n    virtual ~Serializable() = default;\n    \n    virtual std::string serialize() const {\n        std::ostringstream oss;\n        oss << getClassName() << \"\\n\";\n        oss << getVersion() << \"\\n\";\n        serializeData(oss);\n        return oss.str();\n    }\n    \n    virtual void deserialize(const std::string& str) {\n        std::istringstream iss(str);\n        std::string className;\n        int version;\n        \n        std::getline(iss, className);\n        iss >> version;\n        iss.ignore();\n        \n        if (className != getClassName()) {\n            throw std::runtime_error(\"Class name mismatch\");\n        }\n        \n        if (version != getVersion()) {\n            handleVersionMismatch(version, iss);\n        } else {\n            deserializeData(iss);\n        }\n    }\n    \nprotected:\n    virtual void serializeData(std::ostringstream& oss) const = 0;\n    virtual void deserializeData(std::istringstream& iss) = 0;\n    \n    virtual void handleVersionMismatch(int oldVersion, std::istringstream& iss) {\n        throw std::runtime_error(\"Version mismatch: \" + std::to_string(oldVersion) + \n                                \" != \" + std::to_string(getVersion()));\n    }\n};\n\nclass BaseShape : virtual public Serializable {\nprotected:\n    int id;\n    std::string name;\n    \n    std::string getClassName() const override { return \"BaseShape\"; }\n    int getVersion() const override { return 1; }\n    \n    void serializeData(std::ostringstream& oss) const override {\n        oss << id << \"\\n\";\n        oss << name << \"\\n\";\n    }\n    \n    void deserializeData(std::istringstream& iss) override {\n        iss >> id;\n        iss.ignore();\n        std::getline(iss, name);\n    }\n    \npublic:\n    BaseShape(int i = 0, const std::string& n = \"\") : id(i), name(n) {}\n    virtual ~BaseShape() = default;\n    \n    virtual double area() const = 0;\n    \n    void print() const {\n        std::cout << \"Shape \" << id << \": \" << name << \", area = \" << area() << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass Circle : virtual public BaseShape {\n    double radius;\n    \nprotected:\n    std::string getClassName() const override { return \"Circle\"; }\n    int getVersion() const override { return 2; }\n    \n    void serializeData(std::ostringstream& oss) const override {\n        BaseShape::serializeData(oss);\n        oss << radius << \"\\n\";\n    }\n    \n    void deserializeData(std::istringstream& iss) override {\n        BaseShape::deserializeData(iss);\n        iss >> radius;\n        iss.ignore();\n    }\n    \n    void handleVersionMismatch(int oldVersion, std::istringstream& iss) override {\n        if (oldVersion == 1) {\n            BaseShape::deserializeData(iss);\n            double oldRadius;\n            iss >> oldRadius;\n            radius = oldRadius * 2.0;\n            iss.ignore();\n            std::cout << \"Migrated Circle from v1 to v2\" << std::endl;\n        } else {\n            BaseShape::handleVersionMismatch(oldVersion, iss);\n        }\n    }\n    \npublic:\n    Circle(int i = 0, const std::string& n = \"\", double r = 0) \n        : BaseShape(i, n), radius(r) {}\n        \n    double area() const override {\n        return 3.14159 * radius * radius;\n    }\n};\n\nclass Rectangle : virtual public BaseShape {\n    double width, height;\n    \nprotected:\n    std::string getClassName() const override { return \"Rectangle\"; }\n    int getVersion() const override { return 1; }\n    \n    void serializeData(std::ostringstream& oss) const override {\n        BaseShape::serializeData(oss);\n        oss << width << \"\\n\" << height << \"\\n\";\n    }\n    \n    void deserializeData(std::istringstream& iss) override {\n        BaseShape::deserializeData(iss);\n        iss >> width >> height;\n        iss.ignore();\n    }\n    \npublic:\n    Rectangle(int i = 0, const std::string& n = \"\", double w = 0, double h = 0)\n        : BaseShape(i, n), width(w), height(h) {}\n        \n    double area() const override {\n        return width * height;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Circle circle1(1, \"Small Circle\", 5.0);\n    Rectangle rect1(2, \"Big Rectangle\", 10.0, 20.0);\n    \n    std::cout << \"=== Original objects ===\" << std::endl;\n    circle1.print();\n    rect1.print();\n    \n    std::string circleStr = circle1.serialize();\n    std::string rectStr = rect1.serialize();\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n=== Serialized Circle ===\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << circleStr << std::endl;\n    \n    Circle circle2;\n    Rectangle rect2;\n    \n    circle2.deserialize(circleStr);\n    rect2.deserialize(rectStr);\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n=== Deserialized objects ===\" << std::endl;\n    circle2.print();\n    rect2.print();\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n=== Testing version migration ===\" << std::endl;\n    std::string oldCircleStr = \"Circle\\n1\\n3\\nOld Circle\\n7.5\\n\";\n    Circle oldCircle;\n    oldCircle.deserialize(oldCircleStr);\n    oldCircle.print();\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <string>\n#include <cstring>\nusing namespace std;\n\nbool copyFile(const string& sourcePath, const string& destPath) {\n    ifstream source(sourcePath, ios::binary);\n    if (!source) {\n        cerr << \"Ошибка: не удалось открыть исходный файл '\" << sourcePath << \"'\" << endl;\n        return false;\n    }\n    \n    ofstream dest(destPath, ios::binary);\n    if (!dest) {\n        cerr << \"Ошибка: не удалось создать целевой файл '\" << destPath << \"'\" << endl;\n        return false;\n    }\n    \n    dest << source.rdbuf();\n    \n    if (!dest) {\n        cerr << \"Ошибка при записи в файл '\" << destPath << \"'\" << endl;\n        return false;\n    }\n    \n    return true;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    string sourceFile, destFile;\n    \n    cout << \"Введите путь к исходному файлу: \";\n    getline(cin, sourceFile);\n    \n    cout << \"Введите путь к целевому файлу: \";\n    getline(cin, destFile);\n    \n    if (sourceFile.empty() || destFile.empty()) {\n        cerr << \"Ошибка: пути к файлам не могут быть пустыми\" << endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    if (sourceFile == destFile) {\n        cerr << \"Ошибка: исходный и целевой файлы совпадают\" << endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"Копирование файла...\" << endl;\n    \n    if (copyFile(sourceFile, destFile)) {\n        cout << \"Файл успешно скопирован!\" << endl;\n        \n        ifstream file(destFile, ios::binary | ios::ate);\n        if (file) {\n            streamsize size = file.tellg();\n            cout << \"Размер скопированного файла: \" << size << \" байт\" << endl;\n        }\n        return 0;\n    } else {\n        cerr << \"Не удалось скопировать файл\" << endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nclass CoffeeMachine {\nprivate:\n    int water;\npublic:\n    CoffeeMachine() : water(1000) {}\n    bool makeCoffee() {\n        if (water >= 100) {\n            water -= 100;\n            std::cout << \"Кофе готов! Осталось воды: \" << water << \" мл\" << std::endl;\n            return true;\n        }\n        std::cout << \"Недостаточно воды\" << std::endl;\n        return false;\n    }\n    void addWater(int amount) {\n        water += amount;\n        std::cout << \"Вода добавлена. Всего: \" << water << \" мл\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    int getWater() const { return water; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    CoffeeMachine machine;\n    machine.makeCoffee();\n    machine.makeCoffee();\n    machine.addWater(500);\n    machine.makeCoffee();\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <cctype>\n#include <algorithm>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint findLargestNumber(const string& str) {\n    int max_number = -1;\n    int current_number = 0;\n    bool in_number = false;\n    \n    for(char c : str) {\n        if(isdigit(c)) {\n            in_number = true;\n            current_number = current_number * 10 + (c - '0');\n        } else {\n            if(in_number) {\n                max_number = max(max_number, current_number);\n                current_number = 0;\n                in_number = false;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    if(in_number) {\n        max_number = max(max_number, current_number);\n    }\n    \n    return max_number;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    string str = \"abc123def45gh6ijk789\";\n    cout << \"Наибольшее число в строке: \" << findLargestNumber(str) << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <cctype>\n\nint main() {\n    std::string text = \"Hello World\";\n    std::string vowels = \"aeiouAEIOU\";\n    \n    for(size_t i = 0; i < text.length(); i++) {\n        if(vowels.find(text[i]) != std::string::npos) {\n            text[i] = '*';\n        }\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"Результат: \" << text << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <vector>\n#include <functional>\n#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Observable {\n    vector<function<void()>> observers;\npublic:\n    void subscribe(function<void()> observer) {\n        observers.push_back(observer);\n    }\n    void notify() {\n        for (auto& obs : observers) obs();\n    }\n};\n\nclass Button : public Observable {\n    string label;\npublic:\n    Button(const string& l) : label(l) {}\n    void click() {\n        cout << \"Button '\" << label << \"' clicked.\" << endl;\n        notify();\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Button btn(\"Submit\");\n    \n    btn.subscribe([]() { cout << \"Observer 1: Button clicked!\" << endl; });\n    btn.subscribe([]() { cout << \"Observer 2: Action triggered!\" << endl; });\n    \n    cout << \"Clicking the button...\" << endl;\n    btn.click();\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Matrix {\nprivate:\n    int a, b, c, d; // элементы матрицы [a b; c d]\npublic:\n    Matrix(int aVal, int bVal, int cVal, int dVal) : a(aVal), b(bVal), c(cVal), d(dVal) {}\n    friend int determinant(const Matrix& m);\n    void display() const {\n        cout << \"[\" << a << \" \" << b << \"; \" << c << \" \" << d << \"]\" << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint determinant(const Matrix& m) {\n    return m.a * m.d - m.b * m.c;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    Matrix mat(1, 2, 3, 4);\n    mat.display();\n    cout << \"Определитель: \" << determinant(mat) << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nclass Counter {\n    static int copyCount;\n    int id;\npublic:\n    Counter(int i) : id(i) {}\n    Counter(const Counter& other) : id(other.id) {\n        copyCount++;\n        std::cout << \"Конструктор копирования #\" << copyCount << std::endl;\n    }\n    ~Counter() {\n        std::cout << \"Деструктор для \" << id << std::endl;\n    }\n    static int getCopyCount() { return copyCount; }\n};\n\nint Counter::copyCount = 0;\n\nint main() {\n    Counter a(1);\n    Counter b = a; // Копирование\n    Counter c = b; // Еще копирование\n    std::cout << \"Всего копирований: \" << Counter::getCopyCount() << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nstruct Node {\n    int data;\n    Node* next;\n    \n    void append(int value) {\n        Node* newNode = new Node{value, nullptr};\n        Node* current = this;\n        while (current->next != nullptr) {\n            current = current->next;\n        }\n        current->next = newNode;\n    }\n    \n    void printList() const {\n        const Node* current = this;\n        while (current != nullptr) {\n            cout << current->data << \" \";\n            current = current->next;\n        }\n        cout << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Node* head = new Node{1, nullptr};\n    head->append(2);\n    head->append(3);\n    \n    head->printList();\n    \n    delete head->next->next;\n    delete head->next;\n    delete head;\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <vector>\n\nclass Settings {\npublic:\n    inline static std::string appName = \"MyApp\";\n    inline static int maxUsers = 100;\n    inline static double version = 2.5;\n    inline static std::vector<std::string> defaultColors = {\"red\", \"green\", \"blue\"};\n    \n    static const int DEFAULT_TIMEOUT = 30;\n    static constexpr double PI = 3.14159;\n    \n    static int instanceCount;\n    \n    Settings() {\n        instanceCount++;\n        std::cout << appName << \" instance created. Total: \" << instanceCount << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    ~Settings() {\n        instanceCount--;\n    }\n    \n    static void printSettings() {\n        std::cout << \"\\nApplication Settings:\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"  Name: \" << appName << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"  Version: \" << version << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"  Max Users: \" << maxUsers << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"  Default Timeout: \" << DEFAULT_TIMEOUT << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"  Default Colors: \";\n        for(const auto& color : defaultColors) {\n            std::cout << color << \" \";\n        }\n        std::cout << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"  Active Instances: \" << instanceCount << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint Settings::instanceCount = 0;\n\nint main() {\n    std::cout << \"Accessing static members directly:\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"App Name: \" << Settings::appName << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Version: \" << Settings::version << std::endl;\n    \n    Settings::appName = \"UpdatedApp\";\n    Settings::maxUsers = 200;\n    Settings::defaultColors.push_back(\"yellow\");\n    \n    Settings s1;\n    Settings s2;\n    \n    Settings::printSettings();\n    \n    {\n        Settings s3;\n        std::cout << \"\\nInside block - instances: \" << Settings::instanceCount << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nAfter block - instances: \" << Settings::instanceCount << std::endl;\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nUpdated colors: \";\n    for(const auto& color : Settings::defaultColors) {\n        std::cout << color << \" \";\n    }\n    std::cout << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n\nint findMinRotated(std::vector<int>& nums) {\n    int left = 0, right = nums.size() - 1;\n    \n    while (left < right) {\n        int mid = left + (right - left) / 2;\n        \n        if (nums[mid] > nums[right]) {\n            left = mid + 1;\n        } else {\n            right = mid;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return nums[left];\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::vector<int> nums = {4,5,6,7,0,1,2};\n    std::cout << findMinRotated(nums) << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\n\nstruct Circle {\n    double radius;\n    \n    double circumference() const {\n        return 2 * M_PI * radius;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Circle circle = {5.0};\n    std::cout << \"Длина окружности: \" << circle.circumference() << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <iomanip>\n#include <string>\n#include <limits>\n\nint main() {\n    int choice;\n    bool running = true;\n    \n    std::cout << \"=== КАЛЬКУЛЯТОР ВРЕМЕНИ ===\" << std::endl;\n    \n    while (running) {\n        std::cout << \"\\n=== МЕНЮ ===\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"1. Сложение временных интервалов\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"2. Вычитание временных интервалов\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"3. Конвертация секунд в ЧЧ:ММ:СС\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"4. Конвертация ЧЧ:ММ:СС в секунды\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"5. Сравнение двух времен\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"6. Вычисление разницы между двумя моментами времени\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"7. Выход\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Выберите операцию (1-7): \";\n        \n        std::cin >> choice;\n        \n        if (std::cin.fail()) {\n            std::cin.clear();\n            std::cin.ignore(std::numeric_limits<std::streamsize>::max(), '\\n');\n            std::cout << \"Ошибка ввода. Пожалуйста, введите число от 1 до 7.\" << std::endl;\n            continue;\n        }\n        \n        switch (choice) {\n            case 1: { // Сложение\n                int h1, m1, s1, h2, m2, s2;\n                std::cout << \"\\n=== СЛОЖЕНИЕ ВРЕМЕНИ ===\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"Введите первый интервал (часы минуты секунды): \";\n                std::cin >> h1 >> m1 >> s1;\n                std::cout << \"Введите второй интервал (часы минуты секунды): \";\n                std::cin >> h2 >> m2 >> s2;\n                \n                // Проверка корректности ввода\n                if (h1 < 0 || m1 < 0 || s1 < 0 || m1 >= 60 || s1 >= 60 ||\n                    h2 < 0 || m2 < 0 || s2 < 0 || m2 >= 60 || s2 >= 60) {\n                    std::cout << \"Ошибка: некорректные значения времени.\" << std::endl;\n                    break;\n                }\n                \n                int totalSeconds = s1 + s2;\n                int totalMinutes = m1 + m2 + totalSeconds / 60;\n                int totalHours = h1 + h2 + totalMinutes / 60;\n                \n                int resultSeconds = totalSeconds % 60;\n                int resultMinutes = totalMinutes % 60;\n                int resultHours = totalHours;\n                \n                std::cout << \"Результат: \" << resultHours << \" ч \" << resultMinutes << \" мин \" << resultSeconds << \" сек\" << std::endl;\n                \n                // Дополнительный вывод в днях, если больше 24 часов\n                if (resultHours >= 24) {\n                    int days = resultHours / 24;\n                    int remainingHours = resultHours % 24;\n                    std::cout << \"Или: \" << days << \" дн \" << remainingHours << \" ч \" << resultMinutes << \" мин \" << resultSeconds << \" сек\" << std::endl;\n                }\n                break;\n            }\n            \n            case 2: { // Вычитание\n                int h1, m1, s1, h2, m2, s2;\n                std::cout << \"\\n=== ВЫЧИТАНИЕ ВРЕМЕНИ ===\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"Введите больший интервал (часы минуты секунды): \";\n                std::cin >> h1 >> m1 >> s1;\n                std::cout << \"Введите меньший интервал (часы минуты секунды): \";\n                std::cin >> h2 >> m2 >> s2;\n                \n                // Проверка корректности ввода\n                if (h1 < 0 || m1 < 0 || s1 < 0 || m1 >= 60 || s1 >= 60 ||\n                    h2 < 0 || m2 < 0 || s2 < 0 || m2 >= 60 || s2 >= 60) {\n                    std::cout << \"Ошибка: некорректные значения времени.\" << std::endl;\n                    break;\n                }\n                \n                // Конвертация в секунды\n                int totalSeconds1 = h1 * 3600 + m1 * 60 + s1;\n                int totalSeconds2 = h2 * 3600 + m2 * 60 + s2;\n                \n                if (totalSeconds1 < totalSeconds2) {\n                    std::cout << \"Ошибка: первый интервал должен быть больше второго.\" << std::endl;\n                    break;\n                }\n                \n                int diffSeconds = totalSeconds1 - totalSeconds2;\n                \n                int resultHours = diffSeconds / 3600;\n                int resultMinutes = (diffSeconds % 3600) / 60;\n                int resultSeconds = diffSeconds % 60;\n                \n                std::cout << \"Разница: \" << resultHours << \" ч \" << resultMinutes << \" мин \" << resultSeconds << \" сек\" << std::endl;\n                break;\n            }\n            \n            case 3: { // Конвертация секунд в ЧЧ:ММ:СС\n                int totalSeconds;\n                std::cout << \"\\n=== КОНВЕРТАЦИЯ СЕКУНД В ЧЧ:ММ:СС ===\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"Введите количество секунд: \";\n                std::cin >> totalSeconds;\n                \n                if (totalSeconds < 0) {\n                    std::cout << \"Ошибка: количество секунд не может быть отрицательным.\" << std::endl;\n                    break;\n                }\n                \n                int hours = totalSeconds / 3600;\n                int minutes = (totalSeconds % 3600) / 60;\n                int seconds = totalSeconds % 60;\n                \n                std::cout << \"Результат: \";\n                std::cout << std::setfill('0') << std::setw(2) << hours << \":\";\n                std::cout << std::setfill('0') << std::setw(2) << minutes << \":\";\n                std::cout << std::setfill('0') << std::setw(2) << seconds << std::endl;\n                \n                // Дополнительный формат вывода\n                if (hours > 0) {\n                    std::cout << \"Или: \" << hours << \" час\" << (hours != 1 ? \"ов \" : \" \");\n                }\n                if (minutes > 0 || hours > 0) {\n                    std::cout << minutes << \" минут\" << (minutes != 1 ? \" \" : \" \");\n                }\n                std::cout << seconds << \" секунд\" << (seconds != 1 ? \"\" : \"\") << std::endl;\n                break;\n            }\n            \n            case 4: { // Конвертация ЧЧ:ММ:СС в секунды\n                int hours, minutes, seconds;\n                char delimiter1, delimiter2;\n                std::cout << \"\\n=== КОНВЕРТАЦИЯ ЧЧ:ММ:СС В СЕКУНДЫ ===\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"Введите время в формате ЧЧ:ММ:СС: \";\n                \n                // Используем тернарный подход для обработки ввода\n                if (!(std::cin >> hours >> delimiter1 >> minutes >> delimiter2 >> seconds)) {\n                    std::cout << \"Ошибка ввода. Используйте формат ЧЧ:ММ:СС.\" << std::endl;\n                    std::cin.clear();\n                    std::cin.ignore(std::numeric_limits<std::streamsize>::max(), '\\n');\n                    break;\n                }\n                \n                if (delimiter1 != ':' || delimiter2 != ':') {\n                    std::cout << \"Ошибка: используйте двоеточия как разделители.\" << std::endl;\n                    break;\n                }\n                \n                if (hours < 0 || minutes < 0 || seconds < 0 || minutes >= 60 || seconds >= 60) {\n                    std::cout << \"Ошибка: некорректные значения времени.\" << std::endl;\n                    break;\n                }\n                \n                int totalSeconds = hours * 3600 + minutes * 60 + seconds;\n                std::cout << \"Общее количество секунд: \" << totalSeconds << std::endl;\n                break;\n            }\n            \n            case 5: { // Сравнение двух времен\n                int h1, m1, s1, h2, m2, s2;\n                std::cout << \"\\n=== СРАВНЕНИЕ ДВУХ ВРЕМЕН ===\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"Введите первое время (часы минуты секунды): \";\n                std::cin >> h1 >> m1 >> s1;\n                std::cout << \"Введите второе время (часы минуты секунды): \";\n                std::cin >> h2 >> m2 >> s2;\n                \n                // Проверка корректности ввода\n                if (h1 < 0 || m1 < 0 || s1 < 0 || m1 >= 60 || s1 >= 60 ||\n                    h2 < 0 || m2 < 0 || s2 < 0 || m2 >= 60 || s2 >= 60) {\n                    std::cout << \"Ошибка: некорректные значения времени.\" << std::endl;\n                    break;\n                }\n                \n                // Конвертация в секунды для сравнения\n                int totalSeconds1 = h1 * 3600 + m1 * 60 + s1;\n                int totalSeconds2 = h2 * 3600 + m2 * 60 + s2;\n                \n                std::cout << \"Результат сравнения: \" << std::endl;\n                \n                // Использование вложенных условий для сравнения\n                if (totalSeconds1 == totalSeconds2) {\n                    std::cout << \"Времена равны.\" << std::endl;\n                } else {\n                    std::cout << \"Времена не равны. \" << std::endl;\n                    \n                    // Определение какое время больше\n                    std::string comparisonResult = (totalSeconds1 > totalSeconds2) ? \n                                                  \"Первое время больше второго\" : \n                                                  \"Второе время больше первого\";\n                    std::cout << comparisonResult << \".\" << std::endl;\n                    \n                    // Разница в процентах\n                    double percentage;\n                    if (totalSeconds1 > totalSeconds2) {\n                        percentage = (totalSeconds1 - totalSeconds2) * 100.0 / totalSeconds2;\n                        std::cout << \"Первое время на \" << std::fixed << std::setprecision(2) << percentage << \"% больше.\" << std::endl;\n                    } else {\n                        percentage = (totalSeconds2 - totalSeconds1) * 100.0 / totalSeconds1;\n                        std::cout << \"Второе время на \" << std::fixed << std::setprecision(2) << percentage << \"% больше.\" << std::endl;\n                    }\n                }\n                break;\n            }\n            \n            case 6: { // Разница между двумя моментами времени\n                int h1, m1, s1, h2, m2, s2;\n                std::cout << \"\\n=== РАЗНИЦА МЕЖДУ ДВУМЯ МОМЕНТАМИ ВРЕМЕНИ ===\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"Введите первый момент времени (часы минуты секунды): \";\n                std::cin >> h1 >> m1 >> s1;\n                std::cout << \"Введите второй момент времени (часы минуты секунды): \";\n                std::cin >> h2 >> m2 >> s2;\n                \n                // Проверка корректности ввода\n                if (h1 < 0 || h1 >= 24 || m1 < 0 || s1 < 0 || m1 >= 60 || s1 >= 60 ||\n                    h2 < 0 || h2 >= 24 || m2 < 0 || s2 < 0 || m2 >= 60 || s2 >= 60) {\n                    std::cout << \"Ошибка: некорректные значения времени.\" << std::endl;\n                    break;\n                }\n                \n                // Определение, какой момент времени больше (считаем что в течение одного дня)\n                int totalSeconds1 = h1 * 3600 + m1 * 60 + s1;\n                int totalSeconds2 = h2 * 3600 + m2 * 60 + s2;\n                \n                int diffSeconds;\n                std::string timeOrder;\n                \n                if (totalSeconds1 >= totalSeconds2) {\n                    diffSeconds = totalSeconds1 - totalSeconds2;\n                    timeOrder = \"первый момент времени наступил позже второго\";\n                } else {\n                    diffSeconds = totalSeconds2 - totalSeconds1;\n                    timeOrder = \"второй момент времени наступил позже первого\";\n                }\n                \n                int resultHours = diffSeconds / 3600;\n                int resultMinutes = (diffSeconds % 3600) / 60;\n                int resultSeconds = diffSeconds % 60;\n                \n                std::cout << \"Разница: \" << resultHours << \" ч \" << resultMinutes << \" мин \" << resultSeconds << \" сек\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << timeOrder << \".\" << std::endl;\n                \n                // Дополнительная информация в зависимости от разницы\n                if (diffSeconds < 60) {\n                    std::cout << \"Это менее минуты.\" << std::endl;\n                } else if (diffSeconds < 3600) {\n                    std::cout << \"Это менее часа.\" << std::endl;\n                } else if (diffSeconds >= 3600 && diffSeconds < 7200) {\n                    std::cout << \"Это более часа.\" << std::endl;\n                } else {\n                    std::cout << \"Это несколько часов.\" << std::endl;\n                }\n                break;\n            }\n            \n            case 7: { // Выход\n                std::cout << \"\\nСпасибо за использование калькулятора времени. До свидания!\" << std::endl;\n                running = false;\n                break;\n            }\n            \n            default: {\n                std::cout << \"Неверный выбор. Пожалуйста, выберите операцию от 1 до 7.\" << std::endl;\n                break;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\nusing namespace std;\n\nstruct MonthlySales {\n    string month;\n    double revenue;\n};\n\nstruct SalesStatistics {\n    MonthlySales sales[12];\n    \n    double totalRevenue() const {\n        double total = 0;\n        for (int i = 0; i < 12; ++i) {\n            total += sales[i].revenue;\n        }\n        return total;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    SalesStatistics stats = {{\n        {\"Январь\", 1000},\n        {\"Февраль\", 1200},\n        {\"Март\", 1500},\n        {\"Апрель\", 1300},\n        {\"Май\", 1400},\n        {\"Июнь\", 1600},\n        {\"Июль\", 1700},\n        {\"Август\", 1800},\n        {\"Сентябрь\", 1900},\n        {\"Октябрь\", 2000},\n        {\"Ноябрь\", 2100},\n        {\"Декабрь\", 2200}\n    }};\n    \n    cout << \"Общий объем продаж за год: \" << stats.totalRevenue() << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <string>\n#include <random>\n#include <algorithm>\n\nclass FileEncryptor {\nprivate:\n    std::vector<char> key;\n    \n    void generateKey(size_t length) {\n        std::random_device rd;\n        std::mt19937 gen(rd());\n        std::uniform_int_distribution<> dist(0, 255);\n        \n        key.resize(length);\n        for (size_t i = 0; i < length; i++) {\n            key[i] = static_cast<char>(dist(gen));\n        }\n    }\n    \npublic:\n    void encryptFile(const std::string& inputFile, const std::string& outputFile, const std::string& password) {\n        // Читаем файл\n        std::ifstream in(inputFile, std::ios::binary);\n        if (!in.is_open()) {\n            throw std::runtime_error(\"Не удалось открыть входной файл\");\n        }\n        \n        std::vector<char> buffer((std::istreambuf_iterator<char>(in)), \n                                std::istreambuf_iterator<char>());\n        in.close();\n        \n        // Генерируем ключ на основе пароля\n        size_t keyLength = std::max(buffer.size(), password.length() * 2);\n        generateKey(keyLength);\n        \n        // Добавляем соль на основе пароля\n        for (size_t i = 0; i < password.length(); i++) {\n            key[i % keyLength] ^= password[i];\n        }\n        \n        // Шифруем данные\n        for (size_t i = 0; i < buffer.size(); i++) {\n            buffer[i] ^= key[i % keyLength];\n            buffer[i] ^= (i % 256); // Добавляем позицию в файле\n        }\n        \n        // Записываем зашифрованные данные\n        std::ofstream out(outputFile, std::ios::binary);\n        if (!out.is_open()) {\n            throw std::runtime_error(\"Не удалось создать выходной файл\");\n        }\n        \n        // Записываем длину ключа в начало файла\n        size_t keySize = keyLength;\n        out.write(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&keySize), sizeof(keySize));\n        \n        out.write(buffer.data(), buffer.size());\n        out.close();\n        \n        std::cout << \"Файл зашифрован. Размер: \" << buffer.size() << \" байт\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    void decryptFile(const std::string& inputFile, const std::string& outputFile, const std::string& password) {\n        // Читаем зашифрованный файл\n        std::ifstream in(inputFile, std::ios::binary);\n        if (!in.is_open()) {\n            throw std::runtime_error(\"Не удалось открыть зашифрованный файл\");\n        }\n        \n        // Читаем длину ключа\n        size_t keyLength;\n        in.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&keyLength), sizeof(keyLength));\n        \n        // Читаем остальные данные\n        std::vector<char> buffer((std::istreambuf_iterator<char>(in)), \n                                std::istreambuf_iterator<char>());\n        in.close();\n        \n        // Восстанавливаем ключ\n        generateKey(keyLength);\n        for (size_t i = 0; i < password.length(); i++) {\n            key[i % keyLength] ^= password[i];\n        }\n        \n        // Расшифровываем данные\n        for (size_t i = 0; i < buffer.size(); i++) {\n            buffer[i] ^= (i % 256); // Убираем позицию\n            buffer[i] ^= key[i % keyLength];\n        }\n        \n        // Записываем расшифрованные данные\n        std::ofstream out(outputFile, std::ios::binary);\n        if (!out.is_open()) {\n            throw std::runtime_error(\"Не удалось создать выходной файл\");\n        }\n        \n        out.write(buffer.data(), buffer.size());\n        out.close();\n        \n        std::cout << \"Файл расшифрован. Размер: \" << buffer.size() << \" байт\" << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    FileEncryptor encryptor;\n    std::string password;\n    \n    std::cout << \"Введите пароль для шифрования: \";\n    std::getline(std::cin, password);\n    \n    try {\n        // Шифрование\n        encryptor.encryptFile(\"secret.txt\", \"encrypted.dat\", password);\n        \n        std::cout << \"\\nВведите пароль для расшифрования: \";\n        std::getline(std::cin, password);\n        \n        // Расшифрование\n        encryptor.decryptFile(\"encrypted.dat\", \"decrypted.txt\", password);\n        \n        std::cout << \"\\nОперация завершена успешно\" << std::endl;\n        \n    } catch (const std::exception& e) {\n        std::cerr << \"Ошибка: \" << e.what() << std::endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <climits>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    int vertices = 5;\n    int** graph = new int*[vertices];\n    for(int i = 0; i < vertices; i++) {\n        graph[i] = new int[vertices];\n        for(int j = 0; j < vertices; j++) {\n            graph[i][j] = (i == j) ? 0 : INT_MAX/2;\n        }\n    }\n    graph[0][1] = 10; graph[1][0] = 10;\n    graph[0][3] = 5;  graph[3][0] = 5;\n    graph[1][2] = 1;  graph[2][1] = 1;\n    graph[1][3] = 2;  graph[3][1] = 2;\n    graph[2][4] = 4;  graph[4][2] = 4;\n    graph[3][2] = 3;  graph[2][3] = 3;\n    graph[3][4] = 2;  graph[4][3] = 2;\n    \n    int start = 0;\n    int* dist = new int[vertices];\n    bool* visited = new bool[vertices]();\n    for(int i = 0; i < vertices; i++) dist[i] = INT_MAX/2;\n    dist[start] = 0;\n    \n    for(int count = 0; count < vertices; count++) {\n        int u = -1;\n        for(int i = 0; i < vertices; i++) {\n            if(!visited[i] && (u == -1 || dist[i] < dist[u])) {\n                u = i;\n            }\n        }\n        visited[u] = true;\n        for(int v = 0; v < vertices; v++) {\n            if(graph[u][v] && dist[u] + graph[u][v] < dist[v]) {\n                dist[v] = dist[u] + graph[u][v];\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"Кратчайшие расстояния от вершины \" << start << \":\\n\";\n    for(int i = 0; i < vertices; i++) {\n        cout << \"До \" << i << \": \" << dist[i] << endl;\n    }\n    \n    for(int i = 0; i < vertices; i++) delete[] graph[i];\n    delete[] graph;\n    delete[] dist;\n    delete[] visited;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <sys/types.h>\n#include <sys/socket.h>\n#include <netinet/in.h>\n#include <arpa/inet.h>\n#include <unistd.h>\n#include <iostream>\n#include <cstring>\n#include <sstream>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <cerrno>\n\nint main() {\n    int server_fd = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0);\n    if(server_fd < 0) {\n        std::cerr << \"socket failed\" << std::endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    int opt = 1;\n    setsockopt(server_fd, SOL_SOCKET, SO_REUSEADDR, &opt, sizeof(opt));\n    \n    sockaddr_in addr;\n    std::memset(&addr, 0, sizeof(addr));\n    addr.sin_family = AF_INET;\n    addr.sin_port = htons(8080);\n    addr.sin_addr.s_addr = INADDR_ANY;\n    \n    if(bind(server_fd, (struct sockaddr*)&addr, sizeof(addr)) < 0) {\n        std::cerr << \"bind failed\" << std::endl;\n        close(server_fd);\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    if(listen(server_fd, 10) < 0) {\n        std::cerr << \"listen failed\" << std::endl;\n        close(server_fd);\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"HTTP/1.1 server with Keep-Alive on port 8080\" << std::endl;\n    \n    while(true) {\n        int client_fd = accept(server_fd, NULL, NULL);\n        if(client_fd < 0) continue;\n        \n        bool keep_alive = true;\n        \n        while(keep_alive) {\n            char buffer[4096];\n            ssize_t bytes = recv(client_fd, buffer, sizeof(buffer)-1, 0);\n            if(bytes <= 0) break;\n            buffer[bytes] = '\\0';\n            \n            std::string request(buffer);\n            std::size_t newline_pos = request.find('\\r');\n            if(newline_pos != std::string::npos) {\n                std::cout << \"Request: \" << request.substr(0, newline_pos) << std::endl;\n            }\n            \n            // Проверяем Connection header\n            std::size_t conn_pos = request.find(\"Connection: \");\n            if(conn_pos != std::string::npos) {\n                std::size_t end_line = request.find(\"\\r\\n\", conn_pos);\n                if(end_line != std::string::npos) {\n                    std::string conn_value = request.substr(conn_pos + 12, end_line - conn_pos - 12);\n                    if(conn_value.find(\"close\") != std::string::npos) {\n                        keep_alive = false;\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            \n            if(request.find(\"GET /chunked \") == 0) {\n                // Chunked response\n                std::string response = \"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\n\";\n                response += \"Transfer-Encoding: chunked\\r\\n\";\n                response += \"Content-Type: text/plain\\r\\n\";\n                if(keep_alive) {\n                    response += \"Connection: keep-alive\\r\\n\";\n                } else {\n                    response += \"Connection: close\\r\\n\";\n                }\n                response += \"\\r\\n\";\n                \n                std::string chunks[] = {\"Hello\", \"World\", \"Chunked\", \"Data\", \"End\"};\n                for(const std::string& chunk : chunks) {\n                    std::ostringstream chunk_header;\n                    chunk_header << std::hex << chunk.length() << \"\\r\\n\";\n                    std::string chunk_msg = chunk_header.str() + chunk + \"\\r\\n\";\n                    send(client_fd, chunk_msg.c_str(), chunk_msg.length(), 0);\n                }\n                std::string end_chunk = \"0\\r\\n\\r\\n\";\n                send(client_fd, end_chunk.c_str(), end_chunk.length(), 0);\n                \n            } else {\n                // Normal response with Keep-Alive\n                std::string response = \"HTTP/1.1 200 OK\\r\\n\";\n                if(keep_alive) {\n                    response += \"Connection: keep-alive\\r\\n\";\n                    response += \"Keep-Alive: timeout=5, max=100\\r\\n\";\n                } else {\n                    response += \"Connection: close\\r\\n\";\n                }\n                response += \"Content-Type: text/html\\r\\n\";\n                response += \"\\r\\n\";\n                response += \"<html><body><h1>HTTP/1.1 Server</h1>\";\n                response += \"<p>Keep-Alive: \" + std::string(keep_alive ? \"enabled\" : \"disabled\") + \"</p>\";\n                response += \"</body></html>\";\n                \n                send(client_fd, response.c_str(), response.length(), 0);\n            }\n        }\n        \n        close(client_fd);\n    }\n    \n    close(server_fd);\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <filesystem>\n#include <cstring>\n#include <iomanip>\n#include <cstdint>\n#include <string>\n\nnamespace fs = std::filesystem;\n\nstruct ContainerHeader {\n    char magic[4] = {'P', 'A', 'K', '\\0'};\n    uint32_t version = 1;\n    uint32_t fileCount = 0;\n    uint32_t totalSize = 0;\n};\n\nstruct FileEntry {\n    char filename[256];\n    uint32_t offset;\n    uint32_t size;\n    uint32_t crc32;\n};\n\nclass Packer {\n    uint32_t computeCRC32(const std::vector<char>& data) {\n        uint32_t crc = 0xFFFFFFFF;\n        for(char c : data) {\n            crc ^= static_cast<unsigned char>(c);\n            for(int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {\n                crc = (crc >> 1) ^ (0xEDB88320 & -(crc & 1));\n            }\n        }\n        return ~crc;\n    }\n    \n    void createTestFiles() {\n        std::ofstream file1(\"test1.txt\", std::ios::binary);\n        file1 << \"This is test file 1 content.\" << std::endl;\n        file1 << \"Line 2 of test file 1.\" << std::endl;\n        file1.close();\n        \n        std::ofstream file2(\"test2.bin\", std::ios::binary);\n        for(int i = 0; i < 100; i++) {\n            file2.put(static_cast<char>(i % 256));\n        }\n        file2.close();\n    }\n    \npublic:\n    void pack(const std::vector<std::string>& files, const std::string& output) {\n        std::ofstream out(output, std::ios::binary);\n        ContainerHeader header;\n        header.fileCount = files.size();\n        out.write(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&header), sizeof(header));\n        \n        std::streampos entriesPos = out.tellp();\n        std::vector<FileEntry> entries(files.size());\n        out.seekp(sizeof(FileEntry) * files.size(), std::ios::cur);\n        \n        for(size_t i = 0; i < files.size(); i++) {\n            std::ifstream in(files[i], std::ios::binary | std::ios::ate);\n            if(!in) {\n                std::cerr << \"Cannot open file: \" << files[i] << std::endl;\n                continue;\n            }\n            \n            uint32_t size = in.tellg();\n            in.seekg(0, std::ios::beg);\n            std::vector<char> data(size);\n            \n            if(in.read(data.data(), size)) {\n                std::strncpy(entries[i].filename, fs::path(files[i]).filename().string().c_str(), 255);\n                entries[i].filename[255] = '\\0';\n                entries[i].offset = out.tellp();\n                entries[i].size = size;\n                entries[i].crc32 = computeCRC32(data);\n                out.write(data.data(), size);\n                header.totalSize += size;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        std::streampos endPos = out.tellp();\n        out.seekp(entriesPos);\n        out.write(reinterpret_cast<char*>(entries.data()), sizeof(FileEntry) * entries.size());\n        out.seekp(0);\n        out.write(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&header), sizeof(header));\n        \n        std::cout << \"Packed \" << header.fileCount << \" files into \" << output << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    void unpack(const std::string& container, const std::string& outputDir) {\n        std::ifstream in(container, std::ios::binary);\n        if(!in) {\n            std::cerr << \"Cannot open container: \" << container << std::endl;\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        ContainerHeader header;\n        in.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(&header), sizeof(header));\n        \n        if(std::memcmp(header.magic, \"PAK\\0\", 4) != 0) {\n            std::cerr << \"Invalid container format\" << std::endl;\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        std::vector<FileEntry> entries(header.fileCount);\n        in.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(entries.data()), sizeof(FileEntry) * header.fileCount);\n        \n        fs::create_directory(outputDir);\n        \n        for(const auto& entry : entries) {\n            in.seekg(entry.offset);\n            std::vector<char> data(entry.size);\n            \n            if(in.read(data.data(), entry.size)) {\n                uint32_t computedCrc = computeCRC32(data);\n                if(computedCrc != entry.crc32) {\n                    std::cerr << \"CRC mismatch for \" << entry.filename << \" (expected: \" \n                              << entry.crc32 << \", got: \" << computedCrc << \")\" << std::endl;\n                    continue;\n                }\n                \n                std::string outputPath = outputDir + \"/\" + entry.filename;\n                std::ofstream out(outputPath, std::ios::binary);\n                out.write(data.data(), entry.size);\n                std::cout << \"Extracted: \" << entry.filename << \" (\" << entry.size << \" bytes)\" << std::endl;\n            }\n        }\n        std::cout << \"Unpacked \" << header.fileCount << \" files from \" << container << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    void test() {\n        std::cout << \"Creating test files...\" << std::endl;\n        createTestFiles();\n        \n        std::vector<std::string> files = {\"test1.txt\", \"test2.bin\"};\n        std::string container = \"test_archive.pak\";\n        std::string extractDir = \"extracted\";\n        \n        std::cout << \"\\nPacking files...\" << std::endl;\n        pack(files, container);\n        \n        std::cout << \"\\nUnpacking files...\" << std::endl;\n        unpack(container, extractDir);\n        \n        std::cout << \"\\nTest completed successfully!\" << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Packer packer;\n    packer.test();\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <algorithm>\n\nint main() {\n    int arr[] = {5, 2, 8, 1, 9};\n    int size = sizeof(arr) / sizeof(arr[0]);\n    \n    std::cout << \"До сортировки: \";\n    for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) std::cout << arr[i] << \" \";\n    std::cout << std::endl;\n    \n    std::sort(arr, arr + size);\n    \n    std::cout << \"После сортировки: \";\n    for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) std::cout << arr[i] << \" \";\n    std::cout << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <deque>\n#include <string>\n#include <ctime>\nusing namespace std;\n\nstruct LogEntry {\n    time_t timestamp;\n    string message;\n    string severity; // INFO, WARNING, ERROR\n};\n\nstring timeToString(time_t t) {\n    char buffer[80];\n    strftime(buffer, sizeof(buffer), \"%H:%M:%S\", localtime(&t));\n    return string(buffer);\n}\n\nint main() {\n    deque<LogEntry> logBuffer;\n    const int MAX_LOG_ENTRIES = 5;\n    \n    // Имитация добавления логов\n    time_t now = time(nullptr);\n    logBuffer.push_back({now, \"Система запущена\", \"INFO\"});\n    logBuffer.push_back({now + 1, \"Пользователь вошел в систему\", \"INFO\"});\n    logBuffer.push_back({now + 2, \"Ошибка подключения к базе данных\", \"ERROR\"});\n    logBuffer.push_back({now + 3, \"Выполнено резервное копирование\", \"INFO\"});\n    logBuffer.push_back({now + 4, \"Высокая загрузка CPU\", \"WARNING\"});\n    \n    // Вывод всех логов\n    cout << \"Все логи (последние \" << MAX_LOG_ENTRIES << \" записей):\" << endl;\n    for (const auto& entry : logBuffer) {\n        cout << \"[\" << timeToString(entry.timestamp) << \"] \" \n             << entry.severity << \": \" << entry.message << endl;\n    }\n    \n    // Добавление нового лога (если превышен лимит, удаляем старый)\n    logBuffer.push_back({now + 5, \"Новое событие\", \"INFO\"});\n    if (logBuffer.size() > MAX_LOG_ENTRIES) {\n        logBuffer.pop_front();\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"\\nПосле добавления новой записи:\" << endl;\n    for (const auto& entry : logBuffer) {\n        cout << \"[\" << timeToString(entry.timestamp) << \"] \" \n             << entry.severity << \": \" << entry.message << endl;\n    }\n    \n    // Поиск ошибок в логах\n    cout << \"\\nПоиск ошибок (ERROR):\" << endl;\n    for (const auto& entry : logBuffer) {\n        if (entry.severity == \"ERROR\") {\n            cout << \"Найдена ошибка: \" << entry.message << endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    // Получение самого старого и самого нового лога\n    if (!logBuffer.empty()) {\n        cout << \"\\nСамый старый лог: \" << logBuffer.front().message << endl;\n        cout << \"Самый новый лог: \" << logBuffer.back().message << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <cstring>\n#include <cctype>\n\nvoid toUpperCase(char str[]) {\n    for (int i = 0; str[i] != '\\0'; i++) {\n        str[i] = std::toupper(str[i]);\n    }\n}\n\nvoid toLowerCase(char str[]) {\n    for (int i = 0; str[i] != '\\0'; i++) {\n        str[i] = std::tolower(str[i]);\n    }\n}\n\nint main() {\n    char text[] = \"Hello World\";\n    \n    std::cout << \"Исходная строка: \" << text << std::endl;\n    \n    toUpperCase(text);\n    std::cout << \"В верхнем регистре: \" << text << std::endl;\n    \n    toLowerCase(text);\n    std::cout << \"В нижнем регистре: \" << text << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <typeinfo>\n\n// Шаблонный класс со статическим членом\ntemplate<typename T>\nclass TypeTracker {\nprivate:\n    static int objectCount;\n    T value;\n    \npublic:\n    TypeTracker(const T& val) : value(val) {\n        objectCount++;\n    }\n    \n    ~TypeTracker() {\n        objectCount--;\n    }\n    \n    static int getCount() {\n        return objectCount;\n    }\n    \n    T getValue() const {\n        return value;\n    }\n    \n    static void printInfo() {\n        std::cout << \"TypeTracker<\" << typeid(T).name() << \"> has \" << objectCount << \" objects\" << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\ntemplate<typename T>\nint TypeTracker<T>::objectCount = 0;\n\nint main() {\n    TypeTracker<int> int1(42);\n    TypeTracker<int> int2(100);\n    TypeTracker<int> int3(200);\n    \n    TypeTracker<std::string> str1(\"Hello\");\n    TypeTracker<std::string> str2(\"World\");\n    \n    TypeTracker<double> dbl1(3.14);\n    \n    std::cout << \"Int objects: \" << TypeTracker<int>::getCount() << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"String objects: \" << TypeTracker<std::string>::getCount() << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Double objects: \" << TypeTracker<double>::getCount() << std::endl;\n    \n    TypeTracker<int>::printInfo();\n    TypeTracker<std::string>::printInfo();\n    TypeTracker<double>::printInfo();\n    \n    {\n        TypeTracker<int> temp(999);\n        std::cout << \"\\nAfter creating temp int: \" << TypeTracker<int>::getCount() << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"After temp destroyed: \" << TypeTracker<int>::getCount() << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <utility>\n#include <vector>\n#include <string>\n#include <algorithm>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Buffer {\n    int* data;\n    size_t size;\n    string name;\npublic:\n    Buffer(size_t s, const string& n = \"\") : size(s), name(n) {\n        data = new int[size];\n        cout << \"Constructor: \" << name << \" (size=\" << size << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    ~Buffer() {\n        delete[] data;\n        cout << \"Destructor: \" << name << endl;\n    }\n    \n    Buffer(const Buffer& other) : size(other.size), name(other.name + \"_copy\") {\n        data = new int[size];\n        for(size_t i = 0; i < size; i++) data[i] = other.data[i];\n        cout << \"Copy constructor: \" << name << endl;\n    }\n    \n    Buffer& operator=(const Buffer& other) {\n        if(this != &other) {\n            delete[] data;\n            size = other.size;\n            name = other.name + \"_assigned\";\n            data = new int[size];\n            for(size_t i = 0; i < size; i++) data[i] = other.data[i];\n        }\n        cout << \"Copy assignment: \" << name << endl;\n        return *this;\n    }\n    \n    Buffer(Buffer&& other) noexcept : data(other.data), size(other.size), name(move(other.name) + \"_moved\") {\n        other.data = nullptr;\n        other.size = 0;\n        other.name = \"moved_from\";\n        cout << \"Move constructor: \" << name << endl;\n    }\n    \n    Buffer& operator=(Buffer&& other) noexcept {\n        if(this != &other) {\n            delete[] data;\n            data = other.data;\n            size = other.size;\n            name = move(other.name) + \"_move_assigned\";\n            other.data = nullptr;\n            other.size = 0;\n            other.name = \"moved_from\";\n        }\n        cout << \"Move assignment: \" << name << endl;\n        return *this;\n    }\n    \n    void display() const {\n        cout << name << \" [\";\n        for(size_t i = 0; i < min(size, size_t(5)); i++) {\n            cout << data[i] << \" \";\n        }\n        if(size > 5) cout << \"...\";\n        cout << \"]\" << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nBuffer createBuffer(size_t size, const string& name) {\n    Buffer temp(size, name);\n    return temp;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    cout << \"=== Создание оригинального буфера ===\" << endl;\n    Buffer original(10, \"original\");\n    original.display();\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== Копирование буфера ===\" << endl;\n    Buffer copy = original;\n    copy.display();\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== Перемещение буфера ===\" << endl;\n    Buffer moved = move(original);\n    moved.display();\n    original.display();\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== Возврат из функции ===\" << endl;\n    Buffer fromFunction = createBuffer(5, \"function_buffer\");\n    fromFunction.display();\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== Конец области видимости ===\" << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Color {\npublic:\n    int r, g, b;\n    Color(int red, int green, int blue) : r(red), g(green), b(blue) {}\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Color red(255, 0, 0);\n    cout << \"RGB: (\" << red.r << \", \" << red.g << \", \" << red.b << \")\" << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <memory>\n#include <vector>\n#include <map>\n#include <string>\n#include <functional>\n#include <chrono>\n#include <thread>\n#include <atomic>\n#include <mutex>\n#include <queue>\n#include <condition_variable>\n#include <random>\n#include <stdexcept>\n\nclass CircuitBreaker {\npublic:\n    enum State { CLOSED, OPEN, HALF_OPEN };\n    \nprivate:\n    std::atomic<State> state{CLOSED};\n    std::atomic<int> failureCount{0};\n    std::atomic<int> successCount{0};\n    std::chrono::steady_clock::time_point lastFailureTime;\n    std::mutex stateMutex;\n    \n    int failureThreshold;\n    int successThreshold;\n    std::chrono::milliseconds resetTimeout;\n    std::chrono::milliseconds halfOpenTimeout;\n    \npublic:\n    CircuitBreaker(int failThresh = 5, int successThresh = 3, \n                   std::chrono::milliseconds reset = std::chrono::milliseconds(5000), \n                   std::chrono::milliseconds halfOpen = std::chrono::milliseconds(1000))\n        : failureThreshold(failThresh), successThreshold(successThresh),\n          resetTimeout(reset), halfOpenTimeout(halfOpen) {}\n    \n    bool allowRequest() {\n        auto currentState = state.load();\n        \n        if (currentState == OPEN) {\n            auto now = std::chrono::steady_clock::now();\n            if (now - lastFailureTime > resetTimeout) {\n                if (state.compare_exchange_strong(currentState, HALF_OPEN)) {\n                    successCount = 0;\n                    return true;\n                }\n            }\n            return false;\n        }\n        \n        return true;\n    }\n    \n    void recordSuccess() {\n        if (state.load() == HALF_OPEN) {\n            if (++successCount >= successThreshold) {\n                state = CLOSED;\n                failureCount = 0;\n            }\n        } else {\n            failureCount = 0;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void recordFailure() {\n        failureCount++;\n        lastFailureTime = std::chrono::steady_clock::now();\n        \n        if (failureCount >= failureThreshold) {\n            state = OPEN;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    State getState() const { return state.load(); }\n    \n    std::string getStateString() const {\n        switch(state.load()) {\n            case CLOSED: return \"CLOSED\";\n            case OPEN: return \"OPEN\";\n            case HALF_OPEN: return \"HALF_OPEN\";\n            default: return \"UNKNOWN\";\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nclass SagaStep {\npublic:\n    virtual ~SagaStep() = default;\n    virtual void execute() = 0;\n    virtual void compensate() = 0;\n    virtual std::string getName() const = 0;\n    virtual bool isCritical() const { return false; }\n};\n\nclass SagaOrchestrator {\n    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<SagaStep>> steps;\n    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<SagaStep>> executedSteps;\n    std::mutex executionMutex;\n    \npublic:\n    void addStep(std::unique_ptr<SagaStep> step) {\n        steps.push_back(std::move(step));\n    }\n    \n    bool execute() {\n        std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(executionMutex);\n        \n        for (std::size_t i = 0; i < steps.size(); ++i) {\n            try {\n                std::cout << \"Executing step: \" << steps[i]->getName() << std::endl;\n                steps[i]->execute();\n                executedSteps.push_back(std::unique_ptr<SagaStep>(steps[i].get()));\n                steps[i].release();\n            } catch (const std::exception& e) {\n                std::cout << \"Step failed: \" << steps[i]->getName() \n                     << \" with error: \" << e.what() << std::endl;\n                \n                if (steps[i]->isCritical()) {\n                    compensateAll();\n                    return false;\n                }\n                \n                // Пропускаем некритичный шаг и продолжаем\n                std::cout << \"Skipping non-critical step\" << std::endl;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        return true;\n    }\n    \nprivate:\n    void compensateAll() {\n        std::cout << \"Starting compensation...\" << std::endl;\n        \n        for (auto it = executedSteps.rbegin(); it != executedSteps.rend(); ++it) {\n            try {\n                std::cout << \"Compensating: \" << (*it)->getName() << std::endl;\n                (*it)->compensate();\n            } catch (const std::exception& e) {\n                std::cerr << \"Compensation failed for \" << (*it)->getName() \n                     << \": \" << e.what() << std::endl;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        executedSteps.clear();\n    }\n};\n\nclass ServiceWithCircuitBreaker {\n    std::string serviceName;\n    CircuitBreaker circuitBreaker;\n    double failureProbability;\n    std::mt19937 rng;\n    std::uniform_real_distribution<double> dist;\n    \npublic:\n    ServiceWithCircuitBreaker(const std::string& name, double failProb = 0.3)\n        : serviceName(name), failureProbability(failProb),\n          rng(std::random_device{}()), dist(0.0, 1.0) {}\n    \n    void callService() {\n        if (!circuitBreaker.allowRequest()) {\n            throw std::runtime_error(\"Circuit breaker OPEN for \" + serviceName);\n        }\n        \n        // Имитация вызова сервиса\n        std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(100));\n        \n        if (dist(rng) < failureProbability) {\n            circuitBreaker.recordFailure();\n            throw std::runtime_error(\"Service \" + serviceName + \" failed\");\n        }\n        \n        circuitBreaker.recordSuccess();\n        std::cout << \"Service \" << serviceName << \" called successfully\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    std::string getName() const { return serviceName; }\n    CircuitBreaker::State getCircuitState() const { return circuitBreaker.getState(); }\n    std::string getCircuitStateString() const { return circuitBreaker.getStateString(); }\n};\n\nclass OrderServiceStep : public SagaStep {\n    ServiceWithCircuitBreaker& service;\npublic:\n    OrderServiceStep(ServiceWithCircuitBreaker& svc) : service(svc) {}\n    \n    void execute() override { service.callService(); }\n    \n    void compensate() override {\n        std::cout << \"Compensating order service\" << std::endl;\n        // Логика компенсации заказа\n        std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(50));\n    }\n    \n    std::string getName() const override { return \"OrderService: \" + service.getName(); }\n    bool isCritical() const override { return true; }\n};\n\nclass PaymentServiceStep : public SagaStep {\n    ServiceWithCircuitBreaker& service;\npublic:\n    PaymentServiceStep(ServiceWithCircuitBreaker& svc) : service(svc) {}\n    \n    void execute() override { service.callService(); }\n    \n    void compensate() override {\n        std::cout << \"Compensating payment service\" << std::endl;\n        // Логика возврата платежа\n        std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(50));\n    }\n    \n    std::string getName() const override { return \"PaymentService: \" + service.getName(); }\n    bool isCritical() const override { return true; }\n};\n\nclass InventoryServiceStep : public SagaStep {\n    ServiceWithCircuitBreaker& service;\npublic:\n    InventoryServiceStep(ServiceWithCircuitBreaker& svc) : service(svc) {}\n    \n    void execute() override { service.callService(); }\n    \n    void compensate() override {\n        std::cout << \"Compensating inventory service\" << std::endl;\n        // Логика возврата товара на склад\n        std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(50));\n    }\n    \n    std::string getName() const override { return \"InventoryService: \" + service.getName(); }\n    bool isCritical() const override { return true; }\n};\n\nclass NotificationServiceStep : public SagaStep {\n    ServiceWithCircuitBreaker& service;\npublic:\n    NotificationServiceStep(ServiceWithCircuitBreaker& svc) : service(svc) {}\n    \n    void execute() override { service.callService(); }\n    \n    void compensate() override {\n        std::cout << \"Compensating notification service\" << std::endl;\n        // Отмена отправки уведомления\n        std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(30));\n    }\n    \n    std::string getName() const override { return \"NotificationService: \" + service.getName(); }\n    bool isCritical() const override { return false; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    std::cout << \"=== Microservices Orchestration with Saga and Circuit Breaker ===\\n\" << std::endl;\n    \n    // Создаем сервисы с разной вероятностью сбоя\n    ServiceWithCircuitBreaker orderService(\"Order\", 0.2);\n    ServiceWithCircuitBreaker paymentService(\"Payment\", 0.3);\n    ServiceWithCircuitBreaker inventoryService(\"Inventory\", 0.1);\n    ServiceWithCircuitBreaker notificationService(\"Notification\", 0.4);\n    \n    // Создаем оркестратор Saga\n    SagaOrchestrator orchestrator;\n    \n    // Добавляем шаги в Saga\n    orchestrator.addStep(std::make_unique<OrderServiceStep>(orderService));\n    orchestrator.addStep(std::make_unique<PaymentServiceStep>(paymentService));\n    orchestrator.addStep(std::make_unique<InventoryServiceStep>(inventoryService));\n    orchestrator.addStep(std::make_unique<NotificationServiceStep>(notificationService));\n    \n    // Запускаем несколько транзакций\n    int successfulTransactions = 0;\n    int failedTransactions = 0;\n    \n    for (int i = 1; i <= 5; ++i) {\n        std::cout << \"\\n=== Transaction \" << i << \" ===\" << std::endl;\n        \n        // Выводим состояния Circuit Breaker перед транзакцией\n        std::cout << \"Circuit Breaker states before transaction:\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"  Order: \" << orderService.getCircuitStateString() << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"  Payment: \" << paymentService.getCircuitStateString() << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"  Inventory: \" << inventoryService.getCircuitStateString() << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"  Notification: \" << notificationService.getCircuitStateString() << std::endl;\n        \n        bool success = orchestrator.execute();\n        \n        if (success) {\n            std::cout << \"Transaction \" << i << \" completed successfully!\" << std::endl;\n            successfulTransactions++;\n        } else {\n            std::cout << \"Transaction \" << i << \" failed! Compensation executed.\" << std::endl;\n            failedTransactions++;\n        }\n        \n        // Пауза между транзакциями\n        std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(1000));\n    }\n    \n    // Статистика\n    std::cout << \"\\n=== Statistics ==\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Successful transactions: \" << successfulTransactions << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Failed transactions: \" << failedTransactions << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Success rate: \" << (successfulTransactions * 100.0 / (successfulTransactions + failedTransactions)) << \"%\" << std::endl;\n    \n    // Финальные состояния Circuit Breaker\n    std::cout << \"\\nFinal Circuit Breaker states:\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"  Order: \" << orderService.getCircuitStateString() << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"  Payment: \" << paymentService.getCircuitStateString() << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"  Inventory: \" << inventoryService.getCircuitStateString() << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"  Notification: \" << notificationService.getCircuitStateString() << std::endl;\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n=== Demo completed ===\" << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <ctime>\n#include <map>\n\nint main() {\n    std::map<std::string, std::pair<std::string, int>> users = {\n        {\"admin01\", {\"AdminPass123\", 3}},\n        {\"manager22\", {\"MngSecure!456\", 2}},\n        {\"operator33\", {\"OpPass789\", 1}},\n        {\"guest99\", {\"GuestTemp\", 0}}\n    };\n    \n    std::string username, password;\n    int securityLevel = -1;\n    int attempts = 0;\n    bool authenticated = false;\n    \n    std::cout << \"=== СИСТЕМА КОНТРОЛЯ ДОСТУПА ===\" << std::endl;\n    \n    // Первичная аутентификация\n    while (attempts < 3 && !authenticated) {\n        std::cout << \"\\nПопытка \" << attempts + 1 << \" из 3\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Логин: \";\n        std::cin >> username;\n        std::cout << \"Пароль: \";\n        std::cin >> password;\n        \n        if (users.find(username) != users.end()) {\n            if (users[username].first == password) {\n                authenticated = true;\n                securityLevel = users[username].second;\n                std::cout << \"✓ Аутентификация успешна\" << std::endl;\n            } else {\n                std::cout << \"✗ Неверный пароль\" << std::endl;\n                attempts++;\n            }\n        } else {\n            std::cout << \"✗ Пользователь не найден\" << std::endl;\n            attempts++;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    if (!authenticated) {\n        std::cout << \"\\n!!! ДОСТУП ЗАБЛОКИРОВАН !!!\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Превышено максимальное количество попыток\" << std::endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    // Дополнительные проверки в зависимости от уровня доступа\n    std::time_t now = std::time(0);\n    std::tm *ltm = std::localtime(&now);\n    int hour = ltm->tm_hour;\n    int day = ltm->tm_wday;\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n=== ПРОВЕРКА ДОПОЛНИТЕЛЬНЫХ УСЛОВИЙ ===\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Текущее время: \" << hour << \":00\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Уровень доступа: \" << securityLevel << std::endl;\n    \n    bool timeRestricted = false;\n    bool dayRestricted = false;\n    bool biometricRequired = false;\n    \n    // Проверка временных ограничений\n    if (securityLevel == 0) {\n        if (hour < 9 || hour > 18) {\n            timeRestricted = true;\n            std::cout << \"✗ Доступ гостей разрешен только с 9:00 до 18:00\" << std::endl;\n        }\n        if (day == 0 || day == 6) {\n            dayRestricted = true;\n            std::cout << \"✗ Доступ гостей запрещен в выходные\" << std::endl;\n        }\n    } else if (securityLevel == 1) {\n        if (hour < 8 || hour > 20) {\n            timeRestricted = true;\n            std::cout << \"✗ Доступ операторов разрешен только с 8:00 до 20:00\" << std::endl;\n        }\n    } else if (securityLevel == 2) {\n        if (hour < 6 || hour > 22) {\n            timeRestricted = true;\n            std::cout << \"✗ Доступ менеджеров разрешен только с 6:00 до 22:00\" << std::endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    if (securityLevel >= 2 && hour >= 22) {\n        biometricRequired = true;\n        std::cout << \"⚠️ Требуется дополнительная биометрическая проверка\" << std::endl;\n        \n        std::string biometricCode;\n        std::cout << \"Введите биометрический код: \";\n        std::cin >> biometricCode;\n        \n        if (biometricCode != \"BIO123456\") {\n            std::cout << \"✗ Биометрическая проверка не пройдена\" << std::endl;\n            return 1;\n        }\n        std::cout << \"✓ Биометрическая проверка пройдена\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    // Проверка на наличие активных тревог\n    bool systemAlert = false;\n    bool fireAlert = (hour % 4 == 0);\n    \n    if (fireAlert && securityLevel < 3) {\n        systemAlert = true;\n        std::cout << \"\\n!!! ВНИМАНИЕ: АКТИВНАЯ ПОЖАРНАЯ ТРЕВОГА !!!\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Доступ разрешен только администраторам\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    // Итоговое решение о доступе\n    std::cout << \"\\n=== РЕШЕНИЕ О ДОСТУПЕ ===\" << std::endl;\n    \n    if (systemAlert && securityLevel < 3) {\n        std::cout << \"✗ ДОСТУП ЗАПРЕЩЕН: Активная системная тревога\" << std::endl;\n        return 1;\n    } else if (timeRestricted) {\n        std::cout << \"✗ ДОСТУП ЗАПРЕЩЕН: Временные ограничения\" << std::endl;\n        return 1;\n    } else if (dayRestricted) {\n        std::cout << \"✗ ДОСТУП ЗАПРЕЩЕН: Ограничения по дням недели\" << std::endl;\n        return 1;\n    } else {\n        std::cout << \"✓ ДОСТУП РАЗРЕШЕН\" << std::endl;\n        \n        // Определение зон доступа\n        std::cout << \"\\nДоступные зоны:\" << std::endl;\n        if (securityLevel >= 3) {\n            std::cout << \"- Серверная (уровень 3)\" << std::endl;\n            std::cout << \"- Архив (уровень 3)\" << std::endl;\n        }\n        if (securityLevel >= 2) {\n            std::cout << \"- Управление (уровень 2)\" << std::endl;\n            std::cout << \"- Финансовый отдел (уровень 2)\" << std::endl;\n        }\n        if (securityLevel >= 1) {\n            std::cout << \"- Производственная зона (уровень 1)\" << std::endl;\n            std::cout << \"- Склад (уровень 1)\" << std::endl;\n        }\n        std::cout << \"- Общая зона (уровень 0)\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint countPrimes(int n) {\n    if (n <= 2) return 0;\n    \n    vector<bool> isPrime(n, true);\n    isPrime[0] = isPrime[1] = false;\n    \n    for (int i = 2; i * i < n; i++) {\n        if (isPrime[i]) {\n            for (int j = i * i; j < n; j += i) {\n                isPrime[j] = false;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    int count = 0;\n    for (int i = 2; i < n; i++) {\n        if (isPrime[i]) count++;\n    }\n    \n    return count;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    cout << countPrimes(10) << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nvoid quickSort(int arr[], int low, int high);\nint partition(int arr[], int low, int high);\n\nint main() {\n    int arr[] = {10, 7, 8, 9, 1, 5};\n    int n = sizeof(arr) / sizeof(arr[0]);\n    \n    quickSort(arr, 0, n - 1);\n    \n    cout << \"Отсортированный массив (quicksort): \";\n    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {\n        cout << arr[i] << \" \";\n    }\n    cout << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}\n\nint partition(int arr[], int low, int high) {\n    int pivot = arr[high];\n    int i = low - 1;\n    \n    for (int j = low; j < high; j++) {\n        if (arr[j] < pivot) {\n            i++;\n            swap(arr[i], arr[j]);\n        }\n    }\n    swap(arr[i + 1], arr[high]);\n    return i + 1;\n}\n\nvoid quickSort(int arr[], int low, int high) {\n    if (low < high) {\n        int pi = partition(arr, low, high);\n        quickSort(arr, low, pi - 1);\n        quickSort(arr, pi + 1, high);\n    }\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <memory>\n#include <string>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Command {\npublic:\n    virtual void execute() = 0;\n    virtual void undo() = 0;\n    virtual ~Command() = default;\n};\n\nclass TextEditor {\nprivate:\n    string text;\npublic:\n    void addText(const string& newText) {\n        text += newText;\n    }\n    void deleteText(size_t length) {\n        if (length <= text.length()) {\n            text = text.substr(0, text.length() - length);\n        }\n    }\n    string getText() const {\n        return text;\n    }\n};\n\nclass AddTextCommand : public Command {\nprivate:\n    TextEditor& editor;\n    string addedText;\npublic:\n    AddTextCommand(TextEditor& ed, const string& text) : editor(ed), addedText(text) {}\n    void execute() override {\n        editor.addText(addedText);\n        cout << \"Текст добавлен: \" << editor.getText() << endl;\n    }\n    void undo() override {\n        editor.deleteText(addedText.length());\n        cout << \"Отмена: \" << editor.getText() << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass CommandManager {\nprivate:\n    vector<unique_ptr<Command>> history;\n    size_t current = 0;\npublic:\n    void executeCommand(unique_ptr<Command> cmd) {\n        if (current < history.size()) {\n            history.resize(current);\n        }\n        cmd->execute();\n        history.push_back(move(cmd));\n        current++;\n    }\n    void undo() {\n        if (current > 0) {\n            current--;\n            history[current]->undo();\n        }\n    }\n    void redo() {\n        if (current < history.size()) {\n            history[current]->execute();\n            current++;\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    TextEditor editor;\n    CommandManager manager;\n    \n    manager.executeCommand(make_unique<AddTextCommand>(editor, \"Hello \"));\n    manager.executeCommand(make_unique<AddTextCommand>(editor, \"World!\"));\n    \n    manager.undo();\n    manager.undo();\n    manager.redo();\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nbool isLessThanFive(int n) {\n    return n < 5;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::cout << std::boolalpha << isLessThanFive(3) << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <numeric>\n\nclass Rational {\n    int num, den;\n    void reduce() {\n        int g = std::gcd(num, den);\n        num /= g; den /= g;\n        if(den < 0) { num = -num; den = -den; }\n    }\npublic:\n    Rational(int n = 0, int d = 1) : num(n), den(d) { \n        if(den == 0) den = 1;\n        reduce(); \n    }\n    Rational operator+(const Rational& other) const {\n        return Rational(num * other.den + other.num * den, den * other.den);\n    }\n    Rational operator-(const Rational& other) const {\n        return Rational(num * other.den - other.num * den, den * other.den);\n    }\n    Rational operator*(const Rational& other) const {\n        return Rational(num * other.num, den * other.den);\n    }\n    Rational operator/(const Rational& other) const {\n        return Rational(num * other.den, den * other.num);\n    }\n    friend std::ostream& operator<<(std::ostream& os, const Rational& r) {\n        if(r.den == 1) return os << r.num;\n        return os << r.num << \"/\" << r.den;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Rational r1(2, 3), r2(3, 4);\n    std::cout << \"r1 = \" << r1 << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"r2 = \" << r2 << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"r1 + r2 = \" << (r1 + r2) << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"r1 - r2 = \" << (r1 - r2) << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"r1 * r2 = \" << (r1 * r2) << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"r1 / r2 = \" << (r1 / r2) << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nvoid swap(int& a, int& b) {\n    int temp = a;\n    a = b;\n    b = temp;\n}\n\nvoid bubbleSort(int arr[], int size) {\n    for (int i = 0; i < size - 1; i++) {\n        for (int j = 0; j < size - i - 1; j++) {\n            if (arr[j] > arr[j + 1]) {\n                // Используем функцию swap с ссылками\n                swap(arr[j], arr[j + 1]);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nint main() {\n    int numbers[] = {64, 34, 25, 12, 22, 11, 90};\n    int size = 7;\n    \n    std::cout << \"Исходный массив: \";\n    for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {\n        std::cout << numbers[i] << \" \";\n    }\n    std::cout << std::endl;\n    \n    bubbleSort(numbers, size);\n    \n    std::cout << \"Отсортированный массив: \";\n    for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {\n        std::cout << numbers[i] << \" \";\n    }\n    std::cout << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <vector>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    string text = \"HelloWorldProgramming\";\n    int chunkSize = 5;\n    vector<string> chunks;\n    \n    for(size_t i = 0; i < text.length(); i += chunkSize) {\n        string chunk = text.substr(i, chunkSize);\n        chunks.push_back(chunk);\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"Части по \" << chunkSize << \" символов:\" << endl;\n    for(const string& chunk : chunks) {\n        cout << chunk << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
