#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n\nclass Coffee {\npublic:\n    virtual std::string getDescription() = 0;\n    virtual double cost() = 0;\n};\n\nclass SimpleCoffee : public Coffee {\npublic:\n    std::string getDescription() override { return \"Simple coffee\"; }\n    double cost() override { return 1.0; }\n};\n\nclass MilkDecorator : public Coffee {\n    Coffee* coffee;\npublic:\n    MilkDecorator(Coffee* c) : coffee(c) {}\n    std::string getDescription() override { return coffee->getDescription() + \", milk\"; }\n    double cost() override { return coffee->cost() + 0.5; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Coffee* coffee = new SimpleCoffee();\n    coffee = new MilkDecorator(coffee);\n    std::cout << coffee->getDescription() << \" costs \" << coffee->cost() << std::endl;\n    delete coffee;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <unordered_map>\n#include <vector>\n\nstruct State {\n    int length;\n    int link;\n    std::unordered_map<char, int> transitions;\n    \n    State(int len = 0, int lnk = -1) : length(len), link(lnk) {}\n};\n\nclass SuffixAutomaton {\nprivate:\n    std::vector<State> states;\n    int last;\n    \n    void extend(char c) {\n        int curr = states.size();\n        states.emplace_back(states[last].length + 1);\n        \n        int p = last;\n        while(p != -1 && states[p].transitions.find(c) == states[p].transitions.end()) {\n            states[p].transitions[c] = curr;\n            p = states[p].link;\n        }\n        \n        if(p == -1) {\n            states[curr].link = 0;\n        } else {\n            int q = states[p].transitions[c];\n            if(states[p].length + 1 == states[q].length) {\n                states[curr].link = q;\n            } else {\n                int clone = states.size();\n                states.push_back(states[q]);\n                states[clone].length = states[p].length + 1;\n                \n                while(p != -1 && states[p].transitions[c] == q) {\n                    states[p].transitions[c] = clone;\n                    p = states[p].link;\n                }\n                states[q].link = states[curr].link = clone;\n            }\n        }\n        last = curr;\n    }\n    \npublic:\n    SuffixAutomaton(const std::string& str) {\n        states.emplace_back(0, -1); // начальное состояние\n        last = 0;\n        \n        for(char c : str) {\n            extend(c);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    bool contains(const std::string& pattern) const {\n        int current = 0;\n        for(char c : pattern) {\n            auto it = states[current].transitions.find(c);\n            if(it == states[current].transitions.end()) {\n                return false;\n            }\n            current = it->second;\n        }\n        return true;\n    }\n    \n    void print() const {\n        std::cout << \"Suffix Automaton States: \" << states.size() << std::endl;\n        for(size_t i = 0; i < states.size(); ++i) {\n            std::cout << \"State \" << i << \" (len=\" << states[i].length << \", link=\" << states[i].link << \"): \";\n            for(const auto& [c, to] : states[i].transitions) {\n                std::cout << c << \"->\" << to << \" \";\n            }\n            std::cout << std::endl;\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    std::string str = \"abab\";\n    SuffixAutomaton sa(str);\n    sa.print();\n    \n    std::vector<std::string> tests = {\"ab\", \"ba\", \"aba\", \"bab\", \"abc\"};\n    for(const auto& test : tests) {\n        std::cout << test << \" is \" << (sa.contains(test) ? \"\" : \"not \") << \"a substring\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <iomanip>\n\nint main() {\n    int N;\n    std::cout << \"Введите количество чисел Фибоначчи (N >= 3): \";\n    std::cin >> N;\n    \n    if (N < 3) {\n        std::cout << \"N должно быть не меньше 3.\" << std::endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    long long fib1 = 0, fib2 = 1, fib3;\n    std::cout << \"\\n1. Используя цикл for:\\n\";\n    std::cout << std::setw(5) << fib1 << std::setw(5) << fib2;\n    for (int i = 3; i <= N; ++i) {\n        fib3 = fib1 + fib2;\n        std::cout << std::setw(5) << fib3;\n        fib1 = fib2;\n        fib2 = fib3;\n    }\n    \n    fib1 = 0; fib2 = 1;\n    std::cout << \"\\n\\n2. Используя цикл while:\\n\";\n    std::cout << std::setw(5) << fib1 << std::setw(5) << fib2;\n    int count = 3;\n    while (count <= N) {\n        fib3 = fib1 + fib2;\n        std::cout << std::setw(5) << fib3;\n        fib1 = fib2;\n        fib2 = fib3;\n        ++count;\n    }\n    \n    fib1 = 0; fib2 = 1;\n    std::cout << \"\\n\\n3. Используя цикл do-while:\\n\";\n    std::cout << std::setw(5) << fib1 << std::setw(5) << fib2;\n    count = 3;\n    do {\n        fib3 = fib1 + fib2;\n        std::cout << std::setw(5) << fib3;\n        fib1 = fib2;\n        fib2 = fib3;\n        ++count;\n    } while (count <= N);\n    \n    std::cout << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\ntemplate<typename T>\nclass FlaggedValue {\n    T value;\n    bool valid;\npublic:\n    FlaggedValue(T v = T(), bool vld = true) : value(v), valid(vld) {}\n    \n    T getValue() const {\n        return value;\n    }\n    \n    bool isValid() const {\n        return valid;\n    }\n    \n    void setValid(bool vld) {\n        valid = vld;\n    }\n    \n    void print() const {\n        if (valid) {\n            cout << \"Valid: \" << value << endl;\n        } else {\n            cout << \"Invalid\" << endl;\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    FlaggedValue<int> fv1(42);\n    FlaggedValue<string> fv2(\"Hello\", false);\n    \n    fv1.print();\n    fv2.print();\n    \n    fv2.setValid(true);\n    fv2.print();\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <stack>\n#include <memory>\n\nstruct TreeNode {\n    int value;\n    std::unique_ptr<TreeNode> left;\n    std::unique_ptr<TreeNode> right;\n    TreeNode(int v) : value(v) {}\n};\n\nclass TreeIterator {\n    std::stack<TreeNode*> nodeStack;\n    void pushLeft(TreeNode* node) {\n        while (node) {\n            nodeStack.push(node);\n            node = node->left.get();\n        }\n    }\npublic:\n    TreeIterator(TreeNode* root) {\n        pushLeft(root);\n    }\n    bool hasNext() const {\n        return !nodeStack.empty();\n    }\n    int next() {\n        TreeNode* current = nodeStack.top();\n        nodeStack.pop();\n        pushLeft(current->right.get());\n        return current->value;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    auto root = std::make_unique<TreeNode>(5);\n    root->left = std::make_unique<TreeNode>(3);\n    root->right = std::make_unique<TreeNode>(8);\n    root->left->left = std::make_unique<TreeNode>(1);\n    TreeIterator it(root.get());\n    while (it.hasNext()) {\n        std::cout << it.next() << \" \";\n    }\n    std::cout << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <filesystem>\n#include <string>\n#include <vector>\n#include <ctime>\n#include <sstream>\n#include <iomanip>\n#include <cstdlib>\n#include <cstdio>\nusing namespace std;\nnamespace fs = filesystem;\n\nclass SimpleVersionControl {\nprivate:\n    string repoPath;\n    \n    string getTimestamp() {\n        time_t now = time(nullptr);\n        tm* t = localtime(&now);\n        stringstream ss;\n        ss << put_time(t, \"%Y%m%d_%H%M%S\");\n        return ss.str();\n    }\n    \npublic:\n    SimpleVersionControl(const string& path) : repoPath(path) {\n        if (!fs::exists(repoPath)) {\n            fs::create_directory(repoPath);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void commit(const string& filePath, const string& message) {\n        if (!fs::exists(filePath)) {\n            throw runtime_error(\"Файл не существует: \" + filePath);\n        }\n        \n        string timestamp = getTimestamp();\n        string versionDir = repoPath + \"/\" + timestamp;\n        fs::create_directory(versionDir);\n        \n        string destFile = versionDir + \"/\" + fs::path(filePath).filename().string();\n        fs::copy_file(filePath, destFile, fs::copy_options::overwrite_existing);\n        \n        ofstream infoFile(versionDir + \"/commit_info.txt\");\n        infoFile << \"Message: \" << message << endl;\n        infoFile << \"Timestamp: \" << timestamp << endl;\n        infoFile << \"Original: \" << fs::absolute(filePath).string() << endl;\n        infoFile.close();\n        \n        cout << \"Коммит создан: \" << timestamp << endl;\n        cout << \"Сообщение: \" << message << endl;\n    }\n    \n    void listVersions() {\n        cout << \"\\nДоступные версии:\\n\";\n        int count = 0;\n        \n        for (const auto& entry : fs::directory_iterator(repoPath)) {\n            if (fs::is_directory(entry.path())) {\n                string version = entry.path().filename().string();\n                \n                ifstream infoFile(entry.path().string() + \"/commit_info.txt\");\n                string line, message;\n                while (getline(infoFile, line)) {\n                    if (line.find(\"Message: \") == 0) {\n                        message = line.substr(9);\n                    }\n                }\n                infoFile.close();\n                \n                cout << ++count << \". \" << version << \" - \" << message << endl;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        if (count == 0) {\n            cout << \"Версий не найдено\" << endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void restoreVersion(const string& version, const string& outputPath) {\n        string versionPath = repoPath + \"/\" + version;\n        if (!fs::exists(versionPath)) {\n            throw runtime_error(\"Версия не найдена: \" + version);\n        }\n        \n        for (const auto& entry : fs::directory_iterator(versionPath)) {\n            if (fs::is_regular_file(entry.path()) && \n                entry.path().extension() != \".txt\") {\n                fs::copy_file(entry.path(), outputPath, fs::copy_options::overwrite_existing);\n                cout << \"Версия \" << version << \" восстановлена в \" << outputPath << endl;\n                return;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        throw runtime_error(\"Файл не найден в версии\");\n    }\n    \n    void showDiff(const string& version1, const string& version2) {\n        string path1 = repoPath + \"/\" + version1;\n        string path2 = repoPath + \"/\" + version2;\n        \n        if (!fs::exists(path1) || !fs::exists(path2)) {\n            throw runtime_error(\"Одна из версий не найдена\");\n        }\n        \n        size_t size1 = 0, size2 = 0;\n        \n        for (const auto& entry : fs::directory_iterator(path1)) {\n            if (fs::is_regular_file(entry.path()) && \n                entry.path().extension() != \".txt\") {\n                size1 = fs::file_size(entry.path());\n                break;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        for (const auto& entry : fs::directory_iterator(path2)) {\n            if (fs::is_regular_file(entry.path()) && \n                entry.path().extension() != \".txt\") {\n                size2 = fs::file_size(entry.path());\n                break;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        cout << \"\\nСравнение версий:\";\n        cout << \"\\nВерсия \" << version1 << \": \" << size1 << \" байт\";\n        cout << \"\\nВерсия \" << version2 << \": \" << size2 << \" байт\";\n        \n        if (size1 == size2) {\n            cout << \"\\nФайлы имеют одинаковый размер\" << endl;\n        } else {\n            cout << \"\\nРазница в размере: \" << abs((long long)size1 - (long long)size2) \n                 << \" байт\" << endl;\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    SimpleVersionControl vc(\"./test_repo\");\n    \n    // Удаляем старый репозиторий если существует\n    if (fs::exists(\"./test_repo\")) {\n        fs::remove_all(\"./test_repo\");\n    }\n    \n    // Создаем тестовый файл\n    ofstream testFile(\"test_document.txt\");\n    testFile << \"Это тестовый документ.\\n\";\n    testFile << \"Первая версия файла.\\n\";\n    testFile.close();\n    \n    cout << \"=== Демонстрация системы контроля версий ===\\n\";\n    \n    // Коммит первой версии\n    vc.commit(\"test_document.txt\", \"Первая версия документа\");\n    \n    // Модифицируем файл\n    testFile.open(\"test_document.txt\", ios::app);\n    testFile << \"Добавлена новая строка.\\n\";\n    testFile << \"Вторая версия.\\n\";\n    testFile.close();\n    \n    // Коммит второй версии\n    vc.commit(\"test_document.txt\", \"Вторая версия с дополнениями\");\n    \n    // Показываем версии\n    vc.listVersions();\n    \n    // Сравниваем версии\n    cout << \"\\n=== Сравнение версий ===\";\n    \n    // Получаем список версий для сравнения\n    vector<string> versions;\n    for (const auto& entry : fs::directory_iterator(\"./test_repo\")) {\n        if (fs::is_directory(entry.path())) {\n            versions.push_back(entry.path().filename().string());\n        }\n    }\n    \n    if (versions.size() >= 2) {\n        vc.showDiff(versions[0], versions[1]);\n    }\n    \n    // Восстанавливаем первую версию\n    cout << \"\\n=== Восстановление версии ===\\n\";\n    if (!versions.empty()) {\n        vc.restoreVersion(versions[0], \"restored_version.txt\");\n        \n        // Показываем содержимое восстановленного файла\n        ifstream restored(\"restored_version.txt\");\n        cout << \"\\nСодержимое восстановленного файла:\\n\";\n        string line;\n        while (getline(restored, line)) {\n            cout << line << endl;\n        }\n        restored.close();\n        \n        // Убираем тестовые файлы\n        remove(\"restored_version.txt\");\n        remove(\"test_document.txt\");\n        fs::remove_all(\"./test_repo\");\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== Демонстрация завершена ===\" << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n int a = 20, b = 6, c = 2;\n int result = (a + b) * c - (a / b) % c;\n cout << \"Результат (a+b)*c - (a/b)%c при a=20,b=6,c=2: \" << result << endl;\n return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass BankAccount {\nprivate:\n    string accountNumber;\n    double balance;\npublic:\n    BankAccount(const string& accNum, double initialBalance) \n        : accountNumber(accNum), balance(initialBalance) {}\n    \n    void deposit(double amount) {\n        if (amount > 0) {\n            balance += amount;\n            cout << \"Внесено: \" << amount << \" руб. Новый баланс: \" << balance << endl;\n        } else {\n            cout << \"Неверная сумма для внесения\" << endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    bool withdraw(double amount) {\n        if (amount > 0 && balance >= amount) {\n            balance -= amount;\n            cout << \"Снято: \" << amount << \" руб. Остаток: \" << balance << endl;\n            return true;\n        } else {\n            cout << \"Недостаточно средств или неверная сумма\" << endl;\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    double getBalance() const {\n        return balance;\n    }\n    \n    string getAccountNumber() const {\n        return accountNumber;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    BankAccount acc(\"123456789\", 1000.0);\n    cout << \"Счет: \" << acc.getAccountNumber() << \", баланс: \" << acc.getBalance() << endl;\n    acc.deposit(500.0);\n    acc.withdraw(200.0);\n    acc.withdraw(1500.0); // не удастся\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <functional>\n#include <unordered_map>\n#include <vector>\n#include <memory>\n#include <any>\n#include <typeinfo>\n#include <typeindex>\n#include <stdexcept>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Event {\n    string type;\n    any data;\npublic:\n    Event(const string& t, any d = {}) : type(t), data(d) {}\n    string getType() const { return type; }\n    template<typename T>\n    T getData() const {\n        try {\n            return any_cast<T>(data);\n        } catch(const bad_any_cast&) {\n            throw runtime_error(\"Invalid data type for event \" + type);\n        }\n    }\n    bool hasData() const { return data.has_value(); }\n};\n\nclass EventHandler {\n    function<void(const Event&)> callback;\n    string id;\npublic:\n    EventHandler(const string& handlerId, function<void(const Event&)> cb) \n        : id(handlerId), callback(cb) {}\n    void handle(const Event& event) const {\n        callback(event);\n    }\n    string getId() const { return id; }\n};\n\nclass EventDispatcher {\n    unordered_map<string, vector<shared_ptr<EventHandler>>> handlers;\n    unordered_map<string, vector<Event>> eventQueue;\n    bool isProcessing = false;\npublic:\n    void subscribe(const string& eventType, shared_ptr<EventHandler> handler) {\n        handlers[eventType].push_back(handler);\n        cout << \"Handler '\" << handler->getId() << \"' subscribed to '\" << eventType << \"'\" << endl;\n    }\n    void unsubscribe(const string& eventType, const string& handlerId) {\n        auto& handlersList = handlers[eventType];\n        handlersList.erase(\n            remove_if(handlersList.begin(), handlersList.end(),\n                [&](const shared_ptr<EventHandler>& h) {\n                    return h->getId() == handlerId;\n                }),\n            handlersList.end());\n        cout << \"Handler '\" << handlerId << \"' unsubscribed from '\" << eventType << \"'\" << endl;\n    }\n    void dispatch(const Event& event) {\n        if(isProcessing) {\n            // Если уже обрабатываем события, ставим в очередь\n            eventQueue[event.getType()].push_back(event);\n            return;\n        }\n        isProcessing = true;\n        auto it = handlers.find(event.getType());\n        if(it != handlers.end()) {\n            for(const auto& handler : it->second) {\n                try {\n                    handler->handle(event);\n                } catch(const exception& e) {\n                    cerr << \"Error in handler '\" << handler->getId() \n                         << \"' for event '\" << event.getType() << \"': \" << e.what() << endl;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n        isProcessing = false;\n        // Обработка событий из очереди\n        processQueue();\n    }\n    void processQueue() {\n        if(isProcessing || eventQueue.empty()) return;\n        for(auto& [eventType, events] : eventQueue) {\n            for(const auto& event : events) {\n                dispatch(event);\n            }\n        }\n        eventQueue.clear();\n    }\n    size_t getHandlerCount(const string& eventType) const {\n        auto it = handlers.find(eventType);\n        return it != handlers.end() ? it->second.size() : 0;\n    }\n};\n\n// Пример использования\nclass Player {\n    string name;\n    int score;\npublic:\n    Player(const string& n) : name(n), score(0) {}\n    void onScoreChanged(const Event& event) {\n        int newScore = event.getData<int>();\n        score = newScore;\n        cout << \"Player \" << name << \" score updated to \" << score << endl;\n    }\n    void onGameOver(const Event& event) {\n        cout << \"Player \" << name << \" received game over event\" << endl;\n    }\n    string getName() const { return name; }\n};\n\nclass Game {\n    EventDispatcher dispatcher;\npublic:\n    void start() {\n        cout << \"\\n=== Game Started ===\" << endl;\n        // Создаем игроков\n        Player player1(\"Alice\");\n        Player player2(\"Bob\");\n        // Регистрируем обработчики событий\n        auto scoreHandler1 = make_shared<EventHandler>(\n            \"Player1Score\", \n            bind(&Player::onScoreChanged, &player1, placeholders::_1));\n        auto scoreHandler2 = make_shared<EventHandler>(\n            \"Player2Score\", \n            bind(&Player::onScoreChanged, &player2, placeholders::_1));\n        auto gameOverHandler1 = make_shared<EventHandler>(\n            \"Player1GameOver\", \n            bind(&Player::onGameOver, &player1, placeholders::_1));\n        auto gameOverHandler2 = make_shared<EventHandler>(\n            \"Player2GameOver\", \n            bind(&Player::onGameOver, &player2, placeholders::_1));\n        dispatcher.subscribe(\"SCORE_CHANGED\", scoreHandler1);\n        dispatcher.subscribe(\"SCORE_CHANGED\", scoreHandler2);\n        dispatcher.subscribe(\"GAME_OVER\", gameOverHandler1);\n        dispatcher.subscribe(\"GAME_OVER\", gameOverHandler2);\n        // Генерируем события\n        dispatcher.dispatch(Event(\"SCORE_CHANGED\", 100));\n        dispatcher.dispatch(Event(\"SCORE_CHANGED\", 200));\n        dispatcher.dispatch(Event(\"GAME_OVER\"));\n        // Отписываемся от событий\n        dispatcher.unsubscribe(\"SCORE_CHANGED\", \"Player1Score\");\n        dispatcher.dispatch(Event(\"SCORE_CHANGED\", 300)); // player1 не получит\n        cout << \"\\nHandlers for SCORE_CHANGED: \" << dispatcher.getHandlerCount(\"SCORE_CHANGED\") << endl;\n        cout << \"Handlers for GAME_OVER: \" << dispatcher.getHandlerCount(\"GAME_OVER\") << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Game game;\n    game.start();\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <algorithm>\n#include <queue>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint findKthSmallestPairDistance(vector<int>& nums, int k) {\n    sort(nums.begin(), nums.end());\n    \n    int left = 0, right = nums.back() - nums[0];\n    \n    while (left < right) {\n        int mid = left + (right - left) / 2;\n        int count = 0;\n        \n        for (int i = 0, j = 0; i < nums.size(); i++) {\n            while (j < nums.size() && nums[j] - nums[i] <= mid) {\n                j++;\n            }\n            count += j - i - 1;\n        }\n        \n        if (count < k) {\n            left = mid + 1;\n        } else {\n            right = mid;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return left;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    vector<int> nums = {1,3,1};\n    cout << findKthSmallestPairDistance(nums, 1) << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nint main() {\n    int size = 6;\n    double* arr = new double[size] {2.5, 4.8, 3.1, 5.6, 1.2, 6.3};\n    double sum = 0.0;\n    for(int i = 0; i < size; i++) sum += arr[i];\n    double average = sum / size;\n    int countAbove = 0;\n    for(int i = 0; i < size; i++) {\n        if(arr[i] > average) countAbove++;\n    }\n    std::cout << \"Среднее: \" << average << \", элементов выше среднего: \" << countAbove << std::endl;\n    delete[] arr;\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <algorithm>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    int arr[] = {10, 20, 30, 40, 50};\n    int size = sizeof(arr) / sizeof(arr[0]);\n    \n    vector<int> vec(size);\n    copy(arr, arr + size, vec.begin());\n    \n    cout << \"Исходный массив: \";\n    for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {\n        cout << arr[i] << \" \";\n    }\n    cout << endl;\n    \n    cout << \"Скопированный вектор: \";\n    for (int num : vec) {\n        cout << num << \" \";\n    }\n    cout << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <map>\n#include <string>\n#include <chrono>\n#include <ctime>\n#include <iomanip>\n#include <vector>\n#include <thread>\n\nstruct Order {\n    int id;\n    std::string customer;\n    double amount;\n    std::chrono::system_clock::time_point timestamp;\n    \n    Order(int i, std::string c, double a) : id(i), customer(c), amount(a) {\n        timestamp = std::chrono::system_clock::now();\n    }\n    \n    std::string getTimeString() const {\n        std::time_t t = std::chrono::system_clock::to_time_t(timestamp);\n        char buffer[80];\n        std::strftime(buffer, sizeof(buffer), \"%H:%M:%S\", std::localtime(&t));\n        return std::string(buffer);\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    std::multimap<std::string, Order> ordersByCustomer; // клиент -> заказы\n    std::multimap<double, Order> ordersByAmount;   // сумма -> заказы\n    std::map<std::chrono::system_clock::time_point, Order> ordersByTime; // время -> заказы\n    \n    int orderId = 1;\n    \n    // Функция добавления заказа\n    auto addOrder = [&](std::string customer, double amount) {\n        Order order(orderId++, customer, amount);\n        ordersByCustomer.insert({customer, order});\n        ordersByAmount.insert({amount, order});\n        ordersByTime.insert({order.timestamp, order});\n        \n        std::cout << \"Добавлен заказ #\" << order.id \n             << \", клиент: \" << customer \n             << \", сумма: \" << amount \n             << \", время: \" << order.getTimeString() << std::endl;\n    };\n    \n    // Добавляем заказы\n    addOrder(\"Иван\", 1500.50);\n    std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(100)); // небольшая задержка\n    addOrder(\"Мария\", 2300.75);\n    std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(100));\n    addOrder(\"Иван\", 800.25);\n    std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(100));\n    addOrder(\"Алексей\", 1500.50); // та же сумма, что у первого заказа\n    std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(100));\n    addOrder(\"Мария\", 1200.00);\n    \n    // Поиск заказов клиента\n    std::cout << \"\\nПоиск заказов клиента 'Иван':\" << std::endl;\n    auto range = ordersByCustomer.equal_range(\"Иван\");\n    double totalForCustomer = 0.0;\n    for (auto it = range.first; it != range.second; ++it) {\n        std::cout << \"  Заказ #\" << it->second.id \n             << \", сумма: \" << it->second.amount \n             << \", время: \" << it->second.getTimeString() << std::endl;\n        totalForCustomer += it->second.amount;\n    }\n    std::cout << \"  Итого: \" << totalForCustomer << std::endl;\n    \n    // Поиск заказов по сумме\n    double searchAmount = 1500.50;\n    std::cout << \"\\nПоиск заказов на сумму \" << searchAmount << \":\" << std::endl;\n    auto amountRange = ordersByAmount.equal_range(searchAmount);\n    for (auto it = amountRange.first; it != amountRange.second; ++it) {\n        std::cout << \"  Заказ #\" << it->second.id \n             << \", клиент: \" << it->second.customer \n             << \", время: \" << it->second.getTimeString() << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    // Заказы в хронологическом порядке\n    std::cout << \"\\nЗаказы в хронологическом порядке:\" << std::endl;\n    for (const auto& orderPair : ordersByTime) {\n        const Order& order = orderPair.second;\n        std::cout << \"  \" << order.getTimeString() \n             << \" - Заказ #\" << order.id \n             << \", клиент: \" << order.customer \n             << \", сумма: \" << order.amount << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    // Статистика\n    std::cout << \"\\nСтатистика:\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Всего заказов: \" << ordersByCustomer.size() << std::endl;\n    \n    // Подсчет заказов по клиентам\n    std::map<std::string, int> customerOrderCount;\n    std::map<std::string, double> customerTotalAmount;\n    \n    for (const auto& orderPair : ordersByCustomer) {\n        customerOrderCount[orderPair.first]++;\n        customerTotalAmount[orderPair.first] += orderPair.second.amount;\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"Заказов по клиентам:\" << std::endl;\n    for (const auto& customer : customerOrderCount) {\n        std::cout << \"  \" << customer.first \n             << \": \" << customer.second << \" заказов\"\n             << \", на сумму: \" << customerTotalAmount[customer.first] << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    // Найти самый большой заказ\n    if (!ordersByAmount.empty()) {\n        auto largestOrder = ordersByAmount.rbegin(); // последний элемент (максимальный)\n        std::cout << \"\\nСамый большой заказ:\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"  Заказ #\" << largestOrder->second.id \n             << \", клиент: \" << largestOrder->second.customer \n             << \", сумма: \" << largestOrder->second.amount << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    // Фильтрация заказов по времени (последние 3 заказа)\n    std::cout << \"\\nПоследние 3 заказа:\" << std::endl;\n    auto timeIt = ordersByTime.rbegin();\n    int count = 0;\n    while (timeIt != ordersByTime.rend() && count < 3) {\n        const Order& order = timeIt->second;\n        std::cout << \"  Заказ #\" << order.id \n             << \", клиент: \" << order.customer \n             << \", сумма: \" << order.amount \n             << \", время: \" << order.getTimeString() << std::endl;\n        ++timeIt;\n        ++count;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <cctype>\n\nint main() {\n    std::string text = \"abc123def4567ghi89jkl123456\";\n    int maxLength = 0;\n    int currentLength = 0;\n    \n    for(char c : text) {\n        if(std::isdigit(c)) {\n            currentLength++;\n            if(currentLength > maxLength) {\n                maxLength = currentLength;\n            }\n        } else {\n            currentLength = 0;\n        }\n    }\n    std::cout << \"Длина самой длинной последовательности цифр: \" << maxLength << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <list>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass HashTable {\n    static const int TABLE_SIZE = 10;\n    vector<list<pair<int, string>>> table;\n    int hashFunction(int key) const {\n        return key % TABLE_SIZE;\n    }\npublic:\n    HashTable() : table(TABLE_SIZE) {}\n    void insert(int key, const string& value) {\n        int index = hashFunction(key);\n        for(auto& item : table[index]) {\n            if(item.first == key) {\n                item.second = value;\n                return;\n            }\n        }\n        table[index].push_back(make_pair(key, value));\n    }\n    bool find(int key, string& value) const {\n        int index = hashFunction(key);\n        for(const auto& item : table[index]) {\n            if(item.first == key) {\n                value = item.second;\n                return true;\n            }\n        }\n        return false;\n    }\n    void remove(int key) {\n        int index = hashFunction(key);\n        auto& chain = table[index];\n        for(auto it = chain.begin(); it != chain.end(); ++it) {\n            if(it->first == key) {\n                chain.erase(it);\n                return;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    void print() const {\n        for(int i = 0; i < TABLE_SIZE; i++) {\n            cout << \"Bucket \" << i << \": \";\n            for(const auto& item : table[i]) {\n                cout << \"[\" << item.first << \": \" << item.second << \"] \";\n            }\n            cout << endl;\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    HashTable ht;\n    ht.insert(1, \"Alice\");\n    ht.insert(11, \"Bob\"); // коллизия: 1 и 11 дадут одинаковый хеш\n    ht.insert(2, \"Charlie\");\n    ht.print();\n    string value;\n    if(ht.find(11, value)) {\n        cout << \"\\nFound key 11: \" << value << endl;\n    }\n    ht.remove(1);\n    cout << \"\\nAfter removing key 1:\\n\";\n    ht.print();\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nint main() {\n char ch;\n std::cout << \"Введите символ: \";\n std::cin >> ch;\n std::cout << \"Предыдущий: '\" << char(ch - 1) << \"' (\" << int(ch-1) << \")\" << std::endl;\n std::cout << \"Текущий: '\" << ch << \"' (\" << int(ch) << \")\" << std::endl;\n std::cout << \"Следующий: '\" << char(ch + 1) << \"' (\" << int(ch+1) << \")\" << std::endl;\n return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\nusing namespace std;\n\nstruct CircleSegment {\n    double radius;\n    \n    double segmentArea(double chordLength, double height) const {\n        double theta = 2 * acos((radius - height) / radius);\n        return 0.5 * radius * radius * (theta - sin(theta));\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    CircleSegment circle = {5.0};\n    double area = circle.segmentArea(6.0, 2.0);\n    cout << \"Площадь сегмента круга: \" << area << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nenum ParseError {\n SYNTAX_UNEXPECTED_TOKEN = 1000,\n SYNTAX_MISSING_SEMICOLON = 1001,\n SYNTAX_INVALID_OPERATOR = 1002,\n SEMANTIC_UNDEFINED_VARIABLE = 2000,\n SEMANTIC_TYPE_MISMATCH = 2001,\n IO_FILE_NOT_FOUND = 3000,\n IO_PERMISSION_DENIED = 3001,\n SUCCESS = 0\n};\n\nconst char* getErrorCategory(int errorCode) {\n if (errorCode == SUCCESS) return \"УСПЕХ\";\n if (errorCode >= 1000 && errorCode < 2000) return \"СИНТАКСИС\";\n if (errorCode >= 2000 && errorCode < 3000) return \"СЕМАНТИКА\";\n if (errorCode >= 3000 && errorCode < 4000) return \"ВВОД/ВЫВОД\";\n return \"НЕИЗВЕСТНО\";\n}\n\nint main() {\n ParseError errors[] = {SYNTAX_UNEXPECTED_TOKEN, SEMANTIC_TYPE_MISMATCH, IO_FILE_NOT_FOUND, SUCCESS};\n \n for (ParseError err : errors) {\n cout << \"Код ошибки: \" << err \n << \", Категория: \" << getErrorCategory(err) << endl;\n }\n \n return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <queue>\n#include <algorithm>\n\nstd::pair<int, int> bfsFarthest(const std::vector<std::vector<int>>& tree, int start) {\n    int n = tree.size();\n    std::vector<bool> visited(n, false);\n    std::vector<int> distance(n, 0);\n    std::queue<int> q;\n    \n    q.push(start);\n    visited[start] = true;\n    distance[start] = 0;\n    \n    while (!q.empty()) {\n        int node = q.front();\n        q.pop();\n        \n        for (int neighbor : tree[node]) {\n            if (!visited[neighbor]) {\n                visited[neighbor] = true;\n                distance[neighbor] = distance[node] + 1;\n                q.push(neighbor);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    int maxDist = 0;\n    int farthestNode = start;\n    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {\n        if (distance[i] > maxDist) {\n            maxDist = distance[i];\n            farthestNode = i;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return {farthestNode, maxDist};\n}\n\nint treeDiameter(const std::vector<std::vector<int>>& tree) {\n    // Первый BFS для нахождения самой удаленной вершины\n    std::pair<int, int> firstBFS = bfsFarthest(tree, 0);\n    int farthest1 = firstBFS.first;\n    \n    // Второй BFS для нахождения диаметра\n    std::pair<int, int> secondBFS = bfsFarthest(tree, farthest1);\n    \n    return secondBFS.second;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    int n = 7;\n    std::vector<std::vector<int>> tree(n);\n    \n    tree[0] = {1, 2};\n    tree[1] = {0, 3, 4};\n    tree[2] = {0, 5};\n    tree[3] = {1};\n    tree[4] = {1, 6};\n    tree[5] = {2};\n    tree[6] = {4};\n    \n    int diameter = treeDiameter(tree);\n    std::cout << \"Диаметр дерева: \" << diameter << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <mutex>\n#include <stdexcept>\n#include <functional>\n#include <memory>\n#include <new>\n\ntemplate<typename T>\nclass LazyResource {\n    mutable std::once_flag init_flag;\n    mutable std::unique_ptr<T> resource;\n    std::function<T*()> initializer;\n    mutable std::mutex reset_mutex;\n    mutable bool initialized = false;\n    \n    void ensure_initialized() const {\n        std::call_once(init_flag, [this] {\n            resource.reset(initializer());\n            if (!resource) throw std::logic_error(\"Failed to initialize resource\");\n            initialized = true;\n            std::cout << \"Resource initialized\" << std::endl;\n        });\n    }\n    \npublic:\n    explicit LazyResource(std::function<T*()> init) : initializer(init) {}\n    \n    T& get() const {\n        ensure_initialized();\n        return *resource;\n    }\n    \n    void reset() {\n        std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(reset_mutex);\n        resource.reset(nullptr);\n        initialized = false;\n        // Не можем переприсвоить once_flag, создаём новый объект через placement new\n        init_flag.~once_flag();\n        new (&init_flag) std::once_flag();\n        std::cout << \"Resource reset\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    bool is_initialized() const {\n        std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(reset_mutex);\n        return initialized;\n    }\n    \n    LazyResource(const LazyResource&) = delete;\n    LazyResource& operator=(const LazyResource&) = delete;\n};\n\nclass ExpensiveResource {\npublic:\n    ExpensiveResource() { \n        std::cout << \"ExpensiveResource constructed\" << std::endl; \n    }\n    void use() { \n        std::cout << \"Using ExpensiveResource\" << std::endl; \n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    LazyResource<ExpensiveResource> lazy([]() {\n        return new ExpensiveResource();\n    });\n    \n    std::cout << \"Is initialized? \" << std::boolalpha << lazy.is_initialized() << std::endl;\n    \n    lazy.get().use();\n    \n    std::cout << \"Is initialized? \" << std::boolalpha << lazy.is_initialized() << std::endl;\n    \n    lazy.get().use(); // повторный вызов не инициализирует заново\n    \n    // Демонстрация reset\n    lazy.reset();\n    \n    std::cout << \"After reset, is initialized? \" << std::boolalpha << lazy.is_initialized() << std::endl;\n    \n    lazy.get().use(); // повторная инициализация\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\n\nbool isPrime(int n) {\n    if (n <= 1) return false;\n    if (n == 2) return true;\n    if (n % 2 == 0) return false;\n    \n    for (int i = 3; i <= std::sqrt(n); i += 2) {\n        if (n % i == 0) return false;\n    }\n    return true;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    int numbers[] = {2, 3, 17, 25, 97, 100};\n    for (int n : numbers) {\n        std::cout << n << \" - \" << (isPrime(n) ? \"простое\" : \"составное\") << std::endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nclass Box {\n    int* data;\npublic:\n    Box(int v) { data = new int(v); }\n    ~Box() { delete data; }\n    \n    Box& operator=(Box&& other) noexcept {\n        delete data;\n        data = other.data;\n        other.data = nullptr;\n        std::cout << \"Move assignment\" << std::endl;\n        return *this;\n    }\n    \n    int get() const { return data ? *data : -1; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Box b1(50);\n    Box b2(0);\n    b2 = std::move(b1);\n    std::cout << \"b1: \" << b1.get() << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"b2: \" << b2.get() << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <any>\n#include <string>\n#include <typeinfo>\n#include <vector>\n\nvoid print_any(const std::any& value) {\n    if (value.type() == typeid(int)) {\n        std::cout << \"int: \" << std::any_cast<int>(value) << std::endl;\n    } else if (value.type() == typeid(double)) {\n        std::cout << \"double: \" << std::any_cast<double>(value) << std::endl;\n    } else if (value.type() == typeid(std::string)) {\n        std::cout << \"string: \" << std::any_cast<std::string>(value) << std::endl;\n    } else {\n        std::cout << \"неизвестный тип: \" << value.type().name() << std::endl;\n    }\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::vector<std::any> values;\n    \n    values.push_back(42);\n    values.push_back(3.14159);\n    values.push_back(std::string(\"Hello\"));\n    values.push_back(true);\n    \n    std::cout << \"Содержимое вектора:\" << std::endl;\n    for (const auto& val : values) {\n        print_any(val);\n    }\n    \n    // Безопасное извлечение\n    try {\n        auto str = std::any_cast<std::string>(values[2]);\n        std::cout << \"\\nБезопасное извлечение: \" << str << std::endl;\n    } catch (const std::bad_any_cast& e) {\n        std::cout << \"Ошибка приведения типа: \" << e.what() << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    // Проверка наличия значения\n    if (values[0].has_value()) {\n        std::cout << \"Первое значение существует\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    int arr[] = {1, 2, 3, 4};\n    int size = sizeof(arr) / sizeof(arr[0]);\n    int sumOfSquares = 0;\n    \n    for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {\n        sumOfSquares += arr[i] * arr[i];\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"Сумма квадратов элементов: \" << sumOfSquares << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <numeric>\n#include <stdexcept>\n#include <cmath>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Fraction {\n    long long numerator, denominator;\n    \n    void reduce() {\n        if(denominator == 0) {\n            throw invalid_argument(\"Знаменатель не может быть нулем\");\n        }\n        if(denominator < 0) {\n            numerator = -numerator;\n            denominator = -denominator;\n        }\n        long long gcd_val = gcd(abs(numerator), denominator);\n        numerator /= gcd_val;\n        denominator /= gcd_val;\n    }\n    \npublic:\n    Fraction() : numerator(0), denominator(1) {\n        cout << \"Дробь 0/1 создана\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    Fraction(long long num, long long den = 1) : numerator(num), denominator(den) {\n        reduce();\n        cout << \"Дробь \" << numerator << \"/\" << denominator << \" создана\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    Fraction(const Fraction& other) : numerator(other.numerator), denominator(other.denominator) {\n        cout << \"Дробь скопирована\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    ~Fraction() {\n        cout << \"Дробь \" << numerator << \"/\" << denominator << \" разрушена\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    Fraction& operator=(const Fraction& other) {\n        if(this != &other) {\n            numerator = other.numerator;\n            denominator = other.denominator;\n        }\n        cout << \"Дробь присвоена\" << endl;\n        return *this;\n    }\n    \n    Fraction operator+(const Fraction& other) const {\n        long long num = numerator * other.denominator + other.numerator * denominator;\n        long long den = denominator * other.denominator;\n        return Fraction(num, den);\n    }\n    \n    Fraction operator-(const Fraction& other) const {\n        long long num = numerator * other.denominator - other.numerator * denominator;\n        long long den = denominator * other.denominator;\n        return Fraction(num, den);\n    }\n    \n    Fraction operator*(const Fraction& other) const {\n        return Fraction(numerator * other.numerator, denominator * other.denominator);\n    }\n    \n    Fraction operator/(const Fraction& other) const {\n        if(other.numerator == 0) {\n            throw invalid_argument(\"Деление на ноль\");\n        }\n        return Fraction(numerator * other.denominator, denominator * other.numerator);\n    }\n    \n    Fraction operator-() const {\n        return Fraction(-numerator, denominator);\n    }\n    \n    bool operator==(const Fraction& other) const {\n        return numerator == other.numerator && denominator == other.denominator;\n    }\n    \n    bool operator<(const Fraction& other) const {\n        return numerator * other.denominator < other.numerator * denominator;\n    }\n    \n    bool operator>(const Fraction& other) const {\n        return numerator * other.denominator > other.numerator * denominator;\n    }\n    \n    Fraction reciprocal() const {\n        if(numerator == 0) {\n            throw runtime_error(\"Невозможно получить обратную дробь для нуля\");\n        }\n        return Fraction(denominator, numerator);\n    }\n    \n    Fraction pow(int exponent) const {\n        if(exponent >= 0) {\n            return Fraction(::pow(numerator, exponent), ::pow(denominator, exponent));\n        } else {\n            return reciprocal().pow(-exponent);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    double toDouble() const {\n        return static_cast<double>(numerator) / denominator;\n    }\n    \n    void setNumerator(long long num) {\n        numerator = num;\n        reduce();\n    }\n    \n    void setDenominator(long long den) {\n        if(den == 0) {\n            throw invalid_argument(\"Знаменатель не может быть нулем\");\n        }\n        denominator = den;\n        reduce();\n    }\n    \n    long long getNumerator() const { return numerator; }\n    long long getDenominator() const { return denominator; }\n    \n    bool isInteger() const {\n        return denominator == 1;\n    }\n    \n    bool isProper() const {\n        return abs(numerator) < denominator;\n    }\n    \n    friend ostream& operator<<(ostream& os, const Fraction& f) {\n        if(f.denominator == 1) {\n            os << f.numerator;\n        } else {\n            os << f.numerator << \"/\" << f.denominator;\n        }\n        return os;\n    }\n    \n    friend istream& operator>>(istream& is, Fraction& f) {\n        char slash;\n        is >> f.numerator >> slash >> f.denominator;\n        f.reduce();\n        return is;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    try {\n        Fraction f1(2, 3);\n        Fraction f2(3, 4);\n        \n        cout << \"f1 = \" << f1 << endl;\n        cout << \"f2 = \" << f2 << endl;\n        \n        Fraction sum = f1 + f2;\n        cout << \"f1 + f2 = \" << sum << \" ≈ \" << sum.toDouble() << endl;\n        \n        Fraction diff = f1 - f2;\n        cout << \"f1 - f2 = \" << diff << endl;\n        \n        Fraction prod = f1 * f2;\n        cout << \"f1 * f2 = \" << prod << endl;\n        \n        Fraction quot = f1 / f2;\n        cout << \"f1 / f2 = \" << quot << endl;\n        \n        Fraction neg = -f1;\n        cout << \"-f1 = \" << neg << endl;\n        \n        Fraction recip = f1.reciprocal();\n        cout << \"1/f1 = \" << recip << endl;\n        \n        Fraction pow2 = f1.pow(2);\n        cout << \"f1^2 = \" << pow2 << endl;\n        \n        cout << \"f1 == f2? \" << (f1 == f2 ? \"Да\" : \"Нет\") << endl;\n        cout << \"f1 < f2? \" << (f1 < f2 ? \"Да\" : \"Нет\") << endl;\n        \n        Fraction f3 = f1; // Конструктор копирования\n        cout << \"Копия f1 = \" << f3 << endl;\n        \n        cout << \"f1 целое число? \" << (f1.isInteger() ? \"Да\" : \"Нет\") << endl;\n        cout << \"f1 правильная дробь? \" << (f1.isProper() ? \"Да\" : \"Нет\") << endl;\n        \n    } catch(const exception& e) {\n        cerr << \"Ошибка: \" << e.what() << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    int size = 8;\n    int* arr = new int[size] {1, 4, 7, 2, 9, 3, 6, 8};\n    int targetSum = 10;\n    bool foundPair = false;\n    for(int i = 0; i < size; i++) {\n        for(int j = i+1; j < size; j++) {\n            if(arr[i] + arr[j] == targetSum) {\n                cout << \"Найдена пара: \" << arr[i] << \" + \" << arr[j] << \" = \" << targetSum << endl;\n                foundPair = true;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    if(!foundPair) {\n        cout << \"Пара с суммой \" << targetSum << \" не найдена.\" << endl;\n    }\n    delete[] arr;\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\nusing namespace std;\n\nlong long fibonacci(int n) {\n    if (n <= 1) return n;\n    \n    vector<long long> fib(n + 1);\n    fib[0] = 0;\n    fib[1] = 1;\n    \n    for (int i = 2; i <= n; i++) {\n        fib[i] = fib[i-1] + fib[i-2];\n    }\n    \n    return fib[n];\n}\n\nint main() {\n    for (int n = 0; n <= 20; n++) {\n        cout << \"fib(\" << n << \") = \" << fibonacci(n) << endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <queue>\n#include <vector>\n#include <map>\n#include <string>\n#include <algorithm>\n#include <iomanip>\n\n// Структура для узла дерева Хаффмана\nstruct HuffmanNode {\n    char ch;\n    int freq;\n    HuffmanNode *left, *right;\n    \n    HuffmanNode(char character, int frequency) : \n        ch(character), freq(frequency), left(nullptr), right(nullptr) {}\n};\n\n// Компаратор для priority_queue\nstruct Compare {\n    bool operator()(HuffmanNode* a, HuffmanNode* b) {\n        return a->freq > b->freq; // минимальная частота имеет высший приоритет\n    }\n};\n\n// Функция для обхода дерева и генерации кодов\nvoid generateCodes(HuffmanNode* root, std::string code, std::map<char, std::string>& huffmanCodes) {\n    if (!root) return;\n    \n    // Если это лист (содержит символ)\n    if (!root->left && !root->right) {\n        huffmanCodes[root->ch] = code;\n    }\n    \n    // Рекурсивный обход левого и правого поддеревьев\n    generateCodes(root->left, code + \"0\", huffmanCodes);\n    generateCodes(root->right, code + \"1\", huffmanCodes);\n}\n\n// Функция для печати дерева (в упрощенном виде)\nvoid printTree(HuffmanNode* root, int depth = 0) {\n    if (!root) return;\n    \n    // Отступ для визуализации уровня\n    std::string indent(depth * 2, ' ');\n    \n    if (!root->left && !root->right) {\n        // Лист - печатаем символ и частоту\n        if (root->ch == '\\n') {\n            std::cout << indent << \"[\\\\n:\" << root->freq << \"]\" << std::endl;\n        } else if (root->ch == ' ') {\n            std::cout << indent << \"[space:\" << root->freq << \"]\" << std::endl;\n        } else if (root->ch == '\\t') {\n            std::cout << indent << \"[\\\\t:\" << root->freq << \"]\" << std::endl;\n        } else {\n            std::cout << indent << \"[\" << root->ch << \":\" << root->freq << \"]\" << std::endl;\n        }\n    } else {\n        // Внутренний узел - печатаем частоту\n        std::cout << indent << \"[freq:\" << root->freq << \"]\" << std::endl;\n        printTree(root->left, depth + 1);\n        printTree(root->right, depth + 1);\n    }\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::string text;\n    \n    std::cout << \"Алгоритм Хаффмана для сжатия данных\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Введите текст для кодирования: \" << std::endl;\n    std::getline(std::cin, text);\n    \n    if (text.empty()) {\n        std::cout << \"Текст не должен быть пустым!\" << std::endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    // Шаг 1: Подсчет частоты символов\n    std::cout << \"\\n=== Шаг 1: Подсчет частоты символов ===\" << std::endl;\n    std::map<char, int> frequency;\n    for (char ch : text) {\n        frequency[ch]++;\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"Символ\\tЧастота\" << std::endl;\n    for (auto& pair : frequency) {\n        if (pair.first == '\\n') {\n            std::cout << \"\\\\n\\t\" << pair.second << std::endl;\n        } else if (pair.first == ' ') {\n            std::cout << \"space\\t\" << pair.second << std::endl;\n        } else if (pair.first == '\\t') {\n            std::cout << \"\\\\t\\t\" << pair.second << std::endl;\n        } else {\n            std::cout << pair.first << \"\\t\" << pair.second << std::endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    // Шаг 2: Создание приоритетной очереди\n    std::cout << \"\\n=== Шаг 2: Создание приоритетной очереди ===\" << std::endl;\n    std::priority_queue<HuffmanNode*, std::vector<HuffmanNode*>, Compare> pq;\n    \n    for (auto& pair : frequency) {\n        HuffmanNode* node = new HuffmanNode(pair.first, pair.second);\n        pq.push(node);\n        std::cout << \"Добавлен узел: символ '\";\n        if (pair.first == '\\n') std::cout << \"\\\\n\";\n        else if (pair.first == ' ') std::cout << \"space\";\n        else if (pair.first == '\\t') std::cout << \"\\\\t\";\n        else std::cout << pair.first;\n        std::cout << \"', частота = \" << pair.second << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    // Шаг 3: Построение дерева Хаффмана\n    std::cout << \"\\n=== Шаг 3: Построение дерева Хаффмана ===\" << std::endl;\n    while (pq.size() > 1) {\n        // Извлекаем два узла с наименьшей частотой\n        HuffmanNode* left = pq.top(); pq.pop();\n        HuffmanNode* right = pq.top(); pq.pop();\n        \n        // Создаем новый узел с суммой частот\n        HuffmanNode* parent = new HuffmanNode('\\0', left->freq + right->freq);\n        parent->left = left;\n        parent->right = right;\n        \n        std::cout << \"Объединяем узлы: \" << left->freq << \" + \" << right->freq \n                  << \" = \" << parent->freq << std::endl;\n        \n        pq.push(parent);\n    }\n    \n    HuffmanNode* root = pq.top();\n    std::cout << \"\\nДерево Хаффмана построено. Корень имеет частоту: \" << root->freq << std::endl;\n    \n    // Шаг 4: Генерация кодов Хаффмана\n    std::cout << \"\\n=== Шаг 4: Генерация кодов Хаффмана ===\" << std::endl;\n    std::map<char, std::string> huffmanCodes;\n    generateCodes(root, \"\", huffmanCodes);\n    \n    std::cout << \"Символ\\tКод\" << std::endl;\n    for (auto& pair : huffmanCodes) {\n        if (pair.first == '\\n') {\n            std::cout << \"\\\\n\\t\" << pair.second << std::endl;\n        } else if (pair.first == ' ') {\n            std::cout << \"space\\t\" << pair.second << std::endl;\n        } else if (pair.first == '\\t') {\n            std::cout << \"\\\\t\\t\" << pair.second << std::endl;\n        } else {\n            std::cout << pair.first << \"\\t\" << pair.second << std::endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    // Шаг 5: Кодирование текста\n    std::cout << \"\\n=== Шаг 5: Кодирование текста ===\" << std::endl;\n    std::string encodedText = \"\";\n    for (char ch : text) {\n        encodedText += huffmanCodes[ch];\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"Исходный текст: \" << text << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Закодированный текст: \" << encodedText << std::endl;\n    \n    // Шаг 6: Расчет статистики сжатия\n    std::cout << \"\\n=== Шаг 6: Статистика сжатия ===\" << std::endl;\n    int originalBits = text.length() * 8; // 8 бит на символ в ASCII\n    int compressedBits = encodedText.length();\n    double compressionRatio = (1.0 - (double)compressedBits / originalBits) * 100;\n    double bitsPerChar = (double)compressedBits / text.length();\n    \n    std::cout << \"Длина исходного текста: \" << text.length() << \" символов\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Исходный размер: \" << originalBits << \" бит\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Закодированный размер: \" << compressedBits << \" бит\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Коэффициент сжатия: \" << std::fixed << std::setprecision(2) << compressionRatio << \"%\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Средняя длина кода: \" << bitsPerChar << \" бит/символ\" << std::endl;\n    \n    // Шаг 7: Визуализация дерева\n    std::cout << \"\\n=== Шаг 7: Визуализация дерева Хаффмана ===\" << std::endl;\n    printTree(root);\n    \n    // Шаг 8: Декодирование (для проверки)\n    std::cout << \"\\n=== Шаг 8: Декодирование (проверка) ===\" << std::endl;\n    std::string decodedText = \"\";\n    HuffmanNode* current = root;\n    \n    for (char bit : encodedText) {\n        if (bit == '0') {\n            current = current->left;\n        } else {\n            current = current->right;\n        }\n        \n        // Если достигли листа\n        if (!current->left && !current->right) {\n            decodedText += current->ch;\n            current = root;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"Декодированный текст: \" << decodedText << std::endl;\n    \n    if (text == decodedText) {\n        std::cout << \"✓ Декодирование успешно!\" << std::endl;\n    } else {\n        std::cout << \"✗ Ошибка декодирования!\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    // Пример с предопределенным текстом\n    std::cout << \"\\n=== Пример с фразой 'hello world' ===\" << std::endl;\n    std::string example = \"hello world\";\n    std::map<char, int> exampleFreq;\n    for (char ch : example) exampleFreq[ch]++;\n    \n    std::cout << \"Частоты символов для 'hello world':\" << std::endl;\n    for (auto& pair : exampleFreq) {\n        if (pair.first == ' ') {\n            std::cout << \"'space': \" << pair.second << std::endl;\n        } else {\n            std::cout << \"'\" << pair.first << \"': \" << pair.second << std::endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    // Очистка памяти\n    std::queue<HuffmanNode*> nodesToDelete;\n    nodesToDelete.push(root);\n    while (!nodesToDelete.empty()) {\n        HuffmanNode* node = nodesToDelete.front();\n        nodesToDelete.pop();\n        if (node->left) nodesToDelete.push(node->left);\n        if (node->right) nodesToDelete.push(node->right);\n        delete node;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass VirtualBase {\nprotected:\n    string name;\npublic:\n    VirtualBase(const string& n) : name(n) {\n        cout << \"VirtualBase(\" << name << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n    VirtualBase(const VirtualBase& other) : name(other.name + \"_copy\") {\n        cout << \"VirtualBase copy(\" << name << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n    VirtualBase(VirtualBase&& other) noexcept : name(move(other.name) + \"_moved\") {\n        cout << \"VirtualBase move(\" << name << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n    virtual ~VirtualBase() {\n        cout << \"~VirtualBase(\" << name << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass Derived1 : virtual public VirtualBase {\n    int data1;\npublic:\n    Derived1(const string& n, int d1) : VirtualBase(n + \"_D1\"), data1(d1) {\n        cout << \"Derived1(\" << name << \", \" << data1 << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n    Derived1(const Derived1& other) : VirtualBase(other), data1(other.data1) {\n        cout << \"Derived1 copy(\" << name << \", \" << data1 << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n    Derived1(Derived1&& other) noexcept \n        : VirtualBase(move(other)), data1(other.data1) {\n        cout << \"Derived1 move(\" << name << \", \" << data1 << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass Derived2 : virtual public VirtualBase {\n    double data2;\npublic:\n    Derived2(const string& n, double d2) : VirtualBase(n + \"_D2\"), data2(d2) {\n        cout << \"Derived2(\" << name << \", \" << data2 << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n    Derived2(const Derived2& other) : VirtualBase(other), data2(other.data2) {\n        cout << \"Derived2 copy(\" << name << \", \" << data2 << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n    Derived2(Derived2&& other) noexcept \n        : VirtualBase(move(other)), data2(other.data2) {\n        cout << \"Derived2 move(\" << name << \", \" << data2 << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass Final : public Derived1, public Derived2 {\n    char id;\npublic:\n    Final(const string& n, int d1, double d2, char c) \n        : VirtualBase(n + \"_F\"), \n          Derived1(n, d1), \n          Derived2(n, d2), \n          id(c) {\n        cout << \"Final(\" << name << \", \" << id << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n    Final(const Final& other) \n        : VirtualBase(other), \n          Derived1(other), \n          Derived2(other), \n          id(other.id) {\n        cout << \"Final copy(\" << name << \", \" << id << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n    Final(Final&& other) noexcept \n        : VirtualBase(move(other)), \n          Derived1(move(other)), \n          Derived2(move(other)), \n          id(other.id) {\n        cout << \"Final move(\" << name << \", \" << id << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    cout << \"=== Creating original ===\" << endl;\n    Final f1(\"Test\", 10, 3.14, 'X');\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== Copy construction ===\" << endl;\n    Final f2 = f1;\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== Move construction ===\" << endl;\n    Final f3 = move(f1);\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== Destructors ===\" << endl;\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Base {\nprotected:\n    int value;\npublic:\n    Base(int v) : value(v) {}\n    virtual void print(ostream& os) const {\n        os << \"Base: \" << value;\n    }\n};\n\nclass Derived : public Base {\n    double extra;\npublic:\n    Derived(int v, double e) : Base(v), extra(e) {}\n    void print(ostream& os) const override {\n        Base::print(os);\n        os << \", Extra: \" << extra;\n    }\n};\n\nostream& operator<<(ostream& os, const Base& obj) {\n    obj.print(os);\n    return os;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    Derived d(10, 3.14);\n    cout << d << endl;\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n\nstd::string toRomanWithValidation(int num) {\n    if (num <= 0 || num >= 4000) {\n        return \"Число должно быть от 1 до 3999\";\n    }\n    \n    std::string roman;\n    int values[] = {1000, 900, 500, 400, 100, 90, 50, 40, 10, 9, 5, 4, 1};\n    std::string symbols[] = {\"M\", \"CM\", \"D\", \"CD\", \"C\", \"XC\", \"L\", \"XL\", \"X\", \"IX\", \"V\", \"IV\", \"I\"};\n    \n    for(int i = 0; i < 13; i++) {\n        while(num >= values[i]) {\n            roman += symbols[i];\n            num -= values[i];\n        }\n    }\n    return roman;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    int numbers[] = {1, 4, 9, 49, 99, 499, 999, 2023, 3999, 0, 4000};\n    for (int num : numbers) {\n        std::cout << num << \" = \" << toRomanWithValidation(num) << std::endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <iomanip>\n\nconst int N = 4;\n\n// Функция для получения минора матрицы\nvoid getMinor(int mat[N][N], int temp[N][N], int p, int q, int n) {\n    int i = 0, j = 0;\n    \n    for (int row = 0; row < n; row++) {\n        for (int col = 0; col < n; col++) {\n            if (row != p && col != q) {\n                temp[i][j++] = mat[row][col];\n                \n                if (j == n - 1) {\n                    j = 0;\n                    i++;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n// Функция для вычисления определителя\nint determinant(int mat[N][N], int n) {\n    if (n == 1) return mat[0][0];\n    \n    int det = 0;\n    int sign = 1;\n    int temp[N][N];\n    \n    for (int f = 0; f < n; f++) {\n        getMinor(mat, temp, 0, f, n);\n        det += sign * mat[0][f] * determinant(temp, n - 1);\n        sign = -sign;\n    }\n    \n    return det;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    int matrix[N][N];\n    \n    std::cout << \"Введите элементы матрицы 4x4:\" << std::endl;\n    for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {\n        std::cout << \"Строка \" << (i+1) << \": \";\n        for (int j = 0; j < N; j++) {\n            std::cin >> matrix[i][j];\n        }\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nВведенная матрица:\" << std::endl;\n    for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {\n        for (int j = 0; j < N; j++) {\n            std::cout << std::setw(4) << matrix[i][j] << \" \";\n        }\n        std::cout << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    // Вычисление определителя с промежуточными шагами\n    std::cout << \"\\nВычисление определителя (разложение по первой строке):\" << std::endl;\n    int totalDet = 0;\n    int sign = 1;\n    \n    for (int col = 0; col < N; col++) {\n        int temp[N][N];\n        getMinor(matrix, temp, 0, col, N);\n        \n        // Вычисляем определитель минора 3x3\n        int minorDet = determinant(temp, N - 1);\n        int term = sign * matrix[0][col] * minorDet;\n        totalDet += term;\n        \n        std::cout << \"\\nЭлемент a[1][\" << (col+1) << \"] = \" << matrix[0][col] << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Знак: \" << (sign > 0 ? \"+\" : \"-\") << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Минор 3x3 (определитель = \" << minorDet << \"):\" << std::endl;\n        \n        for (int i = 0; i < N-1; i++) {\n            for (int j = 0; j < N-1; j++) {\n                std::cout << std::setw(4) << temp[i][j] << \" \";\n            }\n            std::cout << std::endl;\n        }\n        \n        std::cout << \"Слагаемое: \" << (sign > 0 ? \"+\" : \"-\") << matrix[0][col] \n                  << \" * \" << minorDet << \" = \" << term << std::endl;\n        \n        sign = -sign;\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nОпределитель матрицы: \" << totalDet << std::endl;\n    \n    if (totalDet == 0) {\n        std::cout << \"Матрица вырожденная.\" << std::endl;\n    } else {\n        std::cout << \"Матрица невырожденная.\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <memory>\n#include <string>\n#include <unordered_map>\n#include <typeinfo>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass SingletonBase {\npublic:\n virtual ~SingletonBase() = default;\n virtual string getName() const = 0;\n};\n\ntemplate<typename T>\nclass TypeSingleton : public SingletonBase {\nprivate:\n static unique_ptr<T> instance;\n \nprotected:\n TypeSingleton() {\n cout << \"TypeSingleton<\" << typeid(T).name() << \"> created\" << endl;\n }\n \npublic:\n TypeSingleton(const TypeSingleton&) = delete;\n TypeSingleton& operator=(const TypeSingleton&) = delete;\n \n static T& getInstance() {\n if (!instance) {\n instance.reset(new T());\n }\n return *instance;\n }\n \n static void resetInstance() {\n instance.reset();\n cout << \"TypeSingleton<\" << typeid(T).name() << \"> reset\" << endl;\n }\n \n string getName() const override {\n return string(\"TypeSingleton<\") + typeid(T).name() + \">\";\n }\n \n virtual ~TypeSingleton() {\n cout << \"TypeSingleton<\" << typeid(T).name() << \"> destroyed\" << endl;\n }\n};\n\ntemplate<typename T>\nunique_ptr<T> TypeSingleton<T>::instance = nullptr;\n\nclass Logger : public TypeSingleton<Logger> {\n friend class TypeSingleton<Logger>;\n \nprivate:\n Logger() {}\n \npublic:\n void log(const string& message) {\n cout << \"[LOG] \" << message << endl;\n }\n};\n\nclass Config : public TypeSingleton<Config> {\n friend class TypeSingleton<Config>;\n \nprivate:\n string configFile;\n \n Config() : configFile(\"default.cfg\") {}\n \npublic:\n void setConfigFile(const string& file) {\n configFile = file;\n cout << \"Config file set to: \" << configFile << endl;\n }\n \n string getConfigFile() const {\n return configFile;\n }\n};\n\nclass Database : public TypeSingleton<Database> {\n friend class TypeSingleton<Database>;\n \nprivate:\n int connectionCount;\n \n Database() : connectionCount(0) {}\n \npublic:\n void connect() {\n connectionCount++;\n cout << \"Database connection established. Total connections: \" << connectionCount << endl;\n }\n \n void disconnect() {\n if (connectionCount > 0) {\n connectionCount--;\n }\n cout << \"Database connection closed. Remaining connections: \" << connectionCount << endl;\n }\n \n int getConnectionCount() const {\n return connectionCount;\n }\n};\n\nclass SingletonManager {\nprivate:\n static unordered_map<string, SingletonBase*>& getRegistry() {\n static unordered_map<string, SingletonBase*> registry;\n return registry;\n }\n \npublic:\n template<typename T>\n static void registerSingleton() {\n auto& instance = TypeSingleton<T>::getInstance();\n getRegistry()[typeid(T).name()] = &instance;\n cout << \"Registered singleton: \" << typeid(T).name() << endl;\n }\n \n static void listAllSingletons() {\n auto& registry = getRegistry();\n cout << \"\\nRegistered Singletons (\" << registry.size() << \") :\" << endl;\n for(const auto& pair : registry) {\n cout << \" \" << pair.first << \" -> \" << (pair.second ? pair.second->getName() : \"nullptr\") << endl;\n }\n }\n \n static void resetAll() {\n cout << \"\\nResetting all singletons\" << endl;\n getRegistry().clear();\n TypeSingleton<Logger>::resetInstance();\n TypeSingleton<Config>::resetInstance();\n TypeSingleton<Database>::resetInstance();\n }\n};\n\nint main() {\n cout << \"Type-Specific Singleton with Lazy Initialization\\n\" << endl;\n \n SingletonManager::registerSingleton<Logger>();\n SingletonManager::registerSingleton<Config>();\n SingletonManager::registerSingleton<Database>();\n \n auto& logger = Logger::getInstance();\n logger.log(\"Application started\");\n \n auto& config = Config::getInstance();\n config.setConfigFile(\"production.cfg\");\n \n auto& db = Database::getInstance();\n db.connect();\n db.connect();\n \n auto& sameLogger = Logger::getInstance();\n sameLogger.log(\"Another message\");\n \n SingletonManager::listAllSingletons();\n \n cout << \"\\nResetting Logger singleton:\" << endl;\n Logger::resetInstance();\n \n auto& newLogger = Logger::getInstance();\n newLogger.log(\"After reset\");\n \n cout << \"\\nDatabase connections: \" << db.getConnectionCount() << endl;\n db.disconnect();\n \n SingletonManager::resetAll();\n \n SingletonManager::listAllSingletons();\n \n // Демонстрация повторного использования после сброса\n cout << \"\\nRecreating singletons after reset:\" << endl;\n auto& logger2 = Logger::getInstance();\n logger2.log(\"Recreated logger\");\n \n return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\n\nint main() {\n int n;\n double first_term, denominator;\n std::cout << \"Введите количество членов (N):\";\n std::cin >> n;\n std::cout << \"Введите первый член прогрессии:\";\n std::cin >> first_term;\n std::cout << \"Введите знаменатель прогрессии:\";\n std::cin >> denominator;\n \n std::cout << \"Первые \" << n << \" членов геометрической прогрессии:\" << std::endl;\n for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {\n double term = first_term * std::pow(denominator, i);\n std::cout << term << \" \";\n }\n std::cout << std::endl;\n return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <chrono>\n#include <string>\n#include <utility>\n#include <vector>\n#include <algorithm>\n#include <cstdlib>\n#include <ctime>\n\ntemplate<typename Derived>\nclass Timer {\nprotected:\n    std::chrono::time_point<std::chrono::high_resolution_clock> start_time;\n    \n    void startTimer() {\n        start_time = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\n    }\n    \n    void stopTimer(const std::string& operation_name) {\n        auto end_time = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\n        auto duration = std::chrono::duration_cast<std::chrono::milliseconds>(end_time - start_time);\n        \n        std::cout << operation_name << \" took \" << duration.count() << \" ms\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \npublic:\n    // Для функций, возвращающих значение\n    template<typename... Args>\n    auto measure(const std::string& name, Args&&... args) {\n        startTimer();\n        auto result = static_cast<Derived*>(this)->execute(std::forward<Args>(args)...);\n        stopTimer(name);\n        return result;\n    }\n    \n    // Для void функций\n    template<typename... Args>\n    void measure_void(const std::string& name, Args&&... args) {\n        startTimer();\n        static_cast<Derived*>(this)->execute_void(std::forward<Args>(args)...);\n        stopTimer(name);\n    }\n};\n\nclass Calculator : public Timer<Calculator> {\npublic:\n    long long factorial(int n) {\n        long long result = 1;\n        for(int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {\n            result *= i;\n        }\n        return result;\n    }\n    \n    // Версия с возвращаемым значением\n    long long execute(int n) {\n        return factorial(n);\n    }\n    \n    double execute(double a, double b) {\n        return a * b;\n    }\n    \n    // void версия\n    void execute_void(int n) {\n        long long result = factorial(n);\n        std::cout << \"Factorial \" << n << \" = \" << result << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass FibonacciCalculator : public Timer<FibonacciCalculator> {\npublic:\n    long long fibonacci(int n) {\n        if (n <= 1) return n;\n        long long a = 0, b = 1;\n        for(int i = 2; i <= n; i++) {\n            long long temp = a + b;\n            a = b;\n            b = temp;\n        }\n        return b;\n    }\n    \n    long long execute(int n) {\n        return fibonacci(n);\n    }\n    \n    void execute_void(int n) {\n        long long result = fibonacci(n);\n        std::cout << \"Fibonacci \" << n << \" = \" << result << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass VectorSorter : public Timer<VectorSorter> {\npublic:\n    std::vector<int> generate_random_vector(std::size_t size) {\n        std::vector<int> vec(size);\n        std::srand(std::time(nullptr));\n        std::generate(vec.begin(), vec.end(), []() { return std::rand() % 1000; });\n        return vec;\n    }\n    \n    std::vector<int> execute(std::size_t size) {\n        std::vector<int> vec = generate_random_vector(size);\n        std::sort(vec.begin(), vec.end());\n        return vec;\n    }\n    \n    void execute_void(std::size_t size) {\n        std::vector<int> vec = generate_random_vector(size);\n        std::sort(vec.begin(), vec.end());\n        std::cout << \"Sorted vector of size \" << size << \" (first 5 elements): \";\n        for(std::size_t i = 0; i < std::min(size, (std::size_t)5); i++) {\n            std::cout << vec[i] << \" \";\n        }\n        std::cout << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass PrimeChecker : public Timer<PrimeChecker> {\npublic:\n    bool is_prime(int n) {\n        if (n <= 1) return false;\n        if (n <= 3) return true;\n        if (n % 2 == 0 || n % 3 == 0) return false;\n        for(int i = 5; i * i <= n; i += 6) {\n            if (n % i == 0 || n % (i + 2) == 0) return false;\n        }\n        return true;\n    }\n    \n    bool execute(int n) {\n        return is_prime(n);\n    }\n    \n    void execute_void(int n) {\n        bool prime = is_prime(n);\n        std::cout << n << \" is \" << (prime ? \"prime\" : \"not prime\") << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    std::cout << \"=== CRTP Timer Example ===\" << std::endl;\n    \n    Calculator calc;\n    FibonacciCalculator fibCalc;\n    VectorSorter sorter;\n    PrimeChecker primeChecker;\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n--- Calculator Tests ---\" << std::endl;\n    auto fact_result = calc.measure(\"Factorial(15)\", 15);\n    std::cout << \"Result: \" << fact_result << std::endl;\n    \n    auto mul_result = calc.measure(\"Multiply(3.14, 2.71)\", 3.14, 2.71);\n    std::cout << \"Result: \" << mul_result << std::endl;\n    \n    calc.measure_void(\"Factorial with output\", 10);\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n--- Fibonacci Calculator Tests ---\" << std::endl;\n    auto fib_result = fibCalc.measure(\"Fibonacci(30)\", 30);\n    std::cout << \"Result: \" << fib_result << std::endl;\n    \n    fibCalc.measure_void(\"Fibonacci with output\", 20);\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n--- Vector Sorting Tests ---\" << std::endl;\n    auto sorted_vec = sorter.measure(\"Sort 10000 elements\", 10000);\n    std::cout << \"Vector size: \" << sorted_vec.size() << std::endl;\n    \n    sorter.measure_void(\"Sort with output\", 5000);\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n--- Prime Checking Tests ---\" << std::endl;\n    auto prime_result = primeChecker.measure(\"Check if 9973 is prime\", 9973);\n    std::cout << \"Result: \" << (prime_result ? \"true\" : \"false\") << std::endl;\n    \n    primeChecker.measure_void(\"Check multiple primes\");\n    primeChecker.execute_void(7919);\n    primeChecker.execute_void(10007);\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n=== Performance Comparison ===\" << std::endl;\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nFactorial performance:\" << std::endl;\n    for(int n : {10, 15, 20, 25}) {\n        calc.measure(\"Factorial \" + std::to_string(n), n);\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nFibonacci performance:\" << std::endl;\n    for(int n : {10, 20, 30, 40, 45}) {\n        fibCalc.measure(\"Fibonacci \" + std::to_string(n), n);\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nSorting performance:\" << std::endl;\n    for(std::size_t n : {1000, 5000, 10000, 50000}) {\n        sorter.measure(\"Sort \" + std::to_string(n) + \" elements\", n);\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nPrime checking performance:\" << std::endl;\n    for(int n : {1009, 7919, 10007, 99991}) {\n        primeChecker.measure(\"Check prime \" + std::to_string(n), n);\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <cstring>\nclass BinaryManager {\n    std::string filename;\npublic:\n    BinaryManager(const std::string& name) : filename(name) {}\n    void append(const std::vector<char>& data) {\n        std::ofstream file(filename, std::ios::binary | std::ios::app);\n        file.write(data.data(), data.size());\n    }\n    std::vector<char> readAll() {\n        std::ifstream file(filename, std::ios::binary | std::ios::ate);\n        std::streamsize size = file.tellg();\n        file.seekg(0, std::ios::beg);\n        std::vector<char> buffer(size);\n        file.read(buffer.data(), size);\n        return buffer;\n    }\n    void insert(std::streampos pos, const std::vector<char>& data) {\n        std::vector<char> original = readAll();\n        std::ofstream file(filename, std::ios::binary | std::ios::trunc);\n        file.write(original.data(), pos);\n        file.write(data.data(), data.size());\n        file.write(original.data() + pos, original.size() - pos);\n    }\n};\nint main() {\n    BinaryManager mgr(\"data.bin\");\n    mgr.append({'H', 'i'});\n    mgr.insert(1, {'e', 'l', 'l', 'o'});\n    std::vector<char> content = mgr.readAll();\n    for(char c : content) std::cout << c;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <stack>\n#include <vector>\n\nvoid DFS(std::vector<std::vector<int>>& graph, int start) {\n    int n = graph.size();\n    std::vector<bool> visited(n, false);\n    std::stack<int> s;\n    s.push(start);\n    while (!s.empty()) {\n        int v = s.top();\n        s.pop();\n        if (!visited[v]) {\n            std::cout << v << \" \";\n            visited[v] = true;\n            for (int i = graph[v].size() - 1; i >= 0; --i) {\n                int neighbor = graph[v][i];\n                if (!visited[neighbor]) {\n                    s.push(neighbor);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    std::cout << std::endl;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    int n = 5;\n    std::vector<std::vector<int>> graph(n);\n    graph[0].push_back(1);\n    graph[0].push_back(2);\n    graph[1].push_back(3);\n    graph[2].push_back(4);\n    std::cout << \"DFS обход начиная с 0: \";\n    DFS(graph, 0);\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    int* arr = new int[5] {12, 45, 23, 67, 34};\n    int first = arr[0], second = arr[0];\n    for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {\n        if(arr[i] > first) {\n            second = first;\n            first = arr[i];\n        } else if(arr[i] > second && arr[i] != first) {\n            second = arr[i];\n        }\n    }\n    cout << \"Второй по величине элемент: \" << second << endl;\n    delete[] arr;\n    return 0;\n}
