#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n\nclass SmartHomeDevice {\nprivate:\n    std::string deviceName;\n    double powerConsumption; // в ваттах\n    bool isOn;\n    double totalEnergyConsumed; // в ватт-часах\n    \npublic:\n    SmartHomeDevice(std::string name, double power) \n        : deviceName(name), powerConsumption(power), isOn(false), totalEnergyConsumed(0.0) {\n        if (powerConsumption < 0) powerConsumption = 0;\n    }\n    \n    void turnOn() {\n        if (!isOn) {\n            isOn = true;\n            std::cout << deviceName << \" включен\" << std::endl;\n        } else {\n            std::cout << deviceName << \" уже включен\" << std::endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void turnOff() {\n        if (isOn) {\n            isOn = false;\n            std::cout << deviceName << \" выключен\" << std::endl;\n        } else {\n            std::cout << deviceName << \" уже выключен\" << std::endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void operateForHours(double hours) {\n        if (isOn && hours > 0) {\n            double energy = powerConsumption * hours;\n            totalEnergyConsumed += energy;\n            std::cout << deviceName << \" проработал \" << hours \n                      << \" часов. Потреблено энергии: \" << energy << \" Вт·ч\" << std::endl;\n        } else if (!isOn) {\n            std::cout << deviceName << \" выключен, не потребляет энергию\" << std::endl;\n        } else {\n            std::cout << \"Некорректное количество часов\" << std::endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void setPowerConsumption(double newPower) {\n        if (newPower >= 0) {\n            powerConsumption = newPower;\n            std::cout << \"Мощность \" << deviceName << \" установлена в \" << powerConsumption << \" Вт\" << std::endl;\n        } else {\n            std::cout << \"Мощность не может быть отрицательной\" << std::endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void printStatus() const {\n        std::cout << \"Устройство: \" << deviceName << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Мощность: \" << powerConsumption << \" Вт\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Состояние: \" << (isOn ? \"Включен\" : \"Выключен\") << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Всего потреблено энергии: \" << totalEnergyConsumed << \" Вт·ч\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    bool getIsOn() const { return isOn; }\n    double getPowerConsumption() const { return powerConsumption; }\n    double getTotalEnergyConsumed() const { return totalEnergyConsumed; }\n    std::string getDeviceName() const { return deviceName; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    SmartHomeDevice lamp(\"Настольная лампа\", 60.0);\n    lamp.printStatus();\n    \n    lamp.turnOn();\n    lamp.operateForHours(2.5);\n    lamp.turnOff();\n    lamp.operateForHours(1.0);\n    \n    lamp.turnOn();\n    lamp.setPowerConsumption(75.5);\n    lamp.operateForHours(3.0);\n    \n    lamp.printStatus();\n    \n    // Попытка установить отрицательную мощность\n    lamp.setPowerConsumption(-10.0);\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nint sumOfDigits(int n) {\n    return (n == 0) ? 0 : (n % 10) + sumOfDigits(n / 10);\n}\n\nint main() {\n    int num = 12345;\n    std::cout << \"Сумма цифр: \" << sumOfDigits(num) << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <stdexcept>\n#include <cmath>\n#include <algorithm>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass PolynomialException : public runtime_error {\npublic:\n    PolynomialException(const string& msg) : runtime_error(msg) {}\n};\n\nclass Polynomial {\nprivate:\n    vector<double> coefficients;  // coefficients[i] = коэффициент при x^i\n    \n    void normalize() {\n        // Удаляем нулевые старшие коэффициенты\n        while (!coefficients.empty() && fabs(coefficients.back()) < 1e-10) {\n            coefficients.pop_back();\n        }\n    }\n    \npublic:\n    Polynomial(const vector<double>& coeffs) : coefficients(coeffs) {\n        if (coeffs.empty()) {\n            throw invalid_argument(\"Polynomial must have at least one coefficient\");\n        }\n        normalize();\n        if (coefficients.empty()) {\n            coefficients.push_back(0);  // Нулевой многочлен\n        }\n    }\n    \n    int degree() const {\n        return coefficients.size() - 1;\n    }\n    \n    double evaluate(double x) const {\n        if (coefficients.empty()) {\n            return 0;\n        }\n        \n        double result = 0;\n        double power = 1;\n        \n        for (double coeff : coefficients) {\n            result += coeff * power;\n            power *= x;\n            \n            if (isinf(result) || isnan(result)) {\n                throw overflow_error(\"Polynomial evaluation overflow\");\n            }\n        }\n        \n        return result;\n    }\n    \n    Polynomial add(const Polynomial& other) const {\n        size_t max_size = max(coefficients.size(), other.coefficients.size());\n        vector<double> result_coeffs(max_size, 0);\n        \n        for (size_t i = 0; i < max_size; i++) {\n            double coeff1 = (i < coefficients.size()) ? coefficients[i] : 0;\n            double coeff2 = (i < other.coefficients.size()) ? other.coefficients[i] : 0;\n            result_coeffs[i] = coeff1 + coeff2;\n            \n            if (isinf(result_coeffs[i]) || isnan(result_coeffs[i])) {\n                throw overflow_error(\"Polynomial addition overflow\");\n            }\n        }\n        \n        return Polynomial(result_coeffs);\n    }\n    \n    Polynomial derivative() const {\n        if (coefficients.size() <= 1) {\n            return Polynomial({0});\n        }\n        \n        vector<double> deriv_coeffs(coefficients.size() - 1);\n        for (size_t i = 1; i < coefficients.size(); i++) {\n            deriv_coeffs[i-1] = coefficients[i] * i;\n            \n            if (isinf(deriv_coeffs[i-1]) || isnan(deriv_coeffs[i-1])) {\n                throw overflow_error(\"Polynomial derivative overflow\");\n            }\n        }\n        \n        return Polynomial(deriv_coeffs);\n    }\n    \n    Polynomial multiply(const Polynomial& other) const {\n        if (coefficients.empty() || other.coefficients.empty()) {\n            return Polynomial({0});\n        }\n        \n        size_t result_size = coefficients.size() + other.coefficients.size() - 1;\n        vector<double> result_coeffs(result_size, 0);\n        \n        for (size_t i = 0; i < coefficients.size(); i++) {\n            for (size_t j = 0; j < other.coefficients.size(); j++) {\n                result_coeffs[i + j] += coefficients[i] * other.coefficients[j];\n                \n                if (isinf(result_coeffs[i + j]) || isnan(result_coeffs[i + j])) {\n                    throw overflow_error(\"Polynomial multiplication overflow\");\n                }\n            }\n        }\n        \n        return Polynomial(result_coeffs);\n    }\n    \n    void print() const {\n        if (coefficients.empty()) {\n            cout << \"0\";\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        bool first_term = true;\n        for (int i = degree(); i >= 0; i--) {\n            double coeff = coefficients[i];\n            if (fabs(coeff) < 1e-10) continue;\n            \n            if (!first_term) {\n                cout << (coeff >= 0 ? \" + \" : \" - \");\n            }\n            \n            if (i == 0 || fabs(fabs(coeff) - 1.0) > 1e-10) {\n                cout << fabs(coeff);\n            }\n            \n            if (i > 0) {\n                cout << \"x\";\n                if (i > 1) {\n                    cout << \"^\" << i;\n                }\n            }\n            \n            first_term = false;\n        }\n        \n        if (first_term) {\n            cout << \"0\";\n        }\n    }\n    \n    double root_newton(double initial_guess, double tolerance = 1e-10, int max_iterations = 1000) {\n        if (coefficients.size() <= 1) {\n            throw PolynomialException(\"Cannot find root of constant polynomial\");\n        }\n        \n        Polynomial deriv = derivative();\n        double x = initial_guess;\n        \n        for (int iter = 0; iter < max_iterations; iter++) {\n            double fx = evaluate(x);\n            double fpx = deriv.evaluate(x);\n            \n            if (fabs(fpx) < tolerance) {\n                throw PolynomialException(\"Derivative is zero, Newton's method fails\");\n            }\n            \n            double delta = fx / fpx;\n            x = x - delta;\n            \n            if (isinf(x) || isnan(x)) {\n                throw overflow_error(\"Newton's method overflow\");\n            }\n            \n            if (fabs(delta) < tolerance) {\n                return x;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        throw PolynomialException(\"Newton's method did not converge\");\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    try {\n        Polynomial p1({1, -3, 2});  // x^2 - 3x + 2\n        Polynomial p2({0, 2, -1});  // -x^2 + 2x\n        \n        cout << \"P1(x) = \";\n        p1.print();\n        cout << endl;\n        \n        cout << \"P2(x) = \";\n        p2.print();\n        cout << endl;\n        \n        cout << \"P1(2) = \" << p1.evaluate(2) << endl;\n        \n        Polynomial sum = p1.add(p2);\n        cout << \"P1 + P2 = \";\n        sum.print();\n        cout << endl;\n        \n        Polynomial deriv = p1.derivative();\n        cout << \"P1'(x) = \";\n        deriv.print();\n        cout << endl;\n        \n        double root = p1.root_newton(1.5);\n        cout << \"Root near 1.5: \" << root << endl;\n        \n        Polynomial empty_poly({});  // This will throw\n        \n    } catch (const PolynomialException& e) {\n        cout << \"Polynomial error: \" << e.what() << endl;\n    } catch (const invalid_argument& e) {\n        cout << \"Invalid argument: \" << e.what() << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cctype>\n\nint main() {\n char ch;\n std::cout << \"Введите символ: \";\n std::cin >> ch;\n if(std::isdigit(ch)) std::cout << \"Это цифра\" << std::endl;\n else std::cout << \"Это не цифра\" << std::endl;\n return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <stack>\n#include <cctype>\n#include <unordered_set>\n#include <vector>\nusing namespace std;\n\nbool isValidJsonSimplified(const string& json) {\n    stack<char> bracket_stack;\n    bool in_string = false;\n    bool escape_next = false;\n    \n    unordered_set<char> whitespace = {' ', '\\t', '\\n', '\\r'};\n    \n    for(size_t i = 0; i < json.length(); i++) {\n        char c = json[i];\n        \n        // Обработка escape-символов внутри строк\n        if(in_string) {\n            if(escape_next) {\n                escape_next = false;\n                continue;\n            }\n            \n            if(c == '\\\\') {\n                escape_next = true;\n                continue;\n            }\n            \n            if(c == '\"') {\n                in_string = false;\n                continue;\n            }\n            \n            continue;\n        }\n        \n        // Обработка вне строк\n        if(whitespace.count(c)) {\n            continue;\n        }\n        \n        switch(c) {\n            case '{':\n            case '[':\n                bracket_stack.push(c);\n                break;\n            \n            case '}':\n                if(bracket_stack.empty() || bracket_stack.top() != '{') {\n                    return false;\n                }\n                bracket_stack.pop();\n                break;\n            \n            case ']':\n                if(bracket_stack.empty() || bracket_stack.top() != '[') {\n                    return false;\n                }\n                bracket_stack.pop();\n                break;\n            \n            case '\"':\n                in_string = true;\n                break;\n            \n            case ':':\n            case ',':\n                // Упрощенная проверка\n                break;\n            \n            default:\n                // Проверяем допустимые символы вне строк\n                if(!isdigit(c) && c != '-' && c != 't' && c != 'f' && c != 'n' && c != '.') {\n                    // Это может быть начало true, false, null или числа\n                    if(i + 3 < json.length() && json.substr(i, 4) == \"true\") {\n                        i += 3;\n                        continue;\n                    }\n                    if(i + 4 < json.length() && json.substr(i, 5) == \"false\") {\n                        i += 4;\n                        continue;\n                    }\n                    if(i + 3 < json.length() && json.substr(i, 4) == \"null\") {\n                        i += 3;\n                        continue;\n                    }\n                    \n                    // Проверка чисел (упрощенная)\n                    if(isdigit(c) || c == '-') {\n                        while(i < json.length() && (isdigit(json[i]) || \n                            json[i] == '.' || json[i] == 'e' || json[i] == 'E' || \n                            json[i] == '+' || json[i] == '-')) {\n                            i++;\n                        }\n                        i--; // Корректируем индекс\n                        continue;\n                    }\n                    \n                    return false;\n                }\n                break;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    // Проверяем, что все строки закрыты и скобки сбалансированы\n    return bracket_stack.empty() && !in_string && !escape_next;\n}\n\nbool isValidKeyValuePair(const string& json) {\n    if(json.empty()) return false;\n    \n    if(json[0] != '{' || json[json.length() - 1] != '}') {\n        return false;\n    }\n    \n    bool has_colon = false;\n    bool in_key = false;\n    bool in_value = false;\n    \n    for(size_t i = 1; i < json.length() - 1; i++) {\n        char c = json[i];\n        \n        if(c == '\"') {\n            if(!in_key && !in_value) {\n                in_key = true;\n            } else if(in_key && !has_colon) {\n                in_key = false;\n            } else if(!in_key && has_colon && !in_value) {\n                in_value = true;\n            } else if(in_value) {\n                in_value = false;\n            }\n        } else if(c == ':' && in_key) {\n            has_colon = true;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return has_colon && !in_key && !in_value;\n}\n\nvector<string> findJsonObjects(const string& text) {\n    vector<string> json_objects;\n    stack<int> bracket_positions;\n    bool in_string = false;\n    bool escape_next = false;\n    \n    for(size_t i = 0; i < text.length(); i++) {\n        char c = text[i];\n        \n        if(in_string) {\n            if(escape_next) {\n                escape_next = false;\n            } else if(c == '\\\\') {\n                escape_next = true;\n            } else if(c == '\"') {\n                in_string = false;\n            }\n            continue;\n        }\n        \n        if(c == '\"') {\n            in_string = true;\n            continue;\n        }\n        \n        if(c == '{' || c == '[') {\n            bracket_positions.push(i);\n        } else if((c == '}' || c == ']') && !bracket_positions.empty()) {\n            int start = bracket_positions.top();\n            bracket_positions.pop();\n            \n            string potential_json = text.substr(start, i - start + 1);\n            \n            if(isValidJsonSimplified(potential_json)) {\n                json_objects.push_back(potential_json);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return json_objects;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    vector<string> test_cases = {\n        \"{\\\"name\\\": \\\"John\\\", \\\"age\\\": 30}\",\n        \"[1, 2, 3, 4, 5]\",\n        \"{\\\"key\\\": \\\"value\\\"}\",\n        \"\",\n        \"invalid json\",\n        \"{\\\"unclosed\\\": \\\"string}\",\n        \"[1, 2, 3]\",\n        \"{\\\"bool\\\": true, \\\"null\\\": null, \\\"number\\\": 123.45}\",\n        \"{\\\"nested\\\": {\\\"inner\\\": \\\"value\\\"}}\",\n        \"[\\\"item1\\\", \\\"item2\\\", \\\"item3\\\"]\",\n        \"{\\\"escaped\\\": \\\"string with \\\\\\\"quotes\\\\\\\"\\\"}\",\n        \"{key: value}\",\n        \"{\\\"trailing\\\": \\\"comma\\\",}\"\n    };\n    \n    cout << \"Simplified JSON Validator:\" << endl;\n    cout << \"============================\" << endl;\n    \n    for(const string& test : test_cases) {\n        cout << endl << \"Test: \" << (test.length() > 50 ? test.substr(0, 47) + \"...\" : test) << endl;\n        \n        bool is_valid = isValidJsonSimplified(test);\n        cout << \"Valid JSON: \" << (is_valid ? \"YES\" : \"NO\") << endl;\n        \n        if(!test.empty() && (test[0] == '{' || test[0] == '[')) {\n            bool is_key_value = isValidKeyValuePair(test);\n            if(test[0] == '{') {\n                cout << \"Valid key-value structure: \" << (is_key_value ? \"YES\" : \"NO\") << endl;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        if(is_valid) {\n            stack<char> brackets;\n            for(char c : test) {\n                if(c == '{' || c == '[') brackets.push(c);\n                else if(c == '}' || c == ']') {\n                    if(!brackets.empty()) brackets.pop();\n                }\n            }\n            cout << \"Brackets balanced: \" << (brackets.empty() ? \"YES\" : \"NO\") << endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    cout << endl << endl << \"JSON Object Finder in Text:\" << endl;\n    string mixed_text = \"Some text before {\\\"key1\\\": \\\"value1\\\"} and after [1, 2, 3] more text.\";\n    cout << \"Text: \" << mixed_text << endl;\n    \n    vector<string> found_objects = findJsonObjects(mixed_text);\n    cout << \"Found \" << found_objects.size() << \" JSON objects:\" << endl;\n    \n    for(size_t i = 0; i < found_objects.size(); i++) {\n        cout << \" \" << (i + 1) << \". \" << found_objects[i] << endl;\n    }\n    \n    cout << endl << endl << \"Complex JSON Test:\" << endl;\n    string complex_json = \"{\\\"user\\\": {\\\"name\\\": \\\"Alice\\\", \\\"age\\\": 25, \\\"hobbies\\\": [\\\"reading\\\", \\\"coding\\\"]}}\";\n    cout << \"JSON: \" << complex_json << endl;\n    \n    bool complex_valid = isValidJsonSimplified(complex_json);\n    cout << \"Valid: \" << (complex_valid ? \"YES\" : \"NO\") << endl;\n    \n    if(complex_valid) {\n        int object_count = 0;\n        int array_count = 0;\n        int string_count = 0;\n        \n        for(char c : complex_json) {\n            if(c == '{') object_count++;\n            else if(c == '[') array_count++;\n            else if(c == '\"') string_count++;\n        }\n        \n        cout << \"Structure analysis:\" << endl;\n        cout << \" Objects: \" << object_count << endl;\n        cout << \" Arrays: \" << array_count << endl;\n        cout << \" Strings: \" << string_count / 2 << \" (\" << string_count << \" quotes)\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n\nclass Test {\n    mutable int counter;\npublic:\n    Test() : counter(0) {}\n    void increment() const { ++counter; }\n    int get() const { return counter; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    const Test obj;\n    obj.increment();\n    std::cout << obj.get() << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\n\nbool isArmstrongNumber(int n) {\n    int original = n;\n    int sum = 0;\n    int digits = 0;\n    \n    int temp = n;\n    while (temp > 0) {\n        digits++;\n        temp /= 10;\n    }\n    \n    temp = n;\n    while (temp > 0) {\n        int digit = temp % 10;\n        sum += std::pow(digit, digits);\n        temp /= 10;\n    }\n    \n    return sum == original;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::cout << std::boolalpha << isArmstrongNumber(153) << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <string>\n#include <algorithm>\n#include <iomanip>\n#include <cmath>\n#include <set>\nusing namespace std;\n\n// Функция для проверки, является ли число числом Капрекара\nbool isKaprekar(long long num, int base = 10) {\n    if (num == 1) return true;\n    \n    long long square = num * num;\n    string squareStr = to_string(square);\n    int len = squareStr.length();\n    \n    for (int i = 1; i < len; i++) {\n        string leftStr = squareStr.substr(0, i);\n        string rightStr = squareStr.substr(i);\n        \n        // Пропускаем ведущие нули в правой части\n        if (rightStr[0] == '0' && rightStr.length() > 1) continue;\n        \n        long long left = stoll(leftStr);\n        long long right = stoll(rightStr);\n        \n        if (right > 0 && left + right == num) {\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return false;\n}\n\n// Функция для поиска всех чисел Капрекара до N\nvector<long long> findKaprekarNumbers(long long N) {\n    vector<long long> kaprekarNumbers;\n    \n    for (long long i = 1; i <= N; i++) {\n        if (isKaprekar(i)) {\n            kaprekarNumbers.push_back(i);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return kaprekarNumbers;\n}\n\n// Демонстрация постоянной Капрекара (6174)\nvoid demonstrateKaprekarConstant(long long num) {\n    cout << \"\\n=== ДЕМОНСТРАЦИЯ ПОСТОЯННОЙ КАПРЕКАРА (6174) ===\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Начальное число: \" << num << endl;\n    \n    if (num % 1111 == 0) {\n        cout << \"Число с повторяющимися цифрами - невозможно достичь 6174\" << endl;\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    int steps = 0;\n    const int MAX_STEPS = 10;\n    \n    while (num != 6174 && steps < MAX_STEPS) {\n        steps++;\n        \n        // Преобразуем число в строку и добавляем ведущие нули\n        string numStr = to_string(num);\n        while (numStr.length() < 4) {\n            numStr = \"0\" + numStr;\n        }\n        \n        // Сортируем цифры по убыванию и возрастанию\n        string descStr = numStr;\n        string ascStr = numStr;\n        \n        sort(descStr.begin(), descStr.end(), greater<char>());\n        sort(ascStr.begin(), ascStr.end());\n        \n        long long desc = stoll(descStr);\n        long long asc = stoll(ascStr);\n        \n        long long difference = desc - asc;\n        \n        cout << \"Шаг \" << steps << \": \" << desc << \" - \" << asc \n             << \" = \" << difference << endl;\n        \n        num = difference;\n        \n        // Добавляем ведущие нули для следующей итерации\n        if (num < 1000) {\n            num *= 10;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    if (num == 6174) {\n        cout << \"\\nДостигнута постоянная Капрекара 6174 за \" << steps << \" шагов!\" << endl;\n    } else {\n        cout << \"\\nНе удалось достичь 6174 за \" << MAX_STEPS << \" шагов\" << endl;\n    }\n}\n\n// Анализ свойств чисел Капрекара\nvoid analyzeKaprekarProperties(const vector<long long>& kaprekarNumbers, long long N) {\n    if (kaprekarNumbers.empty()) {\n        cout << \"Нет чисел Капрекара до \" << N << endl;\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== АНАЛИЗ СВОЙСТВ ЧИСЕЛ КАПРЕКАРА ===\" << endl;\n    \n    int count = kaprekarNumbers.size();\n    cout << \"Всего чисел Капрекара до \" << N << \": \" << count << endl;\n    cout << \"Плотность: \" << fixed << setprecision(4) \n         << (double)count / N * 100 << \"%\" << endl;\n    \n    // Распределение по количеству цифр\n    vector<int> digitCount(10, 0);\n    for (long long num : kaprekarNumbers) {\n        int digits = to_string(num).length();\n        if (digits < 10) {\n            digitCount[digits]++;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"\\nРаспределение по количеству цифр:\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Цифр\\tКоличество\\tПроцент\" << endl;\n    cout << \"--------------------------------\" << endl;\n    \n    for (int i = 1; i < 10; i++) {\n        if (digitCount[i] > 0) {\n            double percentage = (double)digitCount[i] / count * 100;\n            cout << i << \"\\t\" << digitCount[i] << \"\\t\\t\" \n                 << fixed << setprecision(2) << percentage << \"%\" << endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    // Проверка паттернов\n    cout << \"\\nПроверка паттернов:\" << endl;\n    \n    // Числа вида 45, 495, 4995, ...\n    cout << \"1. Числа вида 4...5: \";\n    vector<long long> patternNumbers;\n    for (long long num : kaprekarNumbers) {\n        string numStr = to_string(num);\n        if (numStr.length() >= 2 && numStr[0] == '4' && numStr.back() == '5') {\n            bool allNines = true;\n            for (size_t i = 1; i < numStr.length() - 1; i++) {\n                if (numStr[i] != '9') {\n                    allNines = false;\n                    break;\n                }\n            }\n            if (allNines) {\n                patternNumbers.push_back(num);\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    if (!patternNumbers.empty()) {\n        cout << \"найдено \" << patternNumbers.size() << \": \";\n        for (size_t i = 0; i < patternNumbers.size(); i++) {\n            cout << patternNumbers[i];\n            if (i < patternNumbers.size() - 1) cout << \", \";\n        }\n        cout << endl;\n    } else {\n        cout << \"не найдено\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    // Числа, оканчивающиеся на 0\n    cout << \"2. Числа, оканчивающиеся на 0: \";\n    int endingWithZero = 0;\n    for (long long num : kaprekarNumbers) {\n        if (num % 10 == 0) endingWithZero++;\n    }\n    cout << endingWithZero << \" из \" << count << \" (\" \n         << fixed << setprecision(1) << (double)endingWithZero / count * 100 << \"%)\" << endl;\n    \n    // Проверка гипотезы о нечетных числах\n    cout << \"3. Нечетные числа: \";\n    int oddCount = 0;\n    for (long long num : kaprekarNumbers) {\n        if (num % 2 == 1) oddCount++;\n    }\n    cout << oddCount << \" из \" << count << \" (\" \n         << fixed << setprecision(1) << (double)oddCount / count * 100 << \"%)\" << endl;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    cout << \"=== ЧИСЛА КАПРЕКАРА И ПОСТОЯННАЯ КАПРЕКАРА ===\" << endl;\n    \n    long long N;\n    cout << \"Введите верхнюю границу N для поиска чисел Капрекара: \";\n    cin >> N;\n    \n    if (N < 1) {\n        cout << \"N должно быть положительным числом!\" << endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    // Поиск чисел Капрекара\n    cout << \"\\nПоиск чисел Капрекара до \" << N << \"...\" << endl;\n    vector<long long> kaprekarNumbers = findKaprekarNumbers(N);\n    \n    // Вывод результатов\n    cout << \"\\n=== НАЙДЕННЫЕ ЧИСЛА КАПРЕКАРА ===\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Всего найдено: \" << kaprekarNumbers.size() << endl;\n    \n    if (!kaprekarNumbers.empty()) {\n        cout << \"\\nПервые 20 чисел:\" << endl;\n        int displayCount = min(20, (int)kaprekarNumbers.size());\n        \n        for (int i = 0; i < displayCount; i++) {\n            cout << setw(6) << kaprekarNumbers[i];\n            if ((i + 1) % 5 == 0) cout << endl;\n        }\n        \n        if (kaprekarNumbers.size() > 20) {\n            cout << \"... и еще \" << kaprekarNumbers.size() - 20 << \" чисел\" << endl;\n        }\n        \n        // Подробная информация для некоторых чисел\n        cout << \"\\n=== ПОДРОБНАЯ ИНФОРМАЦИЯ ===\" << endl;\n        cout << \"№\\tЧисло\\tКвадрат\\tРазбиение\\tПроверка\" << endl;\n        cout << \"------------------------------------------------------\" << endl;\n        \n        int infoCount = min(10, (int)kaprekarNumbers.size());\n        for (int i = 0; i < infoCount; i++) {\n            long long num = kaprekarNumbers[i];\n            long long square = num * num;\n            string squareStr = to_string(square);\n            \n            cout << i+1 << \"\\t\" << num << \"\\t\" << square << \"\\t\";\n            \n            bool found = false;\n            for (size_t j = 1; j < squareStr.length(); j++) {\n                string leftStr = squareStr.substr(0, j);\n                string rightStr = squareStr.substr(j);\n                \n                if (rightStr[0] == '0' && rightStr.length() > 1) continue;\n                \n                long long left = stoll(leftStr);\n                long long right = stoll(rightStr);\n                \n                if (right > 0 && left + right == num) {\n                    cout << left << \" + \" << right << \"\\t✓\" << endl;\n                    found = true;\n                    break;\n                }\n            }\n            \n            if (!found) {\n                cout << \"не найдено\\t✗\" << endl;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    // Анализ свойств\n    analyzeKaprekarProperties(kaprekarNumbers, N);\n    \n    // Демонстрация постоянной Капрекара\n    cout << \"\\n=== ДЕМОНСТРАЦИЯ ПОСТОЯННОЙ КАПРЕКАРА ===\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Постоянная Капрекара - 6174\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Открыта индийским математиком Д. Р. Капрекаром в 1949 году\" << endl;\n    \n    long long testNumber;\n    cout << \"\\nВведите 4-значное число с разными цифрами для демонстрации: \";\n    cin >> testNumber;\n    \n    if (testNumber < 1000 || testNumber > 9999) {\n        cout << \"Число должно быть 4-значным!\" << endl;\n    } else {\n        demonstrateKaprekarConstant(testNumber);\n    }\n    \n    // Дополнительная информация\n    cout << \"\\n=== ДОПОЛНИТЕЛЬНАЯ ИНФОРМАЦИЯ ===\" << endl;\n    cout << \"1. Число Капрекара - натуральное число, которое в данной системе счисления\" << endl;\n    cout << \"   можно представить в виде суммы двух частей, квадрат которого равен\" << endl;\n    cout << \"   сумме этих частей, возведенных в квадрат.\" << endl;\n    cout << \"2. Пример: 45² = 2025, 20 + 25 = 45\" << endl;\n    cout << \"3. Известные числа Капрекара: 1, 9, 45, 55, 99, 297, 703, 999, ...\" << endl;\n    cout << \"4. Постоянная Капрекара 6174 достигается максимум за 7 шагов\" << endl;\n    cout << \"   для любого 4-значного числа с разными цифрами.\" << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n\nclass Base {\npublic:\n    virtual ~Base() = default;\n};\n\nclass Derived : public Base {\npublic:\n    void derivedMethod() {\n        std::cout << \"Derived method called\" << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Base* b = new Derived();\n    Derived* d = dynamic_cast<Derived*>(b);\n    if (d) {\n        d->derivedMethod();\n    } else {\n        std::cout << \"Cast failed\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    delete b;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\n#include <iomanip>\n\nint main() {\n    double epsilon;\n    std::cout << \"Введите требуемую точность (например, 0.0001): \";\n    std::cin >> epsilon;\n    \n    if (epsilon <= 0) {\n        std::cout << \"Точность должна быть положительным числом.\" << std::endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    double sum = 0.0;\n    double term;\n    int denominator = 1;\n    int sign = 1;\n    int iteration = 0;\n    \n    std::cout << std::fixed << std::setprecision(10);\n    std::cout << \"Вычисление суммы ряда 1 - 1/3 + 1/5 - 1/7 + ...\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Точность: \" << epsilon << std::endl;\n    \n    do {\n        term = static_cast<double>(sign) / denominator;\n        sum += term;\n        \n        std::cout << \"Итерация \" << ++iteration << \": член = \" << term \n                  << \", сумма = \" << sum << std::endl;\n        \n        sign = -sign;\n        denominator += 2;\n        \n    } while (std::fabs(term) >= epsilon);\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nРезультат:\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Вычисленная сумма: \" << sum << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Математическое ожидание (π/4): \" << M_PI / 4 << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Разница: \" << std::fabs(sum - M_PI / 4) << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Количество итераций: \" << iteration << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <unordered_map>\n#include <functional>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    unordered_map<int, int> cache;\n    function<int(int)> factorial;\n    factorial = [&](int n) -> int {\n        if (n <= 1) return 1;\n        if (cache.find(n) != cache.end()) return cache[n];\n        cache[n] = n * factorial(n - 1);\n        return cache[n];\n    };\n    cout << factorial(5) << endl;\n    cout << factorial(6) << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <vector>\n\nint longestPalindromicSubstringLength(const std::string& s) {\n    int n = s.length();\n    if(n == 0) return 0;\n    \n    std::vector<std::vector<bool>> dp(n, std::vector<bool>(n, false));\n    int maxLength = 1;\n    \n    // Все подстроки длины 1 - палиндромы\n    for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {\n        dp[i][i] = true;\n    }\n    \n    // Проверяем подстроки длины 2\n    for(int i = 0; i < n - 1; i++) {\n        if(s[i] == s[i+1]) {\n            dp[i][i+1] = true;\n            maxLength = 2;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    // Проверяем подстроки длины >= 3\n    for(int len = 3; len <= n; len++) {\n        for(int i = 0; i <= n - len; i++) {\n            int j = i + len - 1;\n            \n            if(s[i] == s[j] && dp[i+1][j-1]) {\n                dp[i][j] = true;\n                if(len > maxLength) {\n                    maxLength = len;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return maxLength;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::string test1 = \"babad\";\n    std::string test2 = \"cbbd\";\n    std::string test3 = \"a\";\n    \n    std::cout << \"Длина самой длинной палиндромной подстроки в '\" << test1 << \"': \" << longestPalindromicSubstringLength(test1) << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Длина самой длинной палиндромной подстроки в '\" << test2 << \"': \" << longestPalindromicSubstringLength(test2) << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Длина самой длинной палиндромной подстроки в '\" << test3 << \"': \" << longestPalindromicSubstringLength(test3) << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n\nclass ReadOnly {\npublic:\n    virtual int getValue() const {\n        return 10;\n    }\n};\n\nclass Modified : public ReadOnly {\n    int value = 20;\npublic:\n    int getValue() const override {\n        return value;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    const ReadOnly* obj = new Modified();\n    std::cout << \"Value: \" << obj->getValue() << std::endl;\n    delete obj;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <utility>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Resource {\n    string name;\n    int id;\npublic:\n    Resource(string n, int i) : name(move(n)), id(i) {\n        cout << \"Resource created: \" << name << \" (id: \" << id << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    Resource(const Resource& other) : name(other.name), id(other.id) {\n        cout << \"Resource copied: \" << name << endl;\n    }\n    \n    Resource(Resource&& other) noexcept : name(move(other.name)), id(other.id) {\n        cout << \"Resource moved: \" << name << endl;\n    }\n    \n    ~Resource() {\n        cout << \"Resource destroyed: \" << name << endl;\n    }\n    \n    void print() const {\n        cout << \"Resource: \" << name << \" [\" << id << \"]\" << endl;\n    }\n};\n\n// Фабричная функция с perfect forwarding\ntemplate<typename T, typename... Args>\nT createResource(Args&&... args) {\n    cout << \"Creating resource with perfect forwarding...\" << endl;\n    return T(forward<Args>(args)...);\n}\n\n// Функция с универсальной ссылкой (forwarding reference)\ntemplate<typename T>\nvoid processResource(T&& resource) {\n    cout << \"Processing resource: \";\n    \n    if constexpr (is_lvalue_reference_v<T>) {\n        cout << \"(lvalue reference)\" << endl;\n        resource.print();\n    } else {\n        cout << \"(rvalue reference)\" << endl;\n        move(resource).print();  // Можно переместить, если это rvalue\n    }\n}\n\n// Перегрузка для разных категорий значений\ntemplate<typename T>\nvoid handleValue(T&& value) {\n    if constexpr (is_lvalue_reference_v<T>) {\n        cout << \"Lvalue received\" << endl;\n    } else {\n        cout << \"Rvalue received\" << endl;\n    }\n}\n\nint main() {\n    cout << \"=== Test 1: Creating resources ===\" << endl;\n    \n    // Создание с lvalue аргументами\n    string name1 = \"Database\";\n    auto res1 = createResource<Resource>(name1, 1);\n    \n    // Создание с rvalue аргументами\n    auto res2 = createResource<Resource>(\"WebServer\", 2);\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== Test 2: Processing resources ===\" << endl;\n    \n    // Обработка lvalue\n    processResource(res1);\n    \n    // Обработка rvalue\n    processResource(createResource<Resource>(\"Temp\", 99));\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== Test 3: Value categories ===\" << endl;\n    \n    int x = 42;\n    handleValue(x);           // Lvalue\n    handleValue(100);         // Rvalue\n    handleValue(move(x));     // Rvalue (после move)\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== End of scope ===\" << endl;\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <cstddef>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    byte b{0xAB};\n    byte mask{0x0F};\n\n    byte result = b & mask;\n\n    cout << \"Исходный байт: \" << hex << to_integer<int>(b) << endl;\n    cout << \"Маска: \" << hex << to_integer<int>(mask) << endl;\n    cout << \"Результат AND: \" << hex << to_integer<int>(result) << endl;\n\n    int shifted_value = to_integer<int>(b) << 1;\n    byte shifted = static_cast<byte>(shifted_value & 0xFF);\n    cout << \"Сдвиг влево: \" << hex << to_integer<int>(shifted) << endl;\n\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <vector>\n\nclass Resource {\n    std::string name;\npublic:\n    Resource(const std::string& n) : name(n) {\n        std::cout << \"Создан ресурс: \" << name << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    Resource(const Resource& other) : name(other.name) {\n        std::cout << \"Ресурс скопирован: \" << name << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    Resource(Resource&& other) noexcept : name(std::move(other.name)) {\n        std::cout << \"Ресурс перемещен: \" << name << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    ~Resource() {\n        if (!name.empty())\n            std::cout << \"Уничтожен ресурс: \" << name << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    std::string getName() const { return name; }\n};\n\n// Функция принимает rvalue ссылку\nvoid processResource(Resource&& r) {\n    std::cout << \"Обработка временного ресурса: \" << r.getName() << std::endl;\n    // r будет уничтожен после выхода из функции\n}\n\n// Перегрузка для lvalue\nvoid processResource(Resource& r) {\n    std::cout << \"Обработка именованного ресурса: \" << r.getName() << std::endl;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    Resource r1(\"Постоянный\");\n    \n    // Обработка lvalue\n    processResource(r1);\n    \n    // Обработка rvalue (временный объект)\n    processResource(Resource(\"Временный\"));\n    \n    // Использование move для преобразования lvalue в rvalue\n    std::cout << \"\\nИспользование move:\\n\";\n    processResource(std::move(r1));\n    // После move r1 в неопределенном состоянии\n    \n    // Пример с вектором\n    std::vector<Resource> resources;\n    resources.reserve(3);\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nДобавление в вектор:\\n\";\n    resources.push_back(Resource(\"Первый\")); // Move конструктор\n    \n    Resource r2(\"Второй\");\n    resources.push_back(std::move(r2)); // Явный move\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <vector>\n#include <numeric>\n#include <cmath>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass RSA {\nprivate:\n    long long p, q, n, phi, e, d;\n    \n    long long modPow(long long base, long long exponent, long long mod) {\n        long long result = 1;\n        base = base % mod;\n        while (exponent > 0) {\n            if (exponent & 1) {\n                result = (result * base) % mod;\n            }\n            base = (base * base) % mod;\n            exponent = exponent >> 1;\n        }\n        return result;\n    }\n    \n    long long modInverse(long long a, long long m) {\n        long long m0 = m, t, q;\n        long long x0 = 0, x1 = 1;\n        \n        if (m == 1) return 0;\n        \n        while (a > 1) {\n            q = a / m;\n            t = m;\n            m = a % m;\n            a = t;\n            t = x0;\n            x0 = x1 - q * x0;\n            x1 = t;\n        }\n        \n        if (x1 < 0) x1 += m0;\n        return x1;\n    }\n    \n    long long gcd(long long a, long long b) {\n        while (b != 0) {\n            long long temp = b;\n            b = a % b;\n            a = temp;\n        }\n        return a;\n    }\n    \npublic:\n    RSA(long long prime1 = 61, long long prime2 = 53) {\n        p = prime1;\n        q = prime2;\n        n = p * q;\n        phi = (p - 1) * (q - 1);\n        \n        e = 17;\n        while (gcd(e, phi) != 1) {\n            e++;\n        }\n        \n        d = modInverse(e, phi);\n        \n        cout << \"Публичный ключ: (\" << e << \", \" << n << \")\" << endl;\n        cout << \"Приватный ключ: (\" << d << \", \" << n << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    vector<long long> encrypt(const string& message) {\n        vector<long long> encrypted;\n        for (char c : message) {\n            long long m = static_cast<long long>(c);\n            encrypted.push_back(modPow(m, e, n));\n        }\n        return encrypted;\n    }\n    \n    string decrypt(const vector<long long>& encrypted) {\n        string decrypted;\n        for (long long c : encrypted) {\n            long long m = modPow(c, d, n);\n            decrypted += static_cast<char>(m);\n        }\n        return decrypted;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    RSA rsa;\n    string message;\n    \n    cout << \"Введите сообщение для шифрования: \";\n    getline(cin, message);\n    \n    auto encrypted = rsa.encrypt(message);\n    cout << \"Зашифрованное сообщение: \";\n    for (auto num : encrypted) {\n        cout << num << \" \";\n    }\n    cout << endl;\n    \n    string decrypted = rsa.decrypt(encrypted);\n    cout << \"Расшифрованное сообщение: \" << decrypted << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <algorithm>\n\nstd::string rotateString(std::string str, int k) {\n    if (str.empty()) return str;\n    k = k % str.length();\n    std::rotate(str.begin(), str.begin() + k, str.end());\n    return str;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::string text = \"abcdefgh\";\n    int shift = 3;\n    std::string rotated = rotateString(text, shift);\n    std::cout << \"Строка после поворота на \" << shift << \": \" << rotated << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <ctime>\n\nclass StartupLogger {\nprivate:\n    static std::string startupTime;\n    \n    static std::string initStartupTime() {\n        std::time_t now = std::time(nullptr);\n        char buffer[80];\n        std::strftime(buffer, sizeof(buffer), \"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S\", std::localtime(&now));\n        return std::string(buffer);\n    }\n    \n    static int initCounter() {\n        std::cout << \"Initializing counter...\" << std::endl;\n        return 100;\n    }\n    \npublic:\n    inline static const std::string APP_START_TIME = initStartupTime();\n    inline static const int START_COUNTER = initCounter();\n    \n    static void printStartupInfo() {\n        std::cout << \"Application started at: \" << APP_START_TIME << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Start counter: \" << START_COUNTER << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Runtime: \" << getRuntime() << \" seconds\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    static int getRuntime() {\n        std::time_t now = std::time(nullptr);\n        std::time_t start = std::time(nullptr);\n        return static_cast<int>(now - start);\n    }\n};\n\nstd::string StartupLogger::startupTime = StartupLogger::initStartupTime();\n\nclass DependencyTest {\npublic:\n    static int initFirst() {\n        std::cout << \"Initializing first\" << std::endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    static int initSecond() {\n        std::cout << \"Initializing second, first = \" << first << std::endl;\n        return first + 1;\n    }\n    \n    inline static int first = initFirst();\n    inline static int second = initSecond();\n};\n\nint main() {\n    std::cout << \"Startup Logger Demo\" << std::endl;\n    \n    StartupLogger::printStartupInfo();\n    \n    StartupLogger logger1;\n    StartupLogger logger2;\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nFrom different objects:\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"APP_START_TIME: \" << StartupLogger::APP_START_TIME << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"START_COUNTER: \" << StartupLogger::START_COUNTER << std::endl;\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nDependencyTest::first = \" << DependencyTest::first << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"DependencyTest::second = \" << DependencyTest::second << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <memory>\n\nclass Base {\npublic:\n    virtual ~Base() = default;\n    virtual std::unique_ptr<Base> clone() const {\n        return std::make_unique<Base>(*this);\n    }\n    virtual void identify() const {\n        std::cout << \"I am Base\" << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass Derived : public Base {\npublic:\n    std::unique_ptr<Base> clone() const override {\n        return std::make_unique<Derived>(*this);\n    }\n    void identify() const override {\n        std::cout << \"I am Derived\" << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    std::unique_ptr<Base> original = std::make_unique<Derived>();\n    std::unique_ptr<Base> copy = original->clone();\n    original->identify();\n    copy->identify();\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <map>\n#include <memory>\n#include <string>\n#include <functional>\n#include <stdexcept>\n#include <cmath>\n#include <vector>\n\nclass Strategy {\npublic:\n    virtual ~Strategy() = default;\n    virtual double execute(double a, double b) = 0;\n    virtual std::string getName() const = 0;\n};\n\nclass StrategyRegistry {\n    std::map<std::string, std::function<std::unique_ptr<Strategy>()>> creators;\npublic:\n    void registerStrategy(const std::string& name, \n                         std::function<std::unique_ptr<Strategy>()> creator) {\n        creators[name] = creator;\n    }\n    \n    std::unique_ptr<Strategy> createStrategy(const std::string& name) {\n        auto it = creators.find(name);\n        if (it == creators.end()) {\n            throw std::runtime_error(\"Strategy not found: \" + name);\n        }\n        return it->second();\n    }\n    \n    std::vector<std::string> getAvailableStrategies() const {\n        std::vector<std::string> names;\n        for (const auto& [name, _] : creators) {\n            names.push_back(name);\n        }\n        return names;\n    }\n};\n\n// Конкретные стратегии\nclass AddStrategy : public Strategy {\npublic:\n    double execute(double a, double b) override { return a + b; }\n    std::string getName() const override { return \"add\"; }\n};\n\nclass SubtractStrategy : public Strategy {\npublic:\n    double execute(double a, double b) override { return a - b; }\n    std::string getName() const override { return \"subtract\"; }\n};\n\nclass MultiplyStrategy : public Strategy {\npublic:\n    double execute(double a, double b) override { return a * b; }\n    std::string getName() const override { return \"multiply\"; }\n};\n\nclass PowerStrategy : public Strategy {\npublic:\n    double execute(double a, double b) override { return std::pow(a, b); }\n    std::string getName() const override { return \"power\"; }\n};\n\nclass Context {\n    std::unique_ptr<Strategy> strategy;\n    StrategyRegistry& registry;\npublic:\n    Context(StrategyRegistry& reg) : registry(reg) {}\n    \n    void setStrategy(const std::string& name) {\n        strategy = registry.createStrategy(name);\n    }\n    \n    double executeStrategy(double a, double b) {\n        if (!strategy) {\n            throw std::runtime_error(\"No strategy set\");\n        }\n        return strategy->execute(a, b);\n    }\n    \n    std::string getCurrentStrategyName() const {\n        return strategy ? strategy->getName() : \"none\";\n    }\n};

#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n\nclass Book {\nprivate:\n    std::string title;\n    std::string author;\n    int year;\n    \npublic:\n    Book(std::string t, std::string a, int y) : title(t), author(a), year(y) {\n        if (year < 0) year = 0;\n    }\n    \n    void printInfo() const {\n        std::cout << \"\\\"\" << title << \"\\\", \" << author << \", \" << year << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    std::string getTitle() const { return title; }\n    std::string getAuthor() const { return author; }\n    int getYear() const { return year; }\n};\n\nclass Library {\nprivate:\n    Book* books[50];\n    int bookCount;\n    const int MAX_BOOKS = 50;\n    \npublic:\n    Library() : bookCount(0) {\n        for (int i = 0; i < MAX_BOOKS; i++) books[i] = nullptr;\n    }\n    \n    ~Library() {\n        for (int i = 0; i < bookCount; i++) {\n            delete books[i];\n        }\n    }\n    \n    bool addBook(std::string title, std::string author, int year) {\n        if (bookCount >= MAX_BOOKS) {\n            std::cout << \"Библиотека полна! Максимум \" << MAX_BOOKS << \" книг\" << std::endl;\n            return false;\n        }\n        books[bookCount++] = new Book(title, author, year);\n        std::cout << \"Книга добавлена: \" << title << std::endl;\n        return true;\n    }\n    \n    void findBooksByAuthor(const std::string& author) const {\n        std::cout << \"\\nКниги автора \" << author << \":\" << std::endl;\n        bool found = false;\n        for (int i = 0; i < bookCount; i++) {\n            if (books[i]->getAuthor() == author) {\n                books[i]->printInfo();\n                found = true;\n            }\n        }\n        if (!found) {\n            std::cout << \"Книги данного автора не найдены\" << std::endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void findBooksByYear(int year) const {\n        std::cout << \"\\nКниги, изданные в \" << year << \" году:\" << std::endl;\n        bool found = false;\n        for (int i = 0; i < bookCount; i++) {\n            if (books[i]->getYear() == year) {\n                books[i]->printInfo();\n                found = true;\n            }\n        }\n        if (!found) {\n            std::cout << \"Книги за этот год не найдены\" << std::endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void findBooksByYearRange(int startYear, int endYear) const {\n        std::cout << \"\\nКниги, изданные с \" << startYear << \" по \" << endYear << \" год:\" << std::endl;\n        bool found = false;\n        for (int i = 0; i < bookCount; i++) {\n            int year = books[i]->getYear();\n            if (year >= startYear && year <= endYear) {\n                books[i]->printInfo();\n                found = true;\n            }\n        }\n        if (!found) {\n            std::cout << \"Книги за этот период не найдены\" << std::endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void printAllBooks() const {\n        if (bookCount == 0) {\n            std::cout << \"Библиотека пуста\" << std::endl;\n            return;\n        }\n        std::cout << \"\\n=== ВСЕ КНИГИ В БИБЛИОТЕКЕ ===\" << std::endl;\n        for (int i = 0; i < bookCount; i++) {\n            std::cout << i + 1 << \". \";\n            books[i]->printInfo();\n        }\n        std::cout << \"Всего книг: \" << bookCount << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    bool removeBook(int index) {\n        if (index < 0 || index >= bookCount) {\n            std::cout << \"Неверный индекс книги\" << std::endl;\n            return false;\n        }\n        std::cout << \"Удалена книга: \" << books[index]->getTitle() << std::endl;\n        delete books[index];\n        for (int i = index; i < bookCount - 1; i++) {\n            books[i] = books[i + 1];\n        }\n        books[bookCount - 1] = nullptr;\n        bookCount--;\n        return true;\n    }\n    \n    int getBookCount() const { return bookCount; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Library lib;\n    \n    lib.addBook(\"Война и мир\", \"Лев Толстой\", 1869);\n    lib.addBook(\"Анна Каренина\", \"Лев Толстой\", 1877);\n    lib.addBook(\"Преступление и наказание\", \"Федор Достоевский\", 1866);\n    lib.addBook(\"1984\", \"Джордж Оруэлл\", 1949);\n    lib.addBook(\"Скотный двор\", \"Джордж Оруэлл\", 1945);\n    \n    lib.printAllBooks();\n    \n    lib.findBooksByAuthor(\"Лев Толстой\");\n    lib.findBooksByYear(1949);\n    lib.findBooksByYearRange(1900, 2000);\n    \n    lib.removeBook(2);\n    lib.printAllBooks();\n    \n    // Поиск несуществующего автора\n    lib.findBooksByAuthor(\"Агата Кристи\");\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nint main() {\n    int arr[5] = {1, 2, 3, 4, 5};\n    int* ptr = arr;\n    \n    std::cout << \"sizeof(arr): \" << sizeof(arr) << \" байт\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"sizeof(ptr): \" << sizeof(ptr) << \" байт\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"sizeof(*ptr): \" << sizeof(*ptr) << \" байт\" << std::endl;\n    \n    int arrSize = sizeof(arr) / sizeof(arr[0]);\n    std::cout << \"Количество элементов в массиве: \" << arrSize << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <type_traits>\nusing namespace std;\n\n// SFINAE для типов с методом serialize()\ntemplate<typename T>\nclass has_serialize {\nprivate:\n    template<typename U>\n    static auto test(int) -> decltype(\n        declval<U>().serialize(), true_type{});\n    \n    template<typename U>\n    static false_type test(...);\n    \npublic:\n    static constexpr bool value = decltype(test<T>(0))::value;\n};\n\ntemplate<typename T>\ntypename enable_if<has_serialize<T>::value, string>::type\nserialize(const T& obj) {\n    return obj.serialize();\n}\n\ntemplate<typename T>\ntypename enable_if<!has_serialize<T>::value, string>::type\nserialize(const T& obj) {\n    return to_string(obj);\n}\n\nclass MyClass {\npublic:\n    string serialize() const {\n        return \"MyClass serialized\";\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    MyClass obj;\n    int number = 42;\n    \n    cout << serialize(obj) << endl;\n    cout << serialize(number) << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <variant>\n#include <string>\n#include <vector>\n\nusing Value = std::variant<int, double, std::string>;\n\nvoid print_value(const Value& val) {\n    std::visit([](const auto& v) {\n        std::cout << \"Значение: \" << v << std::endl;\n    }, val);\n}\n\nclass ValueProcessor {\npublic:\n    void operator()(int i) {\n        std::cout << \"Обработка int: \" << i * 2 << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    void operator()(double d) {\n        std::cout << \"Обработка double: \" << d + 0.5 << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    void operator()(const std::string& s) {\n        std::cout << \"Обработка string: \" << s.length() << \" символов\" << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    std::vector<Value> values = {42, 3.14, \"hello\", 100, \"world\"};\n    \n    std::cout << \"Все значения:\" << std::endl;\n    for (const auto& val : values) {\n        print_value(val);\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nОбработка:\" << std::endl;\n    ValueProcessor processor;\n    for (auto& val : values) {\n        std::visit(processor, val);\n    }\n    \n    // Проверка типа\n    Value v = \"test\";\n    if (std::holds_alternative<std::string>(v)) {\n        std::cout << \"\\nV содержит string: \" << std::get<std::string>(v) << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nint max(int a, int b);\ndouble max(double a, double b);\nint max(int a, int b, int c);\n\nint max(int a, int b) {\n    return (a > b) ? a : b;\n}\n\ndouble max(double a, double b) {\n    return (a > b) ? a : b;\n}\n\nint max(int a, int b, int c) {\n    return max(max(a, b), c);\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::cout << \"max(5, 3) = \" << max(5, 3) << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"max(2.7, 3.1) = \" << max(2.7, 3.1) << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"max(1, 8, 3) = \" << max(1, 8, 3) << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <numbers>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n double radius_top, radius_bottom, height;\n cout << \"Введите верхний радиус, нижний радиус и высоту слоя:\";\n cin >> radius_top >> radius_bottom >> height;\n double volume = (3.1415926535 * height / 6.0) * (3.0 * radius_top * radius_top + 3.0 * radius_bottom * radius_bottom + height * height);\n cout << \"Объем сферического слоя: \" << volume << endl;\n return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <iomanip>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    int n;\n    double sum = 0.0;\n    \n    cout << \"Введите N: \";\n    cin >> n;\n    \n    if (n <= 0) {\n        cout << \"N должно быть положительным!\" << endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    cout << fixed << setprecision(4);\n    cout << \"Вычисление гармонического ряда:\" << endl;\n    \n    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {\n        double term = 1.0 / i;\n        sum += term;\n        cout << \"Шаг \" << i << \": 1/\" << i << \" = \" << term \n             << \", текущая сумма = \" << sum << endl;\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"\\nИтоговая сумма: \" << sum << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nclass Test {\npublic:\n    virtual void byValue(int x) {\n        std::cout << \"Base byValue: \" << x << std::endl;\n    }\n    virtual void byReference(const int& x) {\n        std::cout << \"Base byReference: \" << x << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass TestDerived : public Test {\npublic:\n    void byValue(int x) override {\n        std::cout << \"Derived byValue: \" << x * 2 << std::endl;\n    }\n    void byReference(const int& x) override {\n        std::cout << \"Derived byReference: \" << x * 2 << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    TestDerived d;\n    Test* t = &d;\n    t->byValue(5);\n    t->byReference(5);\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <string>\n\nint main() {\n    std::string source_name, dest_name;\n    std::cout << \"Введите имя исходного файла: \";\n    std::cin >> source_name;\n    std::cout << \"Введите имя целевого файла: \";\n    std::cin >> dest_name;\n    \n    std::ifstream source(source_name, std::ios::binary);\n    std::ofstream destination(dest_name, std::ios::binary);\n    \n    if (!source.is_open()) {\n        std::cout << \"Ошибка: не удалось открыть исходный файл \" << source_name << std::endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    if (!destination.is_open()) {\n        std::cout << \"Ошибка: не удалось создать целевой файл \" << dest_name << std::endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    char ch;\n    int bytes_copied = 0;\n    while (source.get(ch)) {\n        destination.put(ch);\n        bytes_copied++;\n    }\n    \n    source.close();\n    destination.close();\n    \n    std::cout << \"Файл скопирован успешно. Скопировано байт: \" << bytes_copied << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <string>\n\nbool isLuckyNumber(int num) {\n    std::string numStr = std::to_string(num);\n    int length = numStr.length();\n    \n    // Только для чисел с четным количеством цифр\n    if (length % 2 != 0) return false;\n    \n    int leftSum = 0, rightSum = 0;\n    int middle = length / 2;\n    \n    for (int i = 0; i < length; i++) {\n        if (i < middle) {\n            leftSum += numStr[i] - '0';\n        } else {\n            rightSum += numStr[i] - '0';\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return leftSum == rightSum;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    int start, end;\n    \n    std::cout << \"Введите начало диапазона: \";\n    std::cin >> start;\n    std::cout << \"Введите конец диапазона: \";\n    std::cin >> end;\n    \n    if (start > end) {\n        std::cout << \"Начало диапазона должно быть меньше конца!\" << std::endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    if (start < 10) {\n        std::cout << \"Диапазон будет скорректирован (минимальное счастливое число - 10).\" << std::endl;\n        start = 10;\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nПоиск счастливых чисел в диапазоне [\" << start << \", \" << end << \"]:\" << std::endl;\n    \n    std::vector<int> luckyNumbers;\n    int count = 0;\n    \n    for (int num = start; num <= end; num++) {\n        if (isLuckyNumber(num)) {\n            luckyNumbers.push_back(num);\n            count++;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    if (count == 0) {\n        std::cout << \"Счастливые числа не найдены.\" << std::endl;\n    } else {\n        std::cout << \"Найдено \" << count << \" счастливых чисел:\" << std::endl;\n        \n        for (int i = 0; i < luckyNumbers.size(); i++) {\n            std::cout << luckyNumbers[i];\n            \n            // Показываем сумму цифр для каждого числа\n            std::string numStr = std::to_string(luckyNumbers[i]);\n            int middle = numStr.length() / 2;\n            int leftSum = 0, rightSum = 0;\n            \n            for (int j = 0; j < numStr.length(); j++) {\n                if (j < middle) leftSum += numStr[j] - '0';\n                else rightSum += numStr[j] - '0';\n            }\n            \n            std::cout << \" (\" << leftSum << \" = \" << rightSum << \")\";\n            \n            if ((i + 1) % 5 == 0) std::cout << std::endl;\n            else if (i != luckyNumbers.size() - 1) std::cout << \", \";\n        }\n        std::cout << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nvoid reverseArray(int arr[], int size) {\n    int start = 0;\n    int end = size - 1;\n    \n    while (start < end) {\n        swap(arr[start], arr[end]);\n        start++;\n        end--;\n    }\n}\n\nvoid printArray(int arr[], int size) {\n    for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {\n        cout << arr[i] << \" \";\n    }\n    cout << endl;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    int arr[] = {1, 2, 3, 4, 5};\n    reverseArray(arr, 5);\n    printArray(arr, 5);\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <thread>\n#include <vector>\n#include <mutex>\n#include <chrono>\n#include <functional>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass ThreadSafeCounter {\nprivate:\n    int value = 0;\n    mutable mutex mtx; // mutable для использования в const методах\n    \npublic:\n    // Метод для инкремента, возвращает ссылку на объект для цепочек\n    ThreadSafeCounter& increment() {\n        lock_guard<mutex> lock(mtx);\n        ++value;\n        return *this;\n    }\n    \n    // Метод для получения значения (константная ссылка на объект)\n    const ThreadSafeCounter& print() const {\n        lock_guard<mutex> lock(mtx); // mtx теперь mutable\n        cout << \"Текущее значение: \" << value << endl;\n        return *this;\n    }\n    \n    // Метод для получения значения\n    int getValue() const {\n        lock_guard<mutex> lock(mtx); // mtx теперь mutable\n        return value;\n    }\n    \n    // Метод принимает ссылку на результат\n    void getValueRef(int& result) const {\n        lock_guard<mutex> lock(mtx); // mtx теперь mutable\n        result = value;\n    }\n};\n\n// Функция для потока, принимает ссылку на счетчик\nvoid threadFunction(ThreadSafeCounter& counter, int iterations) {\n    for (int i = 0; i < iterations; ++i) {\n        counter.increment().print(); // Цепочка вызовов\n        this_thread::sleep_for(chrono::milliseconds(10));\n    }\n}\n\nint main() {\n    ThreadSafeCounter counter;\n    \n    cout << \"Запуск многопоточного инкремента:\\n\";\n    \n    vector<thread> threads;\n    const int numThreads = 3;\n    const int iterations = 5;\n    \n    // Создаем потоки, передаем ссылку на счетчик\n    for (int i = 0; i < numThreads; ++i) {\n        threads.emplace_back(threadFunction, ref(counter), iterations);\n    }\n    \n    // Основной поток тоже работает со счетчиком\n    for (int i = 0; i < iterations; ++i) {\n        counter.increment();\n        this_thread::sleep_for(chrono::milliseconds(15));\n    }\n    \n    // Ждем завершения всех потоков\n    for (auto& t : threads) {\n        t.join();\n    }\n    \n    // Получение результата через ссылку\n    int finalValue;\n    counter.getValueRef(finalValue);\n    \n    cout << \"\\nФинальное значение счетчика: \" << finalValue << endl;\n    cout << \"Ожидаемое значение: \" << numThreads * iterations + iterations << endl;\n    \n    // Пример с reference_wrapper\n    cout << \"\\nИспользование reference_wrapper:\\n\";\n    ThreadSafeCounter counter2;\n    reference_wrapper<ThreadSafeCounter> counterRef = counter2;\n    \n    // Работа через reference_wrapper\n    counterRef.get().increment();\n    cout << \"counter2 значение: \" << counter2.getValue() << endl;\n    \n    // Вектор reference_wrapper\n    vector<reference_wrapper<ThreadSafeCounter>> counters;\n    counters.push_back(counter);\n    counters.push_back(counter2);\n    \n    for (auto& c : counters) {\n        c.get().increment();\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"\\nПосле инкремента всех счетчиков:\\n\";\n    cout << \"counter: \" << counter.getValue() << endl;\n    cout << \"counter2: \" << counter2.getValue() << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nenum Direction { UP, DOWN, LEFT, RIGHT };\n\nint main() {\n    Direction move1 = UP;\n    Direction move2 = RIGHT;\n    \n    std::cout << \"Первое движение: \" << move1 << \" (Вверх)\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Второе движение: \" << move2 << \" (Вправо)\" << std::endl;\n    \n    if (move1 == UP && move2 == RIGHT) {\n        std::cout << \"Движение: Вверх-Вправо\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cstdlib>\n#include <ctime>\n\nvoid bubbleSort(int arr[], int n) {\n    for (int i = 0; i < n - 1; ++i) {\n        bool swapped = false;\n        for (int j = 0; j < n - i - 1; ++j) {\n            if (arr[j] > arr[j + 1]) {\n                int temp = arr[j];\n                arr[j] = arr[j + 1];\n                arr[j + 1] = temp;\n                swapped = true;\n            }\n        }\n        if (!swapped) break;\n    }\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::srand(std::time(0));\n    int n;\n    std::cout << \"Введите размер массива: \";\n    std::cin >> n;\n    \n    if (n <= 0) {\n        std::cout << \"Размер массива должен быть положительным.\" << std::endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    int* arr = new int[n];\n    std::cout << \"Исходный массив:\" << std::endl;\n    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {\n        arr[i] = std::rand() % 100;\n        std::cout << arr[i] << \" \";\n    }\n    std::cout << std::endl;\n    \n    bubbleSort(arr, n);\n    \n    std::cout << \"Отсортированный массив:\" << std::endl;\n    for (int i = 0; i < n; ++i) {\n        std::cout << arr[i] << \" \";\n    }\n    std::cout << std::endl;\n    \n    delete[] arr;\n    return 0;\n}
