#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <algorithm>\n#include <cmath>\n#include <queue>\n\nstruct Point {\n    double x, y;\n    int id;\n};\n\nstruct CompareDistance {\n    Point target;\n    CompareDistance(Point t) : target(t) {}\n    \n    bool operator()(const Point& a, const Point& b) {\n        double dist_a = std::pow(a.x - target.x, 2) + std::pow(a.y - target.y, 2);\n        double dist_b = std::pow(b.x - target.x, 2) + std::pow(b.y - target.y, 2);\n        return dist_a < dist_b;\n    }\n};\n\nstd::vector<Point> k_nearest_neighbors(const std::vector<Point>& points, const Point& target, int k) {\n    if (k >= points.size()) {\n        return points;\n    }\n    \n    std::vector<Point> result = points;\n    \n    // Используем nth_element для частичной сортировки\n    std::nth_element(result.begin(), result.begin() + k, result.end(), CompareDistance(target));\n    \n    // Сортируем первые k элементов\n    std::sort(result.begin(), result.begin() + k, CompareDistance(target));\n    \n    // Возвращаем k ближайших соседей\n    return std::vector<Point>(result.begin(), result.begin() + k);\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::vector<Point> points = {\n        {1.0, 2.0, 1}, {3.0, 4.0, 2}, {5.0, 1.0, 3},\n        {7.0, 3.0, 4}, {2.0, 7.0, 5}, {4.0, 4.0, 6},\n        {6.0, 6.0, 7}, {8.0, 2.0, 8}, {9.0, 5.0, 9}\n    };\n    \n    Point target = {4.0, 4.0, 0};\n    int k = 3;\n    \n    std::vector<Point> neighbors = k_nearest_neighbors(points, target, k);\n    \n    std::cout << k << \" ближайших соседей к точке (\" << target.x << \", \" << target.y << \"):\" << std::endl;\n    for (const auto& point : neighbors) {\n        double distance = std::sqrt(std::pow(point.x - target.x, 2) + std::pow(point.y - target.y, 2));\n        std::cout << \"Точка \" << point.id << \" (\" << point.x << \", \" << point.y << \"), расстояние: \" << distance << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iterator>\n#include <vector>\n#include <string>\n#include <iostream>\n\nclass DataMover {\n    std::vector<std::string> data;\npublic:\n    void addData(std::string value) {\n        data.push_back(std::move(value));\n    }\n    \n    std::vector<std::string> extractData() {\n        std::vector<std::string> result;\n        result.insert(result.end(),\n                     std::make_move_iterator(data.begin()),\n                     std::make_move_iterator(data.end()));\n        data.clear();\n        return result;\n    }\n    \n    template<typename InputIt>\n    void moveData(InputIt first, InputIt last) {\n        data.insert(data.end(),\n                   std::make_move_iterator(first),\n                   std::make_move_iterator(last));\n    }\n    \n    void display() const {\n        std::cout << \"DataMover содержит \" << data.size() << \" элементов:\" << std::endl;\n        for(const auto& item : data) {\n            std::cout << \"  '\" << item << \"'\" << std::endl;\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    DataMover mover;\n    mover.addData(\"first\");\n    mover.addData(\"second\");\n    mover.addData(\"third\");\n    \n    mover.display();\n    \n    std::vector<std::string> extracted = mover.extractData();\n    std::cout << \"\\nИзвлечено \" << extracted.size() << \" элементов\" << std::endl;\n    \n    mover.display();\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <variant>\n#include <vector>\n#include <string>\n#include <type_traits>\n\nstruct Idle;\nstruct Running;\nstruct Paused;\n\nusing State = std::variant<Idle, Running, Paused>;\n\nstruct Idle {};\nstruct Running { int progress = 0; };\nstruct Paused { int savedProgress = 0; };\n\nclass StateMachine {\n    State currentState;\npublic:\n    StateMachine() : currentState(Idle{}) {}\n    \n    void start() {\n        currentState = std::visit([](auto&& arg) -> State {\n            using T = std::decay_t<decltype(arg)>;\n            if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, Idle>) {\n                std::cout << \"Starting from Idle\" << std::endl;\n                return Running{0};\n            } else {\n                std::cout << \"Cannot start from current state\" << std::endl;\n                return arg;\n            }\n        }, currentState);\n    }\n    \n    void pause() {\n        currentState = std::visit([](auto&& arg) -> State {\n            using T = std::decay_t<decltype(arg)>;\n            if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, Running>) {\n                std::cout << \"Pausing at progress: \" << arg.progress << std::endl;\n                return Paused{arg.progress};\n            } else {\n                std::cout << \"Cannot pause from current state\" << std::endl;\n                return arg;\n            }\n        }, currentState);\n    }\n    \n    void resume() {\n        currentState = std::visit([](auto&& arg) -> State {\n            using T = std::decay_t<decltype(arg)>;\n            if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, Paused>) {\n                std::cout << \"Resuming from progress: \" << arg.savedProgress << std::endl;\n                return Running{arg.savedProgress};\n            } else {\n                std::cout << \"Cannot resume from current state\" << std::endl;\n                return arg;\n            }\n        }, currentState);\n    }\n    \n    void stop() {\n        currentState = std::visit([](auto&& arg) -> State {\n            using T = std::decay_t<decltype(arg)>;\n            if constexpr (std::is_same_v<T, Running> || std::is_same_v<T, Paused>) {\n                std::cout << \"Stopping\" << std::endl;\n                return Idle{};\n            } else {\n                std::cout << \"Already idle\" << std::endl;\n                return arg;\n            }\n        }, currentState);\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    StateMachine sm;\n    sm.start();\n    sm.pause();\n    sm.resume();\n    sm.stop();\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    int arr2D[2][3] = {{1, 2, 3}, {4, 5, 6}};\n    \n    int* elementPtr = &arr2D[0][0];\n    \n    int (*rowPtr)[3] = arr2D;\n    \n    cout << \"Доступ через указатель на элемент:\" << endl;\n    for(int i = 0; i < 6; i++) {\n        cout << *(elementPtr + i) << \" \";\n    }\n    cout << endl;\n    \n    cout << \"\\nДоступ через указатель на строку:\" << endl;\n    for(int i = 0; i < 2; i++) {\n        for(int j = 0; j < 3; j++) {\n            cout << rowPtr[i][j] << \" \";\n        }\n    }\n    cout << endl;\n    \n    cout << \"\\nРазмеры указателей:\" << endl;\n    cout << \"sizeof(elementPtr) = \" << sizeof(elementPtr) << endl;\n    cout << \"sizeof(rowPtr) = \" << sizeof(rowPtr) << endl;\n    cout << \"sizeof(*rowPtr) = \" << sizeof(*rowPtr) << \" (размер строки)\" << endl;\n    \n    cout << \"\\nАрифметика указателей:\" << endl;\n    cout << \"elementPtr + 1 = \" << (void*)(elementPtr + 1) << endl;\n    cout << \"rowPtr + 1 = \" << (void*)(rowPtr + 1) << endl;\n    cout << \"Разница в байтах: \" << sizeof(int[3]) << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <thread>\n#include <mutex>\n#include <condition_variable>\n#include <vector>\n#include <chrono>\n#include <random>\n#include <atomic>\n\nclass ConnectionLimiter {\nprivate:\n    std::mutex mtx;\n    std::condition_variable cv;\n    int available;\n    int max_connections;\n    \npublic:\n    ConnectionLimiter(int max_conn, int initial_available) \n        : max_connections(max_conn), available(initial_available) {\n        if (initial_available > max_conn) available = max_conn;\n    }\n    \n    void acquire() {\n        std::unique_lock<std::mutex> lock(mtx);\n        cv.wait(lock, [this]() { return available > 0; });\n        --available;\n    }\n    \n    void release() {\n        std::unique_lock<std::mutex> lock(mtx);\n        if (available < max_connections) {\n            ++available;\n            cv.notify_one();\n        }\n    }\n    \n    int get_available() {\n        std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(mtx);\n        return available;\n    }\n    \n    int get_max() {\n        return max_connections;\n    }\n};\n\nConnectionLimiter connection_pool(10, 5); // Максимум 10, сейчас 5 доступно\nstd::atomic<int> active_connections(0);\n\nvoid handle_request(int id) {\n    std::random_device rd;\n    std::mt19937 gen(rd());\n    std::uniform_int_distribution<> delay(100, 500);\n    \n    std::cout << \"Запрос \" << id << \" ожидает соединения...\" << std::endl;\n    connection_pool.acquire();\n    \n    int current_active = ++active_connections;\n    std::cout << \"Запрос \" << id << \" получил соединение (активных: \" \n              << current_active << \", доступно: \" << connection_pool.get_available() << \")...\" << std::endl;\n    \n    std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(delay(gen)));\n    \n    --active_connections;\n    connection_pool.release();\n    std::cout << \"Запрос \" << id << \" завершен, соединение освобождено\" << std::endl;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::vector<std::thread> requests;\n    \n    std::cout << \"Симуляция пула соединений: максимум \" << connection_pool.get_max() \n              << \", изначально доступно \" << connection_pool.get_available() << std::endl;\n    \n    for (int i = 0; i < 20; i++) {\n        requests.emplace_back(handle_request, i + 1);\n        std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(50));\n    }\n    \n    for (auto& req : requests) {\n        req.join();\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nВсе запросы обработаны\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Максимум одновременных соединений: \" << connection_pool.get_max() << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Финальное количество доступных соединений: \" << connection_pool.get_available() << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nclass Base {\npublic:\n    virtual void func1() {\n        std::cout << \"Base func1\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    virtual void func2() {\n        std::cout << \"Base func2\" << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass Derived : public Base {\npublic:\n    void func1() override {\n        std::cout << \"Derived func1\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    // func2 не переопределена\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Derived d;\n    Base* b = &d;\n    b->func1();\n    b->func2();\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <functional>\n#include <chrono>\n#include <thread>\n#include <string>\n\n// Объявления аспектных функций\nint add(int a, int b);\ndouble multiply(double a, double b);\nstd::string concat(const std::string& a, const std::string& b);\n\n// Макросы для AOP\n#define ASPECT_BEFORE(func, advice) \\\n    template<typename... Args> \\\n    auto func##_with_before(Args&&... args) -> decltype(func(std::forward<Args>(args)...)) { \\\n        advice(); \\\n        return func(std::forward<Args>(args)...); \\\n    }\n\n#define ASPECT_AFTER(func, advice) \\\n    template<typename... Args> \\\n    auto func##_with_after(Args&&... args) -> decltype(func(std::forward<Args>(args)...)) { \\\n        auto result = func(std::forward<Args>(args)...); \\\n        advice(); \\\n        return result; \\\n    }\n\n#define ASPECT_AROUND(func, before_advice, after_advice) \\\n    template<typename... Args> \\\n    auto func##_with_around(Args&&... args) -> decltype(func(std::forward<Args>(args)...)) { \\\n        before_advice(); \\\n        auto result = func(std::forward<Args>(args)...); \\\n        after_advice(); \\\n        return result; \\\n    }\n\n#define TIMED_ASPECT(func) \\\n    template<typename... Args> \\\n    auto func##_timed(Args&&... args) -> decltype(func(std::forward<Args>(args)...)) { \\\n        auto start = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now(); \\\n        auto result = func(std::forward<Args>(args)...); \\\n        auto end = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now(); \\\n        auto duration = std::chrono::duration_cast<std::chrono::microseconds>(end - start); \\\n        std::cout << #func << \" took \" << duration.count() << \" microseconds\" << std::endl; \\\n        return result; \\\n    }\n\n// Советники (advice)\nvoid logBefore() {\n    std::cout << \"[LOG] Before function execution\" << std::endl;\n}\n\nvoid logAfter() {\n    std::cout << \"[LOG] After function execution\" << std::endl;\n}\n\nvoid securityCheck() {\n    std::cout << \"[SECURITY] Checking permissions...\" << std::endl;\n}\n\n// Базовые функции\nint add(int a, int b) {\n    std::cout << \"Adding \" << a << \" + \" << b << std::endl;\n    return a + b;\n}\n\ndouble multiply(double a, double b) {\n    std::cout << \"Multiplying \" << a << \" * \" << b << std::endl;\n    return a * b;\n}\n\nstd::string concat(const std::string& a, const std::string& b) {\n    std::cout << \"Concatenating '\" << a << \"' + '\" << b << \"'\" << std::endl;\n    return a + b;\n}\n\n// Применение аспектов\nASPECT_BEFORE(add, securityCheck)\nASPECT_AROUND(multiply, logBefore, logAfter)\nTIMED_ASPECT(concat)\n\n// Шаблонная функция для измерения времени выполнения лямбд\ntemplate<typename Lambda, typename... Args>\nauto measureTime(const char* name, Lambda&& lambda, Args&&... args) -> decltype(lambda(std::forward<Args>(args)...)) {\n    auto start = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\n    auto result = lambda(std::forward<Args>(args)...);\n    auto end = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\n    auto duration = std::chrono::duration_cast<std::chrono::microseconds>(end - start);\n    std::cout << name << \" took \" << duration.count() << \" microseconds\" << std::endl;\n    return result;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::cout << \"Testing aspect-oriented programming:\\n\" << std::endl;\n    \n    std::cout << \"1. Function with before aspect (security):\" << std::endl;\n    int sum = add_with_before(10, 20);\n    std::cout << \"Result: \" << sum << \"\\n\" << std::endl;\n    \n    std::cout << \"2. Function with around aspect (logging):\" << std::endl;\n    double product = multiply_with_around(3.5, 2.0);\n    std::cout << \"Result: \" << product << \"\\n\" << std::endl;\n    \n    std::cout << \"3. Function with timing aspect:\" << std::endl;\n    std::string concatResult = concat_timed(\"Hello, \", \"AOP!\");\n    std::cout << \"Result: \" << concatResult << std::endl;\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n4. Lambda function with timing:\" << std::endl;\n    auto slowOperation = [](int x) -> int {\n        std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(100));\n        return x * 2;\n    };\n    \n    int lambdaResult = measureTime(\"slowOperation\", slowOperation, 42);\n    std::cout << \"Lambda result: \" << lambdaResult << std::endl;\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n5. Aspect combination:\" << std::endl;\n    {\n        securityCheck();\n        auto start = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\n        logBefore();\n        \n        int combined = add(100, 200);\n        \n        logAfter();\n        auto end = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\n        auto duration = std::chrono::duration_cast<std::chrono::microseconds>(end - start);\n        \n        std::cout << \"Combined result: \" << combined << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Total execution time: \" << duration.count() << \" microseconds\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n6. Complex aspect example:\" << std::endl;\n    auto complexOp = [](int a, int b, int c) -> int {\n        return (a + b) * c;\n    };\n    \n    auto wrappedComplexOp = [&complexOp](int a, int b, int c) -> int {\n        securityCheck();\n        auto start = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\n        \n        int result = complexOp(a, b, c);\n        \n        auto end = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\n        auto duration = std::chrono::duration_cast<std::chrono::microseconds>(end - start);\n        std::cout << \"Complex operation took \" << duration.count() << \" microseconds\" << std::endl;\n        \n        return result;\n    };\n    \n    int complexResult = wrappedComplexOp(2, 3, 4);\n    std::cout << \"Complex result: \" << complexResult << std::endl;\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n7. Example with standard function and timing:\" << std::endl;\n    auto timedAdd = measureTime(\"add function\", add, 50, 60);\n    std::cout << \"Timed add result: \" << timedAdd << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <cstdlib>\n#include <ctime>\n#include <cmath>\n\ndouble estimatePi(int numSamples) {\n    int insideCircle = 0;\n    \n    std::srand(std::time(0));\n    for (int i = 0; i < numSamples; i++) {\n        double x = (double)std::rand() / RAND_MAX;\n        double y = (double)std::rand() / RAND_MAX;\n        \n        if (x * x + y * y <= 1) {\n            insideCircle++;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return 4.0 * insideCircle / numSamples;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    int samples = 1000000;\n    double piEstimate = estimatePi(samples);\n    \n    std::cout << \"Оценка Pi методом Монте-Карло: \" << piEstimate << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Точное значение Pi: \" << M_PI << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Погрешность: \" << std::abs(piEstimate - M_PI) << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <sys/types.h>\n#include <sys/socket.h>\n#include <netinet/in.h>\n#include <arpa/inet.h>\n#include <unistd.h>\n#include <iostream>\n#include <cstring>\n#include <vector>\n#include <thread>\n#include <mutex>\n#include <atomic>\n\nstd::mutex cout_mutex;\nstd::atomic<int> open_ports(0);\n\nvoid scan_port(const std::string& ip, int port) {\n    int sock = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0);\n    sockaddr_in addr;\n    addr.sin_family = AF_INET;\n    addr.sin_port = htons(port);\n    inet_pton(AF_INET, ip.c_str(), &addr.sin_addr);\n    \n    struct timeval tv;\n    tv.tv_sec = 1;\n    tv.tv_usec = 0;\n    setsockopt(sock, SOL_SOCKET, SO_RCVTIMEO, &tv, sizeof(tv));\n    \n    if(connect(sock, (struct sockaddr*)&addr, sizeof(addr)) == 0) {\n        std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(cout_mutex);\n        std::cout << \"Port \" << port << \" is OPEN\" << std::endl;\n        open_ports++;\n    }\n    close(sock);\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::string target_ip = \"127.0.0.1\";\n    std::vector<std::thread> threads;\n    int start_port = 1;\n    int end_port = 1024;\n    \n    std::cout << \"Scanning ports \" << start_port << \"-\" << end_port << \" on \" << target_ip << std::endl;\n    \n    for(int port = start_port; port <= end_port; port++) {\n        threads.emplace_back(scan_port, target_ip, port);\n        if(threads.size() >= 100) { // Limit concurrent threads\n            for(auto& t : threads) t.join();\n            threads.clear();\n        }\n    }\n    \n    for(auto& t : threads) t.join();\n    \n    std::cout << \"Scan completed. Found \" << open_ports << \" open ports.\" << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <unordered_map>\n#include <vector>\n#include <chrono>\n#include <mutex>\n#include <thread>\n#include <iomanip>\nusing namespace std;\nusing namespace chrono;\n\nclass Metrics {\nprivate:\n    inline static unordered_map<string, double> counters;\n    inline static unordered_map<string, pair<double, double>> gauges;\n    inline static unordered_map<string, vector<double>> histograms;\n    \n    inline static mutex metricsMutex;\n    \n    Metrics() = delete;\n    \npublic:\n    static void incrementCounter(const string& name, double value = 1.0) {\n        lock_guard<mutex> lock(metricsMutex);\n        counters[name] += value;\n    }\n    \n    static void decrementCounter(const string& name, double value = 1.0) {\n        lock_guard<mutex> lock(metricsMutex);\n        counters[name] -= value;\n    }\n    \n    static double getCounter(const string& name) {\n        lock_guard<mutex> lock(metricsMutex);\n        return counters[name];\n    }\n    \n    static void setGauge(const string& name, double value) {\n        lock_guard<mutex> lock(metricsMutex);\n        auto& gauge = gauges[name];\n        gauge.first = value;\n        if(value > gauge.second) {\n            gauge.second = value;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    static pair<double, double> getGauge(const string& name) {\n        lock_guard<mutex> lock(metricsMutex);\n        return gauges[name];\n    }\n    \n    static void recordHistogram(const string& name, double value) {\n        lock_guard<mutex> lock(metricsMutex);\n        histograms[name].push_back(value);\n    }\n    \n    class Timer {\n    private:\n        string metricName;\n        steady_clock::time_point startTime;\n        \n    public:\n        Timer(const string& name) : metricName(name) {\n            startTime = steady_clock::now();\n        }\n        \n        ~Timer() {\n            auto endTime = steady_clock::now();\n            auto duration = duration_cast<milliseconds>(endTime - startTime);\n            recordHistogram(metricName, duration.count());\n        }\n    };\n    \n    static void printMetrics() {\n        lock_guard<mutex> lock(metricsMutex);\n        \n        cout << \"\\n=== METRICS REPORT ===\" << endl;\n        \n        if(!counters.empty()) {\n            cout << \"\\nCOUNTERS:\" << endl;\n            for(const auto& pair : counters) {\n                cout << \"  \" << setw(30) << left << pair.first \n                     << \": \" << pair.second << endl;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        if(!gauges.empty()) {\n            cout << \"\\nGAUGES:\" << endl;\n            for(const auto& pair : gauges) {\n                cout << \"  \" << setw(30) << left << pair.first\n                     << \": current=\" << pair.second.first\n                     << \", max=\" << pair.second.second << endl;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        if(!histograms.empty()) {\n            cout << \"\\nHISTOGRAMS:\" << endl;\n            for(const auto& pair : histograms) {\n                const auto& values = pair.second;\n                if(values.empty()) continue;\n                \n                double sum = 0;\n                double minVal = values[0];\n                double maxVal = values[0];\n                \n                for(double val : values) {\n                    sum += val;\n                    if(val < minVal) minVal = val;\n                    if(val > maxVal) maxVal = val;\n                }\n                \n                double avg = sum / values.size();\n                \n                cout << \"  \" << setw(30) << left << pair.first\n                     << \": count=\" << values.size()\n                     << \", avg=\" << fixed << setprecision(2) << avg\n                     << \", min=\" << minVal\n                     << \", max=\" << maxVal << endl;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    static void resetAll() {\n        lock_guard<mutex> lock(metricsMutex);\n        counters.clear();\n        gauges.clear();\n        histograms.clear();\n        cout << \"All metrics reset\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    static string exportMetrics() {\n        lock_guard<mutex> lock(metricsMutex);\n        string result;\n        \n        for(const auto& pair : counters) {\n            result += \"counter_\" + pair.first + \" \" + to_string(pair.second) + \"\\n\";\n        }\n        \n        return result;\n    }\n};\n\nvoid workerThread(int id) {\n    string threadName = \"thread_\" + to_string(id);\n    \n    Metrics::incrementCounter(threadName + \".operations\");\n    \n    Metrics::setGauge(threadName + \".queue_size\", id * 10.0);\n    \n    {\n        Metrics::Timer timer(threadName + \".processing_time\");\n        this_thread::sleep_for(milliseconds(id * 10));\n    }\n    \n    Metrics::incrementCounter(\"global.operations\");\n    Metrics::recordHistogram(\"global.latency\", id * 5.0);\n}\n\nint main() {\n    cout << \"Metrics and Monitoring System with Static Members\" << endl;\n    \n    const int numThreads = 5;\n    thread threads[numThreads];\n    \n    for(int i = 0; i < numThreads; ++i) {\n        threads[i] = thread(workerThread, i + 1);\n    }\n    \n    Metrics::incrementCounter(\"main.requests\");\n    Metrics::setGauge(\"main.active_connections\", 3.5);\n    \n    {\n        Metrics::Timer timer(\"main.expensive_operation\");\n        this_thread::sleep_for(milliseconds(50));\n    }\n    \n    for(int i = 0; i < numThreads; ++i) {\n        threads[i].join();\n    }\n    \n    Metrics::incrementCounter(\"app.completed_jobs\", numThreads);\n    Metrics::setGauge(\"app.memory_usage\", 85.3);\n    \n    Metrics::printMetrics();\n    \n    cout << \"\\nExported metrics:\" << endl;\n    cout << Metrics::exportMetrics() << endl;\n    \n    cout << \"\\nResetting metrics...\" << endl;\n    Metrics::resetAll();\n    \n    cout << \"\\nMetrics after reset:\" << endl;\n    Metrics::printMetrics();\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== Real-world example ===\" << endl;\n    \n    class WebServer {\n    public:\n        void handleRequest(const string& endpoint) {\n            Metrics::incrementCounter(\"http.requests.total\");\n            Metrics::incrementCounter(\"http.requests.\" + endpoint);\n            \n            {\n                Metrics::Timer timer(\"http.request_duration\");\n                this_thread::sleep_for(milliseconds(rand() % 100));\n                \n                Metrics::incrementCounter(\"http.responses.ok\");\n            }\n        }\n    };\n    \n    WebServer server;\n    server.handleRequest(\"/api/users\");\n    server.handleRequest(\"/api/products\");\n    server.handleRequest(\"/api/orders\");\n    \n    Metrics::printMetrics();\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nenum LogLevel {\n NONE = 0,\n ERROR = 1 << 0,\n WARNING = 1 << 1,\n INFO = 1 << 2,\n DEBUG = 1 << 3\n};\n\nint main() {\n int currentLogSettings = ERROR | INFO | DEBUG;\n cout << \"Текущие настройки логирования (число): \" << currentLogSettings << endl;\n \n if (currentLogSettings & ERROR) {\n cout << \"Логирование ошибок включено\" << endl;\n }\n \n if (!(currentLogSettings & WARNING)) {\n cout << \"Логирование предупреждений выключено\" << endl;\n }\n \n return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <map>\n#include <stdexcept>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass CurrencyConverter {\nprivate:\n    map<string, double> exchange_rates;\n    \npublic:\n    CurrencyConverter() {\n        exchange_rates[\"USD\"] = 1.0;\n        exchange_rates[\"EUR\"] = 0.85;\n        exchange_rates[\"GBP\"] = 0.73;\n        exchange_rates[\"JPY\"] = 110.5;\n    }\n    \n    double convert(double amount, const string& from, const string& to) {\n        if (amount <= 0) {\n            throw invalid_argument(\"Amount must be positive\");\n        }\n        \n        if (exchange_rates.find(from) == exchange_rates.end()) {\n            throw runtime_error(\"Unknown source currency: \" + from);\n        }\n        \n        if (exchange_rates.find(to) == exchange_rates.end()) {\n            throw runtime_error(\"Unknown target currency: \" + to);\n        }\n        \n        double usd_amount = amount / exchange_rates[from];\n        double result = usd_amount * exchange_rates[to];\n        \n        if (result > 1e9) {\n            throw overflow_error(\"Converted amount too large\");\n        }\n        \n        return result;\n    }\n    \n    void add_currency(const string& code, double rate_to_usd) {\n        if (rate_to_usd <= 0) {\n            throw invalid_argument(\"Exchange rate must be positive\");\n        }\n        exchange_rates[code] = rate_to_usd;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    CurrencyConverter converter;\n    \n    try {\n        double result1 = converter.convert(100, \"USD\", \"EUR\");\n        cout << \"100 USD = \" << result1 << \" EUR\" << endl;\n        \n        double result2 = converter.convert(500, \"EUR\", \"GBP\");\n        cout << \"500 EUR = \" << result2 << \" GBP\" << endl;\n        \n        double result3 = converter.convert(-100, \"USD\", \"EUR\");  // This will throw\n    } catch (const invalid_argument& e) {\n        cout << \"Invalid argument: \" << e.what() << endl;\n    } catch (const runtime_error& e) {\n        cout << \"Runtime error: \" << e.what() << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <type_traits>\n#include <limits>\n#include <stdexcept>\n\ntemplate<typename T, typename U>\nauto safeDivide(T numerator, U denominator) {\n    if constexpr (std::is_floating_point_v<T> || std::is_floating_point_v<U>) {\n        // Для вещественных чисел\n        using ResultType = std::conditional_t<std::is_floating_point_v<T>, T, U>;\n        if (denominator == 0) {\n            return std::numeric_limits<ResultType>::quiet_NaN();\n        }\n        return static_cast<ResultType>(numerator) / static_cast<ResultType>(denominator);\n    } \n    else if constexpr (std::is_integral_v<T> && std::is_integral_v<U>) {\n        // Для целых чисел\n        using ResultType = std::common_type_t<T, U>;\n        if (denominator == 0) {\n            throw std::runtime_error(\"Division by zero\");\n        }\n        return static_cast<ResultType>(numerator) / static_cast<ResultType>(denominator);\n    }\n    else {\n        static_assert(std::is_arithmetic_v<T> && std::is_arithmetic_v<U>, \n                     \"Both arguments must be arithmetic types\");\n        return numerator / denominator;\n    }\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::cout << \"safeDivide(10, 3) = \" << safeDivide(10, 3) << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"safeDivide(10.0, 3) = \" << safeDivide(10.0, 3) << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"safeDivide(10, 3.0) = \" << safeDivide(10, 3.0) << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"safeDivide(10.0, 0.0) = \" << safeDivide(10.0, 0.0) << std::endl;\n    \n    try {\n        std::cout << \"safeDivide(10, 0) = \";\n        std::cout << safeDivide(10, 0) << std::endl;\n    } catch (const std::exception& e) {\n        std::cout << \"Exception: \" << e.what() << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\nusing namespace std;\n\nstruct Segment {\n    double x1, y1, x2, y2;\n    \n    double slope() const {\n        if (x2 == x1) {\n            return INFINITY;\n        }\n        return (y2 - y1) / (x2 - x1);\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Segment seg1 = {0, 0, 2, 2};\n    Segment seg2 = {1, 1, 1, 3};\n    \n    cout << \"Наклон seg1: \" << seg1.slope() << endl;\n    cout << \"Наклон seg2: \" << seg2.slope() << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <utility>\n#include <vector>\n\nclass Resource {\nprivate:\n    std::vector<int> data;\npublic:\n    Resource() : data(1000, 42) { \n        std::cout << \"Resource создан\" << std::endl; \n    }\n    \n    Resource(const Resource& other) : data(other.data) { \n        std::cout << \"Resource скопирован\" << std::endl; \n    }\n    \n    Resource(Resource&& other) noexcept : data(std::move(other.data)) { \n        std::cout << \"Resource перемещен\" << std::endl; \n    }\n    \n    ~Resource() { \n        std::cout << \"Resource уничтожен\" << std::endl; \n    }\n};\n\nvoid processByReference(const Resource& r) {\n    std::cout << \"Обработка по l-value ссылке\" << std::endl;\n}\n\nvoid processByReference(Resource&& r) {\n    std::cout << \"Обработка по r-value ссылке\" << std::endl;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::cout << \"=== L-value ссылки ===\" << std::endl;\n    Resource r1;\n    processByReference(r1);\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n=== R-value ссылки ===\" << std::endl;\n    processByReference(Resource());\n    processByReference(std::move(r1));\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n\nclass ArrayWrapper {\nprivate:\n    int arr[5];\n    int size;\npublic:\n    ArrayWrapper() : size(5) { for (int i = 0; i < size; ++i) arr[i] = 0; }\n    void set(int index, int value) { if (index >= 0 && index < size) arr[index] = value; }\n    void display() const {\n        for (int i = 0; i < size; ++i) std::cout << arr[i] << ' ';\n        std::cout << std::endl;\n    }\n    friend ArrayWrapper sumArrays(const ArrayWrapper& a1, const ArrayWrapper& a2);\n};\n\nArrayWrapper sumArrays(const ArrayWrapper& a1, const ArrayWrapper& a2) {\n    ArrayWrapper result;\n    for (int i = 0; i < a1.size; ++i) {\n        result.arr[i] = a1.arr[i] + a2.arr[i];\n    }\n    return result;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    ArrayWrapper aw1, aw2;\n    aw1.set(0, 1); aw1.set(1, 2); aw1.set(2, 3);\n    aw2.set(0, 4); aw2.set(1, 5); aw2.set(2, 6);\n    std::cout << \"Массив 1: \"; aw1.display();\n    std::cout << \"Массив 2: \"; aw2.display();\n    ArrayWrapper sum = sumArrays(aw1, aw2);\n    std::cout << \"Сумма: \"; sum.display();\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nint main() {\n    int arr[] = {1, 0, 2, 0, 3, 0, 4};\n    int size = sizeof(arr) / sizeof(arr[0]);\n    int nonZeroIndex = 0;\n    \n    for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {\n        if (arr[i] != 0) {\n            arr[nonZeroIndex] = arr[i];\n            nonZeroIndex++;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    while (nonZeroIndex < size) {\n        arr[nonZeroIndex] = 0;\n        nonZeroIndex++;\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"Массив после перемещения нулей: \";\n    for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {\n        std::cout << arr[i] << \" \";\n    }\n    std::cout << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <sys/ptrace.h>\n#include <sys/wait.h>\n#include <sys/user.h>\n#include <unistd.h>\n#include <signal.h>\n#include <iostream>\n#include <cstring>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <cerrno>\n#include <cstdlib>\nclass ProcessCheckpointer {\n    pid_t target_pid;\n    struct user_regs_struct saved_regs;\n    std::vector<unsigned char> saved_stack;\n    static constexpr long STACK_SIZE = 4096;\n    \n    bool wait_for_stop() {\n        int status;\n        return waitpid(target_pid, &status, 0) != -1 && WIFSTOPPED(status);\n    }\n    \npublic:\n    ProcessCheckpointer(pid_t pid) : target_pid(pid) {\n        std::memset(&saved_regs, 0, sizeof(saved_regs));\n    }\n    \n    bool checkpoint() {\n        std::cout << \"Creating checkpoint for PID \" << target_pid << std::endl;\n        \n        if(ptrace(PTRACE_ATTACH, target_pid, nullptr, nullptr) == -1) {\n            std::cerr << \"PTRACE_ATTACH failed: \" << std::strerror(errno) << std::endl;\n            return false;\n        }\n        \n        if(!wait_for_stop()) {\n            std::cerr << \"Failed to stop process\" << std::endl;\n            return false;\n        }\n        \n        if(ptrace(PTRACE_GETREGS, target_pid, nullptr, &saved_regs) == -1) {\n            std::cerr << \"PTRACE_GETREGS failed: \" << std::strerror(errno) << std::endl;\n            ptrace(PTRACE_DETACH, target_pid, nullptr, nullptr);\n            return false;\n        }\n        \n        // Сохраняем часть стека\n        saved_stack.clear();\n        for(long i = 0; i < STACK_SIZE; i += sizeof(long)) {\n            errno = 0;\n            long data = ptrace(PTRACE_PEEKDATA, target_pid, saved_regs.rsp + i, nullptr);\n            if(errno != 0 && data == -1) {\n                break;\n            }\n            for(std::size_t j = 0; j < sizeof(long); ++j) {\n                saved_stack.push_back((data >> (j * 8)) & 0xFF);\n            }\n        }\n        \n        if(ptrace(PTRACE_DETACH, target_pid, nullptr, nullptr) == -1) {\n            std::cerr << \"PTRACE_DETACH failed: \" << std::strerror(errno) << std::endl;\n            return false;\n        }\n        \n        std::cout << \"Checkpoint saved (stack: \" << saved_stack.size() << \" bytes)\" << std::endl;\n        return true;\n    }\n    \n    bool restore() {\n        std::cout << \"Restoring checkpoint for PID \" << target_pid << std::endl;\n        \n        if(ptrace(PTRACE_ATTACH, target_pid, nullptr, nullptr) == -1) {\n            std::cerr << \"PTRACE_ATTACH failed: \" << std::strerror(errno) << std::endl;\n            return false;\n        }\n        \n        if(!wait_for_stop()) {\n            std::cerr << \"Failed to stop process\" << std::endl;\n            return false;\n        }\n        \n        if(ptrace(PTRACE_SETREGS, target_pid, nullptr, &saved_regs) == -1) {\n            std::cerr << \"PTRACE_SETREGS failed: \" << std::strerror(errno) << std::endl;\n            ptrace(PTRACE_DETACH, target_pid, nullptr, nullptr);\n            return false;\n        }\n        \n        // Восстанавливаем стек\n        for(std::size_t i = 0; i < saved_stack.size(); i += sizeof(long)) {\n            long data = 0;\n            for(std::size_t j = 0; j < sizeof(long) && (i + j) < saved_stack.size(); ++j) {\n                data |= static_cast<long>(saved_stack[i + j]) << (j * 8);\n            }\n            if(ptrace(PTRACE_POKEDATA, target_pid, saved_regs.rsp + i, data) == -1) {\n                std::cerr << \"PTRACE_POKEDATA failed at offset \" << i << \": \" << std::strerror(errno) << std::endl;\n                break;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        if(ptrace(PTRACE_DETACH, target_pid, nullptr, nullptr) == -1) {\n            std::cerr << \"PTRACE_DETACH failed: \" << std::strerror(errno) << std::endl;\n            return false;\n        }\n        \n        std::cout << \"Checkpoint restored\" << std::endl;\n        return true;\n    }\n};\nint main() {\n    pid_t pid = fork();\n    if(pid == 0) {\n        // Дочерний процесс просто выполняет цикл\n        volatile int counter = 0;\n        while(counter < 100) {\n            sleep(1);\n            counter++;\n        }\n        std::exit(0);\n    } else {\n        sleep(2); // Даем процессу запуститься\n        \n        ProcessCheckpointer checkpointer(pid);\n        \n        if(checkpointer.checkpoint()) {\n            std::cout << \"Process checkpointed, waiting...\" << std::endl;\n            sleep(3);\n            \n            if(checkpointer.restore()) {\n                std::cout << \"Process restored\" << std::endl;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        // Завершаем процесс\n        kill(pid, SIGTERM);\n        waitpid(pid, nullptr, 0);\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <type_traits>\n\n#define DECLARE_TEMPLATE_SPECIALIZATION(type, value) \\\n    template<> \\\n    struct TypeInfo<type> { \\\n        static const char* name() { return #type; } \\\n        static constexpr size_t size = sizeof(type); \\\n        static constexpr int id = value; \\\n    };\n\ntemplate<typename T>\nstruct TypeInfo {\n    static const char* name() { return \"unknown\"; }\n    static constexpr size_t size = sizeof(T);\n    static constexpr int id = 0;\n};\n\nDECLARE_TEMPLATE_SPECIALIZATION(int, 1)\nDECLARE_TEMPLATE_SPECIALIZATION(double, 2)\nDECLARE_TEMPLATE_SPECIALIZATION(char, 3)\nDECLARE_TEMPLATE_SPECIALIZATION(bool, 4)\n\ntemplate<typename T>\nvoid printTypeInfo() {\n    std::cout << \"Type: \" << TypeInfo<T>::name() \n              << \", Size: \" << TypeInfo<T>::size \n              << \", ID: \" << TypeInfo<T>::id << std::endl;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    printTypeInfo<int>();\n    printTypeInfo<double>();\n    printTypeInfo<char>();\n    printTypeInfo<bool>();\n    printTypeInfo<float>(); // Использует общий шаблон\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <sys/types.h>\n#include <sys/socket.h>\n#include <netdb.h>\n#include <iostream>\nint main() {\n    struct addrinfo hints = {};\n    hints.ai_family = AF_INET;\n    hints.ai_socktype = SOCK_STREAM;\n    struct addrinfo* result;\n    int status = getaddrinfo(\"google.com\", \"http\", &hints, &result);\n    if(status == 0) {\n        std::cout << \"Address resolved successfully.\" << std::endl;\n        freeaddrinfo(result);\n    } else {\n        std::cout << \"getaddrinfo error: \" << gai_strerror(status) << std::endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <vector>\n#include <algorithm>\n#include <cstdlib>\n#include <ctime>\n#include <chrono>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint partition(vector<string>& arr, int low, int high, bool descending = false) {\n    string pivot = arr[high];\n    int i = low - 1;\n    \n    for(int j = low; j < high; j++) {\n        bool condition = descending ? (arr[j] > pivot) : (arr[j] < pivot);\n        \n        if(condition) {\n            i++;\n            swap(arr[i], arr[j]);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    swap(arr[i + 1], arr[high]);\n    return i + 1;\n}\n\nint randomizedPartition(vector<string>& arr, int low, int high, bool descending = false) {\n    int random = low + rand() % (high - low + 1);\n    swap(arr[random], arr[high]);\n    return partition(arr, low, high, descending);\n}\n\nvoid quicksort(vector<string>& arr, int low, int high, bool descending = false) {\n    if(low < high) {\n        int pi = randomizedPartition(arr, low, high, descending);\n        quicksort(arr, low, pi - 1, descending);\n        quicksort(arr, pi + 1, high, descending);\n    }\n}\n\nvoid quickSortStrings(vector<string>& strings, bool descending = false) {\n    srand(time(nullptr));\n    quicksort(strings, 0, strings.size() - 1, descending);\n}\n\nvector<string> generateRandomStrings(int count, int min_len = 3, int max_len = 10) {\n    vector<string> strings;\n    string chars = \"abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ\";\n    \n    for(int i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n        int len = min_len + rand() % (max_len - min_len + 1);\n        string str;\n        \n        for(int j = 0; j < len; j++) {\n            str += chars[rand() % chars.length()];\n        }\n        \n        strings.push_back(str);\n    }\n    \n    return strings;\n}\n\nbool isSorted(const vector<string>& arr, bool descending = false) {\n    for(size_t i = 1; i < arr.size(); i++) {\n        if(descending) {\n            if(arr[i - 1] < arr[i]) return false;\n        } else {\n            if(arr[i - 1] > arr[i]) return false;\n        }\n    }\n    return true;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    srand(time(nullptr));\n    \n    cout << \"Quicksort for Strings:\\n\";\n    \n    // Тест 1: Базовый тест\n    vector<string> test1 = {\"banana\", \"apple\", \"cherry\", \"date\", \"elderberry\", \"fig\"};\n    cout << \"\\nTest 1 - Basic strings:\\n\";\n    cout << \"Original: \";\n    for(const auto& s : test1) cout << s << \" \";\n    \n    vector<string> test1_copy = test1;\n    quickSortStrings(test1_copy);\n    cout << \"\\nSorted (ascending): \";\n    for(const auto& s : test1_copy) cout << s << \" \";\n    cout << \"\\nIs sorted: \" << (isSorted(test1_copy) ? \"YES\" : \"NO\") << endl;\n    \n    // Тест 2: Случайные строки\n    cout << \"\\nTest 2 - Random strings:\\n\";\n    vector<string> random_strings = generateRandomStrings(15, 3, 7);\n    cout << \"Original (first 10): \";\n    for(int i = 0; i < min(10, (int)random_strings.size()); i++) {\n        cout << random_strings[i] << \" \";\n    }\n    \n    quickSortStrings(random_strings, true); // descending\n    cout << \"\\nSorted (descending, first 10): \";\n    for(int i = 0; i < min(10, (int)random_strings.size()); i++) {\n        cout << random_strings[i] << \" \";\n    }\n    cout << \"\\nIs sorted descending: \" << (isSorted(random_strings, true) ? \"YES\" : \"NO\") << endl;\n    \n    // Тест 3: Большой набор данных\n    cout << \"\\nTest 3 - Performance test (10000 strings):\\n\";\n    vector<string> large_set = generateRandomStrings(10000, 5, 15);\n    \n    auto start = chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\n    quickSortStrings(large_set);\n    auto end = chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\n    \n    auto duration = chrono::duration_cast<chrono::milliseconds>(end - start);\n    cout << \"Time taken: \" << duration.count() << \" ms\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Is sorted: \" << (isSorted(large_set) ? \"YES\" : \"NO\") << endl;\n    \n    // Тест 4: Сравнение со стандартной сортировкой\n    cout << \"\\nTest 4 - Comparison with sort:\\n\";\n    vector<string> comparison_set = generateRandomStrings(1000, 5, 10);\n    vector<string> copy1 = comparison_set;\n    vector<string> copy2 = comparison_set;\n    \n    auto start1 = chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\n    quickSortStrings(copy1);\n    auto end1 = chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\n    \n    auto start2 = chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\n    sort(copy2.begin(), copy2.end());\n    auto end2 = chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\n    \n    auto duration1 = chrono::duration_cast<chrono::microseconds>(end1 - start1);\n    auto duration2 = chrono::duration_cast<chrono::microseconds>(end2 - start2);\n    \n    cout << \"Quicksort time: \" << duration1.count() << \" microseconds\" << endl;\n    cout << \"sort time: \" << duration2.count() << \" microseconds\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Results match: \" << (copy1 == copy2 ? \"YES\" : \"NO\") << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass LagrangePolynomial {\n    vector<double> xPoints, yPoints;\npublic:\n    LagrangePolynomial(const vector<double>& x, const vector<double>& y) \n        : xPoints(x), yPoints(y) {}\n    double evaluate(double x) const {\n        double result = 0;\n        int n = xPoints.size();\n        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {\n            double term = yPoints[i];\n            for(int j = 0; j < n; j++) {\n                if(i != j) {\n                    term *= (x - xPoints[j]) / (xPoints[i] - xPoints[j]);\n                }\n            }\n            result += term;\n        }\n        return result;\n    }\n    void printPoints() const {\n        cout << \"Points: \";\n        for(size_t i = 0; i < xPoints.size(); i++) {\n            cout << \"(\" << xPoints[i] << \", \" << yPoints[i] << \") \";\n        }\n        cout << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    vector<double> x = {0, 1, 2};\n    vector<double> y = {0, 1, 4};\n    LagrangePolynomial poly(x, y);\n    poly.printPoints();\n    cout << \"Value at x=1.5: \" << poly.evaluate(1.5) << endl;\n    cout << \"Value at x=3: \" << poly.evaluate(3) << endl;\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <type_traits>\nusing namespace std;\n\n#define COMPILE_TIME_HASH(str) (compileTimeHash(str))\n#define HASHED_STRING(str) CompileTimeString<compileTimeHash(str)>\n\nconstexpr unsigned int compileTimeHash(const char* str) {\n    return str[0] == 0 ? 5381 : (compileTimeHash(str + 1) * 33) ^ str[0];\n}\n\ntemplate<unsigned int N>\nstruct CompileTimeString {\n    static constexpr unsigned int hash = N;\n    \n    static void print() {\n        cout << \"Hash: \" << hash << endl;\n    }\n    \n    static constexpr bool equals(unsigned int otherHash) {\n        return hash == otherHash;\n    }\n};\n\n#define CASE_HASH(str) \\\n    case COMPILE_TIME_HASH(str): \\\n        cout << \"String: \" << str << endl; \\\n        break;\n\nvoid processString(const char* str) {\n    unsigned int hash = compileTimeHash(str);\n    \n    switch(hash) {\n        CASE_HASH(\"apple\")\n        CASE_HASH(\"banana\")\n        CASE_HASH(\"cherry\")\n        CASE_HASH(\"date\")\n        default:\n            cout << \"Unknown string hash: \" << hash << endl;\n    }\n}\n\nint main() {\n    // Компиляционное вычисление хэшей\n    constexpr unsigned int h1 = COMPILE_TIME_HASH(\"hello\");\n    constexpr unsigned int h2 = COMPILE_TIME_HASH(\"world\");\n    \n    cout << \"Hash of 'hello': \" << h1 << endl;\n    cout << \"Hash of 'world': \" << h2 << endl;\n    \n    // Использование типизированного хэша\n    HASHED_STRING(\"test\")::print();\n    \n    // Обработка строк по хэшу\n    processString(\"apple\");\n    processString(\"banana\");\n    processString(\"unknown\");\n    \n    // Проверка во время компиляции\n    static_assert(COMPILE_TIME_HASH(\"abc\") != COMPILE_TIME_HASH(\"ABC\"), \"Hashes should differ\");\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <stdexcept>\n#include <cmath>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass ImageException : public runtime_error {\npublic:\n    ImageException(const string& msg) : runtime_error(msg) {}\n};\n\nclass Image {\nprivate:\n    int width, height;\n    vector<vector<int>> pixels;  // Grayscale image 0-255\n    \npublic:\n    Image(int w, int h) : width(w), height(h) {\n        if (w <= 0 || h <= 0) {\n            throw invalid_argument(\"Image dimensions must be positive\");\n        }\n        if (w > 10000 || h > 10000) {\n            throw overflow_error(\"Image dimensions too large\");\n        }\n        \n        pixels.resize(height, vector<int>(width, 0));\n    }\n    \n    void set_pixel(int x, int y, int value) {\n        if (x < 0 || x >= width || y < 0 || y >= height) {\n            throw out_of_range(\"Pixel coordinates out of bounds\");\n        }\n        if (value < 0 || value > 255) {\n            throw invalid_argument(\"Pixel value must be between 0 and 255\");\n        }\n        pixels[y][x] = value;\n    }\n    \n    int get_pixel(int x, int y) const {\n        if (x < 0 || x >= width || y < 0 || y >= height) {\n            throw out_of_range(\"Pixel coordinates out of bounds\");\n        }\n        return pixels[y][x];\n    }\n    \n    Image resize(int new_width, int new_height) const {\n        if (new_width <= 0 || new_height <= 0) {\n            throw invalid_argument(\"New dimensions must be positive\");\n        }\n        \n        Image result(new_width, new_height);\n        \n        double scale_x = static_cast<double>(width) / new_width;\n        double scale_y = static_cast<double>(height) / new_height;\n        \n        for (int y = 0; y < new_height; y++) {\n            for (int x = 0; x < new_width; x++) {\n                int src_x = static_cast<int>(x * scale_x);\n                int src_y = static_cast<int>(y * scale_y);\n                \n                if (src_x >= width) src_x = width - 1;\n                if (src_y >= height) src_y = height - 1;\n                \n                result.set_pixel(x, y, get_pixel(src_x, src_y));\n            }\n        }\n        \n        return result;\n    }\n    \n    Image invert() const {\n        Image result(width, height);\n        \n        for (int y = 0; y < height; y++) {\n            for (int x = 0; x < width; x++) {\n                result.set_pixel(x, y, 255 - get_pixel(x, y));\n            }\n        }\n        \n        return result;\n    }\n    \n    double calculate_brightness() const {\n        if (width == 0 || height == 0) {\n            throw runtime_error(\"Image has zero dimensions\");\n        }\n        \n        long long sum = 0;\n        for (int y = 0; y < height; y++) {\n            for (int x = 0; x < width; x++) {\n                sum += pixels[y][x];\n            }\n        }\n        \n        return static_cast<double>(sum) / (width * height);\n    }\n    \n    void print_small() const {\n        if (width > 20 || height > 20) {\n            throw ImageException(\"Image too large to print\");\n        }\n        \n        for (int y = 0; y < height; y++) {\n            for (int x = 0; x < width; x++) {\n                cout << (pixels[y][x] > 127 ? \"#\" : \".\");\n            }\n            cout << endl;\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    try {\n        Image img(5, 5);\n        \n        for (int y = 0; y < 5; y++) {\n            for (int x = 0; x < 5; x++) {\n                img.set_pixel(x, y, (x + y) * 25);\n            }\n        }\n        \n        cout << \"Original image:\" << endl;\n        img.print_small();\n        \n        cout << \"\\nBrightness: \" << img.calculate_brightness() << endl;\n        \n        Image inverted = img.invert();\n        cout << \"\\nInverted image:\" << endl;\n        inverted.print_small();\n        \n        img.set_pixel(10, 10, 100);  // This will throw\n        \n    } catch (const out_of_range& e) {\n        cout << \"Out of range: \" << e.what() << endl;\n    } catch (const invalid_argument& e) {\n        cout << \"Invalid argument: \" << e.what() << endl;\n    } catch (const overflow_error& e) {\n        cout << \"Overflow error: \" << e.what() << endl;\n    } catch (const ImageException& e) {\n        cout << \"Image error: \" << e.what() << endl;\n    } catch (const exception& e) {\n        cout << \"General error: \" << e.what() << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    int size = 10;\n    int* arr = new int[size] {1, 3, 2, 3, 4, 2, 3, 1, 3, 5};\n    int maxCount = 0, frequentElement = arr[0];\n    for(int i = 0; i < size; i++) {\n        int count = 0;\n        for(int j = 0; j < size; j++) {\n            if(arr[j] == arr[i]) count++;\n        }\n        if(count > maxCount) {\n            maxCount = count;\n            frequentElement = arr[i];\n        }\n    }\n    cout << \"Наиболее частый элемент: \" << frequentElement << \" (встречается \" << maxCount << \" раз)\" << endl;\n    delete[] arr;\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <memory>\n#include <cmath>\n#include <string>\n#include <stdexcept>\n\nclass Shape {\npublic:\n    virtual double area() const = 0;\n    virtual double perimeter() const = 0;\n    virtual std::string name() const = 0;\n    virtual void print() const {\n        std::cout << name() << \": area = \" << area() << \", perimeter = \" << perimeter() << std::endl;\n    }\n    virtual std::unique_ptr<Shape> clone() const = 0;\n    virtual ~Shape() = default;\n};\n\nclass Circle : public Shape {\n    double radius;\npublic:\n    explicit Circle(double r) : radius(r) {\n        if (radius <= 0) throw std::invalid_argument(\"Radius must be positive\");\n    }\n    double area() const override { return M_PI * radius * radius; }\n    double perimeter() const override { return 2 * M_PI * radius; }\n    std::string name() const override { return \"Circle\"; }\n    std::unique_ptr<Shape> clone() const override {\n        return std::make_unique<Circle>(*this);\n    }\n};\n\nclass Rectangle : public Shape {\n    double width, height;\npublic:\n    Rectangle(double w, double h) : width(w), height(h) {\n        if (width <= 0 || height <= 0) throw std::invalid_argument(\"Dimensions must be positive\");\n    }\n    double area() const override { return width * height; }\n    double perimeter() const override { return 2 * (width + height); }\n    std::string name() const override { return \"Rectangle\"; }\n    std::unique_ptr<Shape> clone() const override {\n        return std::make_unique<Rectangle>(*this);\n    }\n};\n\nclass Triangle : public Shape {\n    double a, b, c;\npublic:\n    Triangle(double side1, double side2, double side3) : a(side1), b(side2), c(side3) {\n        if (a <= 0 || b <= 0 || c <= 0) throw std::invalid_argument(\"Sides must be positive\");\n        if (a + b <= c || a + c <= b || b + c <= a) throw std::invalid_argument(\"Invalid triangle\");\n    }\n    double area() const override {\n        double s = perimeter() / 2;\n        return sqrt(s * (s - a) * (s - b) * (s - c));\n    }\n    double perimeter() const override { return a + b + c; }\n    std::string name() const override { return \"Triangle\"; }\n    std::unique_ptr<Shape> clone() const override {\n        return std::make_unique<Triangle>(*this);\n    }\n};\n\nclass ShapeFactory {\npublic:\n    static std::unique_ptr<Shape> createCircle(double radius) {\n        return std::make_unique<Circle>(radius);\n    }\n    static std::unique_ptr<Shape> createRectangle(double width, double height) {\n        return std::make_unique<Rectangle>(width, height);\n    }\n    static std::unique_ptr<Shape> createTriangle(double a, double b, double c) {\n        return std::make_unique<Triangle>(a, b, c);\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<Shape>> shapes;\n    shapes.push_back(ShapeFactory::createCircle(5.0));\n    shapes.push_back(ShapeFactory::createRectangle(4.0, 6.0));\n    shapes.push_back(ShapeFactory::createTriangle(3.0, 4.0, 5.0));\n    \n    std::cout << \"Original shapes:\" << std::endl;\n    for (const auto& shape : shapes) {\n        shape->print();\n    }\n    \n    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<Shape>> clonedShapes;\n    for (const auto& shape : shapes) {\n        clonedShapes.push_back(shape->clone());\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nCloned shapes:\" << std::endl;\n    for (const auto& shape : clonedShapes) {\n        shape->print();\n    }\n    \n    double totalArea = 0;\n    double totalPerimeter = 0;\n    for (const auto& shape : shapes) {\n        totalArea += shape->area();\n        totalPerimeter += shape->perimeter();\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nTotal area: \" << totalArea << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Total perimeter: \" << totalPerimeter << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    string str = \"main.cpp\";\n    string suffix = \".cpp\";\n    if (str.size() >= suffix.size() && str.compare(str.size() - suffix.size(), suffix.size(), suffix) == 0) {\n        cout << \"Строка заканчивается на \" << suffix << endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    int size = 8;\n    int* arr = new int[size] {10, 22, 9, 33, 21, 50, 41, 60};\n    int* lengths = new int[size] {};\n    int maxLength = 0;\n    for(int i = 0; i < size; i++) {\n        lengths[i] = 1;\n        for(int j = 0; j < i; j++) {\n            if(arr[i] > arr[j] && lengths[i] < lengths[j] + 1) {\n                lengths[i] = lengths[j] + 1;\n            }\n        }\n        if(lengths[i] > maxLength) maxLength = lengths[i];\n    }\n    cout << \"Длина самой длинной возрастающей подпоследовательности: \" << maxLength << endl;\n    delete[] arr;\n    delete[] lengths;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <cctype>\n\nint main() {\n    // Создаем тестовый бинарный файл\n    std::ofstream out(\"test.bin\", std::ios::binary);\n    std::string data = \"Hello\\nWorld\\x00Test\\nAnother line\";\n    out.write(data.c_str(), data.size());\n    out.close();\n    \n    // Метод 1: Использование getline в бинарном режиме\n    std::cout << \"=== Using getline in binary mode ===\" << std::endl;\n    std::ifstream in1(\"test.bin\", std::ios::binary);\n    char buffer1[256];\n    \n    while (in1.getline(buffer1, sizeof(buffer1), '\\n')) {\n        std::cout << \"Line read: \";\n        // Выводим как строку (остановится на нулевом символе)\n        for (int i = 0; buffer1[i] != '\\0' && i < static_cast<int>(sizeof(buffer1)); ++i) {\n            if (std::isprint(static_cast<unsigned char>(buffer1[i]))) {\n                std::cout << buffer1[i];\n            } else {\n                std::cout << \"[\" << int(static_cast<unsigned char>(buffer1[i])) << \"]\";\n            }\n        }\n        std::cout << \" (length: \" << in1.gcount() << \")\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    in1.close();\n    \n    // Метод 2: Использование read в бинарном режиме\n    std::cout << \"\\n=== Using read in binary mode ===\" << std::endl;\n    std::ifstream in2(\"test.bin\", std::ios::binary);\n    char buffer2[256];\n    \n    in2.read(buffer2, 20);\n    std::streamsize bytesRead = in2.gcount();\n    \n    std::cout << \"Bytes read: \" << bytesRead << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Raw data: \";\n    for (int i = 0; i < static_cast<int>(bytesRead); ++i) {\n        if (std::isprint(static_cast<unsigned char>(buffer2[i]))) {\n            std::cout << buffer2[i];\n        } else {\n            std::cout << \"[\" << int(static_cast<unsigned char>(buffer2[i])) << \"]\";\n        }\n    }\n    std::cout << std::endl;\n    in2.close();\n    \n    // Метод 3: Сравнение работы с нулевым символом\n    std::cout << \"\\n=== Handling null character ===\" << std::endl;\n    std::ifstream in3(\"test.bin\", std::ios::binary);\n    char buffer3[256];\n    \n    // getline остановится на '\\n' или нулевом символе?\n    in3.getline(buffer3, sizeof(buffer3), '\\n');\n    std::cout << \"getline stopped after: \" << in3.gcount() << \" bytes\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Buffer contains: \";\n    for (int i = 0; i < 15; ++i) {\n        if (buffer3[i] == '\\0') {\n            std::cout << \"[NULL]\";\n        } else if (buffer3[i] == '\\n') {\n            std::cout << \"[NEWLINE]\";\n        } else if (std::isprint(static_cast<unsigned char>(buffer3[i]))) {\n            std::cout << buffer3[i];\n        } else {\n            std::cout << \"[\" << int(static_cast<unsigned char>(buffer3[i])) << \"]\";\n        }\n    }\n    std::cout << std::endl;\n    in3.close();\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nint main() {\n    int n;\n    \n    std::cout << \"Введите N: \";\n    std::cin >> n;\n    \n    if (n <= 0) {\n        std::cout << \"N должно быть положительным!\" << std::endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"Числа от \" << n << \" до 1:\" << std::endl;\n    for (int i = n; i >= 1; i--) {\n        std::cout << i << \" \";\n    }\n    std::cout << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n\nclass Student {\nprivate:\n    std::string name;\n    int age;\n    int grades[10];\n    int gradeCount;\n    \npublic:\n    Student(std::string n, int a) : name(n), age(a), gradeCount(0) {\n        for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) grades[i] = 0;\n    }\n    \n    bool addGrade(int grade) {\n        if (grade < 1 || grade > 5) {\n            std::cout << \"Оценка должна быть от 1 до 5\" << std::endl;\n            return false;\n        }\n        if (gradeCount >= 10) {\n            std::cout << \"Достигнут лимит оценок (10)\" << std::endl;\n            return false;\n        }\n        grades[gradeCount++] = grade;\n        return true;\n    }\n    \n    double getAverage() const {\n        if (gradeCount == 0) return 0.0;\n        int sum = 0;\n        for (int i = 0; i < gradeCount; i++) {\n            sum += grades[i];\n        }\n        return static_cast<double>(sum) / gradeCount;\n    }\n    \n    void printInfo() const {\n        std::cout << \"Студент: \" << name << \", возраст: \" << age << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Оценки: \";\n        for (int i = 0; i < gradeCount; i++) {\n            std::cout << grades[i] << \" \";\n        }\n        std::cout << \"\\nСредний балл: \" << getAverage() << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    std::string getName() const { return name; }\n    int getAge() const { return age; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Student student(\"Иван Петров\", 20);\n    student.addGrade(5);\n    student.addGrade(4);\n    student.addGrade(5);\n    student.addGrade(3);\n    student.printInfo();\n    \n    // Попытка добавить некорректную оценку\n    student.addGrade(6);\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <map>\n#include <memory>\n#include <typeinfo>\n#include <typeindex>\n#include <string>\n#include <vector>\n#include <mutex>\n#include <thread>\n#include <chrono>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Resource {\npublic:\n    virtual ~Resource() = default;\n    virtual string getTypeName() const = 0;\n    virtual void load() = 0;\n    virtual void unload() = 0;\n};\n\nclass Texture : public Resource {\n    string name;\npublic:\n    Texture(const string& n) : name(n) {}\n    string getTypeName() const override { return \"Texture\"; }\n    void load() override {\n        this_thread::sleep_for(chrono::milliseconds(100));\n        cout << \"Loading texture: \" << name << endl;\n    }\n    void unload() override {\n        cout << \"Unloading texture: \" << name << endl;\n    }\n    string getName() const { return name; }\n};\n\nclass Shader : public Resource {\n    string source;\npublic:\n    Shader(const string& src) : source(src) {}\n    string getTypeName() const override { return \"Shader\"; }\n    void load() override {\n        this_thread::sleep_for(chrono::milliseconds(50));\n        cout << \"Compiling shader: \" << source.substr(0, 20) << \"...\" << endl;\n    }\n    void unload() override {\n        cout << \"Deleting shader\" << endl;\n    }\n    string getSource() const { return source; }\n};\n\nclass Sound : public Resource {\n    string filepath;\npublic:\n    Sound(const string& path) : filepath(path) {}\n    string getTypeName() const override { return \"Sound\"; }\n    void load() override {\n        this_thread::sleep_for(chrono::milliseconds(150));\n        cout << \"Loading sound: \" << filepath << endl;\n    }\n    void unload() override {\n        cout << \"Unloading sound\" << endl;\n    }\n    string getFilepath() const { return filepath; }\n};\n\nclass ResourceManager {\n    map<type_index, map<string, shared_ptr<Resource>>> cache;\n    mutable mutex cacheMutex;  // mutable для константных методов\n    \npublic:\n    template<typename T, typename... Args>\n    shared_ptr<T> getOrCreate(const string& key, Args&&... args) {\n        static_assert(is_base_of<Resource, T>::value, \"T must derive from Resource\");\n        type_index ti = typeid(T);\n        \n        lock_guard<mutex> lock(cacheMutex);\n        \n        auto& typeCache = cache[ti];\n        auto it = typeCache.find(key);\n        if (it != typeCache.end()) {\n            if (shared_ptr<T> typed = dynamic_pointer_cast<T>(it->second)) {\n                cout << \"Cache hit for \" << ti.name() << \"[\" << key << \"]\" << endl;\n                return typed;\n            } else {\n                cerr << \"Type mismatch in cache! Expected \" << ti.name() \n                     << \" but got \" << typeid(*(it->second)).name() << endl;\n                typeCache.erase(it);\n            }\n        }\n        \n        cout << \"Cache miss for \" << ti.name() << \"[\" << key << \"], creating new\" << endl;\n        shared_ptr<T> resource = make_shared<T>(forward<Args>(args)...);\n        resource->load();\n        typeCache[key] = resource;\n        return resource;\n    }\n    \n    template<typename T>\n    shared_ptr<T> get(const string& key) {\n        type_index ti = typeid(T);\n        lock_guard<mutex> lock(cacheMutex);\n        \n        auto typeIt = cache.find(ti);\n        if (typeIt != cache.end()) {\n            auto& typeCache = typeIt->second;\n            auto it = typeCache.find(key);\n            if (it != typeCache.end()) {\n                return dynamic_pointer_cast<T>(it->second);\n            }\n        }\n        return nullptr;\n    }\n    \n    void unloadType(type_index ti) {\n        lock_guard<mutex> lock(cacheMutex);\n        auto it = cache.find(ti);\n        if (it != cache.end()) {\n            cout << \"Unloading all resources of type: \" << ti.name() << endl;\n            for (auto& [key, resource] : it->second) {\n                resource->unload();\n            }\n            cache.erase(it);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    template<typename T>\n    void unloadAll() {\n        unloadType(typeid(T));\n    }\n    \n    void printStats() const {\n        lock_guard<mutex> lock(cacheMutex);  // теперь корректно, т.к. cacheMutex - mutable\n        cout << \"\\n=== Resource Manager Statistics ===\" << endl;\n        for (const auto& [typeIdx, resources] : cache) {\n            cout << typeIdx.name() << \": \" << resources.size() << \" resources\" << endl;\n            for (const auto& [key, resource] : resources) {\n                cout << \"  \\\"\" << key << \"\\\" - \" << resource->getTypeName() << endl;\n                \n                cout << \"    Actual RTTI type: \" << typeid(*resource).name() << endl;\n                \n                if (auto* texture = dynamic_cast<Texture*>(resource.get())) {\n                    cout << \"    Is Texture, name: \" << texture->getName() << endl;\n                } else if (auto* shader = dynamic_cast<Shader*>(resource.get())) {\n                    cout << \"    Is Shader, source preview: \" \n                         << shader->getSource().substr(0, 30) << \"...\" << endl;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n        cout << \"Total types cached: \" << cache.size() << endl;\n    }\n    \n    size_t getTotalResources() const {\n        lock_guard<mutex> lock(cacheMutex);  // теперь корректно, т.к. cacheMutex - mutable\n        size_t total = 0;\n        for (const auto& [_, resources] : cache) {\n            total += resources.size();\n        }\n        return total;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    ResourceManager manager;\n    \n    cout << \"=== Loading resources ===\" << endl;\n    auto tex1 = manager.getOrCreate<Texture>(\"wall\", \"brick_wall\");\n    auto tex2 = manager.getOrCreate<Texture>(\"floor\", \"wood_floor\");\n    auto shader1 = manager.getOrCreate<Shader>(\"basic\", \"vertex shader code...\");\n    auto sound1 = manager.getOrCreate<Sound>(\"explosion\", \"explosion.wav\");\n    \n    auto tex1again = manager.getOrCreate<Texture>(\"wall\", \"different_texture\");\n    cout << \"Same texture? \" << (tex1.get() == tex1again.get()) << endl;\n    \n    auto retrieved = manager.get<Texture>(\"floor\");\n    if (retrieved) {\n        cout << \"Retrieved texture: \" << retrieved->getName() << endl;\n    }\n    \n    auto missing = manager.get<Texture>(\"missing\");\n    cout << \"Missing resource is nullptr: \" << (missing == nullptr) << endl;\n    \n    manager.printStats();\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== Testing type safety ===\" << endl;\n    auto wrongType = manager.get<Texture>(\"basic\");\n    cout << \"Getting shader as texture: \" << wrongType.get() << endl;\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== RTTI Information ===\" << endl;\n    cout << \"tex1 typeid: \" << typeid(*tex1).name() << endl;\n    cout << \"shader1 typeid: \" << typeid(*shader1).name() << endl;\n    cout << \"Are they same type? \" << (typeid(*tex1) == typeid(*shader1)) << endl;\n    \n    type_index tiTex = typeid(Texture);\n    type_index tiShader = typeid(Shader);\n    cout << \"Texture hash: \" << tiTex.hash_code() << endl;\n    cout << \"Shader hash: \" << tiShader.hash_code() << endl;\n    cout << \"Texture before Shader: \" << (tiTex < tiShader) << endl;\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== Unloading textures ===\" << endl;\n    manager.unloadAll<Texture>();\n    manager.printStats();\n    \n    cout << \"\\nTotal resources after unload: \" << manager.getTotalResources() << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <unordered_map>\n\nbool areIsomorphic(const std::string& str1, const std::string& str2) {\n    if(str1.length() != str2.length()) return false;\n    \n    std::unordered_map<char, char> map1;\n    std::unordered_map<char, char> map2;\n    \n    for(int i = 0; i < str1.length(); i++) {\n        char c1 = str1[i];\n        char c2 = str2[i];\n        \n        if(map1.find(c1) == map1.end()) {\n            map1[c1] = c2;\n        } else if(map1[c1] != c2) {\n            return false;\n        }\n        \n        if(map2.find(c2) == map2.end()) {\n            map2[c2] = c1;\n        } else if(map2[c2] != c1) {\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return true;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::string s1 = \"egg\";\n    std::string s2 = \"add\";\n    std::string s3 = \"foo\";\n    std::string s4 = \"bar\";\n    \n    std::cout << s1 << \" и \" << s2 << (areIsomorphic(s1, s2) ? \" изоморфны\" : \" не изоморфны\") << std::endl;\n    std::cout << s3 << \" и \" << s4 << (areIsomorphic(s3, s4) ? \" изоморфны\" : \" не изоморфны\") << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\nusing namespace std;\n\nvector<int> findPrimeFactors(int n) {\n    vector<int> factors;\n    \n    while (n % 2 == 0) {\n        factors.push_back(2);\n        n /= 2;\n    }\n    \n    for (int i = 3; i * i <= n; i += 2) {\n        while (n % i == 0) {\n            factors.push_back(i);\n            n /= i;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    if (n > 1) {\n        factors.push_back(n);\n    }\n    \n    return factors;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    vector<int> factors = findPrimeFactors(60);\n    for (int f : factors) {\n        cout << f << \" \";\n    }\n    cout << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nstruct Vector3D {\n    double x, y, z;\n    \n    double sumOfCoordinates() const {\n        return x + y + z;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Vector3D v = {1.0, 2.0, 3.0};\n    cout << \"Сумма координат: \" << v.sumOfCoordinates() << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <atomic>\n#include <thread>\n#include <vector>\n\ntemplate<typename T>\nclass AtomicSharedPtr {\n    struct ControlBlock {\n        std::atomic<int> counter;\n        T* ptr;\n        ControlBlock(T* p) : ptr(p), counter(1) {}\n        ~ControlBlock() { delete ptr; }\n    };\n    ControlBlock* cb;\n    void release() {\n        if (cb && --cb->counter == 0) {\n            delete cb;\n        }\n    }\npublic:\n    explicit AtomicSharedPtr(T* p = nullptr) : cb(p ? new ControlBlock(p) : nullptr) {}\n    AtomicSharedPtr(const AtomicSharedPtr& other) : cb(other.cb) {\n        if (cb) ++cb->counter;\n    }\n    AtomicSharedPtr& operator=(const AtomicSharedPtr& other) {\n        if (this != &other) {\n            release();\n            cb = other.cb;\n            if (cb) ++cb->counter;\n        }\n        return *this;\n    }\n    ~AtomicSharedPtr() { release(); }\n    T& operator*() const { return *cb->ptr; }\n    T* operator->() const { return cb->ptr; }\n    int use_count() const { return cb ? cb->counter.load() : 0; }\n};\n\nvoid thread_func(AtomicSharedPtr<int>& sp, int id) {\n    for (int i = 0; i < 1000; ++i) {\n        AtomicSharedPtr<int> copy = sp;\n        ++(*copy);\n    }\n    std::cout << \"Thread \" << id << \" finished, count=\" << sp.use_count() << std::endl;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    AtomicSharedPtr<int> sp(new int(0));\n    std::vector<std::thread> threads;\n    for (int i = 0; i < 5; ++i) {\n        threads.emplace_back(thread_func, std::ref(sp), i);\n    }\n    for (auto& t : threads) t.join();\n    std::cout << \"Final value: \" << *sp << \", use_count=\" << sp.use_count() << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <string>\nusing namespace std;\n\nbool isSafe(vector<string>& board, int row, int col, int n) {\n    for (int i = 0; i < row; i++) {\n        if (board[i][col] == 'Q') return false;\n    }\n    for (int i = row - 1, j = col - 1; i >= 0 && j >= 0; i--, j--) {\n        if (board[i][j] == 'Q') return false;\n    }\n    for (int i = row - 1, j = col + 1; i >= 0 && j < n; i--, j++) {\n        if (board[i][j] == 'Q') return false;\n    }\n    return true;\n}\n\nvoid solveNQueensDFS(int row, int n, vector<string>& board, vector<vector<string>>& result) {\n    if (row == n) {\n        result.push_back(board);\n        return;\n    }\n    for (int col = 0; col < n; col++) {\n        if (isSafe(board, row, col, n)) {\n            board[row][col] = 'Q';\n            solveNQueensDFS(row + 1, n, board, result);\n            board[row][col] = '.';\n        }\n    }\n}\n\nvector<vector<string>> solveNQueens(int n) {\n    vector<vector<string>> result;\n    vector<string> board(n, string(n, '.'));\n    solveNQueensDFS(0, n, board, result);\n    return result;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    int n = 4;\n    vector<vector<string>> solutions = solveNQueens(n);\n    cout << \"Number of solutions: \" << solutions.size() << endl;\n    for (auto& sol : solutions) {\n        for (string& row : sol) {\n            cout << row << endl;\n        }\n        cout << endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
