#include <iostream>\n\nint main() {\n double original_price, discount_percent;\n std::cout << \"Введите исходную цену и процент скидки:\";\n std::cin >> original_price >> discount_percent;\n \n if (original_price < 0 || discount_percent < 0 || discount_percent > 100) {\n std::cout << \"Ошибка: некорректные данные!\" << std::endl;\n return 1;\n }\n \n double discounted_price = original_price * (1.0 - discount_percent/100.0);\n std::cout << \"Цена со скидкой: \" << discounted_price << std::endl;\n return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\n\nconstexpr long double operator\"\" _deg(long double deg) {\n    return deg * 3.1415926535897932385L / 180.0L;\n}\n\nconstexpr long double operator\"\" _rad(long double rad) {\n    return rad;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    constexpr long double angle90 = 90.0_deg;\n    constexpr long double angle45 = 45.0_deg;\n    static_assert(angle90 > 1.57 && angle90 < 1.58, \"\");\n    std::cout << \"90 degrees in radians: \" << angle90 << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"45 degrees in radians: \" << angle45 << std::endl;\n\n    constexpr long double pi_approx = 3.14159_rad;\n    std::cout << \"Pi approx: \" << pi_approx << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <stdexcept>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass InvalidTemperatureException : public runtime_error {\npublic:\n    InvalidTemperatureException() : runtime_error(\"Temperature is outside valid range\") {}\n};\n\nclass Temperature {\nprivate:\n    double celsius;\npublic:\n    Temperature(double temp) {\n        set_celsius(temp);\n    }\n    \n    void set_celsius(double temp) {\n        if (temp < -273.15) {\n            throw InvalidTemperatureException();\n        }\n        if (temp > 10000) {\n            throw overflow_error(\"Temperature too high\");\n        }\n        celsius = temp;\n    }\n    \n    double get_fahrenheit() const {\n        return celsius * 9.0/5.0 + 32.0;\n    }\n    \n    double get_celsius() const { return celsius; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    try {\n        Temperature t1(25);\n        cout << \"25°C = \" << t1.get_fahrenheit() << \"°F\" << endl;\n        \n        Temperature t2(-300);\n    } catch (const InvalidTemperatureException& e) {\n        cout << \"Invalid temperature: \" << e.what() << endl;\n    } catch (const overflow_error& e) {\n        cout << \"Overflow: \" << e.what() << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nint findGCD(int a, int b);\n\nint findLCM(int a, int b) {\n    int gcd = findGCD(a, b);\n    return (a * b) / gcd;\n}\n\nint findGCD(int a, int b) {\n    while (b != 0) {\n        int temp = b;\n        b = a % b;\n        a = temp;\n    }\n    return a;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::cout << \"НОК(12, 18) = \" << findLCM(12, 18) << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"НОК(5, 7) = \" << findLCM(5, 7) << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"НОК(21, 6) = \" << findLCM(21, 6) << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <string>\n#include <sstream>\n#include <vector>\nusing namespace std;\n\nstruct Person {\n    string name;\n    int age;\n    string city;\n};\n\nint main() {\n    ifstream file(\"people.csv\");\n    vector<Person> people;\n    string line;\n    getline(file, line); // Пропуск заголовка\n    while (getline(file, line)) {\n        stringstream ss(line);\n        string name, age_str, city;\n        getline(ss, name, ',');\n        getline(ss, age_str, ',');\n        getline(ss, city);\n        Person p{name, stoi(age_str), city};\n        people.push_back(p);\n    }\n    file.close();\n    for (const auto& p : people) {\n        cout << p.name << \", \" << p.age << \", \" << p.city << endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Shape {\npublic:\n    virtual double area() const = 0;\n    virtual void print() const {\n        cout << \"Shape\" << endl;\n    }\n    virtual ~Shape() {}\n};\n\nclass Circle : public Shape {\n    double radius;\npublic:\n    Circle(double r) : radius(r) {}\n    double area() const override {\n        return 3.14159 * radius * radius;\n    }\n    void print() const override {\n        cout << \"Circle with radius \" << radius << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass Rectangle : public Shape {\n    double width, height;\npublic:\n    Rectangle(double w, double h) : width(w), height(h) {}\n    double area() const override {\n        return width * height;\n    }\n    void print() const override {\n        cout << \"Rectangle \" << width << \"x\" << height << endl;\n    }\n};\n\n// Функция принимает константную ссылку на базовый класс\nvoid processShape(const Shape& shape) {\n    shape.print();\n    cout << \"Area: \" << shape.area() << endl;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    Circle circle(5.0);\n    Rectangle rectangle(4.0, 6.0);\n    \n    cout << \"Обработка фигур через ссылки:\\n\";\n    processShape(circle);\n    processShape(rectangle);\n    \n    // Работа с вектором ссылок (через указатели или reference_wrapper)\n    vector<reference_wrapper<Shape>> shapes;\n    shapes.push_back(circle);\n    shapes.push_back(rectangle);\n    \n    cout << \"\\nОбработка через вектор reference_wrapper:\\n\";\n    for (const auto& shapeRef : shapes) {\n        processShape(shapeRef.get());\n    }\n    \n    // Модификация через неконстантную ссылку\n    vector<Shape*> shapePtrs = {&circle, &rectangle};\n    for (auto* ptr : shapePtrs) {\n        const Shape& shapeRef = *ptr;\n        processShape(shapeRef);\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <map>\n#include <utility>\n\ntemplate<typename T>\nclass DebugAllocator {\npublic:\n    using value_type = T;\n    using size_type = std::size_t;\n    using difference_type = std::ptrdiff_t;\n    \n    DebugAllocator() = default;\n    \n    template<typename U>\n    DebugAllocator(const DebugAllocator<U>&) {}\n    \n    T* allocate(std::size_t n) {\n        std::size_t total = n * sizeof(T);\n        T* ptr = static_cast<T*>(::operator new(total));\n        std::cout << \"[DEBUG] Allocated \" << total << \" bytes at \" << ptr \n             << \" for \" << n << \" elements\" << std::endl;\n        return ptr;\n    }\n    \n    void deallocate(T* p, std::size_t n) noexcept {\n        std::cout << \"[DEBUG] Deallocating \" << n << \" elements at \" << p << std::endl;\n        ::operator delete(p);\n    }\n    \n    template<typename U, typename... Args>\n    void construct(U* p, Args&&... args) {\n        std::cout << \"[DEBUG] Constructing object at \" << p << std::endl;\n        new(p) U(std::forward<Args>(args)...);\n    }\n    \n    template<typename U>\n    void destroy(U* p) {\n        std::cout << \"[DEBUG] Destroying object at \" << p << std::endl;\n        p->~U();\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    std::vector<int, DebugAllocator<int>> vec;\n    vec.reserve(3);\n    vec.push_back(1);\n    vec.push_back(2);\n    vec.push_back(3);\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n\nstruct Matrix2x2 {\n    double m[2][2];\n    \n    void scalarMultiply(double scalar) {\n        for (int i = 0; i < 2; ++i) {\n            for (int j = 0; j < 2; ++j) {\n                m[i][j] *= scalar;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void print() const {\n        for (int i = 0; i < 2; ++i) {\n            for (int j = 0; j < 2; ++j) {\n                std::cout << m[i][j] << \" \";\n            }\n            std::cout << std::endl;\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Matrix2x2 mat = {{{1.0, 2.0}, {3.0, 4.0}}};\n    \n    std::cout << \"Исходная матрица:\" << std::endl;\n    mat.print();\n    \n    mat.scalarMultiply(2.0);\n    \n    std::cout << \"Матрица после умножения на 2:\" << std::endl;\n    mat.print();\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\n\nclass Angle {\nprivate:\n    double degrees;\npublic:\n    Angle(double deg) : degrees(deg) {}\n    friend Angle normalize(const Angle& a);\n    void display() const { std::cout << degrees << \"°\"; }\n};\n\nAngle normalize(const Angle& a) {\n    double deg = std::fmod(a.degrees, 360.0);\n    if (deg < 0) deg += 360.0;\n    return Angle(deg);\n}\n\nint main() {\n    Angle a1(450.0);\n    Angle a2(-90.0);\n    Angle a3(720.0);\n    std::cout << \"Исходный угол: \"; a1.display(); std::cout << \" -> нормализованный: \"; normalize(a1).display(); std::cout << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Исходный угол: \"; a2.display(); std::cout << \" -> нормализованный: \"; normalize(a2).display(); std::cout << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Исходный угол: \"; a3.display(); std::cout << \" -> нормализованный: \"; normalize(a3).display(); std::cout << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <memory>\n#include <stack>\n#include <sstream>\n#include <map>\n#include <cctype>\n\nclass Expression {\npublic:\n    virtual int interpret(std::map<std::string, int>& context) = 0;\n    virtual ~Expression() {}\n};\n\nclass Number : public Expression {\n    int value;\npublic:\n    Number(int v) : value(v) {}\n    int interpret(std::map<std::string, int>& context) override {\n        return value;\n    }\n};\n\nclass Variable : public Expression {\n    std::string name;\npublic:\n    Variable(const std::string& n) : name(n) {}\n    int interpret(std::map<std::string, int>& context) override {\n        if(context.find(name) != context.end()) {\n            return context[name];\n        }\n        throw std::runtime_error(\"Undefined variable: \" + name);\n    }\n};\n\nclass AddExpression : public Expression {\n    std::unique_ptr<Expression> left;\n    std::unique_ptr<Expression> right;\npublic:\n    AddExpression(std::unique_ptr<Expression> l, std::unique_ptr<Expression> r)\n        : left(std::move(l)), right(std::move(r)) {}\n    int interpret(std::map<std::string, int>& context) override {\n        return left->interpret(context) + right->interpret(context);\n    }\n};\n\nclass SubtractExpression : public Expression {\n    std::unique_ptr<Expression> left;\n    std::unique_ptr<Expression> right;\npublic:\n    SubtractExpression(std::unique_ptr<Expression> l, std::unique_ptr<Expression> r)\n        : left(std::move(l)), right(std::move(r)) {}\n    int interpret(std::map<std::string, int>& context) override {\n        return left->interpret(context) - right->interpret(context);\n    }\n};\n\nclass MultiplyExpression : public Expression {\n    std::unique_ptr<Expression> left;\n    std::unique_ptr<Expression> right;\npublic:\n    MultiplyExpression(std::unique_ptr<Expression> l, std::unique_ptr<Expression> r)\n        : left(std::move(l)), right(std::move(r)) {}\n    int interpret(std::map<std::string, int>& context) override {\n        return left->interpret(context) * right->interpret(context);\n    }\n};\n\nclass Parser {\n    static bool isOperator(const std::string& token) {\n        return token == \"+\" || token == \"-\" || token == \"*\";\n    }\n    static int precedence(const std::string& op) {\n        if(op == \"+\" || op == \"-\") return 1;\n        if(op == \"*\") return 2;\n        return 0;\n    }\npublic:\n    static std::unique_ptr<Expression> parse(const std::string& expression, \n                                           std::map<std::string, int>& context) {\n        std::stack<std::string> operators;\n        std::stack<std::unique_ptr<Expression>> operands;\n        std::istringstream iss(expression);\n        std::string token;\n        while(iss >> token) {\n            if(token == \"(\") {\n                operators.push(token);\n            } else if(token == \")\") {\n                while(!operators.empty() && operators.top() != \"(\") {\n                    applyOperator(operators, operands);\n                }\n                operators.pop(); // удаляем \"(\"\n            } else if(isOperator(token)) {\n                while(!operators.empty() && precedence(operators.top()) >= precedence(token)) {\n                    applyOperator(operators, operands);\n                }\n                operators.push(token);\n            } else {\n                if(std::isdigit(token[0])) {\n                    operands.push(std::make_unique<Number>(std::stoi(token)));\n                } else {\n                    operands.push(std::make_unique<Variable>(token));\n                }\n            }\n        }\n        while(!operators.empty()) {\n            applyOperator(operators, operands);\n        }\n        return std::move(operands.top());\n    }\nprivate:\n    static void applyOperator(std::stack<std::string>& operators, \n                            std::stack<std::unique_ptr<Expression>>& operands) {\n        std::string op = operators.top();\n        operators.pop();\n        auto right = std::move(operands.top());\n        operands.pop();\n        auto left = std::move(operands.top());\n        operands.pop();\n        if(op == \"+\") {\n            operands.push(std::make_unique<AddExpression>(std::move(left), std::move(right)));\n        } else if(op == \"-\") {\n            operands.push(std::make_unique<SubtractExpression>(std::move(left), std::move(right)));\n        } else if(op == \"*\") {\n            operands.push(std::make_unique<MultiplyExpression>(std::move(left), std::move(right)));\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    std::map<std::string, int> context;\n    context[\"x\"] = 10;\n    context[\"y\"] = 5;\n    context[\"z\"] = 2;\n    try {\n        auto expr1 = Parser::parse(\"x + y * z\", context);\n        std::cout << \"x + y * z = \" << expr1->interpret(context) << std::endl;\n        auto expr2 = Parser::parse(\"( x + y ) * z\", context);\n        std::cout << \"(x + y) * z = \" << expr2->interpret(context) << std::endl;\n        auto expr3 = Parser::parse(\"10 * 2 + 5\", context);\n        std::cout << \"10 * 2 + 5 = \" << expr3->interpret(context) << std::endl;\n    } catch(const std::exception& e) {\n        std::cerr << \"Error: \" << e.what() << std::endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\nusing namespace std;\n\nbool isPerfect(int num) {\n    if (num <= 1) return false;\n    int sum = 1;\n    for (int i = 2; i <= sqrt(num); ++i) {\n        if (num % i == 0) {\n            sum += i;\n            if (i != num / i) {\n                sum += num / i;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    return sum == num;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    int n;\n    cout << \"Введите верхнюю границу N для поиска совершенных чисел: \";\n    cin >> n;\n    \n    if (n < 1) {\n        cout << \"Диапазон должен начинаться с 1.\" << endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"Совершенные числа до \" << n << \":\" << endl;\n    bool found = false;\n    for (int i = 1; i <= n; ++i) {\n        if (isPerfect(i)) {\n            cout << i << \" = 1\";\n            for (int j = 2; j <= i / 2; ++j) {\n                if (i % j == 0) {\n                    cout << \" + \" << j;\n                }\n            }\n            cout << endl;\n            found = true;\n        }\n    }\n    if (!found) {\n        cout << \"Совершенные числа не найдены в данном диапазоне.\" << endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <utility>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Storage {\nprivate:\n    int data;\npublic:\n    Storage(int d = 0) : data(d) {}\n    int getData() const { return data; }\n    void setData(int d) { data = d; }\n    void display() const { cout << \"Data: \" << data << endl; }\n    \n    // Дружественная шаблонная функция\n    template<typename T>\n    friend void swapMembers(T& a, T& b);\n    \n    // Дружественная функция для этого конкретного класса\n    friend void swapStorage(Storage& a, Storage& b);\n};\n\n// Шаблонная функция для обмена любыми данными\ntemplate<typename T>\nvoid swapMembers(T& a, T& b) {\n    T temp = a.data;\n    a.data = b.data;\n    b.data = temp;\n}\n\n// Явная специализация для Storage\ntemplate<>\nvoid swapMembers<Storage>(Storage& a, Storage& b) {\n    int temp = a.data;\n    a.data = b.data;\n    b.data = temp;\n}\n\n// Обычная дружественная функция (не шаблон)\nvoid swapStorage(Storage& a, Storage& b) {\n    int temp = a.data;\n    a.data = b.data;\n    b.data = temp;\n}\n\n// Шаблонный класс с аналогичной функциональностью\ntemplate<typename T>\nclass GenericStorage {\nprivate:\n    T value;\npublic:\n    GenericStorage(T v = T{}) : value(v) {}\n    \n    T getValue() const { return value; }\n    void setValue(T v) { value = v; }\n    \n    void display() const {\n        cout << \"Value: \" << value << endl;\n    }\n    \n    // Дружественная шаблонная функция для этого класса\n    template<typename U>\n    friend void swapGeneric(GenericStorage<U>& a, GenericStorage<U>& b);\n};\n\n// Дружественная функция для GenericStorage\ntemplate<typename U>\nvoid swapGeneric(GenericStorage<U>& a, GenericStorage<U>& b) {\n    U temp = a.value;\n    a.value = b.value;\n    b.value = temp;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    cout << \"=== Basic Storage with friend template function ===\" << endl;\n    Storage s1(10), s2(20);\n    cout << \"Before swap:\" << endl;\n    s1.display();\n    s2.display();\n    \n    // Используем явную специализацию шаблона\n    swapMembers<Storage>(s1, s2);\n    cout << \"\\nAfter swapMembers<Storage>:\" << endl;\n    s1.display();\n    s2.display();\n    \n    // Используем обычную дружественную функцию\n    swapStorage(s1, s2);\n    cout << \"\\nAfter swapStorage:\" << endl;\n    s1.display();\n    s2.display();\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== GenericStorage with templates ===\" << endl;\n    GenericStorage<int> gs1(100), gs2(200);\n    GenericStorage<string> gs3(\"Hello\"), gs4(\"World\");\n    \n    cout << \"\\nInteger storage before swap:\" << endl;\n    gs1.display();\n    gs2.display();\n    swapGeneric(gs1, gs2);\n    cout << \"After swap:\" << endl;\n    gs1.display();\n    gs2.display();\n    \n    cout << \"\\nString storage before swap:\" << endl;\n    gs3.display();\n    gs4.display();\n    swapGeneric(gs3, gs4);\n    cout << \"After swap:\" << endl;\n    gs3.display();\n    gs4.display();\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== Using swap for comparison ===\" << endl;\n    Storage s3(30), s4(40);\n    cout << \"Before swap:\" << endl;\n    s3.display();\n    s4.display();\n    \n    // Используем стандартный swap (работает, если есть move-операции)\n    swap(s3, s4);\n    cout << \"After swap:\" << endl;\n    s3.display();\n    s4.display();\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <type_traits>\n\nint global = 50;\nint& get_ref() { return global; }\n\nint main() {\n int x = 10;\n int& rx = x;\n auto a1 = rx;\n decltype(auto) a2 = rx;\n\n a1 = 20;\n a2 = 30;\n\n std::cout << \"x после auto: \" << x << std::endl;\n std::cout << \"x после decltype(auto): \" << x << std::endl;\n\n std::cout << std::boolalpha;\n std::cout << \"is_same<decltype(a2), int&>: \" << std::is_same<decltype(a2), int&>::value << std::endl;\n return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <iomanip>\n\nint main() {\n    const int N = 4;\n    int mat[N][N] = {0};\n    int value = 1;\n    int top = 0, bottom = N-1, left = 0, right = N-1;\n    \n    while (value <= N*N) {\n        for (int i = left; i <= right; i++) mat[top][i] = value++;\n        top++;\n        for (int i = top; i <= bottom; i++) mat[i][right] = value++;\n        right--;\n        for (int i = right; i >= left; i--) mat[bottom][i] = value++;\n        bottom--;\n        for (int i = bottom; i >= top; i--) mat[i][left] = value++;\n        left++;\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"Матрица, заполненная по спирали:\" << std::endl;\n    for (int i = 0; i < N; i++) {\n        for (int j = 0; j < N; j++) {\n            std::cout << std::setw(3) << mat[i][j];\n        }\n        std::cout << std::endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <algorithm>\nusing namespace std;\n\nstring trim(const string& str) {\n    size_t first = str.find_first_not_of(' ');\n    if(first == string::npos) return \"\";\n    size_t last = str.find_last_not_of(' ');\n    return str.substr(first, (last - first + 1));\n}\n\nint main() {\n    string text = \"   Hello World   \";\n    cout << \"Исходная: '\" << text << \"'\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Обрезанная: '\" << trim(text) << \"'\" << endl;\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <ctime>\n#include <cstring>\nusing namespace std;\n\nunion FileAttributes {\n    struct {\n        unsigned int read_only : 1;\n        unsigned int hidden : 1;\n        unsigned int system : 1;\n        unsigned int archive : 1;\n        unsigned int directory : 1;\n        unsigned int device : 1;\n        unsigned int normal : 1;\n        unsigned int temporary : 1;\n        unsigned int sparse : 1;\n        unsigned int reparse_point : 1;\n        unsigned int compressed : 1;\n        unsigned int offline : 1;\n        unsigned int not_content_indexed : 1;\n        unsigned int encrypted : 1;\n        unsigned int integrity_stream : 1;\n        unsigned int virtual_file : 1;\n        unsigned int reserved : 16;\n    } windows;\n    \n    struct {\n        unsigned short permissions; // Unix permissions\n        unsigned short uid;         // User ID\n        unsigned short gid;         // Group ID\n        unsigned int is_directory : 1;\n        unsigned int is_symlink : 1;\n        unsigned int is_fifo : 1;\n        unsigned int is_socket : 1;\n        unsigned int is_block_device : 1;\n        unsigned int is_char_device : 1;\n        unsigned int is_setuid : 1;\n        unsigned int is_setgid : 1;\n        unsigned int is_sticky : 1;\n        unsigned int reserved : 7;\n    } unix;\n    \n    unsigned int raw_attributes;\n    \n    FileAttributes(unsigned int attr = 0, bool is_windows = true) {\n        if (is_windows) {\n            raw_attributes = attr;\n            parse_windows_attributes();\n        } else {\n            raw_attributes = attr;\n            parse_unix_attributes();\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void parse_windows_attributes() {\n        // Просто копируем биты\n        memcpy(&windows, &raw_attributes, sizeof(windows));\n    }\n    \n    void parse_unix_attributes() {\n        memcpy(&unix, &raw_attributes, sizeof(unix));\n    }\n    \n    void print_windows() const {\n        cout << \"Windows атрибуты (0x\" << hex << raw_attributes << dec << \"):\" << endl;\n        cout << \"  ReadOnly: \" << windows.read_only << endl;\n        cout << \"  Hidden: \" << windows.hidden << endl;\n        cout << \"  System: \" << windows.system << endl;\n        cout << \"  Directory: \" << windows.directory << endl;\n        cout << \"  Archive: \" << windows.archive << endl;\n        cout << \"  Compressed: \" << windows.compressed << endl;\n        cout << \"  Encrypted: \" << windows.encrypted << endl;\n    }\n    \n    void print_unix() const {\n        cout << \"Unix атрибуты (0x\" << hex << raw_attributes << dec << \"):\" << endl;\n        cout << \"  Permissions: 0\" << oct << unix.permissions << dec << endl;\n        cout << \"  Directory: \" << unix.is_directory << endl;\n        cout << \"  Symlink: \" << unix.is_symlink << endl;\n        cout << \"  SetUID: \" << unix.is_setuid << endl;\n        cout << \"  SetGID: \" << unix.is_setgid << endl;\n        cout << \"  Sticky: \" << unix.is_sticky << endl;\n    }\n    \n    void set_windows_attribute(const char* attr_name, bool value) {\n        if (strcmp(attr_name, \"read_only\") == 0) windows.read_only = value;\n        else if (strcmp(attr_name, \"hidden\") == 0) windows.hidden = value;\n        else if (strcmp(attr_name, \"archive\") == 0) windows.archive = value;\n        update_raw_from_windows();\n    }\n    \n    void update_raw_from_windows() {\n        memcpy(&raw_attributes, &windows, sizeof(windows));\n    }\n    \n    void update_raw_from_unix() {\n        memcpy(&raw_attributes, &unix, sizeof(unix));\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    cout << \"Файловые атрибуты для разных ОС:\" << endl;\n    cout << \"================================\" << endl;\n    \n    // Windows атрибуты (например, архивный + скрытый)\n    FileAttributes win_attr(0x22); // 0x22 = архивный + скрытый\n    win_attr.print_windows();\n    \n    cout << endl;\n    \n    // Unix атрибуты (например, 755 для директории)\n    FileAttributes unix_attr(0x41ED, false); // 0x41ED = директория с правами 755\n    unix_attr.print_unix();\n    \n    cout << \"\\nИзменение атрибутов:\" << endl;\n    win_attr.set_windows_attribute(\"read_only\", true);\n    win_attr.set_windows_attribute(\"hidden\", false);\n    win_attr.print_windows();\n    \n    cout << \"\\nРазмер FileAttributes: \" << sizeof(FileAttributes) << \" байт\" << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <bitset>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    bitset<8> status(\"00101101\");\n    \n    cout << \"Исходное состояние: \" << status << endl;\n    cout << \"Десятичное значение: \" << status.to_ulong() << endl;\n    \n    // Проверка битов\n    cout << \"Бит 0: \" << status.test(0) << endl;\n    cout << \"Бит 2: \" << status.test(2) << endl;\n    cout << \"Бит 5: \" << status.test(5) << endl;\n    \n    // Установка битов\n    status.set(3); // Устанавливаем бит 3 в 1\n    cout << \"После set(3): \" << status << endl;\n    \n    // Сброс битов\n    status.reset(5); // Устанавливаем бит 5 в 0\n    cout << \"После reset(5): \" << status << endl;\n    \n    // Инверсия битов\n    status.flip(0); // Инвертируем бит 0\n    cout << \"После flip(0): \" << status << endl;\n    \n    // Подсчет единиц\n    cout << \"Количество единиц: \" << status.count() << endl;\n    cout << \"Количество нулей: \" << status.size() - status.count() << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Singleton {\nprivate:\n    static Singleton* instance;\n    Singleton() { cout << \"Singleton created\" << endl; }\npublic:\n    static Singleton* getInstance() {\n        if (!instance) instance = new Singleton();\n        return instance;\n    }\n    void show() { cout << \"Singleton address: \" << this << endl; }\n};\n\nSingleton* Singleton::instance = nullptr;\n\nint main() {\n    Singleton* s = Singleton::getInstance();\n    s->show();\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <cstdlib>\n#include <ctime>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Playlist {\nprivate:\n    string songs[20];\n    int songCount;\n    const int MAX_SONGS = 20;\n    \npublic:\n    Playlist() : songCount(0) {\n        for (int i = 0; i < MAX_SONGS; i++) songs[i] = \"\";\n        srand(time(0));\n    }\n    \n    bool addSong(const string& songName) {\n        if (songName.empty()) {\n            cout << \"Название песни не может быть пустым\" << endl;\n            return false;\n        }\n        if (songCount >= MAX_SONGS) {\n            cout << \"Плейлист полон! Максимум \" << MAX_SONGS << \" песен\" << endl;\n            return false;\n        }\n        songs[songCount++] = songName;\n        cout << \"Добавлена песня: \" << songName << endl;\n        return true;\n    }\n    \n    bool removeSong(int index) {\n        if (index < 0 || index >= songCount) {\n            cout << \"Неверный индекс песни\" << endl;\n            return false;\n        }\n        cout << \"Удалена песня: \" << songs[index] << endl;\n        for (int i = index; i < songCount - 1; i++) {\n            songs[i] = songs[i + 1];\n        }\n        songs[songCount - 1] = \"\";\n        songCount--;\n        return true;\n    }\n    \n    void shuffle() {\n        if (songCount < 2) {\n            cout << \"Недостаточно песен для перемешивания\" << endl;\n            return;\n        }\n        for (int i = 0; i < songCount; i++) {\n            int j = rand() % songCount;\n            string temp = songs[i];\n            songs[i] = songs[j];\n            songs[j] = temp;\n        }\n        cout << \"Плейлист перемешан!\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    void play() const {\n        if (songCount == 0) {\n            cout << \"Плейлист пуст\" << endl;\n            return;\n        }\n        cout << \"\\n=== Воспроизведение плейлиста ===\" << endl;\n        for (int i = 0; i < songCount; i++) {\n            cout << i + 1 << \". \" << songs[i] << endl;\n        }\n        cout << \"Всего песен: \" << songCount << endl;\n    }\n    \n    void clear() {\n        for (int i = 0; i < songCount; i++) {\n            songs[i] = \"\";\n        }\n        songCount = 0;\n        cout << \"Плейлист очищен\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    int findSong(const string& songName) const {\n        for (int i = 0; i < songCount; i++) {\n            if (songs[i] == songName) {\n                return i;\n            }\n        }\n        return -1;\n    }\n    \n    void playSong(int index) const {\n        if (index < 0 || index >= songCount) {\n            cout << \"Неверный индекс песни\" << endl;\n            return;\n        }\n        cout << \"Сейчас играет: \" << songs[index] << endl;\n    }\n    \n    int getSongCount() const { return songCount; }\n    int getMaxSongs() const { return MAX_SONGS; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Playlist myPlaylist;\n    \n    myPlaylist.addSong(\"Bohemian Rhapsody\");\n    myPlaylist.addSong(\"Imagine\");\n    myPlaylist.addSong(\"Hotel California\");\n    myPlaylist.addSong(\"Stairway to Heaven\");\n    \n    myPlaylist.play();\n    \n    myPlaylist.shuffle();\n    myPlaylist.play();\n    \n    int index = myPlaylist.findSong(\"Imagine\");\n    if (index != -1) {\n        cout << \"\\nПесня 'Imagine' найдена на позиции \" << index + 1 << endl;\n        myPlaylist.playSong(index);\n    }\n    \n    myPlaylist.removeSong(1);\n    myPlaylist.play();\n    \n    // Добавляем песни до лимита\n    for (int i = 0; i < 20; i++) {\n        myPlaylist.addSong(\"Песня \" + to_string(i));\n    }\n    \n    myPlaylist.clear();\n    myPlaylist.play();\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <sys/mman.h>\n#include <sys/stat.h>\n#include <fcntl.h>\n#include <unistd.h>\n#include <cstring>\nclass MemoryMappedFile {\n    int fd = -1;\n    void* addr = nullptr;\n    size_t length = 0;\npublic:\n    MemoryMappedFile(const std::string& filename, bool writeable = false) {\n        fd = open(filename.c_str(), writeable ? O_RDWR : O_RDONLY);\n        if(fd == -1) throw std::runtime_error(\"Cannot open file\");\n        struct stat sb;\n        if(fstat(fd, &sb) == -1) throw std::runtime_error(\"Cannot get file size\");\n        length = sb.st_size;\n        addr = mmap(nullptr, length, writeable ? PROT_READ | PROT_WRITE : PROT_READ, \n                    MAP_PRIVATE, fd, 0);\n        if(addr == MAP_FAILED) throw std::runtime_error(\"Memory mapping failed\");\n    }\n    ~MemoryMappedFile() {\n        if(addr != nullptr && addr != MAP_FAILED) munmap(addr, length);\n        if(fd != -1) close(fd);\n    }\n    char* data() { return static_cast<char*>(addr); }\n    size_t size() const { return length; }\n    void sync() {\n        if(msync(addr, length, MS_SYNC) == -1) {\n            throw std::runtime_error(\"Sync failed\");\n        }\n    }\n};\nint main() {\n    try {\n        MemoryMappedFile mmap(\"data.bin\", true);\n        std::memset(mmap.data(), 0xAA, mmap.size());\n        mmap.sync();\n        std::cout << \"File modified via memory mapping\" << std::endl;\n    } catch(const std::exception& e) {\n        std::cerr << \"Error: \" << e.what() << std::endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Base {\npublic:\n    void nonVirtual() {\n        cout << \"Base nonVirtual\" << endl;\n    }\n    virtual void isVirtual() {\n        cout << \"Base isVirtual\" << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass Derived : public Base {\npublic:\n    void nonVirtual() {\n        cout << \"Derived nonVirtual\" << endl;\n    }\n    void isVirtual() override {\n        cout << \"Derived isVirtual\" << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Derived d;\n    Base* b = &d;\n    b->nonVirtual();\n    b->isVirtual();\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\n\nstruct Segment {\n    double x1, y1, x2, y2;\n    \n    double slope() const {\n        if (x2 == x1) {\n            return INFINITY;\n        }\n        return (y2 - y1) / (x2 - x1);\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Segment seg1 = {0, 0, 2, 2};\n    Segment seg2 = {1, 1, 1, 3};\n    \n    std::cout << \"Наклон seg1: \" << seg1.slope() << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Наклон seg2: \" << seg2.slope() << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nstruct Point {\n    double x, y;\n    \n    double squaredDistance(const Point& other) const {\n        double dx = x - other.x;\n        double dy = y - other.y;\n        return dx*dx + dy*dy;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Point p1 = {0, 0};\n    Point p2 = {3, 4};\n    \n    cout << \"Квадрат расстояния: \" << p1.squaredDistance(p2) << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n\nclass Employee {\n    std::string name;\n    int age;\n    std::string position;\n    double salary;\n    int yearsOfService;\n    \npublic:\n    Employee() : name(\"Неизвестно\"), age(0), position(\"Неизвестно\"), salary(0.0), yearsOfService(0) {\n        std::cout << \"Сотрудник по умолчанию создан\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    Employee(const std::string& n, int a, const std::string& pos, double sal, int years = 0) \n        : name(n), age(a), position(pos), salary(sal), yearsOfService(years) {\n        if(age < 18 || age > 70) {\n            std::cout << \"Предупреждение: некорректный возраст сотрудника\" << std::endl;\n        }\n        if(salary < 0) {\n            std::cout << \"Ошибка: зарплата не может быть отрицательной\" << std::endl;\n            salary = 0.0;\n        }\n        if(yearsOfService < 0) {\n            std::cout << \"Ошибка: стаж не может быть отрицательным\" << std::endl;\n            yearsOfService = 0;\n        }\n        std::cout << \"Сотрудник \" << name << \" создан\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    ~Employee() {\n        std::cout << \"Сотрудник \" << name << \" уволен\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    void giveRaise(double percent) {\n        if(percent <= 0) {\n            std::cout << \"Ошибка: процент повышения должен быть положительным\" << std::endl;\n            return;\n        }\n        double increase = salary * (percent / 100.0);\n        salary += increase;\n        std::cout << \"Зарплата повышена на \" << percent << \"% (+\" << increase \n                  << \"). Новая зарплата: \" << salary << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    void addServiceYear() {\n        yearsOfService++;\n        std::cout << \"Стаж увеличен. Теперь: \" << yearsOfService << \" лет\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    double calculateAnnualSalary() const {\n        return salary * 12;\n    }\n    \n    bool isEligibleForBonus() const {\n        return yearsOfService >= 5;\n    }\n    \n    void displayInfo() const {\n        std::cout << \"Имя: \" << name << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Возраст: \" << age << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Должность: \" << position << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Зарплата: \" << salary << \" руб./мес.\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Стаж: \" << yearsOfService << \" лет\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Годовая зарплата: \" << calculateAnnualSalary() << \" руб.\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Претендует на бонус (стаж ≥ 5 лет): \" << (isEligibleForBonus() ? \"Да\" : \"Нет\") << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Employee e1;\n    Employee e2(\"Иван Иванов\", 35, \"Разработчик\", 80000.0, 7);\n    Employee e3(\"Анна Петрова\", 25, \"Дизайнер\", 60000.0);\n    \n    e1.displayInfo();\n    std::cout << std::endl;\n    e2.displayInfo();\n    \n    e2.giveRaise(10.0);\n    e2.addServiceYear();\n    e2.displayInfo();\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Base {\npublic:\n    virtual void show() const {\n        cout << \"Base show\" << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass Derived : public Base {\npublic:\n    void show() const override {\n        cout << \"Derived show\" << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Base* ptr = new Derived();\n    ptr->show();\n    delete ptr;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    int arr[] = {2, 5, 8, 12, 16, 23, 38, 56, 72, 91};\n    int n = sizeof(arr) / sizeof(arr[0]);\n    int target = 23;\n    \n    int left = 0, right = n - 1;\n    int index = -1;\n    \n    while (left <= right) {\n        int mid = left + (right - left) / 2;\n        \n        if (arr[mid] == target) {\n            index = mid;\n            break;\n        }\n        \n        if (arr[mid] < target) {\n            left = mid + 1;\n        } else {\n            right = mid - 1;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    if (index != -1) {\n        cout << \"Элемент \" << target << \" найден на позиции \" << index << endl;\n    } else {\n        cout << \"Элемент \" << target << \" не найден\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <algorithm>\nusing namespace std;\n\nvoid dfs(int u, int parent, vector<vector<int>>& tree, vector<vector<int>>& dp) {\n    dp[u][0] = 0; // not taking u\n    dp[u][1] = 1; // taking u\n    for (int v : tree[u]) {\n        if (v == parent) continue;\n        dfs(v, u, tree, dp);\n        dp[u][0] += dp[v][1]; // if not taking u, must take v\n        dp[u][1] += min(dp[v][0], dp[v][1]); // if taking u, can choose min\n    }\n}\n\nint minVertexCover(int n, vector<vector<int>>& edges) {\n    vector<vector<int>> tree(n);\n    for (auto& e : edges) {\n        tree[e[0]].push_back(e[1]);\n        tree[e[1]].push_back(e[0]);\n    }\n    vector<vector<int>> dp(n, vector<int>(2, 0));\n    dfs(0, -1, tree, dp);\n    return min(dp[0][0], dp[0][1]);\n}\n\nint main() {\n    int n = 4;\n    vector<vector<int>> edges = {{0,1}, {0,2}, {1,3}};\n    cout << \"Minimum vertex cover size: \" << minVertexCover(n, edges) << endl;\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n\nint uniquePathsWithObstacles(std::vector<std::vector<int>>& obstacleGrid) {\n    int m = obstacleGrid.size();\n    int n = obstacleGrid[0].size();\n    std::vector<std::vector<int>> dp(m, std::vector<int>(n, 0));\n    \n    dp[0][0] = (obstacleGrid[0][0] == 0) ? 1 : 0;\n    for (int i = 1; i < m; i++) {\n        dp[i][0] = (obstacleGrid[i][0] == 0 && dp[i-1][0] == 1) ? 1 : 0;\n    }\n    for (int j = 1; j < n; j++) {\n        dp[0][j] = (obstacleGrid[0][j] == 0 && dp[0][j-1] == 1) ? 1 : 0;\n    }\n    \n    for (int i = 1; i < m; i++) {\n        for (int j = 1; j < n; j++) {\n            if (obstacleGrid[i][j] == 0) {\n                dp[i][j] = dp[i-1][j] + dp[i][j-1];\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    return dp[m-1][n-1];\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::vector<std::vector<int>> grid = {{0,0,0}, {0,1,0}, {0,0,0}};\n    std::cout << \"Unique paths: \" << uniquePathsWithObstacles(grid) << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <cstring>\n#include <cctype>\n\nbool isPalindrome(char str[]) {\n    int left = 0;\n    int right = std::strlen(str) - 1;\n    \n    while (left < right) {\n        while (left < right && !std::isalnum(str[left])) left++;\n        while (left < right && !std::isalnum(str[right])) right--;\n        \n        if (std::tolower(str[left]) != std::tolower(str[right])) {\n            return false;\n        }\n        \n        left++;\n        right--;\n    }\n    \n    return true;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    char str[] = \"A man a plan a canal Panama\";\n    \n    std::cout << \"Строка: \" << str << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Палиндром: \" << std::boolalpha << isPalindrome(str) << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\n\nstruct Point {\n    double x, y;\n};\n\nstruct Triangle {\n    Point a, b, c;\n};\n\ndouble distance(const Point& p1, const Point& p2) {\n    return std::sqrt(std::pow(p2.x - p1.x, 2) + std::pow(p2.y - p1.y, 2));\n}\n\ndouble perimeter(const Triangle& tri) {\n    return distance(tri.a, tri.b) + distance(tri.b, tri.c) + distance(tri.c, tri.a);\n}\n\nint main() {\n    Triangle tri = {{0.0, 0.0}, {3.0, 0.0}, {0.0, 4.0}};\n    \n    std::cout << \"Периметр треугольника: \" << perimeter(tri) << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <algorithm>\n\nint findTrapRainWater(std::vector<int>& height) {\n    if (height.empty()) return 0;\n    \n    int left = 0, right = height.size() - 1;\n    int leftMax = 0, rightMax = 0;\n    int water = 0;\n    \n    while (left < right) {\n        if (height[left] < height[right]) {\n            if (height[left] >= leftMax) {\n                leftMax = height[left];\n            } else {\n                water += leftMax - height[left];\n            }\n            left++;\n        } else {\n            if (height[right] >= rightMax) {\n                rightMax = height[right];\n            } else {\n                water += rightMax - height[right];\n            }\n            right--;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return water;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::vector<int> height = {0,1,0,2,1,0,1,3,2,1,2,1};\n    std::cout << findTrapRainWater(height) << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nenum OldColor { RED, GREEN, BLUE };\nenum class NewColor { Red, Green, Blue };\n\nint main() {\n OldColor oc = GREEN;\n NewColor nc = NewColor::Green;\n \n int ocValue = oc;\n std::cout << \"OldColor как int: \" << ocValue << std::endl;\n \n int ncValue = static_cast<int>(nc);\n std::cout << \"NewColor как int: \" << ncValue << std::endl;\n \n if (oc == 1) {\n std::cout << \"OldColor равен 1\" << std::endl;\n }\n \n if (nc == NewColor::Green) {\n std::cout << \"NewColor равен Green\" << std::endl;\n }\n \n return 0;\n}
#include <sys/types.h>\n#include <sys/socket.h>\n#include <netinet/in.h>\n#include <arpa/inet.h>\n#include <unistd.h>\n#include <fcntl.h>\n#include <iostream>\n#include <cstring>\n#include <vector>\n#include <ctime>\n\nint main() {\n    const int MAX_CLIENTS = 3;\n    const int RUN_TIME = 5;\n    \n    int server_fd = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0);\n    if(server_fd < 0) {\n        std::cerr << \"socket failed\" << std::endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    sockaddr_in addr;\n    std::memset(&addr, 0, sizeof(addr));\n    addr.sin_family = AF_INET;\n    addr.sin_port = htons(7777);\n    addr.sin_addr.s_addr = INADDR_ANY;\n    \n    // Неблокирующий режим\n    int flags = fcntl(server_fd, F_GETFL, 0);\n    fcntl(server_fd, F_SETFL, flags | O_NONBLOCK);\n    \n    if(bind(server_fd, (struct sockaddr*)&addr, sizeof(addr)) < 0) {\n        std::cerr << \"bind failed\" << std::endl;\n        close(server_fd);\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    if(listen(server_fd, MAX_CLIENTS) < 0) {\n        std::cerr << \"listen failed\" << std::endl;\n        close(server_fd);\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"Server started on port 7777 (max \" << MAX_CLIENTS << \" clients)\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Will run for \" << RUN_TIME << \" seconds...\" << std::endl;\n    \n    std::vector<int> clients;\n    std::time_t start_time = std::time(nullptr);\n    \n    while(std::time(nullptr) - start_time < RUN_TIME) {\n        fd_set read_fds;\n        FD_ZERO(&read_fds);\n        FD_SET(server_fd, &read_fds);\n        \n        struct timeval tv;\n        tv.tv_sec = 1;\n        tv.tv_usec = 0;\n        \n        int max_fd = server_fd;\n        for(int client : clients) {\n            FD_SET(client, &read_fds);\n            if(client > max_fd) max_fd = client;\n        }\n        \n        int activity = select(max_fd + 1, &read_fds, NULL, NULL, &tv);\n        \n        if(activity < 0) {\n            perror(\"select error\");\n            break;\n        }\n        \n        if(FD_ISSET(server_fd, &read_fds)) {\n            if(clients.size() < MAX_CLIENTS) {\n                sockaddr_in client_addr;\n                socklen_t client_len = sizeof(client_addr);\n                int client_fd = accept(server_fd, (struct sockaddr*)&client_addr, &client_len);\n                if(client_fd >= 0) {\n                    clients.push_back(client_fd);\n                    std::cout << \"New client accepted. Total: \" << clients.size() << std::endl;\n                    const char* msg = \"Welcome!\\n\";\n                    send(client_fd, msg, std::strlen(msg), 0);\n                }\n            } else {\n                std::cout << \"Connection refused: max clients reached\" << std::endl;\n                sockaddr_in client_addr;\n                socklen_t client_len = sizeof(client_addr);\n                int temp_fd = accept(server_fd, (struct sockaddr*)&client_addr, &client_len);\n                if(temp_fd >= 0) {\n                    const char* msg = \"Server full\\n\";\n                    send(temp_fd, msg, std::strlen(msg), 0);\n                    close(temp_fd);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n        \n        for(std::size_t i = 0; i < clients.size(); i++) {\n            if(FD_ISSET(clients[i], &read_fds)) {\n                char buffer[1024];\n                ssize_t bytes = recv(clients[i], buffer, sizeof(buffer), 0);\n                if(bytes <= 0) {\n                    close(clients[i]);\n                    clients.erase(clients.begin() + i);\n                    i--;\n                    std::cout << \"Client disconnected. Total: \" << clients.size() << std::endl;\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    for(int client : clients) {\n        close(client);\n    }\n    close(server_fd);\n    \n    std::cout << \"Server shutdown after \" << RUN_TIME << \" seconds\" << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <queue>\n#include <unordered_map>\n#include <string>\n\nstruct Node {\n    char ch;\n    int freq;\n    Node *left, *right;\n    \n    Node(char c, int f) : ch(c), freq(f), left(nullptr), right(nullptr) {}\n};\n\nstruct Compare {\n    bool operator()(Node* a, Node* b) {\n        return a->freq > b->freq;\n    }\n};\n\nvoid buildHuffmanCodes(Node* root, std::string code, std::unordered_map<char, std::string>& codes) {\n    if (!root) return;\n    \n    if (!root->left && !root->right) {\n        codes[root->ch] = code;\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    buildHuffmanCodes(root->left, code + \"0\", codes);\n    buildHuffmanCodes(root->right, code + \"1\", codes);\n}\n\nstd::unordered_map<char, std::string> huffmanEncoding(const std::string& text) {\n    // Подсчет частот\n    std::unordered_map<char, int> freq;\n    for (char ch : text) {\n        freq[ch]++;\n    }\n    \n    // Создание приоритетной очереди\n    std::priority_queue<Node*, std::vector<Node*>, Compare> pq;\n    \n    for (auto& pair : freq) {\n        pq.push(new Node(pair.first, pair.second));\n    }\n    \n    // Построение дерева Хаффмана\n    while (pq.size() > 1) {\n        Node* left = pq.top(); pq.pop();\n        Node* right = pq.top(); pq.pop();\n        \n        Node* parent = new Node('\\0', left->freq + right->freq);\n        parent->left = left;\n        parent->right = right;\n        \n        pq.push(parent);\n    }\n    \n    // Генерация кодов\n    std::unordered_map<char, std::string> codes;\n    if (!pq.empty()) {\n        buildHuffmanCodes(pq.top(), \"\", codes);\n    }\n    \n    return codes;\n}\n\nstd::string encodeText(const std::string& text, const std::unordered_map<char, std::string>& codes) {\n    std::string encoded;\n    for (char ch : text) {\n        encoded += codes.at(ch);\n    }\n    return encoded;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::string text = \"this is an example for huffman encoding\";\n    \n    std::cout << \"Исходный текст: \" << text << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Длина: \" << text.length() * 8 << \" бит\" << std::endl;\n    \n    auto codes = huffmanEncoding(text);\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nКоды Хаффмана:\" << std::endl;\n    for (auto& pair : codes) {\n        std::cout << \"'\" << pair.first << \"': \" << pair.second << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    std::string encoded = encodeText(text, codes);\n    std::cout << \"\\nЗакодированный текст: \" << encoded << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Длина: \" << encoded.length() << \" бит\" << std::endl;\n    \n    double compressionRatio = (double)(text.length() * 8) / encoded.length();\n    std::cout << \"Коэффициент сжатия: \" << compressionRatio << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <unordered_map>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    string text = \"leetcode\";\n    unordered_map<char, int> charCount;\n    \n    for(char c : text) {\n        charCount[c]++;\n    }\n    \n    int index = -1;\n    for(size_t i = 0; i < text.length(); i++) {\n        if(charCount[text[i]] == 1) {\n            index = i;\n            break;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    if(index != -1) {\n        cout << \"Первый уникальный символ: '\" << text[index] << \"' на позиции \" << index << endl;\n    } else {\n        cout << \"Уникальных символов нет\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <string>\n#include <algorithm>\n#include <ctime>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Date {\nprivate:\n    int day, month, year;\npublic:\n    Date(int d = 1, int m = 1, int y = 2000) : day(d), month(m), year(y) {}\n    \n    static Date currentDate() {\n        time_t now = time(0);\n        tm* ltm = localtime(&now);\n        return Date(ltm->tm_mday, 1 + ltm->tm_mon, 1900 + ltm->tm_year);\n    }\n    \n    bool operator<(const Date& other) const {\n        if(year != other.year) return year < other.year;\n        if(month != other.month) return month < other.month;\n        return day < other.day;\n    }\n    \n    string toString() const {\n        return to_string(day) + \"/\" + to_string(month) + \"/\" + to_string(year);\n    }\n};\n\nclass Book {\nprivate:\n    string isbn;\n    string title;\n    string author;\n    string publisher;\n    Date publicationDate;\n    int pages;\n    bool available;\npublic:\n    Book(string i, string t, string a, string p, Date pd, int pg) \n        : isbn(i), title(t), author(a), publisher(p), publicationDate(pd), pages(pg), available(true) {}\n    \n    string getISBN() const { return isbn; }\n    string getTitle() const { return title; }\n    string getAuthor() const { return author; }\n    string getPublisher() const { return publisher; }\n    Date getPublicationDate() const { return publicationDate; }\n    int getPages() const { return pages; }\n    bool isAvailable() const { return available; }\n    \n    void borrow() { \n        if(available) {\n            available = false;\n            cout << \"Book '\" << title << \"' borrowed successfully.\" << endl;\n        } else {\n            cout << \"Book '\" << title << \"' is not available.\" << endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void returnBook() { \n        available = true;\n        cout << \"Book '\" << title << \"' returned successfully.\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    void display() const {\n        cout << \"ISBN: \" << isbn << endl;\n        cout << \"Title: \" << title << endl;\n        cout << \"Author: \" << author << endl;\n        cout << \"Publisher: \" << publisher << endl;\n        cout << \"Publication Date: \" << publicationDate.toString() << endl;\n        cout << \"Pages: \" << pages << endl;\n        cout << \"Status: \" << (available ? \"Available\" : \"Borrowed\") << endl;\n        cout << \"---------------------------------\" << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass Library {\nprivate:\n    vector<Book> books;\n    \n    static bool compareByTitle(const Book& a, const Book& b) {\n        return a.getTitle() < b.getTitle();\n    }\n    \n    static bool compareByAuthor(const Book& a, const Book& b) {\n        return a.getAuthor() < b.getAuthor();\n    }\n    \n    static bool compareByDate(const Book& a, const Book& b) {\n        return a.getPublicationDate() < b.getPublicationDate();\n    }\n    \npublic:\n    void addBook(const Book& book) {\n        books.push_back(book);\n        cout << \"Book added to library.\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    void removeBook(const string& isbn) {\n        auto it = find_if(books.begin(), books.end(), \n                         [&](const Book& b) { return b.getISBN() == isbn; });\n        if(it != books.end()) {\n            books.erase(it);\n            cout << \"Book removed from library.\" << endl;\n        } else {\n            cout << \"Book not found.\" << endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    vector<Book> searchByTitle(const string& title) const {\n        vector<Book> results;\n        for(const auto& book : books) {\n            if(book.getTitle().find(title) != string::npos) {\n                results.push_back(book);\n            }\n        }\n        return results;\n    }\n    \n    vector<Book> searchByAuthor(const string& author) const {\n        vector<Book> results;\n        for(const auto& book : books) {\n            if(book.getAuthor().find(author) != string::npos) {\n                results.push_back(book);\n            }\n        }\n        return results;\n    }\n    \n    Book* findBookByISBN(const string& isbn) {\n        for(auto& book : books) {\n            if(book.getISBN() == isbn) {\n                return &book;\n            }\n        }\n        return nullptr;\n    }\n    \n    void sortByTitle() {\n        sort(books.begin(), books.end(), compareByTitle);\n        cout << \"Library sorted by title.\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    void sortByAuthor() {\n        sort(books.begin(), books.end(), compareByAuthor);\n        cout << \"Library sorted by author.\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    void sortByPublicationDate() {\n        sort(books.begin(), books.end(), compareByDate);\n        cout << \"Library sorted by publication date.\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    void displayAll() const {\n        if(books.empty()) {\n            cout << \"Library is empty.\" << endl;\n            return;\n        }\n        cout << \"\\nLibrary Catalog (\" << books.size() << \" books):\" << endl;\n        cout << \"=========================================\" << endl;\n        for(const auto& book : books) {\n            book.display();\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void displayAvailable() const {\n        cout << \"\\nAvailable Books:\" << endl;\n        cout << \"=================\" << endl;\n        for(const auto& book : books) {\n            if(book.isAvailable()) {\n                book.display();\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    int getTotalBooks() const { return books.size(); }\n    \n    int getAvailableBooks() const {\n        int count = 0;\n        for(const auto& book : books) {\n            if(book.isAvailable()) count++;\n        }\n        return count;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Library library;\n    \n    Book book1(\"978-3-16-148410-0\", \"The C++ Programming Language\", \"Bjarne Stroustrup\", \n               \"Addison-Wesley\", Date(1, 1, 2013), 1376);\n    Book book2(\"978-0-13-235088-4\", \"Clean Code: A Handbook of Agile Software Craftsmanship\", \n               \"Robert C. Martin\", \"Prentice Hall\", Date(1, 8, 2008), 464);\n    Book book3(\"978-0-321-99278-9\", \"Effective Modern C++\", \"Scott Meyers\", \n               \"O'Reilly Media\", Date(1, 11, 2014), 334);\n    \n    library.addBook(book1);\n    library.addBook(book2);\n    library.addBook(book3);\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== Initial Library State ===\" << endl;\n    library.displayAll();\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== Searching for books with 'C++' in title ===\" << endl;\n    vector<Book> cppBooks = library.searchByTitle(\"C++\");\n    for(const auto& book : cppBooks) {\n        book.display();\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== Sorting by author ===\" << endl;\n    library.sortByAuthor();\n    library.displayAll();\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== Borrowing a book ===\" << endl;\n    Book* bookToBorrow = library.findBookByISBN(\"978-3-16-148410-0\");\n    if(bookToBorrow) {\n        bookToBorrow->borrow();\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== Available books after borrowing ===\" << endl;\n    library.displayAvailable();\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== Library Statistics ===\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Total books: \" << library.getTotalBooks() << endl;\n    cout << \"Available books: \" << library.getAvailableBooks() << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nint main() {\n    int arr[] = {1, 2, 3, 4, 5};\n    int size = sizeof(arr) / sizeof(arr[0]);\n    \n    std::cout << \"Массив в обратном порядке: \";\n    for (int i = size - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n        std::cout << arr[i] << \" \";\n    }\n    std::cout << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\n\nclass Complex {\n    double real, imag;\npublic:\n    Complex(double r = 0, double i = 0) : real(r), imag(i) {}\n    Complex operator+(const Complex& other) const {\n        return Complex(real + other.real, imag + other.imag);\n    }\n    Complex operator-(const Complex& other) const {\n        return Complex(real - other.real, imag - other.imag);\n    }\n    void print() const {\n        std::cout << real << (imag >= 0 ? \" + \" : \" - \") << std::abs(imag) << \"i\";\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Complex c1(3, 4), c2(1, -2);\n    Complex sum = c1 + c2;\n    Complex diff = c1 - c2;\n    std::cout << \"c1 = \"; c1.print(); std::cout << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"c2 = \"; c2.print(); std::cout << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"c1 + c2 = \"; sum.print(); std::cout << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"c1 - c2 = \"; diff.print(); std::cout << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Polynomial2 {\n    double a, b, c; // ax^2 + bx + c\npublic:\n    Polynomial2(double a_coef = 0, double b_coef = 0, double c_coef = 0) \n        : a(a_coef), b(b_coef), c(c_coef) {}\n    double evaluate(double x) const {\n        return a*x*x + b*x + c;\n    }\n    Polynomial2 derivative() const {\n        return Polynomial2(0, 2*a, b); // производная: 2ax + b\n    }\n    void print() const {\n        cout << a << \"x^2 + \" << b << \"x + \" << c << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Polynomial2 poly(2, -3, 1); // 2x^2 - 3x + 1\n    cout << \"Polynomial: \"; poly.print();\n    cout << \"Value at x=2: \" << poly.evaluate(2) << endl;\n    Polynomial2 deriv = poly.derivative();\n    cout << \"Derivative: \"; deriv.print();\n    cout << \"Derivative value at x=2: \" << deriv.evaluate(2) << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    int* arr = new int[5]();\n    cout << \"Массив нулей: \";\n    for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {\n        cout << arr[i] << \" \";\n    }\n    cout << endl;\n    delete[] arr;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <stdexcept>\n#include <limits>\n\nint safe_factorial(int n) {\n    if (n < 0) {\n        throw std::invalid_argument(\"Factorial is not defined for negative numbers\");\n    }\n    if (n > 12) {  // 13! превышает максимальное значение для int\n        throw std::overflow_error(\"Factorial value would cause integer overflow\");\n    }\n    \n    int result = 1;\n    for (int i = 2; i <= n; i++) {\n        if (result > std::numeric_limits<int>::max() / i) {\n            throw std::overflow_error(\"Integer overflow during factorial calculation\");\n        }\n        result *= i;\n    }\n    return result;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    try {\n        std::cout << \"Factorial of 5: \" << safe_factorial(5) << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Factorial of 0: \" << safe_factorial(0) << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Factorial of -3: \" << safe_factorial(-3) << std::endl;\n    } catch (const std::invalid_argument& e) {\n        std::cout << \"Invalid argument: \" << e.what() << std::endl;\n    } catch (const std::overflow_error& e) {\n        std::cout << \"Overflow error: \" << e.what() << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    try {\n        std::cout << \"Factorial of 15: \" << safe_factorial(15) << std::endl;\n    } catch (const std::overflow_error& e) {\n        std::cout << \"Overflow error: \" << e.what() << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <unistd.h>\n#include <iostream>\n#include <cstring>\nusing namespace std;\nint main() {\n    int fd[2];\n    if(pipe(fd) == -1) {\n        perror(\"pipe\");\n        return 1;\n    }\n    const char* msg = \"Hello through pipe!\";\n    write(fd[1], msg, strlen(msg));\n    char buffer[100];\n    read(fd[0], buffer, sizeof(buffer));\n    cout << \"Received: \" << buffer << endl;\n    close(fd[0]);\n    close(fd[1]);\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <memory>\n#include <string>\n#include <vector>\n\n// Предварительные объявления\nclass CircleShape;\nclass SquareShape;\nclass CompositeShape;\n\nclass DrawingAPI {\npublic:\n    virtual ~DrawingAPI() = default;\n    virtual void drawCircle(double x, double y, double radius) = 0;\n    virtual void drawSquare(double x, double y, double side) = 0;\n    virtual void drawText(double x, double y, const std::string& text) = 0;\n    virtual std::string getName() const = 0;\n};\n\nclass OpenGLAPI : public DrawingAPI {\npublic:\n    void drawCircle(double x, double y, double radius) override {\n        std::cout << \"[OpenGL] Drawing circle at (\" << x << \", \" << y \n                  << \") with radius \" << radius << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    void drawSquare(double x, double y, double side) override {\n        std::cout << \"[OpenGL] Drawing square at (\" << x << \", \" << y \n                  << \") with side \" << side << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    void drawText(double x, double y, const std::string& text) override {\n        std::cout << \"[OpenGL] Drawing text '\" << text << \"' at (\" \n                  << x << \", \" << y << \")\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    std::string getName() const override { return \"OpenGL\"; }\n};\n\nclass DirectXAPI : public DrawingAPI {\npublic:\n    void drawCircle(double x, double y, double radius) override {\n        std::cout << \"[DirectX] Rendering circle at (\" << x << \", \" << y \n                  << \") with radius \" << radius << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    void drawSquare(double x, double y, double side) override {\n        std::cout << \"[DirectX] Rendering square at (\" << x << \", \" << y \n                  << \") with side \" << side << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    void drawText(double x, double y, const std::string& text) override {\n        std::cout << \"[DirectX] Rendering text '\" << text << \"' at (\" \n                  << x << \", \" << y << \")\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    std::string getName() const override { return \"DirectX\"; }\n};\n\nclass Shape {\nprotected:\n    DrawingAPI* drawingAPI;\n    \npublic:\n    Shape(DrawingAPI* api) : drawingAPI(api) {}\n    virtual ~Shape() = default;\n    \n    virtual void draw() = 0;\n    virtual double area() const = 0;\n    virtual void scale(double factor) = 0;\n    virtual std::string getName() const = 0;\n    \n    virtual void collideWith(Shape* other) = 0;\n    virtual void handleCollisionWith(CircleShape* circle) = 0;\n    virtual void handleCollisionWith(SquareShape* square) = 0;\n    virtual void handleCollisionWith(CompositeShape* composite) = 0;\n};\n\nclass CircleShape : virtual public Shape {\n    double x, y, radius;\n    \npublic:\n    CircleShape(DrawingAPI* api, double x, double y, double r) \n        : Shape(api), x(x), y(y), radius(r) {}\n    \n    void draw() override {\n        drawingAPI->drawCircle(x, y, radius);\n    }\n    \n    double area() const override {\n        return 3.14159 * radius * radius;\n    }\n    \n    void scale(double factor) override {\n        radius *= factor;\n        std::cout << \"[Circle] Scaled by \" << factor << \", new radius: \" << radius << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    std::string getName() const override {\n        return \"Circle\";\n    }\n    \n    void collideWith(Shape* other) override {\n        std::cout << \"[Circle] Collision detection with \" << other->getName() << std::endl;\n        other->handleCollisionWith(this);\n    }\n    \n    void handleCollisionWith(CircleShape* circle) override {\n        std::cout << \"  Circle-Circle collision handling\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    void handleCollisionWith(SquareShape* square) override {\n        std::cout << \"  Circle-Square collision handling\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    void handleCollisionWith(CompositeShape* composite) override {\n        std::cout << \"  Circle-Composite collision handling\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    double getRadius() const { return radius; }\n};\n\nclass SquareShape : virtual public Shape {\n    double x, y, side;\n    \npublic:\n    SquareShape(DrawingAPI* api, double x, double y, double s) \n        : Shape(api), x(x), y(y), side(s) {}\n    \n    void draw() override {\n        drawingAPI->drawSquare(x, y, side);\n    }\n    \n    double area() const override {\n        return side * side;\n    }\n    \n    void scale(double factor) override {\n        side *= factor;\n        std::cout << \"[Square] Scaled by \" << factor << \", new side: \" << side << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    std::string getName() const override {\n        return \"Square\";\n    }\n    \n    void collideWith(Shape* other) override {\n        std::cout << \"[Square] Collision detection with \" << other->getName() << std::endl;\n        other->handleCollisionWith(this);\n    }\n    \n    void handleCollisionWith(CircleShape* circle) override {\n        std::cout << \"  Square-Circle collision handling\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    void handleCollisionWith(SquareShape* square) override {\n        std::cout << \"  Square-Square collision handling\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    void handleCollisionWith(CompositeShape* composite) override {\n        std::cout << \"  Square-Composite collision handling\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    double getSide() const { return side; }\n};\n\nclass CompositeShape : public CircleShape, public SquareShape {\n    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<Shape>> children;\n    \npublic:\n    CompositeShape(DrawingAPI* api, double x, double y, double r, double s)\n        : Shape(api), \n          CircleShape(api, x, y, r), \n          SquareShape(api, x + r + 10, y, s) {}\n    \n    void draw() override {\n        std::cout << \"[Composite] Drawing both shapes:\" << std::endl;\n        CircleShape::draw();\n        SquareShape::draw();\n    }\n    \n    double area() const override {\n        return CircleShape::area() + SquareShape::area();\n    }\n    \n    void scale(double factor) override {\n        std::cout << \"[Composite] Scaling both shapes by \" << factor << \":\" << std::endl;\n        CircleShape::scale(factor);\n        SquareShape::scale(factor);\n    }\n    \n    std::string getName() const override {\n        return \"Composite (Circle + Square)\";\n    }\n    \n    void collideWith(Shape* other) override {\n        std::cout << \"[Composite] Collision detection with \" << other->getName() << std::endl;\n        other->handleCollisionWith(this);\n    }\n    \n    void handleCollisionWith(CircleShape* circle) override {\n        std::cout << \"  Composite-Circle collision handling\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    void handleCollisionWith(SquareShape* square) override {\n        std::cout << \"  Composite-Square collision handling\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    void handleCollisionWith(CompositeShape* composite) override {\n        std::cout << \"  Composite-Composite collision handling\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    void addChild(std::unique_ptr<Shape> shape) {\n        children.push_back(std::move(shape));\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    std::cout << \"=== Bridge Pattern with Double Dispatch ===\" << std::endl << std::endl;\n    \n    OpenGLAPI opengl;\n    DirectXAPI directx;\n    \n    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<Shape>> shapes;\n    shapes.push_back(std::make_unique<CircleShape>(&opengl, 10, 20, 5));\n    shapes.push_back(std::make_unique<SquareShape>(&directx, 30, 40, 8));\n    shapes.push_back(std::make_unique<CompositeShape>(&opengl, 50, 60, 6, 4));\n    \n    std::cout << \"=== Drawing shapes ===\" << std::endl;\n    for (auto& shape : shapes) {\n        shape->draw();\n        std::cout << \"  Area: \" << shape->area() << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n=== Scaling shapes ===\" << std::endl;\n    for (auto& shape : shapes) {\n        shape->scale(1.5);\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n=== Double dispatch collision detection ===\" << std::endl;\n    for (std::size_t i = 0; i < shapes.size(); ++i) {\n        for (std::size_t j = i + 1; j < shapes.size(); ++j) {\n            std::cout << \"\\nCollision between \" << shapes[i]->getName() \n                      << \" and \" << shapes[j]->getName() << \":\" << std::endl;\n            shapes[i]->collideWith(shapes[j].get());\n        }\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n=== Testing all collision combinations ===\" << std::endl;\n    CircleShape circle(&opengl, 0, 0, 5);\n    SquareShape square(&directx, 10, 10, 8);\n    CompositeShape composite(&opengl, 20, 20, 6, 4);\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n1. Circle with Square:\" << std::endl;\n    circle.collideWith(&square);\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n2. Square with Circle:\" << std::endl;\n    square.collideWith(&circle);\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n3. Circle with Composite:\" << std::endl;\n    circle.collideWith(&composite);\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n4. Square with Composite:\" << std::endl;\n    square.collideWith(&composite);\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n5. Composite with Circle:\" << std::endl;\n    composite.collideWith(&circle);\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\n6. Composite with Square:\" << std::endl;\n    composite.collideWith(&square);\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <climits>\nusing namespace std;\n\nstruct Node {\n    int data;\n    Node* left;\n    Node* right;\n    Node(int val) : data(val), left(nullptr), right(nullptr) {}\n};\n\nbool isBSTUtil(Node* root, int min, int max) {\n    if (root == nullptr) {\n        return true;\n    }\n    if (root->data <= min || root->data >= max) {\n        return false;\n    }\n    return isBSTUtil(root->left, min, root->data) && isBSTUtil(root->right, root->data, max);\n}\n\nbool isBST(Node* root) {\n    return isBSTUtil(root, INT_MIN, INT_MAX);\n}\n\nint main() {\n    Node* root1 = new Node(4);\n    root1->left = new Node(2);\n    root1->right = new Node(5);\n    root1->left->left = new Node(1);\n    root1->left->right = new Node(3);\n    cout << \"Дерево 1 - BST: \" << (isBST(root1) ? \"Да\" : \"Нет\") << endl;\n    Node* root2 = new Node(3);\n    root2->left = new Node(2);\n    root2->right = new Node(5);\n    root2->left->left = new Node(1);\n    root2->left->right = new Node(4);\n    cout << \"Дерево 2 - BST: \" << (isBST(root2) ? \"Да\" : \"Нет\") << endl;\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <memory>\n#include <unordered_map>\n#include <functional>\n#include <string>\n\nclass Strategy {\npublic:\n    virtual void execute(int a, int b) = 0;\n    virtual ~Strategy() = default;\n};\n\nclass AddStrategy : public Strategy {\npublic:\n    void execute(int a, int b) override { std::cout << a << \" + \" << b << \" = \" << (a + b) << std::endl; }\n};\n\nclass SubtractStrategy : public Strategy {\npublic:\n    void execute(int a, int b) override { std::cout << a << \" - \" << b << \" = \" << (a - b) << std::endl; }\n};\n\nclass StrategyRegistry {\n    std::unordered_map<std::string, std::unique_ptr<Strategy>> strategies;\npublic:\n    StrategyRegistry() {\n        registerStrategy(\"add\", std::make_unique<AddStrategy>());\n        registerStrategy(\"sub\", std::make_unique<SubtractStrategy>());\n    }\n    \n    void registerStrategy(const std::string& name, std::unique_ptr<Strategy> strategy) {\n        strategies[name] = std::move(strategy);\n    }\n    \n    Strategy* getStrategy(const std::string& name) {\n        auto it = strategies.find(name);\n        if (it != strategies.end()) return it->second.get();\n        return nullptr;\n    }\n};\n\nclass Context {\n    StrategyRegistry& registry;\n    Strategy* currentStrategy;\npublic:\n    Context(StrategyRegistry& reg) : registry(reg), currentStrategy(nullptr) {}\n    \n    void setStrategy(const std::string& name) {\n        currentStrategy = registry.getStrategy(name);\n    }\n    \n    void execute(int a, int b) {\n        if (currentStrategy) currentStrategy->execute(a, b);\n        else std::cout << \"No strategy set\" << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    StrategyRegistry registry;\n    Context context(registry);\n    \n    context.setStrategy(\"add\");\n    context.execute(10, 5);\n    \n    context.setStrategy(\"sub\");\n    context.execute(10, 5);\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n\nvoid findMin(int a, int b, int& minValue) {\n    if (a < b) {\n        minValue = a;\n    } else {\n        minValue = b;\n    }\n}\n\nint main() {\n    int x = 7, y = 3;\n    int minResult;\n    \n    findMin(x, y, minResult);\n    std::cout << \"Минимум из \" << x << \" и \" << y << \" = \" << minResult << std::endl;\n    \n    findMin(10, 20, minResult);\n    std::cout << \"Минимум из 10 и 20 = \" << minResult << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nclass TimePeriod {\nprivate:\n    int hours;\n    int minutes;\n    int seconds;\n    \n    void normalize() {\n        if (seconds >= 60) {\n            minutes += seconds / 60;\n            seconds %= 60;\n        }\n        if (minutes >= 60) {\n            hours += minutes / 60;\n            minutes %= 60;\n        }\n    }\n    \npublic:\n    TimePeriod(int h = 0, int m = 0, int s = 0) : hours(h), minutes(m), seconds(s) {\n        if (hours < 0) hours = 0;\n        if (minutes < 0) minutes = 0;\n        if (seconds < 0) seconds = 0;\n        normalize();\n    }\n    \n    TimePeriod add(const TimePeriod& other) const {\n        TimePeriod result(hours + other.hours, \n                         minutes + other.minutes, \n                         seconds + other.seconds);\n        result.normalize();\n        return result;\n    }\n    \n    int totalSeconds() const {\n        return hours * 3600 + minutes * 60 + seconds;\n    }\n    \n    void print() const {\n        std::cout << hours << \" ч \" << minutes << \" мин \" << seconds << \" сек\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    void printTotalSeconds() const {\n        std::cout << \"Всего секунд: \" << totalSeconds() << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    bool setPeriod(int h, int m, int s) {\n        if (h >= 0 && m >= 0 && s >= 0) {\n            hours = h;\n            minutes = m;\n            seconds = s;\n            normalize();\n            return true;\n        }\n        std::cout << \"Значения не могут быть отрицательными\" << std::endl;\n        return false;\n    }\n    \n    int getHours() const { return hours; }\n    int getMinutes() const { return minutes; }\n    int getSeconds() const { return seconds; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    TimePeriod t1(1, 70, 80); // будет нормализовано\n    std::cout << \"Период 1: \"; t1.print();\n    \n    TimePeriod t2(0, 50, 45);\n    std::cout << \"Период 2: \"; t2.print();\n    \n    TimePeriod sum = t1.add(t2);\n    std::cout << \"Сумма периодов: \"; sum.print();\n    \n    t1.printTotalSeconds();\n    t2.printTotalSeconds();\n    sum.printTotalSeconds();\n    \n    TimePeriod t3;\n    t3.setPeriod(2, 30, 15);\n    std::cout << \"Период 3: \"; t3.print();\n    \n    // Некорректная установка\n    t3.setPeriod(-1, 10, 10);\n    return 0;\n}
