#include <iostream>\n#include <stdexcept>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    auto safe_divide = [](int a, int b) {\n        if (b == 0) throw runtime_error(\"Division by zero\");\n        return a / b;\n    };\n    try {\n        cout << safe_divide(10, 2) << endl;\n        cout << safe_divide(5, 0) << endl;\n    } catch (const exception& e) {\n        cout << \"Error: \" << e.what() << endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\n\nclass Complex {\nprivate:\n    double real;\n    double imag;\n    static int objectCount;\n    \npublic:\n    Complex(double r = 0.0, double i = 0.0) : real(r), imag(i) {\n        objectCount++;\n    }\n    \n    Complex(const Complex& other) : real(other.real), imag(other.imag) {\n        objectCount++;\n    }\n    \n    ~Complex() {\n        objectCount--;\n    }\n    \n    friend Complex operator+(const Complex& a, const Complex& b);\n    friend std::ostream& operator<<(std::ostream& os, const Complex& c);\n    \n    static int getObjectCount() {\n        return objectCount;\n    }\n    \n    double magnitude() const {\n        return std::sqrt(real * real + imag * imag);\n    }\n};\n\nint Complex::objectCount = 0;\n\nComplex operator+(const Complex& a, const Complex& b) {\n    return Complex(a.real + b.real, a.imag + b.imag);\n}\n\nstd::ostream& operator<<(std::ostream& os, const Complex& c) {\n    os << c.real;\n    if(c.imag >= 0) {\n        os << \" + \" << c.imag << \"i\";\n    } else {\n        os << \" - \" << -c.imag << \"i\";\n    }\n    return os;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::cout << \"Initial object count: \" << Complex::getObjectCount() << std::endl;\n    \n    Complex c1(3.0, 4.0);\n    Complex c2(1.0, -2.0);\n    \n    std::cout << \"c1 = \" << c1 << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"c2 = \" << c2 << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Magnitude of c1: \" << c1.magnitude() << std::endl;\n    \n    std::cout << \"Current object count: \" << Complex::getObjectCount() << std::endl;\n    \n    Complex c3 = c1 + c2;\n    std::cout << \"c1 + c2 = \" << c3 << std::endl;\n    \n    {\n        Complex c4(5.0, 6.0);\n        std::cout << \"\\nInside block:\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"c4 = \" << c4 << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Object count: \" << Complex::getObjectCount() << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nAfter block:\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Object count: \" << Complex::getObjectCount() << std::endl;\n    \n    Complex c5 = c1;\n    std::cout << \"\\nAfter copy:\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"c5 (copy of c1) = \" << c5 << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Object count: \" << Complex::getObjectCount() << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <thread>\n#include <chrono>\n#include <string>\n\nclass ThreadLocalCounter {\nprivate:\n    static thread_local int threadSpecificCounter;\n    static int globalCounter;\n    \n    std::string threadName;\n    \npublic:\n    ThreadLocalCounter(const std::string& name) : threadName(name) {}\n    \n    void increment() {\n        threadSpecificCounter++;\n        globalCounter++;\n        \n        std::cout << threadName << \": threadLocal = \" << threadSpecificCounter \n                  << \", global = \" << globalCounter << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    static int getThreadLocal() {\n        return threadSpecificCounter;\n    }\n    \n    static int getGlobal() {\n        return globalCounter;\n    }\n    \n    static void resetCounters() {\n        threadSpecificCounter = 0;\n        globalCounter = 0;\n    }\n};\n\nthread_local int ThreadLocalCounter::threadSpecificCounter = 0;\nint ThreadLocalCounter::globalCounter = 0;\n\nvoid threadFunction(const std::string& threadName) {\n    ThreadLocalCounter counter(threadName);\n    \n    for(int i = 0; i < 3; ++i) {\n        counter.increment();\n        std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(100));\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << threadName << \" final - threadLocal: \" \n              << ThreadLocalCounter::getThreadLocal() \n              << \", global: \" << ThreadLocalCounter::getGlobal() << std::endl;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::cout << \"Thread-Local Static Members Demo\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Starting with counters reset\" << std::endl;\n    \n    ThreadLocalCounter::resetCounters();\n    \n    std::thread t1(threadFunction, \"Thread-1\");\n    std::thread t2(threadFunction, \"Thread-2\");\n    std::thread t3(threadFunction, \"Thread-3\");\n    \n    ThreadLocalCounter mainCounter(\"MainThread\");\n    mainCounter.increment();\n    mainCounter.increment();\n    \n    t1.join();\n    t2.join();\n    t3.join();\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nFinal global counter: \" << ThreadLocalCounter::getGlobal() << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Main thread local counter: \" << ThreadLocalCounter::getThreadLocal() << std::endl;\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nAccessing from main thread after joins:\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Main thread local: \" << ThreadLocalCounter::getThreadLocal() << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Weight {\n    double kg;\npublic:\n    Weight(double k = 0) : kg(k) {}\n    Weight operator+(const Weight& other) const {\n        return Weight(kg + other.kg);\n    }\n    void print() const {\n        cout << kg << \" kg\" << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Weight w1(5.5), w2(3.2);\n    Weight total = w1 + w2;\n    total.print();\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nclass Shape {\nprotected:\n    double x, y;\npublic:\n    Shape(double xVal, double yVal) : x(xVal), y(yVal) {}\n    virtual double area() const = 0;\n    virtual double perimeter() const = 0;\n    virtual void display() const {\n        std::cout << \"Shape at (\" << x << \", \" << y << \")\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    virtual ~Shape() = default;\n};\n\nclass Circle : public Shape {\n    double radius;\npublic:\n    Circle(double xVal, double yVal, double r) : Shape(xVal, yVal), radius(r) {}\n    double area() const override {\n        return 3.14159 * radius * radius;\n    }\n    double perimeter() const override {\n        return 2 * 3.14159 * radius;\n    }\n    void display() const override {\n        std::cout << \"Circle at (\" << x << \", \" << y << \") with radius \" << radius << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass Rectangle : public Shape {\n    double width, height;\npublic:\n    Rectangle(double xVal, double yVal, double w, double h) : Shape(xVal, yVal), width(w), height(h) {}\n    double area() const override {\n        return width * height;\n    }\n    double perimeter() const override {\n        return 2 * (width + height);\n    }\n    void display() const override {\n        std::cout << \"Rectangle at (\" << x << \", \" << y << \") \" << width << \"x\" << height << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Circle circle(0, 0, 5);\n    Rectangle rect(2, 3, 4, 6);\n    Shape* shapes[] = {&circle, &rect};\n    for(Shape* shape : shapes) {\n        shape->display();\n        std::cout << \"Area: \" << shape->area() << \", Perimeter: \" << shape->perimeter() << std::endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\nusing namespace std;\n\nbool isSubstring(const string& main, const string& sub) {\n    if(sub.empty()) return true;\n    if(main.length() < sub.length()) return false;\n    \n    for(size_t i = 0; i <= main.length() - sub.length(); i++) {\n        bool found = true;\n        for(size_t j = 0; j < sub.length(); j++) {\n            if(main[i + j] != sub[j]) {\n                found = false;\n                break;\n            }\n        }\n        if(found) return true;\n    }\n    return false;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    string main_str = \"Hello World\";\n    string sub1 = \"World\";\n    string sub2 = \"test\";\n    \n    cout << sub1 << (isSubstring(main_str, sub1) ? \" является\" : \" не является\") << \" подстрокой\" << endl;\n    cout << sub2 << (isSubstring(main_str, sub2) ? \" является\" : \" не является\") << \" подстрокой\" << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <vector>\n#include <algorithm>\nusing namespace std;\n\nvector<string> findAllPalindromes(const string& s) {\n    vector<string> palindromes;\n    int n = s.length();\n    \n    // Обрабатываем нечетные палиндромы\n    for(int center = 0; center < n; center++) {\n        int radius = 0;\n        while(center - radius >= 0 && center + radius < n && \n              s[center - radius] == s[center + radius]) {\n            if(radius > 0) {\n                palindromes.push_back(s.substr(center - radius, 2 * radius + 1));\n            }\n            radius++;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    // Обрабатываем четные палиндромы\n    for(int center = 0; center < n - 1; center++) {\n        int radius = 0;\n        while(center - radius >= 0 && center + 1 + radius < n && \n              s[center - radius] == s[center + 1 + radius]) {\n            palindromes.push_back(s.substr(center - radius, 2 * (radius + 1)));\n            radius++;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return palindromes;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    string str = \"abba\";\n    vector<string> palindromes = findAllPalindromes(str);\n    \n    cout << \"Палиндромные подстроки в '\" << str << \"':\" << endl;\n    for(const string& p : palindromes) {\n        cout << p << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <sys/ptrace.h>\n#include <sys/wait.h>\n#include <sys/mman.h>\n#include <sys/user.h>\n#include <unistd.h>\n#include <iostream>\n#include <cstring>\n#include <fcntl.h>\n#include <cstdio>\nclass LivePatcher {\n    pid_t target_pid;\n    int memfd;\n    void* patch_code;\n    size_t patch_size;\n    long find_free_memory(pid_t pid, size_t size) {\n        char maps_path[256];\n        std::sprintf(maps_path, \"/proc/%d/maps\", pid);\n        std::FILE* maps = std::fopen(maps_path, \"r\");\n        if(!maps) return 0;\n        long last_end = 0x40000000;\n        char line[256];\n        while(std::fgets(line, sizeof(line), maps)) {\n            long start, end;\n            std::sscanf(line, \"%lx-%lx\", &start, &end);\n            if(start - last_end > size) {\n                std::fclose(maps);\n                return last_end;\n            }\n            last_end = end;\n        }\n        std::fclose(maps);\n        return last_end;\n    }\npublic:\n    LivePatcher(pid_t pid) : target_pid(pid) {\n        memfd = memfd_create(\"patch\", 0);\n        const unsigned char code[] = {\n            0x48, 0xC7, 0xC0, 0x2A, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, // mov rax, 42\n            0xC3                                        // ret\n        };\n        patch_size = sizeof(code);\n        write(memfd, code, patch_size);\n        lseek(memfd, 0, SEEK_SET);\n        patch_code = mmap(nullptr, patch_size, PROT_READ | PROT_WRITE | PROT_EXEC,\n                         MAP_PRIVATE, memfd, 0);\n    }\n    ~LivePatcher() {\n        if(patch_code) munmap(patch_code, patch_size);\n        close(memfd);\n    }\n    bool apply_patch() {\n        ptrace(PTRACE_ATTACH, target_pid, nullptr, nullptr);\n        waitpid(target_pid, nullptr, 0);\n        long inject_addr = find_free_memory(target_pid, patch_size);\n        if(!inject_addr) {\n            ptrace(PTRACE_DETACH, target_pid, nullptr, nullptr);\n            return false;\n        }\n        for(size_t i = 0; i < patch_size; i += sizeof(long)) {\n            long data = 0;\n            std::memcpy(&data, (char*)patch_code + i, sizeof(long));\n            ptrace(PTRACE_POKEDATA, target_pid, inject_addr + i, data);\n        }\n        struct user_regs_struct regs;\n        ptrace(PTRACE_GETREGS, target_pid, nullptr, &regs);\n        long original_rip = regs.rip;\n        regs.rip = inject_addr;\n        ptrace(PTRACE_SETREGS, target_pid, nullptr, &regs);\n        ptrace(PTRACE_CONT, target_pid, nullptr, nullptr);\n        usleep(1000);\n        ptrace(PTRACE_GETREGS, target_pid, nullptr, &regs);\n        std::cout << \"Process returned value: \" << regs.rax << std::endl;\n        regs.rip = original_rip;\n        ptrace(PTRACE_SETREGS, target_pid, nullptr, &regs);\n        ptrace(PTRACE_DETACH, target_pid, nullptr, nullptr);\n        return true;\n    }\n};\nint main() {\n    pid_t pid = fork();\n    if(pid == 0) {\n        while(true) {\n            sleep(1);\n        }\n    } else {\n        sleep(1);\n        LivePatcher patcher(pid);\n        std::cout << \"Applying live patch...\" << std::endl;\n        if(patcher.apply_patch()) {\n            std::cout << \"Patch applied successfully\" << std::endl;\n        }\n        kill(pid, SIGTERM);\n        wait(nullptr);\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <iomanip>\n#include <cmath>\n#include <limits>\n\nint main() {\n    int mainChoice, subChoice;\n    double value, result;\n    bool continueProgram = true;\n    \n    std::cout << \"=== КОНВЕРТЕР ЕДИНИЦ ИЗМЕРЕНИЯ ===\" << std::endl;\n    \n    while (continueProgram) {\n        std::cout << \"\\n=== ОСНОВНОЕ МЕНЮ ===\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"1. Конвертация длины\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"2. Конвертация массы\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"3. Конвертация температуры\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"4. Конвертация объема\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"5. Выход\" << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Выберите категорию (1-5): \";\n        \n        std::cin >> mainChoice;\n        \n        if (std::cin.fail()) {\n            std::cin.clear();\n            std::cin.ignore(std::numeric_limits<std::streamsize>::max(), '\\n');\n            std::cout << \"Ошибка ввода. Пожалуйста, введите число от 1 до 5.\" << std::endl;\n            continue;\n        }\n        \n        if (mainChoice == 5) {\n            std::cout << \"Программа завершена. До свидания!\" << std::endl;\n            break;\n        }\n        \n        if (mainChoice < 1 || mainChoice > 4) {\n            std::cout << \"Неверный выбор. Пожалуйста, выберите от 1 до 5.\" << std::endl;\n            continue;\n        }\n        \n        // Ввод значения для конвертации\n        std::cout << \"Введите значение для конвертации: \";\n        std::cin >> value;\n        \n        if (std::cin.fail()) {\n            std::cin.clear();\n            std::cin.ignore(std::numeric_limits<std::streamsize>::max(), '\\n');\n            std::cout << \"Ошибка ввода. Пожалуйста, введите числовое значение.\" << std::endl;\n            continue;\n        }\n        \n        // Вложенные меню для каждой категории\n        switch (mainChoice) {\n            case 1: { // Длина\n                std::cout << \"\\n=== КОНВЕРТАЦИЯ ДЛИНЫ ===\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"1. Метры -> Километры\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"2. Километры -> Метры\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"3. Футы -> Метры\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"4. Метры -> Футы\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"5. Дюймы -> Сантиметры\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"6. Сантиметры -> Дюймы\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"Выберите тип конвертации (1-6): \";\n                std::cin >> subChoice;\n                \n                if (std::cin.fail()) {\n                    std::cin.clear();\n                    std::cin.ignore(std::numeric_limits<std::streamsize>::max(), '\\n');\n                    std::cout << \"Ошибка ввода. Пожалуйста, введите число от 1 до 6.\" << std::endl;\n                    break;\n                }\n                \n                switch (subChoice) {\n                    case 1:\n                        result = value / 1000.0;\n                        std::cout << value << \" метров = \" << result << \" километров\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 2:\n                        result = value * 1000.0;\n                        std::cout << value << \" километров = \" << result << \" метров\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 3:\n                        result = value * 0.3048;\n                        std::cout << value << \" футов = \" << result << \" метров\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 4:\n                        result = value / 0.3048;\n                        std::cout << value << \" метров = \" << result << \" футов\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 5:\n                        result = value * 2.54;\n                        std::cout << value << \" дюймов = \" << result << \" сантиметров\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 6:\n                        result = value / 2.54;\n                        std::cout << value << \" сантиметров = \" << result << \" дюймов\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    default:\n                        std::cout << \"Неверный выбор конвертации длины.\" << std::endl;\n                }\n                break;\n            }\n            \n            case 2: { // Масса\n                std::cout << \"\\n=== КОНВЕРТАЦИЯ МАССЫ ===\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"1. Тонны -> Килограммы\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"6. Килограммы -> Тонны\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"Выберите тип конвертации (1-6): \";\n                std::cin >> subChoice;\n                \n                if (std::cin.fail()) {\n                    std::cin.clear();\n                    std::cin.ignore(std::numeric_limits<std::streamsize>::max(), '\\n');\n                    std::cout << \"Ошибка ввода. Пожалуйста, введите число от 1 до 6.\" << std::endl;\n                    break;\n                }\n                \n                switch (subChoice) {\n                    case 1:\n                        result = value * 2.20462;\n                        std::cout << value << \" кг = \" << result << \" фунтов\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 2:\n                        result = value / 2.20462;\n                        std::cout << value << \" фунтов = \" << result << \" кг\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 3:\n                        result = value / 1000.0;\n                        std::cout << value << \" г = \" << result << \" кг\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 4:\n                        result = value * 1000.0;\n                        std::cout << value << \" кг = \" << result << \" г\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 5:\n                        result = value * 1000.0;\n                        std::cout << value << \" т = \" << result << \" кг\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 6:\n                        result = value / 1000.0;\n                        std::cout << value << \" кг = \" << result << \" т\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    default:\n                        std::cout << \"Неверный выбор конвертации массы.\" << std::endl;\n                }\n                break;\n            }\n            \n            case 3: { // Температура\n                std::cout << \"\\n=== КОНВЕРТАЦИЯ ТЕМПЕРАТУРЫ ===\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"1. Пожалуйста, введите число от 1 до 6.\" << std::endl;\n                    break;\n                }\n                \n                switch (subChoice) {\n                    case 1:\n                        result = (value * 9.0/5.0) + 32.0;\n                        std::cout << value << \" C = \" << result << \" F\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 2:\n                        result = (value - 32.0) * 5.0/9.0;\n                        std::cout << value << \" F = \" << result << \" C\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 3:\n                        result = value + 273.15;\n                        std::cout << value << \" C = \" << result << \" K\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 4:\n                        result = value - 273.15;\n                        std::cout << value << \" K = \" << result << \" C\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 5:\n                        result = (value - 32.0) * 5.0/9.0 + 273.15;\n                        std::cout << value << \" F = \" << result << \" K\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 6:\n                        result = (value - 273.15) * 9.0/5.0 + 32.0;\n                        std::cout << value << \" K = \" << result << \" F\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    default:\n                        std::cout << \"Неверный выбор конвертации температуры.\" << std::endl;\n                }\n                break;\n            }\n            \n            case 4: { // Объем\n                std::cout << \"\\n=== КОНВЕРТАЦИЯ ОБЪЕМА ===\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"1. Литр -> Галлон (US)\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"2. Галлон (US) -> Литр\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"3. Кубические метры -> Литр\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"4. Литр -> Кубические метры\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"5. Миллилитр -> Литр\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"6. Литр -> Миллилитр\" << std::endl;\n                std::cout << \"Выберите тип конвертации (1-6): \";\n                std::cin >> subChoice;\n                \n                if (std::cin.fail()) {\n                    std::cin.clear();\n                    std::cin.ignore(std::numeric_limits<std::streamsize>::max(), '\\n');\n                    std::cout << \"Ошибка ввода. Пожалуйста, введите число от 1 до 6.\" << std::endl;\n                    break;\n                }\n                \n                switch (subChoice) {\n                    case 1:\n                        result = value * 0.264172;\n                        std::cout << value << \" л = \" << result << \" галлонов (US)\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 2:\n                        result = value / 0.264172;\n                        std::cout << value << \" галлонов (US) = \" << result << \" л\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 3:\n                        result = value * 1000.0;\n                        std::cout << value << \" куб. м = \" << result << \" л\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 4:\n                        result = value / 1000.0;\n                        std::cout << value << \" л = \" << result << \" куб. м\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 5:\n                        result = value / 1000.0;\n                        std::cout << value << \" мл = \" << result << \" л\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 6:\n                        result = value * 1000.0;\n                        std::cout << value << \" л = \" << result << \" мл\" << std::endl;\n                        break;\n                    default:\n                        std::cout << \"Неверный выбор конвертации объема.\" << std::endl;\n                }\n                break;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        // Предложение продолжить\n        char continueChoice;\n        std::cout << \"\\nХотите выполнить еще одну конвертацию? (y/n): \";\n        std::cin >> continueChoice;\n        \n        continueProgram = (continueChoice == 'y' || continueChoice == 'Y');\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Shape {\npublic:\n    virtual void draw() {\n        cout << \"Рисую фигуру\" << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass Circle : public Shape {\npublic:\n    void draw() override {\n        cout << \"Рисую круг\" << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Shape* shape = new Circle();\n    shape->draw();\n    delete shape;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <unordered_map>\n#include <list>\n#include <string>\n#include <algorithm>\n\nstruct CacheItem {\n    std::string key;\n    std::string value;\n    int frequency;\n    \n    CacheItem(std::string k, std::string v) : key(k), value(v), frequency(1) {}\n};\n\nclass LFUCache {\nprivate:\n    std::unordered_map<std::string, std::list<CacheItem>::iterator> cacheMap;\n    std::unordered_map<int, std::list<CacheItem>> frequencyMap;\n    int capacity;\n    int minFrequency;\n    \npublic:\n    LFUCache(int cap) : capacity(cap), minFrequency(0) {}\n    \n    std::string get(std::string key) {\n        if (cacheMap.find(key) == cacheMap.end()) {\n            return \"\"; // Кэш-промах\n        }\n        \n        // Находим элемент\n        auto it = cacheMap[key];\n        CacheItem item = *it;\n        \n        // Удаляем из текущего списка частоты\n        frequencyMap[item.frequency].erase(it);\n        \n        // Если список стал пустым, обновляем minFrequency\n        if (frequencyMap[item.frequency].empty() && item.frequency == minFrequency) {\n            minFrequency++;\n        }\n        \n        // Увеличиваем частоту\n        item.frequency++;\n        \n        // Добавляем в новый список частоты\n        frequencyMap[item.frequency].push_front(item);\n        cacheMap[key] = frequencyMap[item.frequency].begin();\n        \n        return item.value;\n    }\n    \n    void put(std::string key, std::string value) {\n        if (capacity <= 0) return;\n        \n        // Если ключ уже существует\n        if (cacheMap.find(key) != cacheMap.end()) {\n            // Обновляем значение через get\n            get(key); // Увеличит частоту\n            cacheMap[key]->value = value;\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        // Если кэш полон, удаляем наименее часто используемый\n        if (cacheMap.size() >= capacity) {\n            // Удаляем последний элемент из списка с minFrequency\n            auto& minFreqList = frequencyMap[minFrequency];\n            if (!minFreqList.empty()) {\n                CacheItem itemToRemove = minFreqList.back();\n                cacheMap.erase(itemToRemove.key);\n                minFreqList.pop_back();\n                std::cout << \"Удален из кэша: \" << itemToRemove.key << std::endl;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        // Создаем новый элемент с частотой 1\n        CacheItem newItem(key, value);\n        frequencyMap[1].push_front(newItem);\n        cacheMap[key] = frequencyMap[1].begin();\n        minFrequency = 1;\n        \n        std::cout << \"Добавлен в кэш: \" << key << \" -> \" << value << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    void printCache() {\n        std::cout << \"\\nТекущее состояние кэша:\" << std::endl;\n        for (const auto& freqPair : frequencyMap) {\n            if (!freqPair.second.empty()) {\n                std::cout << \"Частота \" << freqPair.first << \": \";\n                for (const auto& item : freqPair.second) {\n                    std::cout << \"[\" << item.key << \":\" << item.value << \", f=\" << item.frequency << \"] \";\n                }\n                std::cout << std::endl;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    LFUCache cache(3);\n    \n    std::cout << \"Тестирование LFU кэша (емкость=3):\" << std::endl;\n    \n    cache.put(\"A\", \"Данные A\");\n    cache.put(\"B\", \"Данные B\");\n    cache.put(\"C\", \"Данные C\");\n    \n    cache.printCache();\n    \n    // Доступ к элементам\n    std::cout << \"\\nДоступ к элементам:\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"get(A): \" << cache.get(\"A\") << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"get(A): \" << cache.get(\"A\") << std::endl; // Увеличит частоту A\n    std::cout << \"get(B): \" << cache.get(\"B\") << std::endl;\n    \n    cache.printCache();\n    \n    // Добавляем новый элемент, должен вытеснить наименее частый\n    cache.put(\"D\", \"Данные D\");\n    \n    cache.printCache();\n    \n    // Проверяем, что C был удален (наименее частый)\n    std::cout << \"\\nПроверка удаленного элемента:\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"get(C): \" << cache.get(\"C\") << std::endl;\n    \n    // Еще доступы\n    std::cout << \"get(D): \" << cache.get(\"D\") << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"get(D): \" << cache.get(\"D\") << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"get(D): \" << cache.get(\"D\") << std::endl;\n    \n    cache.printCache();\n    \n    // Добавляем еще один элемент\n    cache.put(\"E\", \"Данные E\");\n    \n    cache.printCache();\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    int a, b, c;\n    cout << \"Введите три числа: \";\n    cin >> a >> b >> c;\n    \n    if (b - a == c - b) {\n        cout << \"Арифметическая прогрессия\";\n    } else if (a != 0 && b != 0 && c != 0 && b*b == a*c) {\n        cout << \"Геометрическая прогрессия\";\n    } else {\n        cout << \"Не прогрессия\";\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <algorithm>\n#include <utility>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass DynamicArray {\n    int* data;\n    size_t size;\npublic:\n    DynamicArray(size_t n) : size(n), data(new int[n]) {\n        fill(data, data + size, 0);\n        cout << \"Constructor size=\" << size << endl;\n    }\n    \n    ~DynamicArray() {\n        delete[] data;\n        cout << \"Destructor size=\" << size << endl;\n    }\n    \n    DynamicArray(const DynamicArray& other) : size(other.size), data(new int[other.size]) {\n        copy(other.data, other.data + size, data);\n        cout << \"Copy constructor\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    DynamicArray(DynamicArray&& other) noexcept : data(other.data), size(other.size) {\n        other.data = nullptr;\n        other.size = 0;\n        cout << \"Move constructor\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    DynamicArray& operator=(DynamicArray&& other) noexcept {\n        if (this != &other) {\n            delete[] data;\n            data = other.data;\n            size = other.size;\n            other.data = nullptr;\n            other.size = 0;\n            cout << \"Move assignment\" << endl;\n        }\n        return *this;\n    }\n    \n    void set(size_t index, int value) {\n        if (index < size) data[index] = value;\n    }\n    \n    void print() const {\n        cout << \"[\";\n        for (size_t i = 0; i < min(size, size_t(5)); ++i) {\n            cout << data[i] << \" \";\n        }\n        if (size > 5) cout << \"...\";\n        cout << \"]\" << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    DynamicArray arr1(10);\n    arr1.set(0, 42);\n    \n    DynamicArray arr2 = move(arr1);\n    cout << \"arr2 after move:\";\n    arr2.print();\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <iomanip>\nusing namespace std;\nvoid copyWithProgress(const string& src, const string& dst) {\n    ifstream in(src, ios::binary | ios::ate);\n    ofstream out(dst, ios::binary);\n    if(!in || !out) {\n        cerr << \"Cannot open files\" << endl;\n        return;\n    }\n    streamsize total = in.tellg();\n    in.seekg(0, ios::beg);\n    const streamsize BUFFER_SIZE = 4096;\n    char buffer[BUFFER_SIZE];\n    streamsize copied = 0;\n    while(in.read(buffer, BUFFER_SIZE) || in.gcount()) {\n        streamsize count = in.gcount();\n        out.write(buffer, count);\n        copied += count;\n        int percent = static_cast<int>((copied * 100) / total);\n        cout << \"\\rProgress: \" << percent << \"%\" << flush;\n    }\n    cout << endl;\n}\nint main() {\n    copyWithProgress(\"source.bin\", \"destination.bin\");\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n\nint main() {\n    const char* str = \"Hello, Pointers!\";\n    const char* ptr = str;\n    int count = 0;\n    \n    while (*ptr != '\\0') {\n        count++;\n        ptr++; // Перемещаем указатель на следующий символ\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"Строка: \\\"\" << str << \"\\\"\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Длина строки (без учета нуль-терминатора): \" << count << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <unordered_map>\n#include <unordered_set>\n#include <vector>\n#include <functional>\n#include <algorithm>\n#include <cstdlib>\n#include <ctime>\nusing namespace std;\n\nbool areIsomorphic(const string& s1, const string& s2) {\n    if(s1.length() != s2.length()) return false;\n    \n    unordered_map<char, char> mapping;\n    unordered_set<char> used_chars;\n    \n    for(size_t i = 0; i < s1.length(); i++) {\n        char c1 = s1[i];\n        char c2 = s2[i];\n        \n        if(mapping.find(c1) != mapping.end()) {\n            if(mapping[c1] != c2) {\n                return false;\n            }\n        } else {\n            if(used_chars.find(c2) != used_chars.end()) {\n                return false;\n            }\n            \n            mapping[c1] = c2;\n            used_chars.insert(c2);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return true;\n}\n\nvector<vector<string>> findIsomorphicGroups(const vector<string>& strings) {\n    vector<vector<string>> groups;\n    vector<bool> assigned(strings.size(), false);\n    \n    for(size_t i = 0; i < strings.size(); i++) {\n        if(assigned[i]) continue;\n        \n        vector<string> group;\n        group.push_back(strings[i]);\n        assigned[i] = true;\n        \n        for(size_t j = i + 1; j < strings.size(); j++) {\n            if(!assigned[j] && areIsomorphic(strings[i], strings[j])) {\n                group.push_back(strings[j]);\n                assigned[j] = true;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        groups.push_back(group);\n    }\n    \n    return groups;\n}\n\nbool areCyclicallyIsomorphic(const string& s1, const string& s2) {\n    if(s1.length() != s2.length()) return false;\n    \n    string doubled = s1 + s1;\n    \n    for(size_t i = 0; i < s1.length(); i++) {\n        string shifted = doubled.substr(i, s1.length());\n        if(areIsomorphic(shifted, s2)) {\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return false;\n}\n\nvector<string> generateIsomorphicStrings(const string& s, \n                                        const unordered_map<char, vector<char>>& allowed_mappings) {\n    vector<string> result;\n    \n    function<void(size_t, string)> generate = [&](size_t pos, string current) {\n        if(pos == s.length()) {\n            result.push_back(current);\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        char c = s[pos];\n        auto it = allowed_mappings.find(c);\n        if(it != allowed_mappings.end()) {\n            for(char mapped_char : it->second) {\n                generate(pos + 1, current + mapped_char);\n            }\n        } else {\n            for(char mapped_char = 'a'; mapped_char <= 'z'; mapped_char++) {\n                generate(pos + 1, current + mapped_char);\n            }\n        }\n    };\n    \n    generate(0, \"\");\n    return result;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    srand(time(nullptr));\n    \n    cout << \"String Isomorphism Test:\\n\";\n    cout << \"========================\\n\";\n    \n    vector<pair<string, string>> test_cases = {\n        {\"egg\", \"add\"},\n        {\"foo\", \"bar\"},\n        {\"paper\", \"title\"},\n        {\"ab\", \"aa\"},\n        {\"abc\", \"def\"},\n        {\"\", \"\"},\n        {\"a\", \"b\"}\n    };\n    \n    cout << \"\\nBasic Isomorphism Tests:\\n\";\n    for(const auto& [s1, s2] : test_cases) {\n        bool isomorphic = areIsomorphic(s1, s2);\n        cout << \"\\\"\" << s1 << \"\\\" and \\\"\" << s2 << \"\\\": \" \n             << (isomorphic ? \"ISOMORPHIC\" : \"NOT ISOMORPHIC\") << endl;\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"\\n\\nIsomorphic Groups Test:\\n\";\n    vector<string> string_list = {\"egg\", \"add\", \"foo\", \"bar\", \"paper\", \"title\"};\n    \n    auto groups = findIsomorphicGroups(string_list);\n    cout << \"Found \" << groups.size() << \" isomorphic groups:\\n\";\n    \n    for(size_t i = 0; i < groups.size(); i++) {\n        cout << \"Group \" << (i + 1) << \": \";\n        for(const string& s : groups[i]) {\n            cout << s << \" \";\n        }\n        cout << endl;\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"\\n\\nIsomorphic String Generation:\\n\";\n    string base = \"abc\";\n    unordered_map<char, vector<char>> mappings = {\n        {'a', {'x', 'y', 'z'}},\n        {'b', {'p', 'q'}},\n        {'c', {'r', 's', 't'}}\n    };\n    \n    auto isomorphic_strings = generateIsomorphicStrings(base, mappings);\n    cout << \"Base string: \\\"\" << base << \"\\\"\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Generated \" << isomorphic_strings.size() << \" isomorphic strings:\\n\";\n    \n    int count = 0;\n    for(const string& s : isomorphic_strings) {\n        cout << s << \" \";\n        if(++count % 10 == 0) cout << endl;\n        if(count >= 20) break;\n    }\n    \n    if(isomorphic_strings.size() > 20) {\n        cout << \"\\n... and \" << isomorphic_strings.size() - 20 << \" more\";\n    }\n    cout << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <sstream>\n#include <unordered_map>\n#include <algorithm>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    string text = \"apple banana apple cherry banana apple date\";\n    istringstream iss(text);\n    string word;\n    unordered_map<string, int> wordCount;\n    \n    while(iss >> word) {\n        // Приводим к нижнему регистру для учета регистра\n        transform(word.begin(), word.end(), word.begin(), ::tolower);\n        wordCount[word]++;\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"Количество вхождений слов:\" << endl;\n    for(const auto& pair : wordCount) {\n        cout << pair.first << \": \" << pair.second << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <unistd.h>\n#include <fcntl.h>\n#include <sys/stat.h>\n#include <dirent.h>\n#include <cstring>\n#include <vector>\n#include <string>\n#include <stdexcept>\n\nclass RawFileDescriptor {\n    int fd = -1;\npublic:\n    RawFileDescriptor(const std::string& path, int flags, mode_t mode = 0644) {\n        fd = open(path.c_str(), flags, mode);\n        if(fd == -1) throw std::runtime_error(\"open() failed\");\n    }\n    \n    ~RawFileDescriptor() { \n        if(fd != -1) close(fd); \n    }\n    \n    ssize_t read(void* buf, std::size_t count) {\n        return ::read(fd, buf, count);\n    }\n    \n    ssize_t write(const void* buf, std::size_t count) {\n        return ::write(fd, buf, count);\n    }\n    \n    off_t seek(off_t offset, int whence) {\n        return lseek(fd, offset, whence);\n    }\n    \n    void truncate(off_t length) {\n        if(ftruncate(fd, length) == -1) {\n            throw std::runtime_error(\"ftruncate failed\");\n        }\n    }\n    \n    static std::vector<std::string> readDirectory(const std::string& path) {\n        std::vector<std::string> entries;\n        DIR* dir = opendir(path.c_str());\n        if(!dir) throw std::runtime_error(\"opendir failed\");\n        \n        struct dirent* entry;\n        while((entry = readdir(dir)) != nullptr) {\n            if(std::strcmp(entry->d_name, \".\") != 0 && std::strcmp(entry->d_name, \"..\") != 0) {\n                entries.push_back(entry->d_name);\n            }\n        }\n        closedir(dir);\n        return entries;\n    }\n    \n    static void createFile(const std::string& path, mode_t mode = 0644) {\n        int fd = creat(path.c_str(), mode);\n        if(fd == -1) throw std::runtime_error(\"creat() failed\");\n        close(fd);\n    }\n    \n    static void removeFile(const std::string& path) {\n        if(unlink(path.c_str()) == -1) {\n            throw std::runtime_error(\"unlink() failed\");\n        }\n    }\n    \n    static void makeDirectory(const std::string& path, mode_t mode = 0755) {\n        if(mkdir(path.c_str(), mode) == -1) {\n            throw std::runtime_error(\"mkdir() failed\");\n        }\n    }\n    \n    static void removeDirectory(const std::string& path) {\n        if(rmdir(path.c_str()) == -1) {\n            throw std::runtime_error(\"rmdir() failed\");\n        }\n    }\n    \n    int getDescriptor() const { return fd; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    try {\n        std::cout << \"=== File Descriptor Operations ===\" << std::endl;\n        \n        // Создание и запись в файл\n        RawFileDescriptor file(\"raw.bin\", O_RDWR | O_CREAT);\n        const char data[] = \"Hello, raw world!\";\n        ssize_t written = file.write(data, sizeof(data)-1);\n        std::cout << \"Written \" << written << \" bytes\" << std::endl;\n        \n        // Чтение файла\n        file.seek(0, SEEK_SET);\n        char buffer[100];\n        ssize_t read_bytes = file.read(buffer, sizeof(buffer));\n        buffer[read_bytes] = '\\0';\n        std::cout << \"Read \" << read_bytes << \" bytes: \" << buffer << std::endl;\n        \n        // Обрезание файла\n        file.truncate(10);\n        std::cout << \"File truncated to 10 bytes\" << std::endl;\n        \n        // Создание нового файла\n        RawFileDescriptor::createFile(\"newfile.txt\");\n        std::cout << \"Created newfile.txt\" << std::endl;\n        \n        // Чтение директории\n        std::cout << \"\\nDirectory contents:\" << std::endl;\n        auto files = RawFileDescriptor::readDirectory(\".\");\n        for(const auto& f : files) {\n            std::cout << \"  \" << f << std::endl;\n        }\n        \n        // Создание и удаление директории\n        RawFileDescriptor::makeDirectory(\"test_dir\");\n        std::cout << \"\\nCreated directory test_dir\" << std::endl;\n        \n        RawFileDescriptor::createFile(\"test_dir/inside.txt\");\n        std::cout << \"Created test_dir/inside.txt\" << std::endl;\n        \n        RawFileDescriptor::removeFile(\"test_dir/inside.txt\");\n        std::cout << \"Removed test_dir/inside.txt\" << std::endl;\n        \n        RawFileDescriptor::removeDirectory(\"test_dir\");\n        std::cout << \"Removed directory test_dir\" << std::endl;\n        \n        // Удаление созданных файлов\n        RawFileDescriptor::removeFile(\"raw.bin\");\n        RawFileDescriptor::removeFile(\"newfile.txt\");\n        std::cout << \"\\nCleaned up temporary files\" << std::endl;\n        \n    } catch(const std::exception& e) {\n        std::cerr << \"Error: \" << e.what() << std::endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <thread>\n#include <vector>\n#include <chrono>\n#include <mutex>\n#include <condition_variable>\n\nclass ThreadLatch {\n    std::mutex mtx;\n    std::condition_variable cv;\n    int count;\n    bool ready = false;\n    \npublic:\n    ThreadLatch(int n) : count(n) {}\n    \n    void count_down() {\n        std::unique_lock<std::mutex> lock(mtx);\n        if (--count == 0) {\n            ready = true;\n            cv.notify_all();\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void wait() {\n        std::unique_lock<std::mutex> lock(mtx);\n        cv.wait(lock, [this] { return ready; });\n    }\n};\n\nThreadLatch start_latch(3);\n\nvoid worker(int id) {\n    std::cout << \"Поток \" << id << \" готовится...\" << std::endl;\n    std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(id * 100));\n    \n    start_latch.count_down();\n    std::cout << \"Поток \" << id << \" уменьшил счетчик\" << std::endl;\n    \n    start_latch.wait();\n    std::cout << \"Поток \" << id << \" начал работу\" << std::endl;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::vector<std::thread> threads;\n    \n    for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {\n        threads.emplace_back(worker, i + 1);\n    }\n    \n    for (auto& t : threads) {\n        t.join();\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"Все потоки завершили работу\" << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nlong long factorial(int n) {\n    long long result = 1;\n    for (int i = 2; i <= n; i++) {\n        result *= i;\n    }\n    return result;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    for (int n = 0; n <= 10; n++) {\n        std::cout << n << \"! = \" << factorial(n) << std::endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    int arr[] = {45, 67, 23, 89, 12};\n    int size = sizeof(arr) / sizeof(arr[0]);\n    bool allLessThan100 = true;\n    \n    for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {\n        if (arr[i] >= 100) {\n            allLessThan100 = false;\n            break;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    if (allLessThan100) {\n        cout << \"Все элементы меньше 100\" << endl;\n    } else {\n        cout << \"Есть элементы больше или равные 100\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nint main() {\n    int year;\n    std::cout << \"Введите год: \";\n    std::cin >> year;\n    \n    bool isLeap = false;\n    \n    if (year < 1582) {\n        std::cout << \"Год до введения григорианского календаря (1582). Используется юлианский календарь.\" << std::endl;\n        isLeap = (year % 4 == 0);\n    } else {\n        // Григорианский календарь\n        if (year % 400 == 0) {\n            isLeap = true;\n        } else if (year % 100 == 0) {\n            isLeap = false;\n        } else if (year % 4 == 0) {\n            isLeap = true;\n        } else {\n            isLeap = false;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    // Особые случаи (некоторые страны перешли позже)\n    if (year == 1700 || year == 1800 || year == 1900) {\n        std::cout << \"Примечание: в России этот год считался високосным по юлианскому календарю.\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    if (year == 2000) {\n        std::cout << \"Примечание: год 2000 был високосным в григорианском календаре.\" << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << year << \" год - \" << (isLeap ? \"високосный\" : \"не високосный\") << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <sys/socket.h>\n#include <netinet/in.h>\n#include <arpa/inet.h>\n#include <unistd.h>\n#include <iostream>\nint main() {\n    int sock = socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, 0);\n    sockaddr_in server_addr;\n    server_addr.sin_family = AF_INET;\n    server_addr.sin_port = htons(80);\n    inet_pton(AF_INET, \"8.8.8.8\", &server_addr.sin_addr);\n    // Assume connect succeeded...\n    sockaddr_in peer_addr;\n    socklen_t len = sizeof(peer_addr);\n    getpeername(sock, (struct sockaddr*)&peer_addr, &len);\n    char ip_str[INET_ADDRSTRLEN];\n    inet_ntop(AF_INET, &peer_addr.sin_addr, ip_str, sizeof(ip_str));\n    std::cout << \"Connected to: \" << ip_str << \":\" << ntohs(peer_addr.sin_port) << std::endl;\n    close(sock);\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nclass Vehicle {\npublic:\n    virtual void move() {\n        std::cout << \"Vehicle is moving\" << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass Car : public Vehicle {\npublic:\n    void move() override {\n        std::cout << \"Car is driving\" << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Car car;\n    Vehicle& v = car;\n    v.move();\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <functional>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Calculator {\npublic:\n    double add(double a, double b) { return a + b; }\n    double subtract(double a, double b) { return a - b; }\n    double multiply(double a, double b) { return a * b; }\n    double divide(double a, double b) { \n        if (b != 0) return a / b;\n        throw runtime_error(\"Division by zero\");\n    }\n};\n\n// Тип для ссылки на функцию-член\nusing Operation = double (Calculator::*)(double, double);\n\nint main() {\n    Calculator calc;\n    \n    // Ссылки на функции-члены\n    Operation addOp = &Calculator::add;\n    Operation subOp = &Calculator::subtract;\n    Operation mulOp = &Calculator::multiply;\n    Operation divOp = &Calculator::divide;\n    \n    // Вызов через ссылку на функцию-член\n    double result1 = (calc.*addOp)(10, 5);\n    cout << \"10 + 5 = \" << result1 << endl;\n    \n    double result2 = (calc.*subOp)(10, 5);\n    cout << \"10 - 5 = \" << result2 << endl;\n    \n    // Массив ссылок на функции-члены\n    Operation operations[] = {addOp, subOp, mulOp, divOp};\n    const char* names[] = {\"Сложение\", \"Вычитание\", \"Умножение\", \"Деление\"};\n    \n    double x = 20, y = 4;\n    cout << \"\\nОперации над \" << x << \" и \" << y << \":\" << endl;\n    \n    for (int i = 0; i < 4; ++i) {\n        try {\n            double result = (calc.*operations[i])(x, y);\n            cout << names[i] << \": \" << result << endl;\n        } catch (const runtime_error& e) {\n            cout << names[i] << \": Ошибка - \" << e.what() << endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    // Использование function\n    using CalcFunction = function<double(double, double)>;\n    \n    // Создание function из функции-члена\n    CalcFunction addFunc = bind(&Calculator::add, &calc, placeholders::_1, placeholders::_2);\n    CalcFunction mulFunc = [&calc](double a, double b) { return calc.multiply(a, b); };\n    \n    cout << \"\\nИспользование function:\\n\";\n    cout << \"addFunc(3, 4) = \" << addFunc(3, 4) << endl;\n    cout << \"mulFunc(3, 4) = \" << mulFunc(3, 4) << endl;\n    \n    // Вектор функций\n    vector<CalcFunction> functions = {addFunc, mulFunc};\n    for (const auto& func : functions) {\n        cout << \"Результат: \" << func(5, 6) << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <algorithm>\n#include <stdexcept>\n#include <vector>\n\n// Сравнение двух строк как чисел\nbool isGreaterOrEqual(const std::string& a, const std::string& b) {\n    if(a.length() != b.length()) {\n        return a.length() > b.length();\n    }\n    return a >= b;\n}\n\n// Сложение больших чисел\nstd::string addStrings(const std::string& num1, const std::string& num2) {\n    std::string result;\n    int carry = 0;\n    int i = num1.length() - 1;\n    int j = num2.length() - 1;\n    \n    while(i >= 0 || j >= 0 || carry) {\n        int sum = carry;\n        if(i >= 0) sum += num1[i--] - '0';\n        if(j >= 0) sum += num2[j--] - '0';\n        \n        result.push_back(sum % 10 + '0');\n        carry = sum / 10;\n    }\n    \n    std::reverse(result.begin(), result.end());\n    return result;\n}\n\n// Вычитание больших чисел (num1 >= num2)\nstd::string subtractStrings(const std::string& num1, const std::string& num2) {\n    if(!isGreaterOrEqual(num1, num2)) {\n        throw std::invalid_argument(\"num1 must be greater or equal to num2\");\n    }\n    \n    std::string result;\n    int borrow = 0;\n    int i = num1.length() - 1;\n    int j = num2.length() - 1;\n    \n    while(i >= 0) {\n        int digit1 = num1[i--] - '0' - borrow;\n        int digit2 = (j >= 0) ? num2[j--] - '0' : 0;\n        \n        if(digit1 < digit2) {\n            digit1 += 10;\n            borrow = 1;\n        } else {\n            borrow = 0;\n        }\n        \n        result.push_back((digit1 - digit2) + '0');\n    }\n    \n    // Удаляем ведущие нули\n    while(result.length() > 1 && result.back() == '0') {\n        result.pop_back();\n    }\n    \n    std::reverse(result.begin(), result.end());\n    return result;\n}\n\n// Умножение больших чисел\nstd::string multiplyStrings(const std::string& num1, const std::string& num2) {\n    if(num1 == \"0\" || num2 == \"0\") return \"0\";\n    \n    int m = num1.length(), n = num2.length();\n    std::vector<int> pos(m + n, 0);\n    \n    for(int i = m - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\n        for(int j = n - 1; j >= 0; j--) {\n            int mul = (num1[i] - '0') * (num2[j] - '0');\n            int sum = mul + pos[i + j + 1];\n            \n            pos[i + j + 1] = sum % 10;\n            pos[i + j] += sum / 10;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    std::string result;\n    for(int digit : pos) {\n        if(!(result.empty() && digit == 0)) {\n            result.push_back(digit + '0');\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return result.empty() ? \"0\" : result;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::string num1 = \"12345678901234567890\";\n    std::string num2 = \"98765432109876543210\";\n    \n    std::cout << \"Big Integer Arithmetic:\\n\";\n    std::cout << \"Number 1: \" << num1 << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Number 2: \" << num2 << std::endl << std::endl;\n    \n    std::string sum = addStrings(num1, num2);\n    std::cout << \"Addition: \" << num1 << \" + \" << num2 << \" = \" << sum << std::endl;\n    \n    try {\n        std::string diff = subtractStrings(sum, num1);\n        std::cout << \"Subtraction: \" << sum << \" - \" << num1 << \" = \" << diff << std::endl;\n    } catch(const std::exception& e) {\n        std::cerr << \"Subtraction error: \" << e.what() << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    std::string product = multiplyStrings(\"12345\", \"6789\");\n    std::cout << \"Multiplication: 12345 * 6789 = \" << product << std::endl;\n    \n    // Тестирование граничных случаев\n    std::cout << \"\\nEdge Cases:\\n\";\n    std::cout << \"Add 0 + 0: \" << addStrings(\"0\", \"0\") << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Multiply 999 * 999: \" << multiplyStrings(\"999\", \"999\") << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Subtract 1000 - 999: \" << subtractStrings(\"1000\", \"999\") << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\n#include <complex>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n double a, b, c;\n cout << \"Введите коэффициенты a, b, c:\";\n cin >> a >> b >> c;\n \n double discriminant = b*b - 4*a*c;\n \n if (discriminant > 0) {\n double x1 = (-b + sqrt(discriminant)) / (2*a);\n double x2 = (-b - sqrt(discriminant)) / (2*a);\n cout << \"Два действительных корня: \" << x1 << \", \" << x2 << endl;\n } else if (discriminant == 0) {\n double x = -b / (2*a);\n cout << \"Один корень: \" << x << endl;\n } else {\n complex<double> x1(-b/(2*a), sqrt(-discriminant)/(2*a));\n complex<double> x2(-b/(2*a), -sqrt(-discriminant)/(2*a));\n cout << \"Два комплексных корня: \" << x1 << \", \" << x2 << endl;\n }\n return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <climits>\n\nstruct MinHeapNode {\n    int v;\n    int dist;\n};\n\nclass MinHeap {\n    std::vector<MinHeapNode*> heap;\n    std::vector<int> pos;\n    int size;\n    void swapNodes(int i, int j) {\n        MinHeapNode* temp = heap[i];\n        heap[i] = heap[j];\n        heap[j] = temp;\n        pos[heap[i]->v] = i;\n        pos[heap[j]->v] = j;\n    }\n    void heapify(int idx) {\n        int smallest = idx;\n        int left = 2 * idx + 1;\n        int right = 2 * idx + 2;\n        if (left < size && heap[left]->dist < heap[smallest]->dist) smallest = left;\n        if (right < size && heap[right]->dist < heap[smallest]->dist) smallest = right;\n        if (smallest != idx) {\n            swapNodes(idx, smallest);\n            heapify(smallest);\n        }\n    }\npublic:\n    MinHeap(int capacity) {\n        heap.resize(capacity);\n        pos.resize(capacity, -1);\n        size = 0;\n    }\n    bool isEmpty() { return size == 0; }\n    void insert(int v, int dist) {\n        MinHeapNode* node = new MinHeapNode();\n        node->v = v;\n        node->dist = dist;\n        heap[size] = node;\n        pos[v] = size;\n        size++;\n        int i = size - 1;\n        while (i > 0 && heap[(i - 1) / 2]->dist > heap[i]->dist) {\n            swapNodes(i, (i - 1) / 2);\n            i = (i - 1) / 2;\n        }\n    }\n    MinHeapNode* extractMin() {\n        if (size == 0) return nullptr;\n        MinHeapNode* root = heap[0];\n        swapNodes(0, size - 1);\n        size--;\n        heapify(0);\n        pos[root->v] = -1;\n        return root;\n    }\n    void decreaseKey(int v, int dist) {\n        int i = pos[v];\n        heap[i]->dist = dist;\n        while (i > 0 && heap[(i - 1) / 2]->dist > heap[i]->dist) {\n            swapNodes(i, (i - 1) / 2);\n            i = (i - 1) / 2;\n        }\n    }\n    bool isInHeap(int v) { return pos[v] != -1; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    int V = 3;\n    MinHeap heap(V);\n    heap.insert(0, 5);\n    heap.insert(1, 3);\n    heap.insert(2, 8);\n    heap.decreaseKey(2, 1);\n    while (!heap.isEmpty()) {\n        MinHeapNode* node = heap.extractMin();\n        std::cout << \"Вершина: \" << node->v << \", Расстояние: \" << node->dist << std::endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <vector>\n#include <utility>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Person {\n    string name;\n    vector<string> skills;\npublic:\n    Person(const string& n, initializer_list<string> sk) : name(n), skills(sk) {}\n    \n    Person(Person&& other) noexcept \n        : name(move(other.name)), skills(move(other.skills)) {\n        cout << \"Person moved: \" << name << endl;\n    }\n    \n    Person& operator=(Person&& other) noexcept {\n        if (this != &other) {\n            name = move(other.name);\n            skills = move(other.skills);\n            cout << \"Person move assigned: \" << name << endl;\n        }\n        return *this;\n    }\n    \n    void display() const {\n        cout << name << \" has skills: \";\n        for (const auto& skill : skills) {\n            cout << skill << \" \";\n        }\n        cout << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Person p1(\"Alice\", {\"C++\", \"Python\", \"Java\"});\n    Person p2 = move(p1);\n    \n    p2.display();\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <sys/file.h>\n#include <fcntl.h>\n#include <unistd.h>\n#include <iostream>\n#include <thread>\n#include <chrono>\nusing namespace std;\nvoid lock_process(const char* filename, int process_num) {\n    int fd = open(filename, O_RDWR | O_CREAT, 0644);\n    if(fd == -1) {\n        perror(\"open\");\n        return;\n    }\n    cout << \"Process \" << process_num << \" trying to lock...\" << endl;\n    if(flock(fd, LOCK_EX) == -1) {\n        perror(\"flock\");\n        close(fd);\n        return;\n    }\n    cout << \"Process \" << process_num << \" acquired lock\" << endl;\n    this_thread::sleep_for(chrono::seconds(2));\n    cout << \"Process \" << process_num << \" releasing lock\" << endl;\n    flock(fd, LOCK_UN);\n    close(fd);\n}\nint main() {\n    thread t1(lock_process, \"lockfile.txt\", 1);\n    thread t2(lock_process, \"lockfile.txt\", 2);\n    t1.join();\n    t2.join();\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <unordered_set>\n\nbool containsAllChars(const std::string& str, const std::string& chars) {\n    std::unordered_set<char> strChars;\n    \n    for(char c : str) {\n        strChars.insert(c);\n    }\n    \n    for(char c : chars) {\n        if(strChars.find(c) == strChars.end()) {\n            return false;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return true;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::string str = \"Hello World\";\n    std::string test1 = \"Hlo\";\n    std::string test2 = \"xyz\";\n    \n    std::cout << test1 << (containsAllChars(str, test1) ? \" содержится\" : \" не содержится\") << \" в строке\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << test2 << (containsAllChars(str, test2) ? \" содержится\" : \" не содержится\") << \" в строке\" << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <algorithm>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Fraction {\nprivate:\n    int numerator;\n    int denominator;\n    \n    int gcd(int a, int b) const {\n        while (b != 0) {\n            int temp = b;\n            b = a % b;\n            a = temp;\n        }\n        return a;\n    }\n    \n    void reduce() {\n        if (denominator < 0) {\n            numerator = -numerator;\n            denominator = -denominator;\n        }\n        int divisor = gcd(abs(numerator), denominator);\n        if (divisor > 1) {\n            numerator /= divisor;\n            denominator /= divisor;\n        }\n    }\n    \npublic:\n    Fraction(int num = 0, int den = 1) : numerator(num), denominator(den) {\n        if (denominator == 0) {\n            cout << \"Знаменатель не может быть нулем! Установлен 1.\" << endl;\n            denominator = 1;\n        }\n        reduce();\n    }\n    \n    Fraction add(const Fraction& other) const {\n        int newNum = numerator * other.denominator + other.numerator * denominator;\n        int newDen = denominator * other.denominator;\n        return Fraction(newNum, newDen);\n    }\n    \n    Fraction multiply(const Fraction& other) const {\n        int newNum = numerator * other.numerator;\n        int newDen = denominator * other.denominator;\n        return Fraction(newNum, newDen);\n    }\n    \n    void print() const {\n        if (denominator == 1) {\n            cout << numerator << endl;\n        } else {\n            cout << numerator << \"/\" << denominator << endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void printAsDecimal() const {\n        cout << static_cast<double>(numerator) / denominator << endl;\n    }\n    \n    int getNumerator() const { return numerator; }\n    int getDenominator() const { return denominator; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Fraction f1(2, 4);\n    Fraction f2(3, 5);\n    \n    cout << \"Дробь 1: \"; f1.print();\n    cout << \"Дробь 2: \"; f2.print();\n    \n    Fraction sum = f1.add(f2);\n    cout << \"Сумма: \"; sum.print();\n    \n    Fraction product = f1.multiply(f2);\n    cout << \"Произведение: \"; product.print();\n    \n    cout << \"Десятичное представление дроби 1: \";\n    f1.printAsDecimal();\n    \n    Fraction f3(6, 8);\n    cout << \"Дробь 6/8 после сокращения: \"; f3.print();\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    int arr[] = {1, 4, 2, 5, 7, 3};\n    int target = 8;\n    int size = sizeof(arr) / sizeof(arr[0]);\n    bool found = false;\n    \n    for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) {\n        for (int j = i + 1; j < size; j++) {\n            if (arr[i] + arr[j] == target) {\n                cout << \"Найдена пара: \" << arr[i] << \" и \" << arr[j] << endl;\n                found = true;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    if (!found) {\n        cout << \"Пара не найдена\" << endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n\nbool isPalindrome(const std::string& str, int start, int end);\n\nbool isPalindrome(const std::string& str, int start, int end) {\n    if(start >= end) return true;\n    if(str[start] != str[end]) return false;\n    return isPalindrome(str, start + 1, end - 1);\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::string str = \"radar\";\n    std::cout << str << (isPalindrome(str, 0, str.length()-1) ? \" - палиндром\" : \" - не палиндром\") << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nvoid swap(int& a, int& b) {\n    int temp = a;\n    a = b;\n    b = temp;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    int x = 5, y = 10;\n    \n    cout << \"До обмена: x = \" << x << \", y = \" << y << endl;\n    swap(x, y);\n    cout << \"После обмена: x = \" << x << \", y = \" << y << endl;\n    \n    int a = -3, b = 7;\n    cout << \"\\nДо обмена: a = \" << a << \", b = \" << b << endl;\n    swap(a, b);\n    cout << \"После обмена: a = \" << a << \", b = \" << b << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <string>\n#include <regex>\n#include <sstream>\n\nstd::string markdownToHtml(const std::string& markdown) {\n    std::string html = markdown;\n    \n    // Заголовки\n    html = std::regex_replace(html, std::regex(\"^# (.+)$\"), \"<h1>$1</h1>\");\n    html = std::regex_replace(html, std::regex(\"^## (.+)$\"), \"<h2>$1</h2>\");\n    html = std::regex_replace(html, std::regex(\"^### (.+)$\"), \"<h3>$1</h3>\");\n    \n    // Жирный текст\n    html = std::regex_replace(html, std::regex(\"\\\\*\\\\*(.+?)\\\\*\\\\*\"), \"<strong>$1</strong>\");\n    // Курсив\n    html = std::regex_replace(html, std::regex(\"\\\\*(.+?)\\\\*\"), \"<em>$1</em>\");\n    // Код\n    html = std::regex_replace(html, std::regex(\"`(.+?)`\"), \"<code>$1</code>\");\n    \n    // Списки\n    std::stringstream ss(html);\n    std::string line;\n    std::string result;\n    bool in_list = false;\n    \n    while (std::getline(ss, line)) {\n        if (std::regex_match(line, std::regex(\"^\\\\* .+\"))) {\n            if (!in_list) {\n                result += \"<ul>\\n\";\n                in_list = true;\n            }\n            line = std::regex_replace(line, std::regex(\"^\\\\* (.+)$\"), \"<li>$1</li>\");\n            result += line + \"\\n\";\n        } else {\n            if (in_list) {\n                result += \"</ul>\\n\";\n                in_list = false;\n            }\n            result += line + \"\\n\";\n        }\n    }\n    \n    if (in_list) {\n        result += \"</ul>\\n\";\n    }\n    \n    // Параграфы\n    result = std::regex_replace(result, std::regex(\"\\n\\n\"), \"</p><p>\");\n    result = \"<p>\" + result + \"</p>\";\n    \n    // Ссылки\n    result = std::regex_replace(result, std::regex(\"\\\\[(.+?)\\\\]\\\\((.+?)\\\\)\"), \n                          \"<a href='$2'>$1</a>\");\n    \n    return result;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::ifstream input(\"document.md\");\n    std::stringstream buffer;\n    buffer << input.rdbuf();\n    \n    std::string html = markdownToHtml(buffer.str());\n    \n    std::ofstream output(\"output.html\");\n    output << \"<!DOCTYPE html>\\n<html>\\n<body>\\n\" << html << \"\\n</body>\\n</html>\";\n    \n    std::cout << \"Markdown converted to HTML.\\n\";\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cstring>\n\nunion WidgetData {\n    struct {\n        int min_value;\n        int max_value;\n        int current_value;\n    } slider;\n    \n    struct {\n        char items[5][32];\n        int selected_index;\n    } dropdown;\n    \n    struct {\n        char text[128];\n        bool multiline;\n        int max_length;\n    } textbox;\n    \n    struct {\n        bool checked;\n        char label[32];\n    } checkbox;\n};\n\nstruct GUIWidget {\n    enum WidgetType { SLIDER, DROPDOWN, TEXTBOX, CHECKBOX } type;\n    char id[32];\n    WidgetData data;\n    \n    void initialize_slider(int min_val, int max_val, int current) {\n        type = SLIDER;\n        data.slider.min_value = min_val;\n        data.slider.max_value = max_val;\n        data.slider.current_value = current;\n    }\n    \n    void initialize_dropdown(const char* items[], int count, int selected) {\n        type = DROPDOWN;\n        data.dropdown.selected_index = selected;\n        for (int i = 0; i < count && i < 5; i++) {\n            std::strncpy(data.dropdown.items[i], items[i], 31);\n            data.dropdown.items[i][31] = '\\0';\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void print() const {\n        std::cout << \"Widget '\" << id << \"' (\";\n        switch (type) {\n            case SLIDER:\n                std::cout << \"Slider): \" << data.slider.current_value \n                         << \" [\" << data.slider.min_value << \"-\" \n                         << data.slider.max_value << \"]\";\n                break;\n            case DROPDOWN:\n                std::cout << \"Dropdown): выбрано '\" \n                         << data.dropdown.items[data.dropdown.selected_index] << \"'\";\n                break;\n            case TEXTBOX:\n                std::cout << \"Textbox): \\\"\" << data.textbox.text << \"\\\"\";\n                break;\n            case CHECKBOX:\n                std::cout << \"Checkbox): \" << (data.checkbox.checked ? \"✓ \" : \"✗ \") \n                         << data.checkbox.label;\n                break;\n        }\n        std::cout << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    GUIWidget widget1, widget2, widget3;\n    \n    std::strcpy(widget1.id, \"volume_slider\");\n    widget1.initialize_slider(0, 100, 75);\n    \n    std::strcpy(widget2.id, \"country_select\");\n    const char* countries[] = {\"Russia\", \"USA\", \"Germany\", \"Japan\", \"China\"};\n    widget2.initialize_dropdown(countries, 5, 0);\n    \n    std::strcpy(widget3.id, \"accept_terms\");\n    widget3.type = GUIWidget::CHECKBOX;\n    widget3.data.checkbox.checked = true;\n    std::strcpy(widget3.data.checkbox.label, \"Accept Terms\");\n    \n    std::cout << \"Виджеты графического интерфейса:\" << std::endl;\n    widget1.print();\n    widget2.print();\n    widget3.print();\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nРазмер GUIWidget: \" << sizeof(GUIWidget) << \" байт\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Размер WidgetData: \" << sizeof(WidgetData) << \" байт\" << std::endl;\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nДемонстрация перезаписи данных:\" << std::endl;\n    widget1.initialize_slider(0, 10, 5);\n    widget1.print();\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <unordered_map>\n#include <functional>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    unordered_map<int, int> memo;\n    function<int(int, int, int)> fib_tail;\n    fib_tail = [&](int n, int a, int b) -> int {\n        if (memo.find(n) != memo.end()) return memo[n];\n        if (n == 0) return memo[n] = a;\n        if (n == 1) return memo[n] = b;\n        return memo[n] = fib_tail(n-1, b, a+b);\n    };\n    \n    auto fibonacci = [&](int n) { return fib_tail(n, 0, 1); };\n    \n    for (int i = 0; i <= 10; ++i) {\n        cout << \"fib(\" << i << \") = \" << fibonacci(i) << endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
