#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <memory>\n#include <string>\n#include <map>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass DocumentVisitor;\n\nclass Document {\npublic:\n    virtual ~Document() = default;\n    virtual void open() = 0;\n    virtual void save() = 0;\n    virtual void display() const = 0;\n    virtual void accept(DocumentVisitor& visitor) = 0;\n    virtual string getType() const = 0;\n};\n\nclass DocumentVisitor {\npublic:\n    virtual ~DocumentVisitor() = default;\n    virtual void visitTextDocument(class TextDocument& doc) = 0;\n    virtual void visitPDFDocument(class PDFDocument& doc) = 0;\n    virtual void visitImageDocument(class ImageDocument& doc) = 0;\n};\n\nclass TextDocument : public Document {\n    string content;\n    string filename;\npublic:\n    TextDocument(const string& name) : filename(name) {}\n    void open() override {\n        content = \"Text content from \" + filename;\n        cout << \"Opening text document: \" << filename << endl;\n    }\n    void save() override {\n        cout << \"Saving text document: \" << filename << endl;\n    }\n    void display() const override {\n        cout << \"Displaying text: \" << content << endl;\n    }\n    void accept(DocumentVisitor& visitor) override;\n    string getType() const override { return \"Text\"; }\n    string getContent() const { return content; }\n};\n\nclass PDFDocument : public Document {\n    int pageCount;\n    string filename;\npublic:\n    PDFDocument(const string& name, int pages) : filename(name), pageCount(pages) {}\n    void open() override {\n        cout << \"Opening PDF document: \" << filename << \" with \" << pageCount << \" pages\" << endl;\n    }\n    void save() override {\n        cout << \"Saving PDF document: \" << filename << endl;\n    }\n    void display() const override {\n        cout << \"Displaying PDF: \" << filename << \" (page 1 of \" << pageCount << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n    void accept(DocumentVisitor& visitor) override;\n    string getType() const override { return \"PDF\"; }\n    int getPageCount() const { return pageCount; }\n};\n\nclass ImageDocument : public Document {\n    string filename;\n    int width, height;\npublic:\n    ImageDocument(const string& name, int w, int h) : filename(name), width(w), height(h) {}\n    void open() override {\n        cout << \"Opening image: \" << filename << \" (\" << width << \"x\" << height << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n    void save() override {\n        cout << \"Saving image: \" << filename << endl;\n    }\n    void display() const override {\n        cout << \"Displaying image: \" << filename << endl;\n    }\n    void accept(DocumentVisitor& visitor) override;\n    string getType() const override { return \"Image\"; }\n    pair<int, int> getDimensions() const { return {width, height}; }\n};\n\nvoid TextDocument::accept(DocumentVisitor& visitor) { visitor.visitTextDocument(*this); }\nvoid PDFDocument::accept(DocumentVisitor& visitor) { visitor.visitPDFDocument(*this); }\nvoid ImageDocument::accept(DocumentVisitor& visitor) { visitor.visitImageDocument(*this); }\n\nclass StatisticsVisitor : public DocumentVisitor {\n    map<string, int> typeCount;\n    int totalDocs = 0;\npublic:\n    void visitTextDocument(TextDocument& doc) override {\n        typeCount[\"Text\"]++;\n        totalDocs++;\n        cout << \"Statistics: Processed text document with content: \" << doc.getContent().substr(0, 20) << \"...\" << endl;\n    }\n    void visitPDFDocument(PDFDocument& doc) override {\n        typeCount[\"PDF\"]++;\n        totalDocs++;\n        cout << \"Statistics: Processed PDF with \" << doc.getPageCount() << \" pages\" << endl;\n    }\n    void visitImageDocument(ImageDocument& doc) override {\n        typeCount[\"Image\"]++;\n        totalDocs++;\n        auto dims = doc.getDimensions();\n        cout << \"Statistics: Processed image \" << dims.first << \"x\" << dims.second << endl;\n    }\n    void printSummary() const {\n        cout << \"\\n=== Document Statistics ===\" << endl;\n        cout << \"Total documents: \" << totalDocs << endl;\n        for (const auto& [type, count] : typeCount) {\n            cout << type << \": \" << count << endl;\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nclass DocumentManager {\n    vector<unique_ptr<Document>> documents;\npublic:\n    void addDocument(unique_ptr<Document> doc) {\n        documents.push_back(move(doc));\n    }\n    void processAll() {\n        StatisticsVisitor stats;\n        for (const auto& doc : documents) {\n            doc->open();\n            doc->display();\n            doc->save();\n            doc->accept(stats);\n            cout << \"---\" << endl;\n        }\n        stats.printSummary();\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    DocumentManager manager;\n    manager.addDocument(make_unique<TextDocument>(\"report.txt\"));\n    manager.addDocument(make_unique<PDFDocument>(\"manual.pdf\", 50));\n    manager.addDocument(make_unique<ImageDocument>(\"photo.jpg\", 1920, 1080));\n    manager.addDocument(make_unique<TextDocument>(\"notes.txt\"));\n    \n    manager.processAll();\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nint main() {\n    int count;\n    std::cout << \"Введите количество чисел: \";\n    std::cin >> count;\n    double* numbers = new double[count];\n    double sum = 0.0;\n    std::cout << \"Введите \" << count << \" чисел: \";\n    for(int i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n        std::cin >> numbers[i];\n        sum += numbers[i];\n    }\n    double average = sum / count;\n    std::cout << \"Среднее арифметическое: \" << average << std::endl;\n    delete[] numbers;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n\nclass LagrangePolynomial {\n    std::vector<double> xPoints, yPoints;\npublic:\n    LagrangePolynomial(const std::vector<double>& x, const std::vector<double>& y) \n        : xPoints(x), yPoints(y) {}\n    double evaluate(double x) const {\n        double result = 0;\n        int n = xPoints.size();\n        for(int i = 0; i < n; i++) {\n            double term = yPoints[i];\n            for(int j = 0; j < n; j++) {\n                if(i != j) {\n                    term *= (x - xPoints[j]) / (xPoints[i] - xPoints[j]);\n                }\n            }\n            result += term;\n        }\n        return result;\n    }\n    void printPoints() const {\n        std::cout << \"Points: \";\n        for(size_t i = 0; i < xPoints.size(); i++) {\n            std::cout << \"(\" << xPoints[i] << \", \" << yPoints[i] << \") \";\n        }\n        std::cout << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    std::vector<double> x = {0, 1, 2};\n    std::vector<double> y = {0, 1, 4};\n    LagrangePolynomial poly(x, y);\n    poly.printPoints();\n    std::cout << \"Value at x=1.5: \" << poly.evaluate(1.5) << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Value at x=3: \" << poly.evaluate(3) << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nint main() {\n int numbers[10];\n size_t arraySize = sizeof(numbers) / sizeof(numbers[0]);\n std::cout << \"Размер массива из 10 int (в элементах): \" << arraySize << std::endl;\n return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <queue>\n#include <climits>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint primMST(const vector<vector<pair<int, int>>>& graph) {\n    int n = graph.size();\n    vector<bool> inMST(n, false);\n    vector<int> key(n, INT_MAX);\n    \n    priority_queue<pair<int, int>, vector<pair<int, int>>, greater<pair<int, int>>> pq;\n    \n    key[0] = 0;\n    pq.push({0, 0});\n    \n    int totalWeight = 0;\n    \n    while (!pq.empty()) {\n        int u = pq.top().second;\n        pq.pop();\n        \n        if (inMST[u]) continue;\n        \n        inMST[u] = true;\n        totalWeight += key[u];\n        \n        for (const auto& edge : graph[u]) {\n            int v = edge.first;\n            int weight = edge.second;\n            \n            if (!inMST[v] && weight < key[v]) {\n                key[v] = weight;\n                pq.push({key[v], v});\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return totalWeight;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    int n = 5;\n    vector<vector<pair<int, int>>> graph(n);\n    \n    graph[0].push_back({1, 2});\n    graph[0].push_back({3, 6});\n    graph[1].push_back({0, 2});\n    graph[1].push_back({2, 3});\n    graph[1].push_back({3, 8});\n    graph[1].push_back({4, 5});\n    graph[2].push_back({1, 3});\n    graph[2].push_back({4, 7});\n    graph[3].push_back({0, 6});\n    graph[3].push_back({1, 8});\n    graph[3].push_back({4, 9});\n    graph[4].push_back({1, 5});\n    graph[4].push_back({2, 7});\n    graph[4].push_back({3, 9});\n    \n    int totalWeight = primMST(graph);\n    \n    cout << \"Вес минимального остовного дерева: \" << totalWeight << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    int x = 5;\n    const int y = 10;\n    \n    // Обычная ссылка\n    int& ref1 = x;\n    ref1 = 7; // можно изменять\n    cout << \"x через обычную ссылку: \" << ref1 << endl;\n    \n    // Константная ссылка на неконстантную переменную\n    const int& ref2 = x;\n    // ref2 = 8; // ошибка - нельзя изменять через константную ссылку\n    cout << \"x через константную ссылку: \" << ref2 << endl;\n    \n    // Константная ссылка на константную переменную\n    const int& ref3 = y;\n    cout << \"y через константную ссылку: \" << ref3 << endl;\n    \n    // Обычная ссылка не может ссылаться на константу\n    // int& ref4 = y; // ошибка\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <queue>\n#include <climits>\n#include <iomanip>\n#include <algorithm>\n\nstruct Edge {\n int destination;\n int weight;\n};\n\nstruct QueueNode {\n int vertex;\n int distance;\n \n bool operator>(const QueueNode& other) const {\n return distance > other.distance;\n }\n};\n\nclass Graph {\n int V;\n std::vector<std::vector<Edge>> adj;\n \npublic:\n Graph(int vertices) : V(vertices), adj(vertices) {}\n \n void addDirectedEdge(int src, int dest, int weight) {\n adj[src].push_back({dest, weight});\n }\n \n void addUndirectedEdge(int v, int w, int weight) {\n addDirectedEdge(v, w, weight);\n addDirectedEdge(w, v, weight);\n }\n \n void dijkstra(int start) {\n std::vector<int> dist(V, INT_MAX);\n std::vector<int> prev(V, -1);\n std::vector<bool> visited(V, false);\n \n std::priority_queue<QueueNode, std::vector<QueueNode>, std::greater<QueueNode>> pq;\n \n dist[start] = 0;\n pq.push({start, 0});\n \n std::cout << \"\\n=== Алгоритм Дейкстры (старт с вершины \" << start << \") ===\" << std::endl;\n \n int step = 0;\n while (!pq.empty()) {\n step++;\n QueueNode current = pq.top();\n pq.pop();\n \n int u = current.vertex;\n \n if (visited[u]) continue;\n visited[u] = true;\n \n for (const Edge& edge : adj[u]) {\n int v = edge.destination;\n int weight = edge.weight;\n \n if (!visited[v]) {\n int newDist = dist[u] + weight;\n if (newDist < dist[v]) {\n dist[v] = newDist;\n prev[v] = u;\n pq.push({v, newDist});\n }\n }\n }\n }\n \n std::cout << \"\\n=== РЕЗУЛЬТАТЫ ===\" << std::endl;\n std::cout << std::setw(10) << \"Вершина\" << std::setw(15) << \"Расстояние\" << std::setw(15) << \"Путь\" << std::endl;\n \n for (int i = 0; i < V; i++) {\n std::cout << std::setw(10) << i << std::setw(15);\n \n if (dist[i] == INT_MAX) {\n std::cout << \"INF\";\n } else {\n std::cout << dist[i];\n }\n \n std::cout << std::setw(15);\n \n if (dist[i] == INT_MAX) {\n std::cout << \"нет пути\";\n } else {\n std::vector<int> path;\n for (int v = i; v != -1; v = prev[v]) {\n path.push_back(v);\n }\n std::reverse(path.begin(), path.end());\n \n for (std::size_t j = 0; j < path.size(); j++) {\n std::cout << path[j];\n if (j < path.size() - 1) std::cout << \"->\";\n }\n }\n std::cout << std::endl;\n }\n }\n \n void printGraph() {\n std::cout << \"\\nСтруктура графа:\" << std::endl;\n for (int v = 0; v < V; v++) {\n std::cout << \"Вершина \" << v << \": \";\n for (const Edge& edge : adj[v]) {\n std::cout << \"-> \" << edge.destination << \"(\" << edge.weight << \") \";\n }\n std::cout << std::endl;\n }\n }\n};\n\nint main() {\n // Используем заранее заданный граф для демонстрации\n Graph g(6);\n \n // Добавляем ребра графа\n g.addDirectedEdge(0, 1, 4);\n g.addDirectedEdge(0, 2, 2);\n g.addDirectedEdge(1, 2, 1);\n g.addDirectedEdge(1, 3, 5);\n g.addDirectedEdge(2, 3, 8);\n g.addDirectedEdge(2, 4, 10);\n g.addDirectedEdge(3, 4, 2);\n g.addDirectedEdge(3, 5, 6);\n g.addDirectedEdge(4, 5, 3);\n \n g.printGraph();\n \n int startVertex = 0;\n g.dijkstra(startVertex);\n \n return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Book {\nprivate:\n    int pages;\npublic:\n    Book(int p) : pages(p) {\n        if (pages < 0) pages = 0;\n    }\n    bool isThick() const {\n        return pages > 300;\n    }\n    void print() const {\n        cout << \"Страниц: \" << pages << endl;\n        cout << \"Толстая? \" << (isThick() ? \"Да\" : \"Нет\") << endl;\n    }\n    int getPages() const { return pages; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Book book1(250);\n    Book book2(500);\n    book1.print();\n    book2.print();\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <iomanip>\n#include <sstream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <cstdint>\n\nclass SHA256 {\nprivate:\n    static constexpr std::uint32_t k[64] = {\n        0x428a2f98, 0x71374491, 0xb5c0fbcf, 0xe9b5dba5,\n        0x3956c25b, 0x59f111f1, 0x923f82a4, 0xab1c5ed5,\n        0xd807aa98, 0x12835b01, 0x243185be, 0x550c7dc3,\n        0x72be5d74, 0x80deb1fe, 0x9bdc06a7, 0xc19bf174,\n        0xe49b69c1, 0xefbe4786, 0x0fc19dc6, 0x240ca1cc,\n        0x2de92c6f, 0x4a7484aa, 0x5cb0a9dc, 0x76f988da,\n        0x983e5152, 0xa831c66d, 0xb00327c8, 0xbf597fc7,\n        0xc6e00bf3, 0xd5a79147, 0x06ca6351, 0x14292967,\n        0x27b70a85, 0x2e1b2138, 0x4d2c6dfc, 0x53380d13,\n        0x650a7354, 0x766a0abb, 0x81c2c92e, 0x92722c85,\n        0xa2bfe8a1, 0xa81a664b, 0xc24b8b70, 0xc76c51a3,\n        0xd192e819, 0xd6990624, 0xf40e3585, 0x106aa070,\n        0x19a4c116, 0x1e376c08, 0x2748774c, 0x34b0bcb5,\n        0x391c0cb3, 0x4ed8aa4a, 0x5b9cca4f, 0x682e6ff3,\n        0x748f82ee, 0x78a5636f, 0x84c87814, 0x8cc70208,\n        0x90befffa, 0xa4506ceb, 0xbef9a3f7, 0xc67178f2\n    };\n\n    static std::uint32_t rotr(std::uint32_t x, std::uint32_t n) {\n        return (x >> n) | (x << (32 - n));\n    }\n\n    static std::uint32_t ch(std::uint32_t x, std::uint32_t y, std::uint32_t z) {\n        return (x & y) ^ (~x & z);\n    }\n\n    static std::uint32_t maj(std::uint32_t x, std::uint32_t y, std::uint32_t z) {\n        return (x & y) ^ (x & z) ^ (y & z);\n    }\n\n    static std::uint32_t sigma0(std::uint32_t x) {\n        return rotr(x, 2) ^ rotr(x, 13) ^ rotr(x, 22);\n    }\n\n    static std::uint32_t sigma1(std::uint32_t x) {\n        return rotr(x, 6) ^ rotr(x, 11) ^ rotr(x, 25);\n    }\n\n    static std::uint32_t gamma0(std::uint32_t x) {\n        return rotr(x, 7) ^ rotr(x, 18) ^ (x >> 3);\n    }\n\n    static std::uint32_t gamma1(std::uint32_t x) {\n        return rotr(x, 17) ^ rotr(x, 19) ^ (x >> 10);\n    }\n\npublic:\n    static std::string hash(const std::string& input) {\n        std::vector<std::uint8_t> data(input.begin(), input.end());\n        std::uint64_t bit_len = data.size() * 8;\n        \n        data.push_back(0x80);\n        while ((data.size() * 8) % 512 != 448) {\n            data.push_back(0x00);\n        }\n        \n        for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {\n            data.push_back((bit_len >> (56 - i * 8)) & 0xFF);\n        }\n        \n        std::uint32_t h[8] = {\n            0x6a09e667, 0xbb67ae85, 0x3c6ef372, 0xa54ff53a,\n            0x510e527f, 0x9b05688c, 0x1f83d9ab, 0x5be0cd19\n        };\n        \n        for (std::size_t chunk = 0; chunk < data.size(); chunk += 64) {\n            std::uint32_t w[64];\n            for (int i = 0; i < 16; i++) {\n                w[i] = (data[chunk + i*4] << 24) | (data[chunk + i*4 + 1] << 16) | \n                       (data[chunk + i*4 + 2] << 8) | data[chunk + i*4 + 3];\n            }\n            \n            for (int i = 16; i < 64; i++) {\n                w[i] = gamma1(w[i-2]) + w[i-7] + gamma0(w[i-15]) + w[i-16];\n            }\n            \n            std::uint32_t a = h[0], b = h[1], c = h[2], d = h[3];\n            std::uint32_t e = h[4], f = h[5], g = h[6], h_val = h[7];\n            \n            for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {\n                std::uint32_t t1 = h_val + sigma1(e) + ch(e, f, g) + k[i] + w[i];\n                std::uint32_t t2 = sigma0(a) + maj(a, b, c);\n                h_val = g;\n                g = f;\n                f = e;\n                e = d + t1;\n                d = c;\n                c = b;\n                b = a;\n                a = t1 + t2;\n            }\n            \n            h[0] += a; h[1] += b; h[2] += c; h[3] += d;\n            h[4] += e; h[5] += f; h[6] += g; h[7] += h_val;\n        }\n        \n        std::stringstream ss;\n        for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {\n            ss << std::hex << std::setw(8) << std::setfill('0') << h[i];\n        }\n        return ss.str();\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    std::string input;\n    std::cout << \"Введите строку для хеширования: \";\n    std::getline(std::cin, input);\n    \n    std::string hash_result = SHA256::hash(input);\n    std::cout << \"SHA-256 хеш: \" << hash_result << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}

#include <vector>\n#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass IntCollection {\n    vector<int> data;\npublic:\n    void add(int value) { data.push_back(value); }\n    class Iterator {\n        size_t index;\n        const vector<int>& ref;\n    public:\n        Iterator(const vector<int>& vec, size_t idx) : ref(vec), index(idx) {}\n        bool operator!=(const Iterator& other) const { return index != other.index; }\n        int operator*() const { return ref[index]; }\n        Iterator& operator++() { ++index; return *this; }\n    };\n    Iterator begin() const { return Iterator(data, 0); }\n    Iterator end() const { return Iterator(data, data.size()); }\n};

#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nstruct TimeInterval {\n    int startHour, startMinute;\n    int endHour, endMinute;\n    \n    bool overlaps(const TimeInterval& other) const {\n        int thisStart = startHour * 60 + startMinute;\n        int thisEnd = endHour * 60 + endMinute;\n        int otherStart = other.startHour * 60 + other.startMinute;\n        int otherEnd = other.endHour * 60 + other.endMinute;\n        \n        return !(thisEnd <= otherStart || thisStart >= otherEnd);\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    TimeInterval interval1 = {9, 0, 12, 0};\n    TimeInterval interval2 = {11, 0, 14, 0};\n    TimeInterval interval3 = {14, 0, 16, 0};\n    \n    cout << \"Интервал 1 пересекается с интервалом 2: \" \n         << (interval1.overlaps(interval2) ? \"да\" : \"нет\") << endl;\n    cout << \"Интервал 1 пересекается с интервалом 3: \" \n         << (interval1.overlaps(interval3) ? \"да\" : \"нет\") << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <memory>\n\ntemplate<typename T>\nclass Iterator {\npublic:\n    virtual bool hasNext() = 0;\n    virtual T next() = 0;\n    virtual ~Iterator() {}\n};\n\ntemplate<typename T>\nclass Aggregate {\npublic:\n    virtual std::unique_ptr<Iterator<T>> createIterator() = 0;\n    virtual ~Aggregate() {}\n};\n\n// Конкретная коллекция\nclass IntegerCollection : public Aggregate<int> {\n    std::vector<int> data;\npublic:\n    void add(int value) { data.push_back(value); }\n    int get(int index) const { return data[index]; }\n    int size() const { return data.size(); }\n    std::unique_ptr<Iterator<int>> createIterator() override;\n};\n\n// Конкретный итератор\nclass IntegerIterator : public Iterator<int> {\n    IntegerCollection* collection;\n    int position;\npublic:\n    IntegerIterator(IntegerCollection* col) : collection(col), position(0) {}\n    bool hasNext() override {\n        return position < collection->size();\n    }\n    int next() override {\n        if(hasNext()) {\n            return collection->get(position++);\n        }\n        throw \"No more elements\";\n    }\n};\n\nstd::unique_ptr<Iterator<int>> IntegerCollection::createIterator() {\n    return std::make_unique<IntegerIterator>(this);\n}\n\nint main() {\n    IntegerCollection collection;\n    for(int i = 1; i <= 5; i++) {\n        collection.add(i * 10);\n    }\n    auto iterator = collection.createIterator();\n    std::cout << \"Collection elements: \";\n    while(iterator->hasNext()) {\n        std::cout << iterator->next() << \" \";\n    }\n    std::cout << std::endl;\n    // Можно создать новый итератор\n    auto iterator2 = collection.createIterator();\n    std::cout << \"First element: \" << iterator2->next() << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Second element: \" << iterator2->next() << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n int number;\n cout << \"Введите целое положительное число: \";\n cin >> number;\n \n if (number <= 0) {\n cout << \"Ошибка: число должно быть положительным\" << endl;\n return 1;\n }\n \n int sum = 0;\n for (int i = 1; i <= number / 2; i++) {\n if (number % i == 0) {\n sum += i;\n }\n }\n \n bool is_perfect = (sum == number);\n \n if (is_perfect) {\n cout << number << \" является совершенным числом\" << endl;\n } else {\n cout << number << \" не является совершенным числом\" << endl;\n }\n return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Shape {\nprotected:\n    double x, y;\npublic:\n    Shape(double xVal, double yVal) : x(xVal), y(yVal) {}\n    virtual double area() const = 0;\n    virtual double perimeter() const = 0;\n    virtual void display() const {\n        cout << \"Shape at (\" << x << \", \" << y << \")\" << endl;\n    }\n    virtual ~Shape() = default;\n};\n\nclass Circle : public Shape {\n    double radius;\npublic:\n    Circle(double xVal, double yVal, double r) : Shape(xVal, yVal), radius(r) {}\n    double area() const override {\n        return 3.14159 * radius * radius;\n    }\n    double perimeter() const override {\n        return 2 * 3.14159 * radius;\n    }\n    void display() const override {\n        cout << \"Circle at (\" << x << \", \" << y << \") with radius \" << radius << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass Rectangle : public Shape {\n    double width, height;\npublic:\n    Rectangle(double xVal, double yVal, double w, double h) : Shape(xVal, yVal), width(w), height(h) {}\n    double area() const override {\n        return width * height;\n    }\n    double perimeter() const override {\n        return 2 * (width + height);\n    }\n    void display() const override {\n        cout << \"Rectangle at (\" << x << \", \" << y << \") \" << width << \"x\" << height << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Circle circle(0, 0, 5);\n    Rectangle rect(2, 3, 4, 6);\n    Shape* shapes[] = {&circle, &rect};\n    for(Shape* shape : shapes) {\n        shape->display();\n        cout << \"Area: \" << shape->area() << \", Perimeter: \" << shape->perimeter() << endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <fstream>\n#include <string>\n#include <vector>\n#include <thread>\n#include <mutex>\n#include <queue>\n#include <atomic>\n#include <condition_variable>\n#include <functional>\n#include <memory>\n#include <sstream>\n#include <iterator>\n#include <cstdio>\n\nclass ThreadPool {\n    std::vector<std::thread> workers;\n    std::queue<std::function<void()>> tasks;\n    std::mutex queue_mutex;\n    std::condition_variable condition;\n    std::atomic<bool> stop{false};\n    \npublic:\n    ThreadPool(std::size_t threads) {\n        for (std::size_t i = 0; i < threads; ++i) {\n            workers.emplace_back([this] {\n                while (true) {\n                    std::function<void()> task;\n                    {\n                        std::unique_lock<std::mutex> lock(queue_mutex);\n                        condition.wait(lock, [this] {\n                            return stop || !tasks.empty();\n                        });\n                        if (stop && tasks.empty()) return;\n                        task = std::move(tasks.front());\n                        tasks.pop();\n                    }\n                    task();\n                }\n            });\n        }\n    }\n    \n    template<class F>\n    void enqueue(F&& f) {\n        {\n            std::unique_lock<std::mutex> lock(queue_mutex);\n            tasks.emplace(std::forward<F>(f));\n        }\n        condition.notify_one();\n    }\n    \n    ~ThreadPool() {\n        stop = true;\n        condition.notify_all();\n        for (std::thread& worker : workers) {\n            worker.join();\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nclass CSVParallelProcessor {\n    std::mutex result_mutex;\n    std::vector<std::vector<std::string>> all_results;\n    std::atomic<int> processed_rows{0};\n    \npublic:\n    void processFile(const std::string& filename) {\n        std::ifstream file(filename);\n        if (!file.is_open()) {\n            std::cerr << \"Failed to open file: \" << filename << std::endl;\n            return;\n        }\n        \n        std::string line;\n        std::getline(file, line); // Пропуск заголовка\n        \n        ThreadPool pool(std::thread::hardware_concurrency());\n        const std::size_t batch_size = 100;\n        std::vector<std::string> batch;\n        batch.reserve(batch_size);\n        \n        while (std::getline(file, line)) {\n            batch.push_back(line);\n            if (batch.size() >= batch_size) {\n                // Используем shared_ptr для безопасного разделения данных\n                auto batch_ptr = std::make_shared<std::vector<std::string>>(std::move(batch));\n                pool.enqueue([this, batch_ptr]() {\n                    processBatch(*batch_ptr);\n                });\n                batch.clear();\n                batch.reserve(batch_size);\n            }\n        }\n        \n        if (!batch.empty()) {\n            auto batch_ptr = std::make_shared<std::vector<std::string>>(std::move(batch));\n            pool.enqueue([this, batch_ptr]() {\n                processBatch(*batch_ptr);\n            });\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void processBatch(const std::vector<std::string>& batch) {\n        std::vector<std::vector<std::string>> batch_results;\n        batch_results.reserve(batch.size());\n        \n        for (const std::string& line : batch) {\n            std::vector<std::string> fields;\n            std::stringstream ss(line);\n            std::string field;\n            while (std::getline(ss, field, ',')) {\n                fields.push_back(field);\n            }\n            batch_results.push_back(std::move(fields));\n        }\n        \n        {\n            std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(result_mutex);\n            all_results.insert(all_results.end(), \n                              std::make_move_iterator(batch_results.begin()), \n                              std::make_move_iterator(batch_results.end()));\n        }\n        \n        processed_rows += static_cast<int>(batch.size());\n    }\n    \n    void printResults() {\n        std::cout << \"Total rows processed: \" << processed_rows << std::endl;\n        std::cout << \"Rows in results vector: \" << all_results.size() << std::endl;\n        if (!all_results.empty()) {\n            std::cout << \"First row: \";\n            for (const std::string& field : all_results[0]) {\n                std::cout << '\\\"' << field << \"\\\" \";\n            }\n            std::cout << std::endl;\n            \n            if (all_results.size() > 1) {\n                std::cout << \"Last row: \";\n                for (const std::string& field : all_results.back()) {\n                    std::cout << '\\\"' << field << \"\\\" \";\n                }\n                std::cout << std::endl;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    CSVParallelProcessor processor;\n    \n    // Создаем тестовый CSV файл\n    std::ofstream test(\"big.csv\");\n    test << \"id,name,value\\n\";\n    for (int i = 0; i < 10000; ++i) {\n        test << i << \",Name\" << i << \",\" << i * 10 << \"\\n\";\n    }\n    test.close();\n    \n    std::cout << \"Starting parallel CSV processing...\" << std::endl;\n    processor.processFile(\"big.csv\");\n    processor.printResults();\n    \n    // Удаляем тестовый файл\n    std::remove(\"big.csv\");\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <vector>\n#include <algorithm>\n#include <cstdlib>\n#include <ctime>\n#include <chrono>\n\nint partition(std::vector<std::string>& arr, int low, int high, bool descending = false) {\n    std::string pivot = arr[high];\n    int i = low - 1;\n    \n    for(int j = low; j < high; j++) {\n        bool condition = descending ? (arr[j] > pivot) : (arr[j] < pivot);\n        \n        if(condition) {\n            i++;\n            std::swap(arr[i], arr[j]);\n        }\n    }\n    \n    std::swap(arr[i + 1], arr[high]);\n    return i + 1;\n}\n\nint randomizedPartition(std::vector<std::string>& arr, int low, int high, bool descending = false) {\n    int random = low + std::rand() % (high - low + 1);\n    std::swap(arr[random], arr[high]);\n    return partition(arr, low, high, descending);\n}\n\nvoid quicksort(std::vector<std::string>& arr, int low, int high, bool descending = false) {\n    if(low < high) {\n        int pi = randomizedPartition(arr, low, high, descending);\n        quicksort(arr, low, pi - 1, descending);\n        quicksort(arr, pi + 1, high, descending);\n    }\n}\n\nvoid quickSortStrings(std::vector<std::string>& strings, bool descending = false) {\n    std::srand(std::time(nullptr));\n    quicksort(strings, 0, strings.size() - 1, descending);\n}\n\nstd::vector<std::string> generateRandomStrings(int count, int min_len = 3, int max_len = 10) {\n    std::vector<std::string> strings;\n    std::string chars = \"abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyzABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ\";\n    \n    for(int i = 0; i < count; i++) {\n        int len = min_len + std::rand() % (max_len - min_len + 1);\n        std::string str;\n        \n        for(int j = 0; j < len; j++) {\n            str += chars[std::rand() % chars.length()];\n        }\n        \n        strings.push_back(str);\n    }\n    \n    return strings;\n}\n\nbool isSorted(const std::vector<std::string>& arr, bool descending = false) {\n    for(size_t i = 1; i < arr.size(); i++) {\n        if(descending) {\n            if(arr[i - 1] < arr[i]) return false;\n        } else {\n            if(arr[i - 1] > arr[i]) return false;\n        }\n    }\n    return true;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::srand(std::time(nullptr));\n    \n    std::cout << \"Quicksort for Strings:\\n\";\n    \n    // Тест 1: Базовый тест\n    std::vector<std::string> test1 = {\"banana\", \"apple\", \"cherry\", \"date\", \"elderberry\", \"fig\"};\n    std::cout << \"\\nTest 1 - Basic strings:\\n\";\n    std::cout << \"Original: \";\n    for(const auto& s : test1) std::cout << s << \" \";\n    \n    std::vector<std::string> test1_copy = test1;\n    quickSortStrings(test1_copy);\n    std::cout << \"\\nSorted (ascending): \";\n    for(const auto& s : test1_copy) std::cout << s << \" \";\n    std::cout << \"\\nIs sorted: \" << (isSorted(test1_copy) ? \"YES\" : \"NO\") << std::endl;\n    \n    // Тест 2: Случайные строки\n    std::cout << \"\\nTest 2 - Random strings:\\n\";\n    std::vector<std::string> random_strings = generateRandomStrings(15, 3, 7);\n    std::cout << \"Original (first 10): \";\n    for(int i = 0; i < std::min(10, (int)random_strings.size()); i++) {\n        std::cout << random_strings[i] << \" \";\n    }\n    \n    quickSortStrings(random_strings, true); // descending\n    std::cout << \"\\nSorted (descending, first 10): \";\n    for(int i = 0; i < std::min(10, (int)random_strings.size()); i++) {\n        std::cout << random_strings[i] << \" \";\n    }\n    std::cout << \"\\nIs sorted descending: \" << (isSorted(random_strings, true) ? \"YES\" : \"NO\") << std::endl;\n    \n    // Тест 3: Большой набор данных\n    std::cout << \"\\nTest 3 - Performance test (10000 strings):\\n\";\n    std::vector<std::string> large_set = generateRandomStrings(10000, 5, 15);\n    \n    auto start = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\n    quickSortStrings(large_set);\n    auto end = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\n    \n    auto duration = std::chrono::duration_cast<std::chrono::milliseconds>(end - start);\n    std::cout << \"Time taken: \" << duration.count() << \" ms\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Is sorted: \" << (isSorted(large_set) ? \"YES\" : \"NO\") << std::endl;\n    \n    // Тест 4: Сравнение со стандартной сортировкой\n    std::cout << \"\\nTest 4 - Comparison with std::sort:\\n\";\n    std::vector<std::string> comparison_set = generateRandomStrings(1000, 5, 10);\n    std::vector<std::string> copy1 = comparison_set;\n    std::vector<std::string> copy2 = comparison_set;\n    \n    auto start1 = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\n    quickSortStrings(copy1);\n    auto end1 = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\n    \n    auto start2 = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\n    std::sort(copy2.begin(), copy2.end());\n    auto end2 = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();\n    \n    auto duration1 = std::chrono::duration_cast<std::chrono::microseconds>(end1 - start1);\n    auto duration2 = std::chrono::duration_cast<std::chrono::microseconds>(end2 - start2);\n    \n    std::cout << \"Quicksort time: \" << duration1.count() << \" microseconds\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"std::sort time: \" << duration2.count() << \" microseconds\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Results match: \" << (copy1 == copy2 ? \"YES\" : \"NO\") << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <cmath>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    double volatility, profitMargin, debtRatio, marketShare;\n    int companyAge, managementScore;\n    \n    cout << \"Волатильность акций (%): \";\n    cin >> volatility;\n    cout << \"Рентабельность (%): \";\n    cin >> profitMargin;\n    cout << \"Долг/капитал (%): \";\n    cin >> debtRatio;\n    cout << \"Доля рынка (%): \";\n    cin >> marketShare;\n    cout << \"Возраст компании (лет): \";\n    cin >> companyAge;\n    cout << \"Оценка менеджмента (1-10): \";\n    cin >> managementScore;\n    \n    int score = 0;\n    \n    // Волатильность (0-20 баллов)\n    if (volatility < 5) score += 20;\n    else if (volatility < 10) score += 15;\n    else if (volatility < 20) score += 10;\n    else if (volatility < 30) score += 5;\n    else score += 0;\n    \n    // Рентабельность (0-25 баллов)\n    if (profitMargin > 20) score += 25;\n    else if (profitMargin > 15) score += 20;\n    else if (profitMargin > 10) score += 15;\n    else if (profitMargin > 5) score += 10;\n    else if (profitMargin > 0) score += 5;\n    else score += 0;\n    \n    // Долговая нагрузка (0-20 баллов)\n    if (debtRatio < 10) score += 20;\n    else if (debtRatio < 30) score += 15;\n    else if (debtRatio < 50) score += 10;\n    else if (debtRatio < 70) score += 5;\n    else score += 0;\n    \n    // Доля рынка (0-15 баллов)\n    if (marketShare > 30) score += 15;\n    else if (marketShare > 20) score += 12;\n    else if (marketShare > 10) score += 9;\n    else if (marketShare > 5) score += 6;\n    else if (marketShare > 1) score += 3;\n    else score += 0;\n    \n    // Возраст компании (0-10 баллов)\n    if (companyAge > 50) score += 10;\n    else if (companyAge > 20) score += 8;\n    else if (companyAge > 10) score += 6;\n    else if (companyAge > 5) score += 4;\n    else if (companyAge > 2) score += 2;\n    else score += 0;\n    \n    // Менеджмент (0-10 баллов)\n    score += managementScore; // 1-10 баллов напрямую\n    \n    // Определение рейтинга\n    string rating;\n    string recommendation;\n    \n    if (score >= 90) {\n        rating = \"AAA\";\n        recommendation = \"Высоконадежная инвестиция\";\n    } else if (score >= 80) {\n        rating = \"AA\";\n        recommendation = \"Очень надежная\";\n    } else if (score >= 70) {\n        rating = \"A\";\n        recommendation = \"Надежная\";\n    } else if (score >= 60) {\n        rating = \"BBB\";\n        recommendation = \"Средний риск\";\n    } else if (score >= 50) {\n        rating = \"BB\";\n        recommendation = \"Спекулятивная\";\n    } else if (score >= 40) {\n        rating = \"B\";\n        recommendation = \"Высокий риск\";\n    } else if (score >= 30) {\n        rating = \"CCC\";\n        recommendation = \"Очень высокий риск\";\n    } else if (score >= 20) {\n        rating = \"CC\";\n        recommendation = \"Крайне рискованная\";\n    } else if (score >= 10) {\n        rating = \"C\";\n        recommendation = \"Почти банкрот\";\n    } else {\n        rating = \"D\";\n        recommendation = \"Дефолт\";\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"\\n=== ОЦЕНКА РИСКА ===\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Общий балл: \" << score << \"/100\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Рейтинг: \" << rating << endl;\n    cout << \"Рекомендация: \" << recommendation << endl;\n    \n    // Дополнительные предупреждения\n    if (debtRatio > 80 && profitMargin < 5) {\n        cout << \"ВНИМАНИЕ: Высокая долговая нагрузка при низкой рентабельности!\" << endl;\n    }\n    if (volatility > 40 && companyAge < 5) {\n        cout << \"ВНИМАНИЕ: Молодая компания с высокой волатильностью!\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <sstream>\n#include <cctype>\n\nbool validateIPAddress(std::string ip) {\n    std::stringstream ss(ip);\n    std::string segment;\n    int count = 0;\n    \n    while (getline(ss, segment, '.')) {\n        count++;\n        if (count > 4) return false;\n        \n        if (segment.empty() || segment.length() > 3) return false;\n        \n        for (char c : segment) {\n            if (!std::isdigit(c)) return false;\n        }\n        \n        int num = std::stoi(segment);\n        if (num < 0 || num > 255) return false;\n        \n        if (segment != std::to_string(num)) return false;\n    }\n    \n    return count == 4;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::cout << std::boolalpha << validateIPAddress(\"192.168.1.1\") << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <climits>\nusing namespace std;\n\nstruct MinHeapNode {\n    int v;\n    int dist;\n};\n\nclass MinHeap {\n    vector<MinHeapNode*> heap;\n    vector<int> pos;\n    int size;\n    void swapNodes(int i, int j) {\n        MinHeapNode* temp = heap[i];\n        heap[i] = heap[j];\n        heap[j] = temp;\n        pos[heap[i]->v] = i;\n        pos[heap[j]->v] = j;\n    }\n    void heapify(int idx) {\n        int smallest = idx;\n        int left = 2 * idx + 1;\n        int right = 2 * idx + 2;\n        if (left < size && heap[left]->dist < heap[smallest]->dist) smallest = left;\n        if (right < size && heap[right]->dist < heap[smallest]->dist) smallest = right;\n        if (smallest != idx) {\n            swapNodes(idx, smallest);\n            heapify(smallest);\n        }\n    }\npublic:\n    MinHeap(int capacity) {\n        heap.resize(capacity);\n        pos.resize(capacity, -1);\n        size = 0;\n    }\n    bool isEmpty() { return size == 0; }\n    void insert(int v, int dist) {\n        MinHeapNode* node = new MinHeapNode();\n        node->v = v;\n        node->dist = dist;\n        heap[size] = node;\n        pos[v] = size;\n        size++;\n        int i = size - 1;\n        while (i > 0 && heap[(i - 1) / 2]->dist > heap[i]->dist) {\n            swapNodes(i, (i - 1) / 2);\n            i = (i - 1) / 2;\n        }\n    }\n    MinHeapNode* extractMin() {\n        if (size == 0) return nullptr;\n        MinHeapNode* root = heap[0];\n        swapNodes(0, size - 1);\n        size--;\n        heapify(0);\n        pos[root->v] = -1;\n        return root;\n    }\n    void decreaseKey(int v, int dist) {\n        int i = pos[v];\n        heap[i]->dist = dist;\n        while (i > 0 && heap[(i - 1) / 2]->dist > heap[i]->dist) {\n            swapNodes(i, (i - 1) / 2);\n            i = (i - 1) / 2;\n        }\n    }\n    bool isInHeap(int v) { return pos[v] != -1; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    int V = 3;\n    MinHeap heap(V);\n    heap.insert(0, 5);\n    heap.insert(1, 3);\n    heap.insert(2, 8);\n    heap.decreaseKey(2, 1);\n    while (!heap.isEmpty()) {\n        MinHeapNode* node = heap.extractMin();\n        cout << \"Вершина: \" << node->v << \", Расстояние: \" << node->dist << endl;\n    }\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Base {\npublic:\n    virtual void log(const string& message) {\n        cout << \"Base log: \" << message << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass Derived : public Base {\npublic:\n    void log(const string& message) override {\n        cout << \"Derived adding timestamp: \";\n        Base::log(message);\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Derived d;\n    Base& b = d;\n    b.log(\"test message\");\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <functional>\n\nint main() {\n    auto get_operation = [](char op) -> std::function<int(int, int)> {\n        if (op == '+') return [](int a, int b) { return a + b; };\n        else return [](int a, int b) { return a - b; };\n    };\n    auto add = get_operation('+');\n    auto sub = get_operation('-');\n    std::cout << add(5, 3) << std::endl;\n    std::cout << sub(5, 3) << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <cstring>\nusing namespace std;\n\nconst int MAX_VERTICES = 10;\n\nunion GraphRepresentation {\n    struct {\n        int vertices;\n        bool adjacency_matrix[MAX_VERTICES][MAX_VERTICES];\n    } adjacency;\n    \n    struct {\n        int vertices;\n        int edges;\n        struct {\n            int from;\n            int to;\n            int weight;\n        } edge_list[MAX_VERTICES * MAX_VERTICES];\n    } edge_list;\n    \n    struct {\n        int vertices;\n        int edges;\n        bool incidence_matrix[MAX_VERTICES][MAX_VERTICES * MAX_VERTICES];\n    } incidence;\n    \n    GraphRepresentation(int v = 0) {\n        memset(this, 0, sizeof(GraphRepresentation));\n        adjacency.vertices = v;\n        edge_list.vertices = v;\n        incidence.vertices = v;\n    }\n    \n    void add_edge_adjacency(int from, int to, bool directed = false) {\n        if (from >= 0 && from < adjacency.vertices && to >= 0 && to < adjacency.vertices) {\n            adjacency.adjacency_matrix[from][to] = true;\n            if (!directed) {\n                adjacency.adjacency_matrix[to][from] = true;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void add_edge_list(int from, int to, int weight = 1) {\n        if (edge_list.edges < MAX_VERTICES * MAX_VERTICES) {\n            edge_list.edge_list[edge_list.edges].from = from;\n            edge_list.edge_list[edge_list.edges].to = to;\n            edge_list.edge_list[edge_list.edges].weight = weight;\n            edge_list.edges++;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void add_edge_incidence(int from, int to, bool directed = false) {\n        if (incidence.edges < MAX_VERTICES * MAX_VERTICES) {\n            incidence.incidence_matrix[from][incidence.edges] = 1;\n            incidence.incidence_matrix[to][incidence.edges] = directed ? -1 : 1;\n            incidence.edges++;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void print_adjacency() const {\n        cout << \"Матрица смежности (\" << adjacency.vertices << \" вершин):\" << endl;\n        cout << \"   \";\n        for (int i = 0; i < adjacency.vertices; i++) cout << i << \" \";\n        cout << endl;\n        \n        for (int i = 0; i < adjacency.vertices; i++) {\n            cout << i << \": \";\n            for (int j = 0; j < adjacency.vertices; j++) {\n                cout << adjacency.adjacency_matrix[i][j] << \" \";\n            }\n            cout << endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void print_edge_list() const {\n        cout << \"Список ребер (\" << edge_list.vertices << \" вершин, \" \n             << edge_list.edges << \" ребер):\" << endl;\n        for (int i = 0; i < edge_list.edges; i++) {\n            cout << \"  \" << edge_list.edge_list[i].from << \" -> \" \n                 << edge_list.edge_list[i].to << \" (вес: \" \n                 << edge_list.edge_list[i].weight << \")\" << endl;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void print_incidence() const {\n        cout << \"Матрица инцидентности (\" << incidence.vertices << \" вершин, \" \n             << incidence.edges << \" ребер):\" << endl;\n        cout << \"   \";\n        for (int j = 0; j < incidence.edges; j++) cout << \"e\" << j << \" \";\n        cout << endl;\n        \n        for (int i = 0; i < incidence.vertices; i++) {\n            cout << i << \": \";\n            for (int j = 0; j < incidence.edges; j++) {\n                cout << incidence.incidence_matrix[i][j] << \" \";\n            }\n            cout << endl;\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    cout << \"Представления графов с использованием union:\" << endl;\n    cout << \"============================================\" << endl;\n    \n    GraphRepresentation graph(5);\n    \n    graph.add_edge_adjacency(0, 1);\n    graph.add_edge_adjacency(0, 2);\n    graph.add_edge_adjacency(1, 3);\n    graph.add_edge_adjacency(2, 3);\n    graph.add_edge_adjacency(3, 4);\n    \n    graph.add_edge_list(0, 1, 5);\n    graph.add_edge_list(0, 2, 3);\n    graph.add_edge_list(1, 3, 2);\n    graph.add_edge_list(2, 3, 1);\n    graph.add_edge_list(3, 4, 4);\n    \n    graph.add_edge_incidence(0, 1);\n    graph.add_edge_incidence(0, 2);\n    graph.add_edge_incidence(1, 3);\n    graph.add_edge_incidence(2, 3);\n    graph.add_edge_incidence(3, 4);\n    \n    cout << \"\\n1. Матрица смежности:\" << endl;\n    graph.print_adjacency();\n    \n    cout << \"\\n2. Список ребер:\" << endl;\n    graph.print_edge_list();\n    \n    cout << \"\\n3. Матрица инцидентности:\" << endl;\n    graph.print_incidence();\n    \n    cout << \"\\nСтатистика:\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Размер GraphRepresentation: \" << sizeof(GraphRepresentation) << \" байт\" << endl;\n    \n    cout << \"\\nДемонстрация доступа к данным:\" << endl;\n    cout << \"Есть ли ребро 0->1 в матрице смежности? \" \n         << graph.adjacency.adjacency_matrix[0][1] << endl;\n    cout << \"Первое ребро в списке: \" << graph.edge_list.edge_list[0].from \n         << \" -> \" << graph.edge_list.edge_list[0].to << endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <algorithm>\n#include <cmath>\n\nclass Polynomial {\n    std::vector<double> coeffs; // coeffs[0] + coeffs[1]*x + coeffs[2]*x^2 + ...\n    void trim() {\n        while(!coeffs.empty() && coeffs.back() == 0) {\n            coeffs.pop_back();\n        }\n    }\npublic:\n    Polynomial(const std::vector<double>& coeffs = {}) : coeffs(coeffs) { trim(); }\n    Polynomial operator+(const Polynomial& other) const {\n        size_t maxSize = std::max(coeffs.size(), other.coeffs.size());\n        std::vector<double> resultCoeffs(maxSize, 0);\n        for(size_t i = 0; i < maxSize; i++) {\n            double a = (i < coeffs.size()) ? coeffs[i] : 0;\n            double b = (i < other.coeffs.size()) ? other.coeffs[i] : 0;\n            resultCoeffs[i] = a + b;\n        }\n        return Polynomial(resultCoeffs);\n    }\n    double evaluate(double x) const {\n        double result = 0;\n        double power = 1;\n        for(double coeff : coeffs) {\n            result += coeff * power;\n            power *= x;\n        }\n        return result;\n    }\n    void print() const {\n        if(coeffs.empty()) { std::cout << \"0\"; return; }\n        for(int i = coeffs.size()-1; i >= 0; i--) {\n            if(coeffs[i] != 0) {\n                if(i < coeffs.size()-1 && coeffs[i] > 0) std::cout << \" + \";\n                if(coeffs[i] < 0) std::cout << \" - \";\n                std::cout << std::abs(coeffs[i]);\n                if(i > 0) std::cout << \"x\";\n                if(i > 1) std::cout << \"^\" << i;\n            }\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Polynomial p1({1, 2, 3}); // 3x^2 + 2x + 1\n    Polynomial p2({2, 0, 4, 1}); // x^3 + 4x^2 + 0x + 2\n    Polynomial sum = p1 + p2;\n    std::cout << \"p1 = \"; p1.print(); std::cout << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"p2 = \"; p2.print(); std::cout << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"p1 + p2 = \"; sum.print(); std::cout << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Sum evaluated at x=2: \" << sum.evaluate(2) << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n\nvoid processString(std::string s) {\n    std::cout << \"Processing: \" << s << std::endl;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::string data = \"Important data\";\n    processString(std::move(data));\n    \n    std::cout << \"Original after move: '\" << data << \"'\" << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    float* fPtr = new float;\n    *fPtr = 3.14159f;\n    cout << \"Число Pi: \" << *fPtr << endl;\n    delete fPtr;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <any>\n#include <string>\n#include <vector>\n#include <typeinfo>\n#include <optional>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Storage {\n    vector<any> data;\npublic:\n    template<typename T>\n    void add(const T& value) {\n        data.push_back(value);\n    }\n    \n    template<typename T>\n    optional<T> get(size_t index) const {\n        if (index >= data.size()) {\n            return nullopt;\n        }\n        try {\n            return any_cast<T>(data[index]);\n        } catch (const bad_any_cast&) {\n            return nullopt;\n        }\n    }\n    \n    void print_all() const {\n        for (size_t i = 0; i < data.size(); ++i) {\n            cout << \"[\" << i << \"] type: \" << data[i].type().name();\n            \n            if (data[i].type() == typeid(int)) {\n                cout << \" value: \" << any_cast<int>(data[i]);\n            } else if (data[i].type() == typeid(string)) {\n                cout << \" value: '\" << any_cast<string>(data[i]) << \"'\";\n            } else if (data[i].type() == typeid(double)) {\n                cout << \" value: \" << any_cast<double>(data[i]);\n            }\n            cout << endl;\n        }\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    Storage storage;\n    storage.add(42);\n    storage.add(3.14);\n    storage.add(string(\"Hello\"));\n    storage.add(100);\n    \n    storage.print_all();\n    \n    auto val = storage.get<int>(0);\n    if (val) {\n        cout << \"\\nGot int: \" << *val << endl;\n    }\n    \n    auto bad_val = storage.get<string>(1);\n    if (!bad_val) {\n        cout << \"Cannot get string from double storage\" << endl;\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <memory>\n#include <queue>\n#include <string>\nusing namespace std;\n\nclass Message {\n    string content;\npublic:\n    Message(const string& c) : content(c) {}\n    void process() {\n        cout << \"Processing message: \" << content << endl;\n    }\n};\n\nclass MessageQueue {\n    queue<unique_ptr<Message>> messages;\npublic:\n    void enqueue(unique_ptr<Message> msg) {\n        messages.push(move(msg));\n    }\n    \n    unique_ptr<Message> dequeue() {\n        if (messages.empty()) {\n            return nullptr;\n        }\n        auto msg = move(messages.front());\n        messages.pop();\n        return msg;\n    }\n    \n    size_t size() const { return messages.size(); }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    MessageQueue mq;\n    mq.enqueue(make_unique<Message>(\"Hello\"));\n    mq.enqueue(make_unique<Message>(\"World\"));\n    \n    while (auto msg = mq.dequeue()) {\n        msg->process();\n    }\n    cout << \"Queue size: \" << mq.size() << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <memory>\nclass ResourceHolder {\n    std::unique_ptr<int> resource;\npublic:\n    ResourceHolder(int value) : resource(std::make_unique<int>(value)) {}\n    void print() const { std::cout << \"Resource: \" << *resource << std::endl; }\n};\nint main() {\n    ResourceHolder holder(888);\n    holder.print();\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\n\nclass HypotenuseCalculator {\npublic:\n    double calculate(double a, double b) {\n        return std::sqrt(a*a + b*b);\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    HypotenuseCalculator calc;\n    std::cout << \"Hypotenuse of triangle with sides 3 and 4: \" << calc.calculate(3, 4) << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    int n;\n    long long product = 1;\n    \n    cout << \"Введите N: \";\n    cin >> n;\n    \n    if (n <= 0) {\n        cout << \"N должно быть положительным числом!\" << endl;\n        return 1;\n    }\n    \n    for (int i = 1; i <= n; i++) {\n        product *= i;\n    }\n    \n    cout << \"Произведение чисел от 1 до \" << n << \" = \" << product << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n\nint main() {\n    auto square = [](int x) { return x * x; };\n    \n    std::cout << \"Квадрат 5: \" << square(5) << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Квадрат 12: \" << square(12) << std::endl;\n    \n    std::vector<int> nums = {1, 2, 3, 4, 5};\n    std::cout << \"Квадраты элементов: \";\n    for (int n : nums) {\n        std::cout << square(n) << \" \";\n    }\n    std::cout << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <iomanip>\n#include <cmath>\n#include <limits>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    int mainChoice, subChoice;\n    double value, result;\n    bool continueProgram = true;\n    \n    cout << \"=== КОНВЕРТЕР ЕДИНИЦ ИЗМЕРЕНИЯ ===\" << endl;\n    \n    while (continueProgram) {\n        cout << \"\\n=== ОСНОВНОЕ МЕНЮ ===\" << endl;\n        cout << \"1. Конвертация длины\" << endl;\n        cout << \"2. Конвертация массы\" << endl;\n        cout << \"3. Конвертация температуры\" << endl;\n        cout << \"4. Конвертация объема\" << endl;\n        cout << \"5. Выход\" << endl;\n        cout << \"Выберите категорию (1-5): \";\n        \n        cin >> mainChoice;\n        \n        if (cin.fail()) {\n            cin.clear();\n            cin.ignore(numeric_limits<streamsize>::max(), '\\n');\n            cout << \"Ошибка ввода. Пожалуйста, введите число от 1 до 5.\" << endl;\n            continue;\n        }\n        \n        if (mainChoice == 5) {\n            cout << \"Программа завершена. До свидания!\" << endl;\n            break;\n        }\n        \n        if (mainChoice < 1 || mainChoice > 4) {\n            cout << \"Неверный выбор. Пожалуйста, выберите от 1 до 5.\" << endl;\n            continue;\n        }\n        \n        // Ввод значения для конвертации\n        cout << \"Введите значение для конвертации: \";\n        cin >> value;\n        \n        if (cin.fail()) {\n            cin.clear();\n            cin.ignore(numeric_limits<streamsize>::max(), '\\n');\n            cout << \"Ошибка ввода. Пожалуйста, введите числовое значение.\" << endl;\n            continue;\n        }\n        \n        // Вложенные меню для каждой категории\n        switch (mainChoice) {\n            case 1: { // Длина\n                cout << \"\\n=== КОНВЕРТАЦИЯ ДЛИНЫ ===\" << endl;\n                cout << \"1. Метры -> Километры\" << endl;\n                cout << \"2. Километры -> Метры\" << endl;\n                cout << \"3. Футы -> Метры\" << endl;\n                cout << \"4. Метры -> Футы\" << endl;\n                cout << \"5. Дюймы -> Сантиметры\" << endl;\n                cout << \"6. Сантиметры -> Дюймы\" << endl;\n                cout << \"Выберите тип конвертации (1-6): \";\n                cin >> subChoice;\n                \n                if (cin.fail()) {\n                    cin.clear();\n                    cin.ignore(numeric_limits<streamsize>::max(), '\\n');\n                    cout << \"Ошибка ввода. Пожалуйста, введите число от 1 до 6.\" << endl;\n                    break;\n                }\n                \n                switch (subChoice) {\n                    case 1:\n                        result = value / 1000.0;\n                        cout << value << \" метров = \" << result << \" километров\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 2:\n                        result = value * 1000.0;\n                        cout << value << \" километров = \" << result << \" метров\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 3:\n                        result = value * 0.3048;\n                        cout << value << \" футов = \" << result << \" метров\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 4:\n                        result = value / 0.3048;\n                        cout << value << \" метров = \" << result << \" футов\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 5:\n                        result = value * 2.54;\n                        cout << value << \" дюймов = \" << result << \" сантиметров\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 6:\n                        result = value / 2.54;\n                        cout << value << \" сантиметров = \" << result << \" дюймов\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    default:\n                        cout << \"Неверный выбор конвертации длины.\" << endl;\n                }\n                break;\n            }\n            \n            case 2: { // Масса\n                cout << \"\\n=== КОНВЕРТАЦИЯ МАССЫ ===\" << endl;\n                cout << \"1. Килограммы -> Фунты\" << endl;\n                cout << \"2. Фунты -> Килограммы\" << endl;\n                cout << \"3. Граммы -> Килограммы\" << endl;\n                cout << \"4. Килограммы -> Граммы\" << endl;\n                cout << \"5. Тонны -> Килограммы\" << endl;\n                cout << \"6. Килограммы -> Тонны\" << endl;\n                cout << \"Выберите тип конвертации (1-6): \";\n                cin >> subChoice;\n                \n                if (cin.fail()) {\n                    cin.clear();\n                    cin.ignore(numeric_limits<streamsize>::max(), '\\n');\n                    cout << \"Ошибка ввода. Пожалуйста, введите число от 1 до 6.\" << endl;\n                    break;\n                }\n                \n                switch (subChoice) {\n                    case 1:\n                        result = value * 2.20462;\n                        cout << value << \" кг = \" << result << \" фунтов\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 2:\n                        result = value / 2.20462;\n                        cout << value << \" фунтов = \" << result << \" кг\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 3:\n                        result = value / 1000.0;\n                        cout << value << \" г = \" << result << \" кг\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 4:\n                        result = value * 1000.0;\n                        cout << value << \" кг = \" << result << \" г\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 5:\n                        result = value * 1000.0;\n                        cout << value << \" т = \" << result << \" кг\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 6:\n                        result = value / 1000.0;\n                        cout << value << \" кг = \" << result << \" т\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    default:\n                        cout << \"Неверный выбор конвертации массы.\" << endl;\n                }\n                break;\n            }\n            \n            case 3: { // Температура\n                cout << \"\\n=== КОНВЕРТАЦИЯ ТЕМПЕРАТУРЫ ===\" << endl;\n                cout << \"1. Цельсий -> Фаренгейт\" << endl;\n                cout << \"2. Фаренгейт -> Цельсий\" << endl;\n                cout << \"3. Цельсий -> Кельвин\" << endl;\n                cout << \"4. Кельвин -> Цельсий\" << endl;\n                cout << \"5. Фаренгейт -> Кельвин\" << endl;\n                cout << \"6. Кельвин -> Фаренгейт\" << endl;\n                cout << \"Выберите тип конвертации (1-6): \";\n                cin >> subChoice;\n                \n                if (cin.fail()) {\n                    cin.clear();\n                    cin.ignore(numeric_limits<streamsize>::max(), '\\n');\n                    cout << \"Ошибка ввода. Пожалуйста, введите число от 1 до 6.\" << endl;\n                    break;\n                }\n                \n                switch (subChoice) {\n                    case 1:\n                        result = (value * 9.0/5.0) + 32.0;\n                        cout << value << \" C = \" << result << \" F\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 2:\n                        result = (value - 32.0) * 5.0/9.0;\n                        cout << value << \" F = \" << result << \" C\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 3:\n                        result = value + 273.15;\n                        cout << value << \" C = \" << result << \" K\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 4:\n                        result = value - 273.15;\n                        cout << value << \" K = \" << result << \" C\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 5:\n                        result = (value - 32.0) * 5.0/9.0 + 273.15;\n                        cout << value << \" F = \" << result << \" K\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 6:\n                        result = (value - 273.15) * 9.0/5.0 + 32.0;\n                        cout << value << \" K = \" << result << \" F\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    default:\n                        cout << \"Неверный выбор конвертации температуры.\" << endl;\n                }\n                break;\n            }\n            \n            case 4: { // Объем\n                cout << \"\\n=== КОНВЕРТАЦИЯ ОБЪЕМА ===\" << endl;\n                cout << \"1. Литр -> Галлон (US)\" << endl;\n                cout << \"2. Галлон (US) -> Литр\" << endl;\n                cout << \"3. Кубические метры -> Литр\" << endl;\n                cout << \"4. Литр -> Кубические метры\" << endl;\n                cout << \"5. Миллилитр -> Литр\" << endl;\n                cout << \"6. Литр -> Миллилитр\" << endl;\n                cout << \"Выберите тип конвертации (1-6): \";\n                cin >> subChoice;\n                \n                if (cin.fail()) {\n                    cin.clear();\n                    cin.ignore(numeric_limits<streamsize>::max(), '\\n');\n                    cout << \"Ошибка ввода. Пожалуйста, введите число от 1 до 6.\" << endl;\n                    break;\n                }\n                \n                switch (subChoice) {\n                    case 1:\n                        result = value * 0.264172;\n                        cout << value << \" л = \" << result << \" галлонов (US)\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 2:\n                        result = value / 0.264172;\n                        cout << value << \" галлонов (US) = \" << result << \" л\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 3:\n                        result = value * 1000.0;\n                        cout << value << \" куб. м = \" << result << \" л\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 4:\n                        result = value / 1000.0;\n                        cout << value << \" л = \" << result << \" куб. м\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 5:\n                        result = value / 1000.0;\n                        cout << value << \" мл = \" << result << \" л\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    case 6:\n                        result = value * 1000.0;\n                        cout << value << \" л = \" << result << \" мл\" << endl;\n                        break;\n                    default:\n                        cout << \"Неверный выбор конвертации объема.\" << endl;\n                }\n                break;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        // Предложение продолжить\n        char continueChoice;\n        cout << \"\\nХотите выполнить еще одну конвертацию? (y/n): \";\n        cin >> continueChoice;\n        \n        continueProgram = (continueChoice == 'y' || continueChoice == 'Y');\n    }\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <algorithm>\n#include <functional>\n#include <type_traits>\n#include <utility>\n\nint main() {\n    std::vector<int> numbers = {1, 2, 3, 4, 5};\n    \n    // Лямбда с захватом по ссылке и mutable\n    int counter = 0;\n    auto processor = [&counter](int& value) mutable {\n        value *= 2;\n        counter++;\n        return value;\n    };\n    \n    std::cout << \"Исходный вектор: \";\n    for (int n : numbers) std::cout << n << \" \";\n    std::cout << \"\\nСчетчик до обработки: \" << counter << std::endl;\n    \n    // Применение лямбды\n    for (int& n : numbers) {\n        processor(n);\n    }\n    \n    std::cout << \"После обработки: \";\n    for (int n : numbers) std::cout << n << \" \";\n    std::cout << \"\\nСчетчик после обработки: \" << counter << std::endl;\n    \n    // Лямбда, возвращающая ссылку на захваченную переменную\n    int storage = 0;\n    auto getStorageRef = [&storage]() -> int& {\n        return storage;\n    };\n    \n    int& storedRef = getStorageRef();\n    storedRef = 42;\n    std::cout << \"\\nstorage через ссылку: \" << storage << std::endl;\n    \n    // Лямбда с универсальной ссылкой в параметре\n    auto universalProcessor = [](auto&& param) {\n        using T = decltype(param);\n        if constexpr (std::is_lvalue_reference<T>::value) {\n            std::cout << \"L-value reference\" << std::endl;\n        } else {\n            std::cout << \"R-value reference\" << std::endl;\n        }\n        return std::forward<decltype(param)>(param);\n    };\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nУниверсальные ссылки:\\n\";\n    int x = 5;\n    universalProcessor(x); // L-value\n    universalProcessor(10); // R-value\n    universalProcessor(std::move(x)); // R-value\n    \n    // Лямбда с захватом по ссылке всех переменных\n    int a = 1, b = 2, c = 3;\n    auto megaProcessor = [&]() {\n        a++;\n        b++;\n        c++;\n        std::cout << \"\\nВнутри megaProcessor: a=\" << a << \" b=\" << b << \" c=\" << c << std::endl;\n    };\n    \n    megaProcessor();\n    std::cout << \"После megaProcessor: a=\" << a << \" b=\" << b << \" c=\" << c << std::endl;\n    \n    // Лямбда в контейнере\n    std::vector<std::function<void(int&)>> processors;\n    \n    // Добавляем разные обработчики\n    processors.push_back([](int& n) { n += 1; });\n    processors.push_back([](int& n) { n *= 2; });\n    processors.push_back([](int& n) { n = -n; });\n    \n    int testNum = 5;\n    std::cout << \"\\nОбработка testNum = \" << testNum << \":\" << std::endl;\n    \n    for (auto& proc : processors) {\n        proc(testNum);\n        std::cout << \"После обработки: \" << testNum << std::endl;\n    }\n    \n    // Лямбда с захватом по ссылке объекта\n    std::vector<int> data = {10, 20, 30};\n    auto dataProcessor = [&data]() {\n        for (int& elem : data) {\n            elem += 100;\n        }\n    };\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nДо dataProcessor: \";\n    for (int n : data) std::cout << n << \" \";\n    std::cout << std::endl;\n    \n    dataProcessor();\n    \n    std::cout << \"После dataProcessor: \";\n    for (int n : data) std::cout << n << \" \";\n    std::cout << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cstring>\n\nclass String {\n    char* data;\n    size_t length;\n    void copy(const char* str) {\n        length = std::strlen(str);\n        data = new char[length + 1];\n        std::strcpy(data, str);\n    }\npublic:\n    String(const char* str = \"\") { copy(str); }\n    String(const String& other) { copy(other.data); }\n    ~String() { delete[] data; }\n    String& operator=(const String& other) {\n        if(this != &other) {\n            delete[] data;\n            copy(other.data);\n        }\n        return *this;\n    }\n    String operator+(const String& other) const {\n        char* newData = new char[length + other.length + 1];\n        std::strcpy(newData, data);\n        std::strcat(newData, other.data);\n        String result(newData);\n        delete[] newData;\n        return result;\n    }\n    String& operator+=(const String& other) {\n        char* newData = new char[length + other.length + 1];\n        std::strcpy(newData, data);\n        std::strcat(newData, other.data);\n        delete[] data;\n        data = newData;\n        length += other.length;\n        return *this;\n    }\n    bool operator==(const String& other) const { return std::strcmp(data, other.data) == 0; }\n    bool operator!=(const String& other) const { return !(*this == other); }\n    bool operator<(const String& other) const { return std::strcmp(data, other.data) < 0; }\n    bool operator>(const String& other) const { return other < *this; }\n    char& operator[](size_t index) { return data[index]; }\n    const char& operator[](size_t index) const { return data[index]; }\n    friend std::ostream& operator<<(std::ostream& os, const String& str) { return os << str.data; }\n    friend std::istream& operator>>(std::istream& is, String& str) {\n        char buffer[256];\n        is >> buffer;\n        str = String(buffer);\n        return is;\n    }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    String s1, s2;\n    std::cout << \"Enter two strings: \";\n    std::cin >> s1 >> s2;\n    std::cout << \"s1 = \" << s1 << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"s2 = \" << s2 << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"s1 + s2 = \" << (s1 + s2) << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"s1 == s2: \" << (s1 == s2) << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"s1[0] = \" << s1[0] << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <string>\n#include <vector>\n#include <algorithm>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint editDistance(const string& str1, const string& str2) {\n    int m = str1.length();\n    int n = str2.length();\n    \n    vector<vector<int>> dp(m + 1, vector<int>(n + 1, 0));\n    \n    for(int i = 0; i <= m; i++) dp[i][0] = i;\n    for(int j = 0; j <= n; j++) dp[0][j] = j;\n    \n    for(int i = 1; i <= m; i++) {\n        for(int j = 1; j <= n; j++) {\n            if(str1[i-1] == str2[j-1]) {\n                dp[i][j] = dp[i-1][j-1];\n            } else {\n                dp[i][j] = 1 + min({dp[i-1][j],   // удаление\n                                    dp[i][j-1],   // вставка\n                                    dp[i-1][j-1]}); // замена\n            }\n        }\n    }\n    \n    return dp[m][n];\n}\n\nint main() {\n    string str1 = \"kitten\";\n    string str2 = \"sitting\";\n    \n    cout << \"Расстояние редактирования: \" << editDistance(str1, str2) << endl;\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nclass Pixel {\nprivate:\n    unsigned char r, g, b;\npublic:\n    Pixel(unsigned char red, unsigned char green, unsigned char blue) : r(red), g(green), b(blue) {}\n    friend Pixel blend(const Pixel& p1, const Pixel& p2, float ratio);\n    void display() const {\n        std::cout << \"RGB(\" << (int)r << \",\" << (int)g << \",\" << (int)b << \")\" << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nPixel blend(const Pixel& p1, const Pixel& p2, float ratio) {\n    unsigned char r = p1.r * ratio + p2.r * (1 - ratio);\n    unsigned char g = p1.g * ratio + p2.g * (1 - ratio);\n    unsigned char b = p1.b * ratio + p2.b * (1 - ratio);\n    return Pixel(r, g, b);\n}\n\nint main() {\n    Pixel red(255, 0, 0);\n    Pixel blue(0, 0, 255);\n    std::cout << \"Пиксель 1: \"; red.display();\n    std::cout << \"Пиксель 2: \"; blue.display();\n    Pixel blended = blend(red, blue, 0.5f);\n    std::cout << \"Смешанный (50%): \"; blended.display();\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <tuple>\n#include <string>\n#include <utility>\n\nint main() {\n    std::tuple<std::string, int, double> t1 = std::make_tuple(\"Test\", 42, 3.14);\n    std::tuple<std::string, int, double> t2 = std::move(t1);\n    \n    std::cout << \"t1 after move:\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"  get<0>: '\" << std::get<0>(t1) << \"'\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"  get<1>: \" << std::get<1>(t1) << std::endl;\n    \n    std::cout << \"\\nt2:\" << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"  get<0>: \" << std::get<0>(t2) << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"  get<1>: \" << std::get<1>(t2) << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"  get<2>: \" << std::get<2>(t2) << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\n#include <numbers>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n double radius, height, turns;\n cout << \"Введите радиус, высоту и количество витков:\";\n cin >> radius >> height >> turns;\n double area = 2.0 * 3.1415926535 * radius * height * sqrt(1.0 + turns*turns);\n cout << \"Площадь поверхности геликоида: \" << area << endl;\n return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n int source = 42;\n int destination;\n destination = source;\n cout << \"source = \" << source << \", destination (после присваивания) = \" << destination << endl;\n return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <cmath>\n#include <iomanip>\n\ndouble newtonMethod(double (*f)(double), double (*df)(double), double x0, double eps = 1e-10, int max_iter = 1000) {\n    double x = x0;\n    for(int i = 0; i < max_iter; i++) {\n        double fx = f(x);\n        double dfx = df(x);\n        \n        if(dfx == 0) {\n            std::cerr << \"Производная равна нулю\" << std::endl;\n            return x;\n        }\n        \n        double x_new = x - fx / dfx;\n        \n        if(std::abs(x_new - x) < eps) {\n            std::cout << \"Сходимость достигнута за \" << i+1 << \" итераций\" << std::endl;\n            return x_new;\n        }\n        \n        x = x_new;\n    }\n    \n    std::cerr << \"Максимальное число итераций достигнуто\" << std::endl;\n    return x;\n}\n\ndouble f(double x) {\n    return x*x - 4;\n}\n\ndouble df(double x) {\n    return 2*x;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    std::cout << std::fixed << std::setprecision(10);\n    double root = newtonMethod(f, df, 3.0);\n    std::cout << \"Корень: \" << root << std::endl;\n    std::cout << \"Проверка: f(\" << root << \") = \" << f(root) << std::endl;\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nclass Matrix {\nprivate:\n    int a, b, c, d; // элементы матрицы [a b; c d]\npublic:\n    Matrix(int aVal, int bVal, int cVal, int dVal) : a(aVal), b(bVal), c(cVal), d(dVal) {}\n    friend int determinant(const Matrix& m);\n    void display() const {\n        std::cout << \"[\" << a << \" \" << b << \"; \" << c << \" \" << d << \"]\" << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nint determinant(const Matrix& m) {\n    return m.a * m.d - m.b * m.c;\n}\n\nint main() {\n    Matrix mat(1, 2, 3, 4);\n    mat.display();\n    std::cout << \"Определитель: \" << determinant(mat) << std::endl;\n    return 0;\n}

#include <iostream>\nusing namespace std;\n\nint main() {\n    cout << \"C++ version: \" << __cplusplus << endl;\n    \n#if __cplusplus >= 201703L\n    cout << \"C++17 or later\" << endl;\n#elif __cplusplus >= 201402L\n    cout << \"C++14\" << endl;\n#elif __cplusplus >= 201103L\n    cout << \"C++11\" << endl;\n#else\n    cout << \"Pre-C++11\" << endl;\n#endif\n    \n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nint main() {\n int number;\n std::cout << \"Введите целое положительное число: \";\n std::cin >> number;\n \n if (number <= 0) {\n std::cout << \"Ошибка: число должно быть положительным\" << std::endl;\n return 1;\n }\n \n int sum = 0;\n for (int i = 1; i <= number / 2; i++) {\n if (number % i == 0) {\n sum += i;\n }\n }\n \n bool is_perfect = (sum == number);\n \n if (is_perfect) {\n std::cout << number << \" является совершенным числом\" << std::endl;\n } else {\n std::cout << number << \" не является совершенным числом\" << std::endl;\n }\n return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n#include <vector>\n#include <string>\n#include <functional>\n\n#define TEST_CASE(name, description) \\\n    class TestCase##name { \\\n    public: \\\n        TestCase##name() { \\\n            TestRegistry::getInstance().registerTest( \\\n                #name, description, []() { \\\n                    return runTest(); \\\n                }); \\\n        } \\\n        static bool runTest(); \\\n    }; \\\n    bool TestCase##name::runTest()\n\n#define ASSERT(condition, message) \\\n    do { \\\n        if (!(condition)) { \\\n            std::cout << \"FAIL: \" << message << \" (\" << #condition << \")\" << std::endl; \\\n            return false; \\\n        } \\\n        std::cout << \"PASS: \" << message << std::endl; \\\n    } while(0)\n\nclass TestRegistry {\n    struct TestInfo {\n        std::string name;\n        std::string description;\n        std::function<bool()> testFunc;\n    };\n    std::vector<TestInfo> tests;\n    \n    TestRegistry() = default;\n    \npublic:\n    static TestRegistry& getInstance() {\n        static TestRegistry instance;\n        return instance;\n    }\n    \n    void registerTest(const std::string& name, const std::string& desc, std::function<bool()> func) {\n        tests.push_back({name, desc, func});\n    }\n    \n    void runAllTests() {\n        std::cout << \"Running \" << tests.size() << \" tests...\" << std::endl << std::endl;\n        int passed = 0;\n        \n        for (auto& test : tests) {\n            std::cout << \"Test: \" << test.name << std::endl;\n            std::cout << \"Description: \" << test.description << std::endl;\n            \n            bool result = test.testFunc();\n            if (result) {\n                std::cout << \"RESULT: PASSED\\n\" << std::endl;\n                passed++;\n            } else {\n                std::cout << \"RESULT: FAILED\\n\" << std::endl;\n            }\n        }\n        \n        std::cout << \"\\nSummary: \" << passed << \"/\" << tests.size() << \" tests passed\" << std::endl;\n    }\n};\n\nTEST_CASE(MathTest, \"Basic math operations\") {\n    ASSERT(2 + 2 == 4, \"Addition works\");\n    ASSERT(5 * 5 == 25, \"Multiplication works\");\n    ASSERT(10 / 2 == 5, \"Division works\");\n    return true;\n}\n\nTEST_CASE(StringTest, \"String operations\") {\n    std::string s1 = \"hello\";\n    std::string s2 = \"world\";\n    ASSERT(s1.length() == 5, \"String length correct\");\n    ASSERT(s1 + \" \" + s2 == \"hello world\", \"String concatenation works\");\n    return true;\n}\n\nTEST_CASE(FailingTest, \"This test should fail\") {\n    ASSERT(1 == 2, \"This should fail\");\n    return true;\n}\n\n// Статические экземпляры для регистрации\nTestCaseMathTest mathTest;\nTestCaseStringTest stringTest;\nTestCaseFailingTest failingTest;\n\nint main() {\n    TestRegistry::getInstance().runAllTests();\n    return 0;\n}
#include <iostream>\n\nclass BankAccount {\nprivate:\n    double balance;\npublic:\n    BankAccount() : balance(0) {}\n    void deposit(double amount) {\n        if (amount > 0) {\n            balance += amount;\n            std::cout << \"Внесено: \" << amount << \". Баланс: \" << balance << std::endl;\n        }\n    }\n    bool withdraw(double amount) {\n        if (amount > 0 && balance >= amount) {\n            balance -= amount;\n            std::cout << \"Снято: \" << amount << \". Баланс: \" << balance << std::endl;\n            return true;\n        }\n        return false;\n    }\n    double getBalance() const { return balance; }\n};\n\nint main() {\n    BankAccount account;\n    account.deposit(1000);\n    account.withdraw(300);\n    account.withdraw(800);\n    return 0;\n}
